◆ 活动规则 ◆
角色试用活动「锋芒崭露」开启期间，开拓者可使用包含所选试用角色的固定队伍，无限次体验指定关卡。
体验活动关卡时，将无法调整编队中角色、角色等级及角色装备的光锥、遗器。

◆ 活动奖励 ◆
达成关卡挑战后，将可以在活动界面领取试用关卡奖励。各试用关卡奖励在活动期间仅可领取一次。
若开拓者在以往版本完成过对应角色的试用关，可以直接领取奖励。
E:
◆ Event Rules ◆
During the character trial event "Aptitude Showcase," Trailblazers can use set teams that include trial characters to repeatedly experience specific stages.
Team Lineup, character levels, and the equipped Light Cones and Relics cannot be changed while experiencing the event stage.

◆ Event Rewards ◆
Rewards for the trial stage can be obtained from the event screen after completing the stage. Each trial stage reward may only be claimed once during the event.
If Trailblazers have already completed the trials of corresponding characters in past versions, they can directly claim the rewards.

◆ 简介 ◆
● 生命花园培育出的奇美拉，竟然是奥赫玛居民的好帮手？成为这群小家伙的管理员，为有需要的人们解决更多困难吧！

◆ 活动规则 ◆
● 在「嗷呜嗷呜事务所」中，开拓者将扮演奇美拉管理员，通过派遣适合的奇美拉参与工作，根据它们的特性调整队伍结构，提升奇美拉小队在花园中的队伍排名。

◆ 加班模式 ◆
●在完成活动任务后，花园将解锁「加班模式」
●在「加班模式」中，开拓者的奇美拉队伍需要完成多轮工作。每轮工作结束后会回到编队界面，此时，上轮工作中存活奇美拉的属性会得到继承，累倒的奇美拉将无法进入下一轮。
●在所有的奇美拉【累倒】前，想办法获得更多的嗷呜饼干吧。 

◆ 常驻奖励 ◆
● 通过提升奇美拉小队的排名，即可获取奖励。
E:
◆ Introduction ◆
● Chimeras bred in the Garden of Life are actually fantastic helpers for the people in Okhema? Step up as their caretaker and tackle the challenges that come your way to assist those in need!

◆ Event Rules ◆
● In The Awooo Firm, Trailblazers will become a chimera administrator. Through assigning suitable chimeras to tasks and adjusting the team composition based on their traits, increase the chimera squad's ranking in the Garden.

◆ Overtime Mode ◆
● After completing the event mission, Overtime Mode will be unlocked at the Garden
● In Overtime Mode, Trailblazer's chimera squad will need to complete multiple rounds of work. After each round of work, you will return to the lineup interface. At this time, the previous round's surviving chimeras' stats will be carried forward, and chimeras that collapsed will not be able to enter the next round.
● Before all the chimeras "collapse from exhaustion," find a way to obtain more Awoo Cookie.

◆ Permanent Rewards ◆
● Rewards are obtained upon increasing chimera squad's ranking.

C:
◆ 简介 ◆
新的冒险已经开启——追寻黑斗篷魔王的踪迹，夺回最强球棒，登上「银河球棒侠」之巅吧！

◆ 活动规则 ◆
● 本次活动共6个战斗关卡，分为简单、中等、疯狂3重难度；每个关卡内包含3个战斗阶段。
● 开拓者需要在有限轮次内，击败3个战斗阶段、指定数量敌人，完成关卡挑战。
● 活动开启后，前置关卡达到指定积分，才可解锁后续关卡。
● 当开拓者提升「均衡等级」时，敌方强度将同步提升。
● 开拓者可以选择试用角色参与挑战。
● 我方角色消灭敌方目标时恢复的能量，在「银河球棒侠传说」活动中，为常规战斗的<unbreak>50%</unbreak>。

◆ 玩法概述 ◆
● 在关卡中消灭敌人可以获取经验，提升「队伍等级」。
● 每个关卡具有不同的「队伍加成」效果， 「队伍等级」提升时，我方角色将根据当前关卡的「队伍加成」效果，获得对应等级倍率的关卡增益。
●「队伍等级」提升时，可以随机选择一件「武器」或「配饰」；重复获取已有「武器」或「配饰」时，将提升其等级，获得更强的效果。
●「武器」能够自主行动或被我方角色触发，以对敌人造成伤害，而「配饰」为「武器」和我方角色提供各种增益效果。
●「武器」存在特定的共鸣「配饰」。获得满级「武器」及任意等级共鸣「配饰」后，可在后续升级时将其进阶为强力的「传说武器」。
● 少数特殊「武器」存在其它共鸣方式，能进阶为更特殊、更强力的「双子武器」或「至尊武器」。
● 关卡中，敌人会随波次刷新和阶段进程逐渐变强，开拓者可以通过合理搭配「武器」及「配饰」，提升武器等级，获得「传说武器」来击败敌人。

◆ 关卡玩法 ◆
● 各关卡中，存在3个阶段、若干波次敌人挑战。每个阶段将以「精英挑战」或「首领挑战」作为结束标志。
● 各波次战斗中，存在指定数量的敌人，敌人会不断刷新，直到该波次全部敌人被击败。
● 各波次战斗中，存在有限的轮次倒计时；倒计时结束时，未被消灭的敌人将会消失，无法再获取其积分和经验。
● 各阶段的精英波次战斗中，存在「通关目标」要求，需要击杀指定数量的精英敌人，才可进入到下一阶段的战斗。
● 战斗中消灭敌人数量、对首领造成的伤害越多，可获得的积分越高。通关时如有剩余轮次，则可额外获得积分。
● 各阶段战斗结束后，当前队伍等级、获得的武器、配饰等数据将自动存档，暂离后可使用存档继续挑战当前关卡。
◆ 探索银河 ◆
● 自第一关「V<unbreak>612</unbreak>星球」至第五关「D<unbreak>007</unbreak>星球」，各关卡将指定不同的初始武器；最终关「魔王巢穴」则可自行选择初始武器。
● 自第二关「C<unbreak>996</unbreak>星球」起，开拓者可在关卡内各阶段开始时进行「冒险策略」选择，获得更多关卡增益。
● 完成最终关「魔王巢穴」的3个常规阶段后，将开启「魔王挑战」阶段；开拓者可在该阶段挑战活动最终首领「黑斗篷魔王」。

◆ 浣熊金币 ◆
● 关卡内消灭敌人可获得「浣熊金币」。
●关卡内通过精英波次挑战、击败魔王爪牙后，可获得「魔王宝藏」，获得随机数量的「武器」/「配饰」和「浣熊金币」。
●结束各关卡的挑战后，可在「银河商店」中消耗浣熊金币，进行属性提升、武器强化，以及解锁强化各类玩法功能。

◆ 经典复刻 ◆
● 通关「银河球棒侠传说：魔王篇」后，可以在活动入口的蓝色街机处游玩「银河球棒侠传说：启程篇」。

◆ 常驻奖励 ◆
● 挑战关卡获取「银河声望」、提升「声望等级」，并领取对应奖励。
E:
◆ Introduction ◆
A new adventure has begun — Chase after the Black Cloak Demon King, reclaim the Ultimate Bat, and become the pinnacle of the Galactic Baseballer!

◆ Event Rules ◆
● This event is made up of 6 stages in total, with 3 levels of difficulty: Easy, Medium, and Frenzy. Each stage contains 3 combat phases.
● Trailblazers need to defeat a specified number of enemies during the 3 combat phases within a limited number of cycles to complete the challenge.
● Once the event starts, a specific score must be achieved in the prerequisite stage to unlock subsequent stages.
● When Trailblazers increase their Equilibrium Level, the enemies will increase in power accordingly.
● Trailblazers can select trial characters to participate in the challenge.
● When defeating enemy targets in "Legend of the Galactic Baseballer," the amount of Energy ally characters regenerate is only <unbreak>50%</unbreak> of what they normally would in regular battles.

◆ Gameplay Overview ◆
● Defeat enemies in the stage to gain experience and increase your Team Level.
● Each stage has a different Team Bonus effect. When the Team Level increases, ally characters will obtain level-based Stage Buff according to the current stage's Team Bonus effect.
● When your Team Level increases, you can randomly choose a "Weapon" or "Accessory." When you get a Weapon or Accessory that you already possess, you can increase their level to obtain stronger effects.
● Weapons can autonomously take action or be triggered by ally characters to deal DMG to enemies. Meanwhile, Accessories can provide various buffs for Weapons and ally characters.
● Weapons have a specific resonant Accessory. When you have a max level Weapon and its resonant Accessory at any level, you can ascend them to a powerful Legendary Weapon when leveling later.
● A few special Weapons have alternative resonance methods, allowing them to evolve into even more unique and powerful Twin Weapons or Esteemed Weapons.
● Enemies in the stages will grow stronger with each wave and phase. Trailblazers can defeat these increasingly powerful enemies by strategically combining Weapons and Accessories and increasing weapon levels to obtain Legendary weapons.

◆ Stage Gameplay ◆
● In each stage, there are multiple waves of enemies spanning 3 phases. Each phase concludes with either an Elite or Boss Challenge.
● Each wave features a specific number of enemies, which will continuously respawn until all enemies in that wave are defeated.
● In each wave of battle, there is a countdown of finite Cycles. When the countdown reaches zero, any remaining enemies will disappear, and you won't be able to earn points or experience from them anymore.
● In the Elite wave of each phase, there are specific Clearance Objectives that require defeating a designated number of elite enemies before you can progress to the next phase of combat.
● The more enemies defeated and the higher damage dealt to the final boss, the higher score you can earn. If there are any Cycles remaining when you clear the stage, you can earn extra points.
● After the completion of each phase of battle, your current Team Level, acquired Weapons, Accessories, and other data will be automatically saved. You can use the saved data to resume your challenge at the current stage after temporarily exiting.
◆ Cosmic Voyage ◆
● From the first stage, Planet V<unbreak>612</unbreak>, to the fifth stage, Planet D<unbreak>007</unbreak>, each stage will have a designated starting weapon. In the final stage, Demon King's Den, Trailblazers can freely choose their starting weapon.
● Starting from the second stage, Planet C<unbreak>996</unbreak>, Trailblazers can select an Adventure Strategy at the beginning of each phase within a stage to gain additional Stage Buffs.
● After completing the three standard phases of the final stage, Demon King's Den, the Demon King Challenge phase will be unlocked, where players can face the event's ultimate boss, the Black Cloak Demon King.

◆ Raccoon Gold Coin ◆
● Defeat enemies in the stages to earn Raccoon Gold Coins.
● After clearing the Elite waves and defeating Demon King's Minions during the stage, Demon King's Treasures can be dropped, providing random amounts of Weapons/Accessories and Raccoon Gold Coins.
● After completing each level's challenges, you can spend Raccoon Gold Coins at the Cosmic Store to enhance your stats, strengthen your weapons, and unlock or enhance various gameplay features.

◆ Classic Revival ◆
● After clearing Legend of the Galactic Baseballer: Demon King, players can access Legend of the Galactic Baseballer: Departure at the blue arcade machine in the event entrance.

◆ Regular Rewards ◆
● Complete stage challenges to earn Cosmic Reputation and increase your Reputation Rank to claim corresponding rewards.

E: Spirithief Capture (II)

C:
在入侵现场优雅踱步的女人如同一道谜题，她嘲弄着受害者的同时又残酷地将加害者消灭殆尽。
通讯里神秘的协助者透露出两人似乎怀抱着某种目的。
她们很清楚这个故事的主角并不是自己。
那么，准备已经就绪。是时候醒过来了，即将踏上旅途的你。
E:
The woman sauntering elegantly across the invasion site is a mystery. She mocks the victims, while also ruthlessly eliminating their oppressors.
Over their comms, the mysterious helper reveals that the two seem to have some sort of agenda.
They are fully aware that they are not the protagonists of this story.
Now that everything is ready, it is time to awaken and embark on your journey.

C: 对于星期日，那或许是他此行最为郑重的一场道别，但在梦境之中，仍有事物需要他做个了结——他自身。
E: As for Sunday, that was perhaps the most solemn farewell he undertook before this journey. However, there's still something else in the Dreamscape that needs a resolution — himself.

C: 你和防卫科一起调查空间站定格诡影的事，发现这一切竟是呜呜伯闹出来的，它们托你找回科员荣仓终被「军团」怪物抢走的遗物。\n尽管照料呜呜伯的荣仓终已经离世，但他依然活在呜呜伯们的心中……
E: Collaborating with the Security Department, you investigated the space station's Stop-Motion Shadow event and discovered that the Wubbaboos were responsible. They asked you to recover Eikura Shuu's relics, which were taken away by the Legion monsters.\nAlthough Eikura Shuu has passed away, his memory lives on in the souls of the Wubbaboos...

C: 丹鼎司丹士长丹枢…不，「药王秘传魁首」丹枢逃走了。不知道你是如何看待这位「朋友」的？\n题外话，「丹鼎司丹士长丹枢」这头衔真的太拗口了，跟绕口令似的。
E: Dan Shu, the chief alchemist of the Alchemy Commission... or rather, the Master Primus of the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus, has fled. What are your thoughts on this "friend" of yours?\nBy the way, Dan Shu's title "Chief Alchemist of the Alchemy Commission" is quite a mouthful.

C: 为了重振金人巷，商会希望充分利用码头物流，与金人巷的商户们建立紧密的合作。\n商会派你来劝说「寿考堂」与商会建立合作关系。但「寿考堂」的老板小天此时却碰上了一些麻烦……
E: In order to revitalize Aurum Alley, the merchant guild aims to fully utilize the docks' logistics capacity and establish close collaborations with the stores in the alley.\nThe guild has sent you to persuade Longevity Hall to establish a partnership with the guild. However, its proprietress Little Tian has encountered some troubles at the moment...

C: 折纸大学的校庆正在进行中，其中最为盛大的活动——「音乐派对」即将开启。经由知更鸟引荐，你成为了舞台演出乐队的经理，而乐队的核心位置将由乱破担任。召集你的乐队成员，共同享受这场音乐庆典吧！
E: Paperfold University's anniversary is happening in full swing and the music party — the biggest event in this festival — is about to begin. As recommended by Robin, you have become the manager of the stage performance band, with Rappa at the band's center position. Gather your bandmates and immerse yourselves in this musical celebration together!

C: 叶子店长爱上了汽水，但谁说喝汽水就要花钱？汽水先生的汽水被叶子店长直接抢走了。\n「我没抢，只是没给钱。」
E: Shopkeeper Leaf loves soda, but who said drinking soda has to cost money? Shopkeeper Leaf steals Mr. Soda's soda.\n"I didn't steal it, I just didn't pay for it."

C: 石头老板找到被囚禁的哈努兄弟，强迫他用火炮轰开大门。但面对威胁，哈努兄弟毫不屈服，他发出了一个无比帅气的*哼*。
E: Boss Stone finds the imprisoned Brother Hanu and forces him to blow open the gate with his launcher. But in the face of Stone's threats, Brother Hanu does not give in. He utters forth an unbelievably handsome *hmph*.

C: 墙壁越来越高，直到挡住所有风沙，也遮住了所有阳光…石头老板将这里彻底「保护」起来，美梦小镇变回了噩梦小镇。
E: The wall gets higher and higher, until it blocks out all the winds, sands, and even sunshine... Boss Stone places this place under total "protection," turning Dreamville back into Nightmareville.

C: 小镇一时间人心惶惶，大家都觉得战争要开始了。\n「现在是不是得多屯点石头？」
E: Everyone in the town is terrified and believes that a war is about to break out.\n"Is it better for us to stack up the stones now?"

C: 罗盘号收到了钟表小子的消息，他们庆幸钟表小子现在一切平安，答应了他的请求，将广告发到了其他小镇。\n「小镇宾馆了解一下，小镇宾馆了解一下。」
E: Clockie's letter successfully reached The Compass. The crew members were delighted to know that Clockie was safe. They agreed to help him by distributing the promotional flyers in other towns.\n"Visit the Town Hotel! Visit the Town Hotel!"

C: 钟表小子在宾馆里放了好多石头老板的气球，告诉大家——这就是吃人的怪物。\n「滴答，反倒是给咱们做广告了！」
E: Clockie placed a lot of balloons in Boss Stone's shape within the hotel, telling everyone that Boss Stone was the man-eating monster.\n"Tick-tock, thanks for the free advertisement!"

C: 钟表小子书写了许多美梦小镇的故事，他将过去变成充满趣味的影片，大受欢迎，甚至传到了石头老板的手中……\n「哼，可恶的钟表小子，正经钟表哪会写日记啊？」
E: Clockie wrote many stories about Dreamville and made them into movies, which took the town by storm. Even Boss Stone got wind of his stories...\n"Hmph, that wretched Clockie. Does a proper clock even write diaries?"

C: 钟表小子不能接受这样的美梦小镇，他要让大家清醒过来！\n「滴答，大家的钟表都不转了，快上弦呀！」
E: Finding the situation in Dreamville worrisome, Clockie pledged to bring everyone to their senses!\n"Tick-tock, everyone's clock has stopped turning. Hurry up and wind them up!"

C: 钟表小子跟木头老爷表达了自己的想法，两人再次成为了伙伴，一起让美梦小镇成为乐园！
E: After Clockie shared his views with Old Man Wood, the two became partners once again. They would strive to turn Dreamville into a paradise together!

C: 罗盘号来到了气候恶劣的暴风雪小镇，大风把帽子师傅的帽子都吹飞了。为了找回这顶帽子，钟表小子一个人跑入了风暴中……
E: The Compass arrives at a small town ravaged by a vicious snowstorm where a strong gust blows away Master Hat's hat. Clockie sets off into the blizzard alone to try and retrieve the hat...

C: 石头老板的兵力远胜于哈努兄弟带领的镇民，想要打败石头老板，就必须整个噩梦小镇的居民都团结起来。
E: Boss Stone is far more powerful than the townsfolk force that Brother Hanu leads. If they want any hope of defeating Boss Stone, the entire population of Nightmareville is going to have to team up.

C: 哈努兄弟的阵营士气低迷，在钟表小子的建议下，野花姐姐每天都用歌舞取悦这些镇民。
E: Morale over in the Brother Hanu camp is low. On Clockie's suggestion, Sister Wildflower entertains the townsfolk daily with song and dance.

C: 在哈努兄弟的领地，镇民们都能受到他的照顾和保护，船员们相信哈努兄弟一定能为噩梦小镇带来希望。
E: While on Brother Hanu's turf, all the townsfolk are cared for and protected by him and the crew believes that Brother Hanu will definitely bring some hope to Nightmareville.

C: 钟表小子在烫金街找到了叶子店长和汽水先生，但他们认为现在的美梦小镇才能赚大钱，让钟表小子安心就好……
E: Clockie visited Shopkeeper Leaf and Mr. Soda on the Gilded Street, but they reassured Clockie that everything would be fine seeing how prosperous Dreamville was at the moment...

C: 美梦小镇里有人质疑审判，钟表小子问：「滴答，木头老爷，该怎么办呢？」
E: Someone was questioning the rulings made in Dreamville. "Tick-tock, what should we do, Old Man Wood?" Clockie asks.

C: 经过一番苦战，船员和镇民们取得了胜利，打跑了可恶的石头老板。
E: After an arduous battle, the crew and townsfolk emerge victorious, fending off the vile Boss Stone.

C: 滴答，现在的美梦小镇还是太落后了，这样下去可不行……
E: Tick-tock. The present Dreamville is too backward, this won't do...

C: 他相信自己能为大家带来更多的幸福，能体会到更多的幸福，并让这种幸福在美梦小镇永续。
E: He believes he can deliver to everyone happiness — bringing them more happiness, having them experience more happiness, and making that happiness everlasting in Dreamville.

C: 【黑潮热】属于持续伤害类负面状态，持续伤害来源于目标受到伤害的一部分，叠加时刷新【黑潮热】的持续回合。【黑潮热】状态下，目标每回合开始时受到风化、灼烧、触电、裂伤持续伤害。敌方的【黑潮热】状态在【在毁灭中狂欢】状态结束时立即解除，我方的【黑潮热】状态在自身生命值回复到上限时立即解除，免受该持续伤害。
E: "Black Tide Fever" is a type of DoT debuff. The DoT originates from a part of the DMG that the target takes. When stacked, it resets the duration of "Black Tide Fever." In "Black Tide Fever," targets receive Wind Shear, Burn, Shock, and Bleed DoT at the start of their turns. The enemies' "Black Tide Fever" is immediately dispelled when the "Revel in Destruction" state ends. Allies' "Black Tide Fever" is immediately dispelled when their HP is fully restored. The targets will not take the DoT damage after this state is dispelled. Units will not take the DoT damage after this state is dispelled.

C:
◆ 简介 ◆
● 黑塔、阮•梅、螺丝咕姆和斯蒂芬，联手推出了模拟宇宙的第一次大更新！
他们不仅更新了全新的祝福、奇物与随机事件，甚至还有全新的「觐见之旅」地图，神秘的「觐见之骰」与「觐见装置」！

 ◆ 玩法目标 ◆
● 在「模拟宇宙：寰宇蝗灾」玩法中，需要进行「行者之道」挑战，提升「觐见行迹」点数，最终解锁全部主线章节。

◆ 玩法内容 ◆
● 「觐见之旅」：在由各类型区域组成的「地图」上移动，规划路径，最终抵达终点。
● 「觐见之骰」：使用「觐见装置」，可以投出「觐见之骰」。各个命途的「觐见之骰」效果各异，合理利用「觐见之骰」的骰面效果，可以获得更多的祝福和奇物。
● 「觐见行迹」：「觐见行迹」点数提升后可以获得各种特殊增益效果（注意：增益效果仅在「模拟宇宙：寰宇蝗灾」中生效）。
● 「虫群•真蛰虫」：在第三位面最深处，可挑战全新首领「虫群•真蛰虫」。
● 此外，本次「模拟宇宙•寰宇蝗灾」更新了大量的全新祝福、奇物及随机事件，同时更新了全新的命途回响。

◆ 玩法奖励 ◆
● 收集「寰宇蝗灾」的章节，可获得章节收集奖励。
● 完成「行者之道」，可获得对应奖励。
● 首次通关各个难度，可获得首通奖励。

◆ 注意事项◆
● 「模拟宇宙•寰宇蝗灾」共拥有5个难度，其中难度V关卡具有较高难度与挑战性，开拓者可根据自身情况选择合适的难度进行挑战。
● 收集「寰宇蝗灾」全部章节并完成冒险任务「寰宇蝗灾：终局」后，将解锁模拟宇宙内全新「繁育」命途。
E:
◆ Introduction ◆
● Herta, Ruan Mei, Screwllum, and Stephen have joined forces to bring about the Simulated Universe's first major update!
They're not only bringing in brand-new Blessings, Curios, and random Occurrences, but also the new Audience Journey map and the mysterious Audience Dice and Communing Device!

◆ Gameplay Goal ◆
In Simulated Universe: Swarm Disaster game mode, Trailblazers need to conduct Trail of Pathstrider challenges, raise Communing Trail points, and ultimately unlock all main story chapters.

◆ Gameplay Content ◆
● Audience Journey: Travel and plot your route across a "map" formed of various domains to arrive at your destination.
● Audience Dice: Use the Communing Device to toss out Audience Dice. Each Path's Audience Die offers varied effects. Using these effects optimally will allow you to gain more Blessings and Curios.
● Communing Trail: Increasing your Communing Trail points can let you unlock various special buffs (Note: The buffs are only active in Simulated Universe: Swarm Disaster).
● Swarm: True Sting — In the depths of the third plane, you can challenge the new boss Swarm: True Sting.
● Additionally, Simulated Universe: Swarm Disaster has been updated with a huge number of new Blessings, Curios, and random Occurrences, while also welcoming brand-new Path Resonances.

◆ Gameplay Rewards ◆
● Collect all the Swarm Disaster chapters to earn chapter collection rewards.
● Complete Trail of Pathstrider to get the corresponding rewards.
● Clearing each difficulty for the first time will earn you first-time completion rewards.

◆ Attention ◆
● Simulated Universe: Swarm Disaster has 5 difficulties in total, with Difficulty V offering high-level obstacles and challenges. Trailblazers can challenge these difficulties based on their preferences.
● Collect all chapters of Swarm Disaster and complete the Adventure Mission Swarm Disaster: The End to unlock the all-new Path of Propagation in Simulated Universe.

"The train's data bank show traces of an update, but the results weren't saved." "So... which entry were you having trouble with?" He grasped his pen tighter as he looked at the bloody scene drawn in the notebook from memory. "I see. It was the one about you..."

C: 悬锋诸王通鉴•卷之一
E: Kings of Kremnos: Volume One

C: \n风雪无法浇灭所有的温暖，最后的火种自地底升腾而起。
E: \nThe blizzard can't put out all warmth. The final kindling rises from below the earth.

C: \n这里是信仰与痛觉交织的银河黄金时代，他只留下了日笃疯癫的纯真。
E: \nHere is the golden age of the Cosmos where faith and pain intertwine. The only thing he left behind was a pure innocence that became madder by the day.

C: \n消除一个生命的痛苦，平息一种酸辛，帮助一只昏厥的鸟儿回到巢中。
E: \nEasing the suffering of a life, soothing a kind of mordancy, helping a fainted bird return to its nest.

C: 能在列车的留声机上播放的碟片，是偶然所得，亦是他人馈赠。音律飞旋时，那些笑容、擦肩、触碰，还有战斗时激荡的心绪，都一一涌上心头。或许这就是时代飞速发展向前，却依然有人在收集碟片的原因。\n当前碟片中刻录着《公民哈努努》。
E: A record that can be played on the Express' phonograph. It might be a chance acquisition or a gift from someone else. All sorts of memories surge up when the music plays — the smiles, encounters, touches, and the excitement of battle. Maybe that is why people still collect records even as society rapidly advances.\nThe current record contains the track "Citizen Hanunue."

C: 能在列车的留声机上播放的碟片，是偶然所得，亦是他人馈赠。音律飞旋时，那些笑容、擦肩、触碰，还有战斗时激荡的心绪，都一一涌上心头。或许这就是时代飞速发展向前，却依然有人在收集碟片的原因。\n当前碟片中刻录着《矩阵》。
E: A record that can be played on the Express' phonograph. It might be a chance acquisition or a gift from someone else. All sorts of memories surge up when the music plays — the smiles, encounters, touches, and the excitement of battle. Maybe that is why people still collect records even as society rapidly advances.\nThe current record contains the track "Matrix."

C: 《空虚荒芜是那大海》
E: "Oed' und leer das Meer"

C: 悬锋城首屈一指的参谋，每句话都蕴含着深刻的哲理，和奥赫玛城中的狮口截然不同。\n\n「不过这只是个模型，你可以自行为它配音。」
E: The most eminent advisor in all of Castrum Kremnos. Every word it utters is steeped in profound philosophy, a far cry from the lion's maw in Okhema.\n\n"This is just a model, though. You can provide your own voice for it."

C: 记述粉霞天女于大地四处旅行的冒险类书籍…理论上应该如此。可惜这石板只是个模型，根本没有可阅读的内容。\n\n「我翻来翻去，总算看出两个字：待续。」
E: This should be an adventure book about the Rosy Celestial Maiden's travels across the earth... in theory. Unfortunately, this slate is just a model and has no readable content.\n\n"After turning it over and over, I finally managed to make out a single phrase: To be continued."

C: 拼色靠枕（蓝）
E: Mixed-Color Cushion (Blue)

C: 此为受邀请者的证明，能够开启智识殿堂的门扉。 钥匙就在手中，但寻到它能开启的大门却比得到钥匙更为艰辛。穿越门扉之人会意识到，一经踏入将再也没有回头的可能。 「智识不能告诉你宇宙的答案，但智识能让你明白如何提问。」
E: This is the proof of invitation to the halls of the Nous Temple. Finding the door of which this key opens is a far more arduous task than obtaining the key itself. Those who pass through the doors will immediately realize the impossibility of returning to this side. "The Erudition does not have answers to the universe, but it will teach you how to ask the right questions."

C: 它行经万军人丛间曲折的缝隙，穿透坚盔上最脆弱的一点，最终驻足在不可一世暴君的颅骨中心，发出一声好似低语的叹息。它出现在那儿，如同致命的巧合。它出现在那儿，如同每个人都要抵达终点。\n\n「有时候，弹孔先于弹道存在。」
E: It traversed the winding paths amidst legions of soldiers, pierced through the weakest point of the stoutest helmets, and finally came to rest at the center of the skull of the invincible tyrant, emitting a whisper-like sigh. Its arrival came like a fatal coincidence. Its arrival was akin to an endpoint that all were fated to meet.\n\n"Sometimes, the bullet hole precedes the trajectory."

C: 多谋善虑、初具兽形的强力岁阳。 显形时「火焰」大小，可以辨别岁阳个体强弱。大岁阳融聚后渐渐成形，不死不灭，危害程度可称之为灾害。 「水淹火灼，山崩雷劈…」
E: An intelligent and powerful heliobus that has started to take the form of a beast. The size of a heliobus's flame when it materializes indicates its strength. A large heliobus, having homogenized its numerous lesser peers, will gradually have a stable shape. These immortal beings can become so dangerous that they are considered calamities. "Floods, fires, landslides, and thunderstorms..."

C: 在数据传输技术如此完善的今天，依旧会有制作人选择用卡带作为游戏的载体，就像作家享受笔尖划过纸张的触感。
E: Even with today's advanced data transfer technology, some developers still prefer cartridges as their game medium, just like writers savoring the sensation of pen on paper.

C: 用于连结矿车车轮的部件。\n\n「一根坚固的轴承连接着两个矿车车轮。」
E: A part used for connecting mine cart wheels.\n\n"A sturdy axle connects two mine cart wheels."

C: 记录了空间站内奇景秘闻之录像带。制作者为了防范他人窥探隐秘，在录像带中植入了非凡的防卫机制。\n\n「不会有援军抵达，如果可以，请按照预定的航线尽快返回，你听见了吗？断断续续的宇宙无线电重复地叫着一个名字。没有回答。」
E: A videotape that recorded the intricate secrets of the space station. Its maker went the extra mile in making it secure by installing a most extraordinary security mechanism.\n\n"There are no reinforcements. If you can, please come back following the route we agreed on in advance. Do you copy? The intermittent sound from the cosmic radio is calling a name repeatedly. There is no reply."

C: 利用特殊显影法破译的藏宝图，揭示了空间站内的隐秘坐标。\n\n「听说那恶棍曾在空间站留下不少私房宝贝，想必都藏在这里。」
E: A treasure map decoded with a Special Autoradiograph, revealing hidden coordinates within the space station.\n\n"I heard that scoundrel left behind some good stuff in the space station. This must be where the treasure is."

C: 神策府的机密文件，记录着永仁加入云骑的完整经历。\n\n「代号：贰柒壹肆玖。」
E: Confidential documents from the Seat of Divine Foresight. It records the entire process of Yongren joining the Cloud Knights.\n\n"Codename: 27-149"

C: 装着帝垣琼玉牌的垃圾袋。帝垣琼玉牌有着不同的稀有度，可以从垃圾袋的颜色上看出来。\n\n「适度娱乐，理性消费。」
E: A trash bag filled with celestial jade tiles. Celestial jade tiles possess differing levels of rarity, and the sorting can be seen from the colors of the trash bags.\n\n"Enjoy responsibly, spend wisely."

C: 当你读到这段文字时，请你考虑一下这个建议：给你的仇敌发一条消息，告诉他们——你原谅他们。\n\n「我们的生命太过短暂，没有那么多时间可供憎恨。」
E: As you read this message, please consider the following advice: Send a message to your nemesis and tell them that you have forgiven them.\n\n"Our lives are too short to be wasted on feuds."

C: 魔方秘社新推出的一项游戏付费订阅服务。按照「智囊」设计，玩家可以通过游玩「枘凿六合•Remake」获得不同阶段的奖励。\n\n「看好了，这就是沉没成本。」
E: A premium gaming subscription service newly released by the Hex Club. Designed by Think-Tank, players can challenge "Hexanexus: Remake" and obtain rewards from various tiers.\n\n"Listen up. This is what sunk cost looks like."

C: 记载了预言的卷册。仔细观察才能发现，卷面是由金丝织就的。\n\n「此中包含着一则预言，它只向开卷者示现。」
E: A tome containing prophecies. Upon closer inspection, one will discover that the scroll is woven from golden threads.\n\n"There is a prophecy within that will only be revealed to the one who opens the scroll."

C: 神秘仪式上必备的献祭用品，闻起来似乎有点古怪的酸味。
E: An essential sacrificial item for a mysterious ritual. It smells a little sour.

C: 来自「诡计的羁客」——赛飞儿的馈赠，象征着她俏皮却真挚的祝福与渴望。
E: From the "Trickery's Traveler": Cipher's bestowal, symbolizing her playful yet sincere blessings and desires.

C: 不知从何处坠落的残叶。 它不属于任何植物，而是某种更抽象之物的化身。 古老的光如同树液浸润叶脉，昭示着虽已消逝，却依旧残存的力量。 「一叶一世界。」
E: A leaf of unknown origin. It doesn't belong to any plant and is more of a representation of something more abstract. The ancient light nourishes the leaf through its veins, displaying its faded but remnant power. "One leaf, one world."

C: 空间站员工餐厅反馈记录表
E: Feedback Form for the Space Station Staff Cafeteria

C: 《仙舟联盟宣言•序》数字拓本
E: Xianzhou Alliance Declaration: A Preface (Digital Rubbing)

C: 烬灭卷：绝灭大君
E: Ruin Scroll: Lord Ravager

C: 静斋的占卜记录
E: Records of Jingzhai Divinations

C: 逐火的旅途荆棘密布。挣脱藏身的黑暗，不断行进吧！直至触到破晓前的第一抹曙光。
E: The journey of Flame-Chase is fraught with thorns. Break free from the darkness in which one hides, and keep on marching forward until one touches the first ray before the daybreak!

C: 我说什么来着？纸质媒体还活着（梦里）。
E: What did I tell you? Paper media still exists (in dreams).

C: 现金交易是种浪漫——尤其是在犯罪片里。
E: Using cash for transactions is a romantic notion — especially in crime drama.

C: 已经写得很清楚了：要是有张床就好了。
E: It already says there, clear as day: If Only There's A Bed.

C: 《以太战线》中的游戏道具，以太灵配备后可以获得特殊的强化能力。
E: A game item in Aetherium Wars. Aether Spirits will gain a special enhanced ability after equipping it.

C: 你意识深处的种种开拓经历，将其完整回忆后能为游戏提供灵感。
E: The trailblazing memories deep in your mind will provide inspiration to the game once you recall it in full.

C: 你意识深处的种种开拓经历，将其完整回忆后能为游戏提供灵感。
E: The trailblazing memories deep in your mind will provide inspiration to the game once you recall it in full.

C: 你意识深处的种种开拓经历，将其完整回忆后能为游戏提供灵感。
E: The trailblazing memories deep in your mind will provide inspiration to the game once you recall it in full.

C: 柔软香甜的乳制品。淡香在舌尖细腻地化开，这种感觉令人迷恋。
E: A soft and sweet dairy delight. The delicate aroma melts exquisitely on the tongue, creating an enchanting sensation.

C: 「保持思考的理性，如晶石般闪耀而坚韧。」——教授
E: "Keep your thoughts rational, and be resplendent and resilient like a crystal." — Professor

C: 「不想后悔」的心愿具象化，变成了一枚神奇的硬币。\n\n「抛硬币做的决定，早在硬币掉下前就已经确定了。」
E: The wish of "having no regrets" materialized into a mysterious coin.\n\n"The decision you want to make via tossing a coin was already decided long before the coin fell."

C: 长盛不衰的配方，现代社会的必需品。 喝下它能获得快乐、糖分、脂肪、和对未来的一点点信心。 「我攒了半辈子崇高道德的赞许，只为了今天尽情摇晃超市里每一罐快乐水。」
E: A time-tested recipe, crucial to the well-being of modern society. You get joy, sugar, fat, and a dash of optimism toward the future all in one goodness. "I spent all my life collecting Praise of High Morals, just so I can shake every soda bottle in the shop today."

C: 行迹升级的高阶素材。
E: Advanced level-up material for Traces.

C: 呜呜伯行为考
E: Observation on Wubbaboo Behavior

C: 宓堂传语
E: Letter From Locus Silentii

C: 艾丝妲的购物清单
E: Asta's Shopping List

E: Leisha and Mrs. Trude Program Page 1

E: The Adventurous Moles: Hidden Treasure — Postface

C: 「丰饶」，药师
E: The Abundance — Yaoshi

C: 可被用于装点游梦手册页面的数字贴纸，有许许多多种款式。
E: Digital stickers that can be used to decorate the pages of the Dreamtour Handbook. They come in many different styles.

E: When attacking enemy targets with HP percentage greater than a certain amount, greatly increases the DMG dealt by the attack.

C: 使用普攻或战技后，消耗所有战技点，立即再次行动，不可连续触发。
E: Consume all Skill Points after using a Basic ATK or Skill to take an extra action. This cannot be triggered consecutively.

C: 将一张回忆卡完整集齐后会获得增益。
E: Complete a Memory Card set to gain buffs.

E: Normal Ingredients — Fruits and vegetables that can be used for cooking dishes

C: 「稀有食材」可以用来烹饪菜品的肉材
E: Rare Ingredients — Meat ingredients that can be used for cooking dishes

C: 漂亮的信封，内含一张定制车票。使用后可从下列4星角色中任选一个：\n【加拉赫】【寒鸦】【卢卡】【阿兰】
E: A beautiful envelope containing a customized ticket. When used, you can choose one of the following 4-star characters:\nGallagher, Hanya, Luka, and Arlan

C: 使用后我方全体在下次战斗中攻击力提高<unbreak>355</unbreak>点，暴击伤害提高<unbreak>20%</unbreak>。
E: Upon use, increases ATK of all allies by <unbreak>355</unbreak> and CRIT DMG by <unbreak>20%</unbreak> for the next battle.

C: 一行简洁的等式，输入合成机中可以解锁新的配方。
E: A simple equation. When entered into the Synthesizer, it will unlock a new recipe.

C: 使用后立即为我方指定单体恢复等同于自身能量上限<unbreak>30%</unbreak>能量。
E: Upon use, immediately regenerates <unbreak>30%</unbreak> of Max Energy for a single ally.

C: 使用后我方全体在下次战斗中获得的护盾量提高<unbreak>27%</unbreak>。
E: Upon use, all allies gain <unbreak>27%</unbreak> increased Shield Effect for the next battle.

C: 「模拟宇宙」奖励，可在黑塔的商店中用它购买物品。
E: A reward from the Simulated Universe. Can be used to buy items from Herta's Store.

C:
敬告各位掘出古代遗物的流浪者们：

很遗憾，我将在本次税时结束后，完全停止古代遗物解读和鉴定的服务。此外，设在贸易集市里的咨询点也会关停。

换句话说，打今天起要是走在矿道里您被不知来历的古代铁疙瘩绊了一跤，又或者您的开采队不小心挖到了发出滚烫光线的古代武器，您就别屁颠屁颠地以为是老天爷赏饭吃。也别费那老鼻子劲儿把这些怎么都清理不干净的废铁往我这儿扛了。

就像在上面说的：没戏。我的活儿彻底停了。

想必有人会问了，干得好好的怎么就不干了呀？那我就勉为其难郑重统一地回答一下吧，省得各位搞不清楚状况。

第一，这活儿吃力不讨好。

我从事这项工作，本是想借助我辛苦收集来的旧世界科技说明书和手稿什么的，帮大家对古代遗物的功能进行解读和鉴定。这样，大家对自己捡来的玩意心里至少是能有个谱，和人讨价还价的时候多少有点数。

懂的都懂。到了这年头，已经没人晓得旧世界的人是怎么造出那些机器的，更加没人晓得他们脑袋里装的知识了。

有些古代遗物一暴露到空气里就爆炸，比塞满瓦斯的矿道还危险。有的普通的跟一条金属棍似的，看起来和你婆娘拿来捅炉子的烧火棍没什么区别。但要按下上面某个按钮，它就会跟你家婆娘发脾气时一样爆，一样可怕。

举个例子吧。上个税时我拿到了一个椭圆形的蛋状物体（没错，贝洛伯格肉联厂卖过的那种蛋）。我翻遍了所有手稿，其中还包括旧世界的杂志，最终得出了一个结论——这是某种被称为「拉姆烈彩蛋」的珠宝。

那么问题来了，珠宝是什么？请教了乌尔特老先生后，我们总算知道，珠宝是用于装饰的物品。瞧瞧，旧世界的人就是骚气，就是事儿多。

老先生拿着这热蛋敲了半天，并且拆掉了上面某个可能用于挂东西的小环。然后热蛋就发光发热了，是的，它放出了比几百盏矿灯叠在一起还亮的光（可能有老先生夸大的嫌疑）。好嘛，老先生那双原本看东西就不清不楚的眼睛现在彻底歇菜了。我福大命大，事发时去冲茶水了，这双眼睛侥幸没事，但也快被老先生的儿子打瞎了，赔了六十多个罐头才把事情趟平。

现在您明白了吗？哥是在豁出性命在给你们鉴宝啊，但各位给的好处费实在是抹不平医疗损伤。

好的，接下来讲讲第二点：「矿灯」的权威遭到了质疑。

这磐岩镇外头越来越危险，来到咱镇上的流浪者也是越来越多了。可是啊，这人一多起来之后，流言蜚语也就跟着来了。我可已经听到不少「巴列维就是瞎鉴定」、「铆钉镇随便来个流浪者都比他强」之类的蠢话——不知道这种毁谤中伤到底是哪些别有用心的人放出来的，我也懒得去争。行嘛，咱大不了甩手不干了呗！反正各位能找到更有眼光的鉴宝专家不是？

我过去一直忠诚服务于各位幸运儿，从没想过贪图过各位挖到的古代货。说到底是因为咱内心敞亮，从来就不做坑蒙拐骗的事情。但是外面来的那些家伙，你能放心吗？他们就是一群唯利是图的家伙，你这些宝贝在他们的口中一文不值，当你相信了这些鬼话之后，他们就大大方方地从你的手里把宝贝买下，自己想办法到别处去大赚一笔了。

不过，「矿灯」巴列维也不是一个绝情的人，万事也有例外。

如果各位手上的宝贝价值不菲，我也不是不可以帮各位把把关的。就当我是古道热肠，担心大家被骗了，才不得不打破原则。明白了吗？要还是一堆破铜烂铁的话，我建议你还是另请高明好吧，巴列维这里已经停止鉴定服务了。
E:
To all vagrants who dig for ancient relics,

Regrettably, I will be stopping my appraisal services at the end of this tax period. The consulting location at the market will also be closed.

In other words, from this day forward, if you stumble over something in the mines, or if your mining team happens upon an ancient weapon, don't think it's a gift from the gods. And don't bother carrying all that junk over to me.

As mentioned above, it's done. I'm done.

I'm sure some of you will be pondering the reason behind my quitting when work is going well. I suppose I should make the effort to give everyone a proper response.

First of all, it's a thankless job.

When I started this business, I wanted to use the Old World manuals I tirelessly collected to help everyone analyze and appraise their ancient relics. That way, everyone would at least have a sense of the items they found, and can have a better sense of value when selling their items.

It's pretty clear for those who know. These days, no one understands how people from the Old World built these machines, much less the knowledge they had in their heads.

Some ancient relics explode when exposed to the air, making it more dangerous than a mine filled with gas. Some were as plain as a metal rod, not unlike the one your wife uses to poke the stove. But push the button somewhere on it, it'll be as scary as one of your wife's temper tantrums.

Let me give you an example. During the last tax period, I received an egg-shaped object. (That's right, the kind of egg sold at Belobog Meat Factory.) Anyway, I went through all the manuscripts, including Old World magazines, and finally concluded that it was some kind of jewelry, known as the "Ramlea Egg."

Let's start with a question: What is jewelry? After asking old Uther, we learned that jewelry is a type of decoration you can wear. It seems that Old World people really had nothing better to do.

The old man banged the egg a few times on the table, then removed the pin on top, which might have been used to hang something on it. Suddenly, the egg started heating up and glowing. It produced a light stronger than hundreds of mine lamps stacked together (Uther might have exaggerated this). The old man could already barely see anything, and now he definitely can't. You can say that I was lucky. When the incident happened, I was in the other room making tea. My eyes were fine but the old man's son threatened to take out my eyes until I offered him sixty canned goods.

Do you understand now? I'm putting my life on the line for you guys, but the money you're paying me won't even cover my medical fees.

Right, here's the second point: Miner's Lamp's standards were called into question.

The area outside Boulder Town is getting more and more dangerous and more and more vagrants are coming here. But with more people, comes more gossip. I've heard enough of foolish things like "Balaway is a blind appraiser," or "Any vagrant from Rivet Town is better than him." I don't know what game they're playing with this slander, but I'm not interested. Better to simply pack my bags and leave. After all, it should be easy to find a better appraiser, right?

I have been faithfully serving you lucky dogs in the past and never thought of coveting the ancient goods you dug up. The very reason is that I am an honest person and have never done anything to cheat. But what about those outsiders? Can you trust them? They are nothing but a bunch of self-serving scoundrels who only care for themselves. They will denigrate those goods you value, but if you believe their nonsense and sold your goods to them as if you were selling scraps, then they will happily take them to flip for a high price elsewhere.

But, Miner's Lamp Balaway is not a heartless person. I can make exceptions.

If the treasure you have is of great value, I might still be able to help you check it out. Think of me as being so fervently compassionate about no one getting cheated out of their fortune that I'll break my hiatus for these exceptional cases. But if it's just a piece of scrap, I suggest you find someone else. Balaway has henceforth ended his appraisal services.

C: 第四名《计程槎飞行士》 导演：赛鸿 编剧：苏琴 坐稳扶好，即刻起飞！ 一位神秘的计程槎飞行士，看似平平无奇，实则身怀绝技。每当有客人遇到难以解决的难题——小到上班即将迟到，大到追击歹徒，他都会带着标志性的微笑说上一句：「坐稳扶好，即刻起飞！」然后启动那台来路不明的战斗星槎发动机，用极为高超的驾驶技术完成任务、解决难题。 《计程槎飞行士》至今已经拍摄了九百二十七部，换了三任导演，每一部都有着不俗的票房表现。坦白来说，本作和所有飚速幻戏一样，没有剧情深度、缺乏情节逆转、鲜少人物弧光，只有飙升的肾上腺素。但正是这种简单、直白、重视感性体验的作品，成为了仙舟上最为长寿的系列幻戏。 不过，请原谅我刻薄一次——本刊邀请的大师们将这部幻戏送入「千年十佳」的序列（甚至送到了第四名），恐怕也是为了彰显自己并非只钟爱曲高和寡的「高雅艺术」，也同样能欣赏市井百姓喜闻乐见的飚速幻戏。
E: No. 4: Starskiff Pilot Director: Sai Hong Screenwriter: Su Qin Sit tight and hold on, get ready for lift-off! A mysterious starskiff pilot who seems to be unremarkable, but in fact has a peculiar skill. Whenever a customer encounters a difficult problem — as small as being late for work, or as big as catching hoodlums, he will say with his signature smile: "Sit tight and hold on, get ready for lift-off!" After which, he starts up that mysterious combat starskiff and uses his superb piloting skills to complete the mission and solve the problem. The Starskiff Pilot franchise has released 927 films so far across three directors. Each film has had a good box office reception. Frankly speaking, this work, like all fast-paced immersias, has no plot depth, no twists, and few character arcs, only rushing adrenaline. But it is this simple, straightforward, and raw type of experience that has become the longest-running immersia series on the Xianzhou. However, please forgive me for being curt, but the experts invited for this issue put this immersia in the "Millennium Top Ten" list (at fourth place no less) to show that they are not biased toward the "sophisticated" and "avant-garde," but are also able to enjoy the fast-paced immersias that general fans love to see.

C: 案件编号： 1000HEZ058 请愿人： 谐乐学院一年级 赫尔兹 请愿主要内容： 黑暗降临折纸大学，请彻查学生普蕾玛及其背后的皮皮西神秘势力「同舟会」 请愿详细内容： 尊敬的折纸大学学生法庭： 折纸大学正面临建校以来最大危机！！！我已57次警告学生法庭此事的毁灭性，至今仍未收到回应。可我不会就此放弃！今日，我选择再次请愿并公开全部内容，即便此举会让我暴露在危险之中—— 上月，折纸大学第550届校球笼赛预选赛上，谐乐学院推选二年级学生普蕾玛（皮皮西人）为学院首席车手，代表谐乐学院出赛今年的校球笼赛。正当天真的学生们大肆庆祝校园内诞生首位皮皮西车手时，殊不知，其实普蕾玛的当选竟是其背后的神秘组织——皮皮西人的「同舟会」 操控比赛的结果。 是的，各位没有看错——看似弱势的皮皮西人，早已通过「同舟会」结盟，暗中操控了匹诺康尼的经济、政治、医疗、教育等命脉。我来简单介绍一下，「同舟会」是一个皮皮西人创立的古老精英组织，其历史最早可追溯至折纸大学建立前！组织等级制度森严，越古老的成员级别越高，等级世袭制以保证财富与权力的代代相传。组织持续吸纳匹诺康尼政商界的顶层精英加入，成为组织头目意志的执行人，这也是表面上皮皮西人较少身居高位的原因。 此次普蕾玛事件暴露了「同舟会」下一步计划——进军匹诺康尼的体育娱乐业，占据主流视野，博取民众好感，为「同舟会」的黑暗统治巩固基础。我有几个铁证以证明「普蕾玛事件」是一个结构性的阴谋： 1、首先，球笼赛举办的500年以来，从未出现皮皮西车手。500年来都不行的皮皮西人，怎么一下就行了呢？其中必有帮手。 2、其次，普蕾玛曾多次接受其他学院赛车冠军（如前财富学院冠军罗密欧）的援助与指导。这种背叛学院、援助对手的举动，若不是罗密欧被委派了任务，或遭到某种势力胁迫，实在难以解释。 3、最后，也是最容易被忽视的：普蕾玛的球笼车名为「飞翔的皮皮西号」，这是电影《阿斯德纳海盗》中某艘幽灵船的命名方式。试问，为何要用船名给赛车命名？再想想「同舟会」里的「舟」字，细思极恐啊！ 普通学生缺少视野，从未将以上三件事联系在一起，但当我补上「同舟会」这块残缺的拼图，各位心中一定恍然大悟。最后，我再给出一个惊人的事实：为何多年来「同舟会」的阴谋从未被戳穿？因为皮皮西人早已垄断匹诺康尼的媒体行业，电视台新闻主持人乌玛是皮皮西人就是最直接的证据。 鉴于此次事件对校园公正性的影响、对校园安全的潜在威胁，我谨代表全体学生向折纸大学校委会与学生法庭提出以下要求： 1、彻查并根除折纸大学内「同舟会」势力，将其从校园中驱逐。 2、严格审查所有在校与未来入学的皮皮西学生。 3、事后向全体学生公布发表调查结果，并向我个人撰写道歉信。 若是学生法庭再次无视我的请愿，我会合理怀疑「同舟会」的势力已渗透入学生法庭内部，届时我会越过学生法庭直接向校委会反馈。 守护折纸大学，人人有责！ 心系折纸大学的普通学生 赫尔兹
E: Case ID: 1000HEZ058 Petitioner: Hertz, a freshman of Charmony Academy Petition Content: Evil has shrouded Paperfold University. Please thoroughly investigate Prema and the enigmatic force of Pepeshi known as Innasemboat behind her. Petition Details: Dear Paperfold University Student Court, Paperfold University is facing an unprecedented crisis!!! I've alerted the Student Court about this severity of this issue 57 times, but I haven't received any replies so far. Still, I won't give up! Today, I'm resubmitting my petition to fully disclose all the details, even though this may place me at great risk... During Paperfold University's 550th Spheroid Race Qualifier last month, Prema, a sophomore Pepeshi at Charmony Academy, was chosen as the Paperfold University Top Driver and represented Charmony Academy for the upcoming university Spheroid Race this year. While many naive students celebrated having the first Pepeshi driver in the university, they were unaware that Prema's selection was influenced by an organization called "Innasemboat," a secretive group composed of Pepeshi. Yes, you heard me right. The seemingly unassuming Pepeshi have banded together through Innasemboat, exerting covert influence over various aspects of Penacony's society, including the economy, politics, healthcare, education, and beyond. Allow me to briefly introduce Innasemboat. It is an ancient elite society of Pepeshi, with origins dating back to before the establishment of Paperfold University. This organization operates with a strict hierarchical structure where seniority equates to rank, where seats are passed down in families to ensure the preservation of wealth and power via blood. The organization continuously enlists top elites from Penacony's political and commercial circles as executors of the leader's will, which explains why Pepeshi seldom hold prominent positions openly in society. The Prema Incident exposes their next move: Innasemboat aims to infiltrate the sports and entertainment sectors of Penacony to enhance their reputation, gain public favor, and lay the groundwork for their control of darkness. I'm hereby presenting substantial evidence that the Prema Incident is part of their elaborate scheme: 1. Pepeshi drivers have never appeared in the Spheroid Race's 500-year history, so how did they suddenly have a star driver after 500 years of incompetence? Someone must be behind this. 2. Prema has repeatedly received assistance from racing champions of rival academies (such as Romeo, the former champion of Fortune Academy). Such an act of betraying his academy and aiding his competitor suggests either ulterior motives or external coercion on Romeo's side. 3. Lastly, a most subtle yet most significant detail: Prema's Spheroid is named "The Flying Pepeshi," reminiscent of a ghost ship from the movie Asdana Pirates. Why would a Spheroid be named after a ship? Think about the name "Innasemboat" and you'll figure out why! The average students lack insight. They have never connected these three elements and thus fail to grasp the bigger picture. However, as I add in the missing link named Innasemboat, everything should become crystal clear to all. Lastly, I will present this astonishing fact: Why has the Innasemboat's conspiracy never been exposed through the years? Because the Pepeshi have controlled the entire Penaconian media industry. The fact that the news host Uma is a Pepeshi serves as the most direct evidence. Given its implications for fair competition and potential security risks for the campus, I, on behalf of all students, hereby present the following demands to the Paperfold University Council and the Student Court: 1. Conduct a comprehensive investigation and eradicate the influence of Innasemboat from the university. 2. Implement rigorous examinations upon all current and future Pepeshi students within the university. 3. Disclose the investigation results to all students and announce a personal apology to me. Should the Student Court once again reject my petition, it would be reasonable for me to suspect that Innasemboat has infiltrated the Student Court. In such a scenario, I will escalate this matter beyond the Student Court and report directly to the University Council. It is everyone's responsibility to safeguard Paperfold University! An ordinary student deeply devoted to Paperfold University, Hertz

C: *这份资料似乎有所缺失，从剩余的部分来看，关键的炼金术式已经被带走，只剩下作者思考的过程记录…* 前述的方法…仍有空白。 将人的「灵魂」与泰坦造物重新融合，并不能提升金血的纯度。 即便是纯粹的泰坦造物，对黄金裔的金血来说仍是杂质。 将人的灵魂与造物融合，只能臻于灵魂杂质的修补，或灵魂即灭状态的牵萦。 …… 即便黄金裔与造物们在创世神话中皆由泰坦创造，但「创造」与「创造」之间亦有不同。 泰坦造物并非是炼金研究的中介变量，黄金裔比造物更为接近泰坦。 换句话说，我不应将泰坦造物与黄金裔并列比较。 我所考虑的假设，理应直接指向泰坦本身。 …… 泰坦研究的机会绝无仅有，理应谨慎选择研究对象—— 尚还活着的泰坦，难以控制。 早已死去的泰坦，缺少价值。 正在死去的泰坦，理想样本。 …… 应掌握造物的原理，令万物诞生时即为完美的状态。 我将亲手熔炼泰坦，抵达灵魂的本质……
E: *These documents appear incomplete. Judging from what's left behind, the important alchemical formulae have been taken away — only the author's reasoning remains...* The previous approach... has flaws. Fusing human "souls" with Titan creations does not purify golden blood. Even pure Titan creations are contaminants to the Chrysos Heirs' golden blood. Soul fusion between humans and creations merely repairs impurities of the soul or maintains a connection to dying souls. ... While creation myths tell us that Chrysos Heirs and other creations were all made by Titans, their nature differs fundamentally. The Titans' creations are no intermediate products of an alchemical process, and the Chrysos Heirs are closer to the Titans than the creations. In other words, I should not have considered Titan creations equal to Chrysos Heirs. The hypothesis I should focus on is one pointed towards the Titans themselves. ... Such rare chances to study Titans demand a meticulous selection of research subjects. Living Titans prove impossible to restrain. And dead Titans offer no insights worth pursuing. But dying Titans — they are the perfect research subjects. ... Only by understanding the fundamentals of creation can we ensure perfection at the moment of everything's birth. Through my own hands, I will melt a Titan and reach the true essence of the soul...

C: 近年来元老院的意图往往因「金丝」窃听而识破，我们有必要找到行之有效的应对措施。 暗语 金丝能洞悉人心、获知讯息，但并非万事皆可得知，且知晓并不等同于理解。 手势：以绸缎覆住双手，在彼此手心划下字句交流。 暗号：将真正的意图层层包裹，确保只有我们能够理解其中的含义。如「十年前今日我们会面之处，如今已存满扫帚。」 裁断 金丝与千年前相较，权能似乎有所衰落。近来金丝末梢愈加衰颓僵硬，甚至到了触之不觉的程度…… 毒杀：金丝衰弱，若虫亦更易驱逐。以药草熬制熏蒸剂，即可有效驱逐这些耳目。 木剪：墨涅塔与瑟希斯权能不相抵触，以树庭枝桠制作木剪，或可在被察觉前绞断金丝。 扰乱 僭主履行{RUBY_B#浪漫之泰坦}墨涅塔{RUBY_E#}神权，金丝会趋「美」而来，避「丑」而去。 声音：乐声能使金丝沉醉，噪声则能扰乱金丝视听。先辈们乐于在剧场议事，的确是一种古老的智慧。 污秽：此招虽好，气味却大，较为不雅，慎之慎之。 …… 以上秘诀须隐秘传阅，万勿泄露。 但不可排除，我等写下笔记的此刻，金丝也并未放过……
E: In recent years, the Council of Elders' intentions have often been exposed due to the golden thread's eavesdropping. It is imperative that we find effective countermeasures. Ciphered Communication Golden threads can perceive thoughts and extract information, but they are not omniscient, nor does knowing always equate to understanding. Gestures: Cover both hands with silk and inscribe messages onto each other's palms for silent exchange. Coded Phrases: Layer true intentions beneath seemingly innocuous statements, ensuring only those within the circle can decipher them. Example: "The place where we met ten years ago is now filled with brooms." Severance Compared to a thousand years ago, the power of the golden threads appears to have waned. Recently, their tips have become increasingly frail and rigid, so much so that they can hardly be felt upon touch... Poisoning: With the weakening of the golden threads, their lesser nymphs are now easier to expel. A fumigation agent brewed from medicinal herbs can effectively drive away these unseen spies. Wooden Shears: The powers of Mnestia and Cerces do not conflict. Using branches from the Grove, one may craft wooden shears capable of cutting the golden threads before they are even aware of the act. Disruption The tyrant exercises the divine authority of {RUBY_B#Romance Titan}Mnestia{RUBY_E#}. Golden threads are drawn to "beauty" and repelled by "ugliness." Sound: Melodic music can intoxicate the golden threads, while harsh noise can distort their perception. Our ancestors' practice of holding discussions in theaters was, indeed, a piece of ancient wisdom. Filth: Though effective, this method carries a strong stench and is rather undignified. Use with caution. ... The above secrets must be passed on discreetly and never be exposed. Yet, we cannot rule out the possibility that even as we write these very words, the golden threads have not spared us...

C:
写给好伙伴小白： 你回信了！我开心得和路过的每个妖精问好！ 村长说你去了很远很远的地方，不可能回信。 我才不相信。一定是你，对吧？ 我按照你的建议做了「扫帚」。家里一下子就被清理得干干净净。
扫帚的力量，好厉害。 / 我按照你的建议，丢掉了很多家具，除了那个瓦罐。
当时我们用它盛摘下的野莓。
莓子吃完了，但里边还留着酸甜的香气。 我不该每天都去翻信箱，它旧得好快。 当时你叮叮咚咚，一个下午就做好了。 是怎么做的？我想修理修理，但怎么也想不起来了迷。 你的好伙伴 咪发迷
E:
To my dear friend Snowy: You wrote back! I was so excited that I greeted every passing fairy! The Chief told me you'd gone somewhere far, far away and couldn't possibly reply. I never believed him. It was really you, wasn't it? I followed your instructions and made a broom. The house was sparkling clean in no time.
The power of a broom is incredible. / I tossed out most of the furniture — except for that clay jar.
We used it back then to hold the wild berries we picked.
The berries are long gone, but it still carries that sweet, tangy scent. I probably shouldn't check the mailbox daily. It's getting worn out so fast. Back then, you fixed it in just one afternoon with all those clinking and clanking. How exactly did you do it? I'd like to fix it myself, but I simply can't remember how. Your dear friend Mifamem

E: A strange creation in the shape of a flower's sepal, with golden stamens and pistils and ink-black petals. It seems to continuously imitate and piece together elements found in reality in an attempt to create new existences.

C: 为供奉欧洛尼斯而修建的院落，村庄的祭司们曾在此处聆听神谕的喃喃低语。
E: A courtyard built to present offerings to Oronyx. The priests of the village once listened to the murmurs of prophecy here.

C: 裂界中暂时停滞行动的虚影，不去触碰便不会有危险。\n无论细节如何逼真，它都只是现实的影子，是裂界仿造的玩具罢了。
E: A shadow in the Fragmentum that temporarily stays stagnant. It is not dangerous if left alone.\nAs lifelike as it may look, it is only part of the umbra of reality, a toy counterfeited by the Fragmentum.

C: 裂界中暂时停滞行动的虚影，不去触碰便不会有危险。\n无论细节如何逼真，它都只是现实的影子，是裂界仿造的玩具罢了。
E: A shadow in the Fragmentum that temporarily stays stagnant. It is not dangerous if left alone.\nAs lifelike as it may look, it is only part of the umbra of reality, a toy counterfeited by the Fragmentum.

E: A shadow in the Fragmentum that temporarily stays stagnant. It is not dangerous if left alone.\nAs lifelike as it may look, it is only part of the umbra of reality, a toy counterfeited by the Fragmentum.

C: 裂界侵蚀现实后留下的伤痕，通向未知的地方。\n有人说裂界并非单纯吞没了现实，它记录着所有被它吞噬之物的信息。若条件正确，过去的遗物会再度浮现。
E: A bite mark left by the Fragmentum when it corroded the reality, leading to mysterious places.\nSome say that the Fragmentum does not simply devour reality. In fact, it preserves all the information of what was eaten. When certain conditions are met, the relics of the past may re-emerge.

C: 为了空间站的网络安全，也为了保住这份工作，伦纳德请求你协助完成一项测试。
E: Leonard is asking for your help to complete a task that will improve the space station's cybersecurity and help him keep his job.

C: 积雪掩埋了曾经的生机，在人力无法抵挡的严寒面前，调头回去也许还来得及。
E: The prosperity of the past has been buried under the snow. Before the unbearable extreme cold, one still has a chance to turn around and go back.

C: 太卜司洞天中聚众议事处。由于太卜大人厌弃空谈无用的会议，故而此处少有人聚集。
E: The official location in the Divination Commission delve where issues are discussed publicly. As the master diviner abhors useless meetings, few people can be found gathered here.

C: 考验参选者文戏演技的关卡舞台，由苏乐达™赞助。
E: A stage to test a performer's acting skills and performances. Sponsored by SoulGlad™.

C: 悬锋城曾经的雕琢区，开采出来的石料将会被运送至此，由石匠们凿刻成材。
E: The former sculpting zone of Castrum Kremnos. The stones excavated would be transported here to be worked on by the masons.

C: 贝洛伯格为数不多的私人营业机械师。承接包括但不限于以下业务：机器养护、故障维修、古代遗物检修、杰帕德的签名、乐队演出活动（仅限摇滚乐演奏）…
E: One of the few privately-owned workshops in Belobog run by a mechanic. They accept, but are not limited to, the following jobs: Machine maintenance and troubleshooting, ancient relic repairs, acquiring Gepard's signature, and band performance events (rock and roll only)...

C: 此地出产以矿业机械为大宗，商品货币一度经此商埠集结流转，可如今已然是座死城。
E: This place used to serve as a trading port with active circulation of commodity money and a major manufacturer of mining machinery. But now it has become a dead town.

C: 大矿区的决胜乐园-第二赛点
E: Great Mine Victory Zone: Match Point 2

C: 「你说的蓝是什么蓝？」

C: 没人知道帕姆是何时出现的，乘员们只知道它始终就在那儿，一如既往照料着列车。
E: No one knows when Pom-Pom appeared. The crew only knows they've always been there, taking care of the Express.

C: 行为怪异的机器，本是服务宾客的「美梦剧团」，因梦中的情绪干扰而陷入失控。它们仍在忠实扮演着自己在梦中的角色，但这些疯狂的「演出」已与破坏无异。
E: An abnormally behaving machine. Originally, they were supposed to be a "Sweet Dreams Troupe" meant to service guests, but have lost control due to emotional disturbance in the dream. They remain true to the roles they were playing in the dream, but their madness-infused "performances" are no different to acts of destruction.

C: 由「纷争」雕琢的泰坦眷属，流淌着尼卡多利的金血。刚猛的身躯是军阵的盾牌，以坚石之身阻隔敌军，以粗大臂膀搬运战场的口粮，也常被悬锋的士兵当作练武的对象。
E: A Titankin sculpted by "Strife." They are infused with Nikador's golden ichor. Their robust bodies are the shields of the army, and they use their stony corpus to cut off their foes, while their powerful limbs carry rations across the battlefield. They are also used as sparring partners by the soldiers of Kremnos.

C: 贝洛伯格的守护者，永屹之城贝洛伯格无可质疑的统治者。\n可可利亚秉持传承自历代守护者的神迹权能，在战斗中号令冰雪的力量冻结敌人。
E: The Guardian of Belobog, and the indisputable ruler of the Towering Citadel, Belobog.\nCocolia possesses the divine authority passed down through the generations of Guardians, giving her command over ice and snow to freeze her enemies in battle.

C: 代码受到影响后的完整投影。参照本体为以旧世界遗留的科技拼凑制造的自动机器单元，少见的人形机械，其右臂部分统一装置着链锯，似乎曾用于采集或建造作业。\n战斗中，自动机兵「齿狼」（完整）的链锯会造成裂伤，令对手持续损失生命值。
E: A complete projection produced by compromised codes. The referent entity is an automaton pieced together with Old World technology. This rare type of humanoid automaton is equipped with a chainsaw on its right arm, presumably used for mining or construction operations.\nIn combat, Automaton Direwolf (Complete) will use its chainsaw to Bleed enemies, dealing DoT.

C: 旧世界的古老遗物，地髓开拓团的时代遗留下的自动控制单元。与大部分无智、只接受指令的机器不同，史瓦罗具有复杂的思考能力。\n在战斗中，史瓦罗会召来机械臂抓取和控制敌人，对目标进行沉重的打击。
E: An ancient relic from the Old World, that was originally used as an automated control unit by the Geomarrow Development Group. Unlike the vast majority of machines that lack intellect and can only act on command, Svarog is capable of much more complex thinking.\nIn battle, Svarog summons mechanical arms to grab and control his enemies, delivering devastating attacks.

C: 随玄鹿足迹而生的建木枝梢。
E: A branch of Ambrosial Arbor created from the Ebon Deer's footprint

C: 由「建木」化生，拱卫其根系的灵瑞之兽，履迹所之，和泽滋生，枝杪郁敷。\n自毁于太古时代的战争后，「建木」终于在星核的修补下再度生长。彼时仙人们所造的珍禽奇兽纷至沓来，宛如旧梦重临。
E: An auspicious spiritual beast wrought into being by the Ambrosial Arbor and protects its roots. Its arrival brings along exuberant vegetation and promises good fortune.\nOnce destroyed during ancient wars, the Ambrosial Arbor is mended by the Stellaron and finally revives. Rare creatures and legendary beasts made by celestials of the past all return to this world, like an old dream coming alive again.

C: 它的矛尖划定了疆界，无边无际。\n疆界之中的军与民，皆是被征服或将被征服的。\n畏怖者的血成为滋养神躯的蜜酿，抗争者的魂灵踏入冥河下的荣耀殿堂。
E: The tip of its spear has drawn a boundless border.\nThe people and soldiers within the border are marked as conquered, or ones to be conquered.\nThe blood of the fearful will become honey brew for the divine body, and the souls of the defiant will walk into the palace of glory under the River of Souls.

C: 世界的形态，求索的欲望，以及赋予他们形体的无垠空间，从中诞生一切智慧的知性。它不再是傀儡，将死于灵知的葬仪，留一座铁铸的墓碑。
E: The shape of the world, the desire to seek, and the boundless space that gives them form. The intellect from which all wisdom is born. It is no longer a puppet, destined to perish in the funeral of knowledge, leaving behind an iron tombstone.

C: 力量本源的至极化身，它背后蕴含的能量形式并不为人知晓。\n反物质引擎会为其他敌人提供能量并强化其技能。
E: The ultimate embodiment of power. The form of the energy that accumulates behind it remains unknown.\nThe Antimatter Engine will grant energy to other enemies and enhance their abilities.

C: 代码受到影响后的完整投影。参照本体为成熟体的真蛰虫；博识学会的杜卢伊爵士遨游星海，曾写下三十卷《诸界异虫札记》。书中详实记载了迄今为止被确认的十几种蠹虫种类，以及星系间数之不尽的亚种。
E: A complete projection produced by compromised codes. The referent entity is a mature True Sting. Sir Duroy, a member of the Intelligentsia Guild, explored the starry seas and authored the thirty-volume of the Chronicles of Interdimensional Insects. The book provides detailed records of over a dozen confirmed species of lepisma and countless subspecies spanning across the stars.

C: 可可利亚（完整）
E: Cocolia (Complete)

C: 天谴歌队
E: Furiae Troupe

C: 晨昏之眼，雅辛忒丝
E: Hyacinthia, Eye of Twilight

C: 基层员工•安保
E: Grunt: Security Personnel

C: 阶段开始时，立即召唤【银鬃尉官（完整）】。
E: When the phase starts, immediately summons Silvermane Lieutenant (Complete).

C: 解除指定除布洛妮娅外的敌方单体的全部负面效果，并使该目标立即行动。
E: Dispels all debuffs on a friendly unit except Bronya, and causes this unit to take action immediately.

C: 召唤【无尽寒冬之槊】。
E: Summons "Lance of the Eternal Freeze".

C: 立即回复敌方全体的生命值。
E: Immediately recovers all friendly units' HP.

C: 召唤【自动机兵•齿狼】。
E: Summons Automaton Direwolf.

C: 吞噬1个永冬灾影使自身攻击力提高，同时锁定指定我方单体。若场上没有永冬灾影，则自身防御力降低。
E: Devours 1 Everwinter Shadewalker to increase ATK and Locks Onto a single target. If there are no Everwinter Shadewalkers on the field, DEF is decreased.

C: 对我方全体造成大量冰属性伤害，并有大概率使受到攻击的我方目标陷入【深寒】状态。
E: Deals massive Ice DMG to all targets, with a high chance to afflict Deep Freeze on the targets.

C: 对指定我方单体造成大量物理属性伤害，如果该目标处于【强烈震荡】状态，则额外对该目标造成物理属性伤害，同时解除该目标的【强烈震荡】状态。
E: Deals massive Physical DMG to a single target. If the target is afflicted with Strong Reverberation, they additionally take Physical DMG, and Strong Reverberation is then dispelled.

C: 对指定我方单体造成雷属性伤害，并大概率使受到攻击的我方目标陷入触电状态。
E: Deals Lightning DMG to a single target, with a high chance to Shock the target.

C: 连续对我方随机单体造成雷属性伤害。
E: Deals successive Lightning DMG to random targets.

C: 对我方单体造成量子属性伤害。
E: Deals Quantum DMG to a single target.

C: 召唤建木枝梢【缃叶之杪】。
E: Summons Ambrosial Arbor branch "Twig of Marple Leaf"

C: 对指定我方单体及相邻目标造成雷属性伤害。
E: Deals Lightning DMG to a single target and adjacent units.

C: 对我方全体造成雷属性伤害，并有概率为我方全体附上【<u>恐惧萦绕</u>】。
E: Deals Lightning DMG to all targets with a high chance of applying "<u>Terror Grip</u>" on all targets.

C: 对指定我方单体目标造成风属性伤害，并大概率使受到攻击的我方目标陷入<u>虚弱</u>状态。
E: Deals Wind DMG to one designated target, with a high chance to inflict <u>Weaken</u>.

C: 使指定我方单体恢复能量。只能在【课间频道】状态下使用。
E: Regenerates Energy for one designated target. This ability can only be used while under the "Off-Class Channel" state.

C: 受到普通攻击或持续伤害造成的致命攻击时，使我方恢复战技点。
E: After suffering a killing blow from a Basic ATK or DoT, recovers Skill Points for targets.

C: 当自身被弱点击破时将会离开战斗。当自身受到我方攻击时，将会被添加此次攻击对应的属性弱点，至多添加2个弱点。
E: When this unit is Weakness Broken, it will leave the battle. When attacked, Weaknesses corresponding to the attack's Type will be implanted, up to 2 Weaknesses.

C: 将【课间频道】状态转变为【课堂频道】状态。
E: Switches the "Off-Class Channel" state to the "Classroom Channel" state.

C: 大概率使我方全体陷入【<u>荒宴醉</u>】或【<u>欢宴罪</u>】状态，大概率使我方全体陷入【<u>异梦</u>】状态，并对我方全体造成大量物理属性伤害。
E: There is a high chance of inflicting <u>Carousal of Wantonness</u> or <u>Carousal of Revelry</u> on all targets. There is a high chance of inflicting the <u>Alien Dream</u> state on all targets, dealing massive Physical DMG.

C: 当永眠墓碣受到致命攻击后，对应我方目标将解除【梦死】状态并回复生命值和能量。
E: After Sombrous Sepulcher receives a killing blow, dispels Morbid Dream from the corresponding target, restoring their HP and regenerating Energy.

C: 连续对我方随机单体造成少量量子属性伤害。每层【无明火】额外造成1段伤害。
E: Deals minor successive Quantum DMG to a random target. Each stack of Obscure Blaze additionally deals DMG 1 time.

C: 对指定我方单体及其相邻目标造成物理属性伤害。
E: Deals Physical DMG to a single target and units adjacent to the target.

C: 对我方全体造成少量火属性伤害。
E: Deals minor Fire DMG to all targets.

C: 使用正确的攻击方式回应【巴特鲁斯】的谜题，【巴特鲁斯】会立即改变谜题，并对其造成基于其生命上限百分比的物理属性伤害。【巴特鲁斯】离开战斗时，令我方全体造成的伤害提高。
E: Use the correct attack method to respond to "Bartholos"'s brainteaser, and "Bartholos" will immediately change the brainteaser, taking Physical DMG based on a percentage of its Max HP. When "Bartholos" leaves the battle, increases the DMG dealt by all targets.

C: 处于【迟到的死讯】状态下，【生者不应逃离】强化为【死者不应躲避】。
E: While in the "Overdue Obituary" state, "The Living Shan't Flee" enhances to "The Dead Shan't Avoid."

C: 对指定我方单体目标造成少量虚数属性伤害。
E: Deals minor Imaginary DMG to one designated target.

C: 连续对我方随机单体目标造成少量虚数属性伤害。
E: Deals successive minor Imaginary DMG to random single targets.

C: 对所有我方角色施加【沉沦于恐惧】，【受征服】状态解除时对应【沉沦于恐惧】一同解除。
E: Inflicts "Drowning in Terror" on all target characters. When "Conquered" state is dispelled, the corresponding "Drowning in Terror" is also dispelled.

C: 对随机我方3个目标造成量子属性<u>【衰亡伤害】</u>。
E: Deals Quantum "<u>Atrophy DMG</u>" to 3 random targets.

C: 使自身和【哀悯长臂】初始受到的伤害降低，我方目标生命值降低时会积累【濒死梦泡】，当【濒死梦泡】达到上限时，使自身行动提前，下一次行动会进入<u>【死亡的芬芳】</u>状态。在该状态下，移除自身和【哀悯长臂】的受到伤害降低状态。解除<u>【死亡的芬芳】</u>状态时，自身受到伤害并回复我方目标生命值。
E: Decreases the initial DMG this unit and "The Long Arms of Sorrow" receive. When targets lose HP, they accumulate "Desperate Bubble." When "Desperate Bubble" reaches the limit, advances this unit's action and enters the <u>"Fragrance of Death"</u> state in its next turn. Under that state, removes this unit's and "The Long Arms of Sorrow"'s DMG Reduction state. When <u>"Fragrance of Death"</u> is dispelled, this unit will take DMG and restore targets' HP.

C: 免疫除【反造物主】外的行动条变化效果影响。【逻各斯】无法被消灭，受到致命攻击后陷入【重创】状态，使我方全体恢复能量并解除【<u>行动锁定</u>】状态。
E: Immune to the effects of action bar changes, except "Anti-Creator." "Logos" cannot be eliminated. When receiving a killing blow, it enters the "Grave Wound" state, causing all targets to regenerate Energy and dispel the "<u>Action Lock</u>" state.

C: 连续对我方随机单体目标造成物理属性伤害，被击中目标降低生命值的一部分转化为<u>【侵蚀】</u>。
E: Deals successive Physical DMG to one random target. Converts a portion of the hit target's reduced HP to "<u>Corrosion</u>."

C: 展开无敌的黑斗篷，使自身和【魔王爪牙】受到的所有伤害降低为1。
E: Expands an invincible black cloak that reduces all DMG received by this unit and "Demon King's Minions" to 1.

C: 获得<u>【灾难之力】</u>并进入【沉默的悲叹】状态，下次行动时施放【莫因舍弃而哭泣】。
E: Obtains <u>"Calamity Power"</u> and enters the "Silent Sorrow" state. Uses "Cry Not for the Discarded" in the next action.

C: 失去第一层韧性时，解除所有控制状态，进入<u>【镣铐崩解】</u>状态，并立即行动。
E: After losing the first layer of Toughness, dispels all Control debuffs, enters <u>"Shackle Shatter"</u> state, and immediately takes action.

C: 对指定我方单体造成少量冰属性伤害。若自身处于【冰点】状态，对冻结状态的我方单体施放攻击后造成额外的冰属性伤害。
E: Deals minor Ice DMG to a single target. Deals extra Ice DMG to the target if the target is currently Frozen and this unit is in the Freezing Point state.

C: 对指定我方单体及其相邻目标造成少量量子属性伤害。
E: Deals minor Quantum DMG to one designated target and units adjacent to the target.

C: 对指定我方单体造成量子属性伤害。
E: Deals Quantum DMG to a single target.

C: 对指定我方单体造成量子属性伤害。
E: Deals Quantum DMG to a single target.

C: 对敌方单体【灾虐的右手】施加强化状态，恢复该目标的韧性。
E: Enhances Disaster's Right Hand, restoring its Toughness.

C: 失去黎明的人们聚集于狭窄的避难所，在末日的夕照之下，向再也无法回应的神明祈求着未来。
E: Those who had lost the dawn gathered in a cramped shelter, praying for a future under the dusk of doomsday, to gods who could no longer reply.

C: 具有挑战的战斗节点，你将面对不同竞争对手阵营中的普通、精英敌人。
E: Challenging Combat Node where you will face Normal and Elite enemies from different rival factions.

C: 可提供随机【投资策略】三选一。选择完毕后将继续备战【战斗节点】。
E: Offers three random "Investment Strategies" to choose one from. After selection, you will continue preparing for the "Combat Node".

C: 海选赛第一轮-Ⅱ
E: Qualifier Round 1 — II

C: 在这里，你可以体验一把字面意义上的「笑死」。
E: Here, you can literally experience "laughing yourself to death."

C: 默认解锁
E: Unlocked by Default

C: 平息漫游乐手对于自动乐团的不满
E: Calm the busker's displeasure with automated orchestras

C: 在梦境酒店的贵宾休息室走廊发现无法被修复的玩具箱
E: Find the unrepairable toy box in the VIP room hallway in the hotel in the Dreamscape

E: Unlocked by Default

C: 银狼
E: Silver Wolf

C: 噩梦和低语
E: Nightmares and Whispers

C: 邀约
E: Invitation

C: 遐蝶憎恶自己那双带去「死亡」的手，渴望像普通人一样生活。然而拥抱过后，唯余永恒的离别。
E: Castorice loathed her hands that bring "Death," desiring an ordinary life. However, following every embrace came only lasting goodbyes.

C: 你们在克里珀堡向布洛妮娅转述了寒潮的长期影响，并在离开雅利洛前与她道别。布洛妮娅承诺，会努力恢复雅利洛与外界的联系。
E: At Qlipoth Fort, you shared what you had learned about the lingering effects of the Eternal Freeze and said your goodbyes before departing Jarilo. Bronya gave her word: She would do everything she could to restore Jarilo's connection with the outside world.

C: 你们来到迴星港，这是仙舟的星槎生产区。停云称自己不擅长战斗，若与卡芙卡遭遇，还请列位恩公自管动手，她会为大家加油鼓劲。
E: You arrived at Stargazer Navalia, the starskiff manufacturing area of the Xianzhou. Tingyun claimed that she was not good at fighting. Should you run into Kafka, she asked the benefactors to launch into action themselves, and she would simply cheer for you.

C: 古代持明长老反对以鳞渊境封印建木，但初代龙尊执意行此。按照传统，此后历任龙尊都要重返此地，守望并加固建木封印。
E: The ancient Vidyadhara Elder refused to seal Ambrosial Arbor with Scalegorge Waterscape, but the first high elder insisted. According to tradition, from now on, successive high elders were obliged to return to guard and strengthen the Arbor's seal.

C: 前面的花园里，安眠着匹诺康尼第一位、也是最后一位无名客——<color=#f29e38ff>「钟表匠，拉格沃克•夏尔•米哈伊尔。」</color>
E: In the garden ahead rested the first and last Nameless of Penacony — <color=#f29e38ff>The Watchmaker, Mikhail Char Legwork</color>.

C: 在列车上，帕姆与其召唤出的英灵米哈伊尔交谈。圣杯破碎后，米沙必须返回匹诺康尼。帕姆与他约好，列车会为逝去的无名客鸣笛。
E: On the Express, Pom-Pom chatted with Mikhail, the Heroic Spirit they summoned. Since the Holy Grail was destroyed, Misha had to go back to Penacony. Pom-Pom promised the Express would sound its whistle to honor the Nameless passengers who had died.

C: 海瑟音献上余生的自由与清醒，以换取与「虚无」对抗的力量，等待救世主的归来。若你归来，请以法吉娜的蜜露浇奠墓碑，将海瑟音唤醒。
E: Hysilens offered the liberty and sanity of her remaining days for the power to wrestle the Nihility, awaiting the Deliverer's return. Should you return, please pour Phagousa's Dew upon the tomb, and Hysilens shall awaken.

C: 回到当下，来古士对你宣扬不可预测的混沌新宇宙，你与海瑟音坚决反对其暴行。为表敬意，来古士表明真身——<color=#f29e38ff>天才俱乐部#1，赞达尔•壹•桑原。</color>
E: Back in the present, Lygus preached a chaotic and unpredictable new cosmos. You and Hysilens rejected his cruel atrocity. In a gesture of respect, Lygus revealed his true identity: <color=#f29e38ff>Genius Society #1, Zandar One Kuwabara.</color>

C: 厨子正与桑博讨价还价，所交易的物件正是失窃的探测器。厨子恼羞成怒，拒绝就此交出赃物。
E: The cook was haggling with Sampo over the stolen detector. Humiliated and angry, the cook refused to hand over the stolen goods.

C: 你与三月七、瓦尔特来到地衡司，协助辨认异邦人士中的危险者。当看到罗刹的面孔时，瓦尔特神色突变。
E: You arrived at the Realm-Keeping Commission with March 7th and Welt to help identify dangerous individuals among the travelers. Upon seeing Luocha's face, Welt's expression changed dramatically.

C: 残存的影像显示，两个黑衣人和一个小孩走出了拱门，时间在罗刹进入空地以后的约一个时辰。
E: The remaining footage showed two people in dark clothing and a child walking out of the archway, approximately two hours after Luocha entered the open area.

C: 你进入一处房间，身后传来沉闷的关门声。藿藿的身影也消失不见，当下与你为伴的唯有一面诡异的镜子。
E: You entered a room, and the heavy thud of the door closing echoed behind you. Huohuo's presence had vanished as well. The only thing that remained with you was a strange, eerie mirror.

C: 藿藿小时候看到奄奄一息的岁阳「尾巴」，一时心软将其放到自己的尾巴上。十王司判官及时赶到，将岁阳封印在藿藿的尾巴上。
E: When Huohuo was a child, she found the dying heliobus "Tail" and, moved by compassion, placed it on her own tail. A Judge of the Ten-Lords Commission arrived just in time and sealed the heliobus onto Huohuo's tail.

C: 星槎海的战斗结束，但长乐天和金人巷仍遭袭扰。驭空正调集星槎，但飞霄决定使用更高效的方式解决问题。
E: The battle at Starskiff Haven concluded, but Exalting Sanctum and Aurum Alley were still under attack. While Yukong mobilized starskiffs, Feixiao had a more direct solution in mind.

C: 物资箱子被扫荡一空，布洛妮娅认为有人先一步到此收集物资。希儿调查周围环境，誓要把对方找出来。
E: The crates had already been picked clean. Bronya guessed someone had beaten you to it. Seele scouted the area, vowing to track them down.

C: 你们远眺废弃的孤儿院，希儿称自己被奥列格捡到后就被送到孤儿院抚养。布洛妮娅觉得这一场景有点眼熟。
E: From afar, the silhouette of the abandoned orphanage came into view. Seele mentioned that Oleg had found her and sent her there as a child. The scene stirred something in Bronya — an odd sense of familiarity.

C: 返回列车之前，三月七提议在城里再逛一圈，为你、丹恒和她自己多拍几张纪念照。
E: Before boarding the Express, March 7th suggested one last stroll through the city to snap a few more memories with you and Dan Heng.

C: 丹恒与景元看到正与反物质军团作战的同伴，快步上前助阵。
E: Dan Heng and Jing Yuan saw their companions fighting against the Antimatter Legion, and hurried over to assist them in combat.

C: 「持明稚童，故人提执。前世贤契，来世蒙师。」壁画描绘的是持明族蜕生后，受年长同胞提携启蒙的成长岁月。
E: "Our reincarnation's greatest cost, the wisdom of a past life lost, yet through the teachings of our kind, unto the young again consigned." The mural depicted the Vidyadhara being guided by their elder, wiser kin after their rebirth.

C: 黑天鹅向姬子汇报，称她将你成功带回。姬子向你介绍来自流光忆庭的忆者黑天鹅，并向你询问此前梦境中的经历。
E: Black Swan reported to Himeko that she had successfully brought you back. Himeko then introduced you formally to Black Swan, Memokeeper from the Garden of Recollection, and asked about your previous experiences in the Dreamscape.

C: 在黑天鹅忆者能力的作用下，流萤留下的记忆以片段形式得到复现。你们对流萤的遭遇展开调查。
E: With Black Swan's Memokeeper ability, the memories Firefly left behind reappeared in the form of clips. You started to investigate what Firefly encountered.

C: 黄泉是某位星神的令使？在答复砂金前，或许你应该和黑天鹅聊聊。
E: Acheron is the Emanator of a particular Aeon? Before you answer Aventurine, perhaps you should talk to Black Swan.

C: 砂金穿过「格列佛拱门」，将自己变得如橡木兵人般大小，由此进入沙盘中。
E: Aventurine stepped through the Gulliver's Arch, shrank to the size of an Oak Family Soldier, and entered the sandpit.

C: 你们来到克劳克影视乐园。加拉赫称《钟表小子》的创作以匹诺康尼历史为背景，「哈努兄弟」正是历史上带领囚犯反抗公司的老大哥。
E: You all arrived at the Clock Studios Theme Park. Gallagher said the production of "Clockie" utilized Penacony's history as its setting, and "Brother Hanu" was a boss that led criminals in a resistance against the IPC.

C: 你将搜集来的材料交给加拉赫。在你的好奇心与加拉赫娴熟调饮技巧的共同作用下，一杯特调饮品由此诞生。
E: You gave the ingredients you had gathered to Gallagher. With your curiosity and Gallagher's skillful mixing techniques, a special beverage was created.

C: 你对阵低价倾销竞争者十七分熟兄弟，激战后成功逆转困局，完成逐梦故事的高潮战斗。
E: In the final battle, you confronted the undercutting competitors, the Beyond Overcooked Brothers. After an intense fight, you turned the tide and delivered the climactic showdown of the Dreamchaser's story.

C: 你与同伴们整装待发，誓言继承米哈伊尔意志，为匹诺康尼开拓未来。
E: You and your companions prepared for the battle, vowing to inherit Mikhail's will and carve a future for Penacony.

C: 你找到「垃圾桶」娃娃，它请你回答斯芬克斯之谜。你回答正确，但很可惜，它讨厌直觉敏锐的小鬼。
E: You found the "Trashcan" Doll, who asked you to solve the Sphinx's riddle. You answered correctly, but unfortunately, it hated smart-aleck kids with sharp intuition.

C: 在「苦茶大师」的指导下，乱破确定了自己的忍号，并踏上研习缭乱•忍法的苦修。
E: Under the guidance of "Master Kucha," Rappa determined her ninja name and embarked on the arduous training of Dazzling Ninjutsu.

C: 乱破击败对手，今天的。有道是「忍道长漫漫，苦难当滑板。」经此苦行三千夜，乱破将如忍侠一般无可匹敌。
E: Rappa defeated her opponent today. As they say, "The way of the ninja is long and windy, and trials and tribulations are mere amusements." After enduring this ordeal for three thousand nights, Rappa would become an unrivaled presence like Ninja Heroes.

C: 你与丹恒追上白厄，得知率军进攻圣城的「纷争」泰坦尼卡多利正是「负世」泰坦刻法勒的死敌。你与丹恒决定加入保卫圣城的战斗。
E: When you and Dan Heng found Phainon, he told you that Nikador, the Strife Titan leading the attack on the holy city, was the nemesis of Kephale, the Worldbearing Titan. You and Dan Heng chose to help defend Okhema.

C: 白厄一侧的落雷停止后，你们发现万敌正迎着落雷奔跑。
E: When the lightning bolts stopped on Phainon's side, you saw Mydei running straight through the bolts without stopping.

C: 你与吟游诗人利波交谈。利波为你吟唱了一首描绘尼卡多利疯狂的诗歌，迷迷从中收集到与悬锋城相关的记忆碎片。
E: You talked to the Bard Lipos, who sang you a poem about Nikador's madness. Mem collected memory fragments about Castrum Kremnos from the poem.

C: 你们来到悬锋城，听到万敌的战吼与尼卡多利的咆哮仍然交织。迷迷发出自信的叫声，已经准备好复现往世，只待你将记忆碎片交给它。
E: Upon arriving Castrum Kremnos, the echoes of Mydei's battle cries still mingled with Nikador's roars. Mem gave a confident chirp, already prepared to relive the past as soon as you provided the memory fragments.

C: 万敌在真言狮口处找到被两名奥赫玛卫兵监视的克拉特鲁斯，称呼其为「吾师」，邀请克拉特鲁斯换个地方说话。
E: At the Verax Leo, Mydei found Krateros, who was under watch by two Okhema guards. Mydei addressed him as his "teacher," and invited him to speak elsewhere.

C: 你们即将到达启蒙王座，迷迷在此感受到强烈的记忆。在浓厚的杀戮气息中，那刻夏与黑潮怪物战斗的场景于记忆领域复现。
E: As you approached the Luminary Throne, Mem was overwhelmed by a surge of memories. Within that thick scent of bloodlust, the scene of Anaxa locked in battle against the black tide monsters reappeared in a dimension of memories.

C: 奥赫玛元老院的名誉元老、「神礼观众」来古士出面接见那刻夏，称其有能力掐断阿格莱雅对会面的探听。那刻夏则表示无需在意监视。
E: An honorary member of Okhema's Council of Elders, Lygus, the Theoros, came to meet Anaxa. He offered to prevent Aglaea from eavesdropping, but Anaxa assured him that there was no need to care about such surveillance.

C: 那刻夏对「灵魂」的研究取得突破。以失去左眼为代价，那刻夏见到姐姐的最后一面。尽管面临渎神的指控，那刻夏仍决定推进研究。
E: Anaxa made a breakthrough in his research on souls. He sacrificed his eye and was able to see his sister one final time. Despite facing accusations of blasphemy, he decided to continue his research.

C: 丹恒来树庭搜集「天外之界」的线索，在此遇到调查树庭之灾的风堇。二人决定结伴行动，并额外寻找关于「死亡」泰坦的文献。
E: Dan Heng arrived in the Grove to search for clues about the world beyond the sky. He met Hyacine, who was investigating the Grove incident. The two of them decided to work together and also look for clues about the Death Titan.

C: 风堇被黑潮怪物团团包围，丹恒与风堇联手击退袭击。
E: Hyacine was surrounded by black tide monsters, and Dan Heng helped her defeat them.

C: 丹恒与风堇阅读遗留的手记，得知那刻夏正在进行「灵魂炼成」的研究。在黑潮入侵时，那刻夏得以实践，将自身与泰坦的火种炼合。
E: Dan Heng and Hyacine read through the notes left behind and discovered that Anaxa had been conducting research into soul transmutation. When the black tide came, Anaxa seized the opportunity to transmute and fuse himself with the Titan's Coreflame.

C: 在与你的接触中，遐蝶心中涌起治愈诅咒的希望，以为自己的触碰可以不再带来悲伤。然而残酷的现实剖白，遐蝶仍未跨越「死亡」。
E: When Castorice touched you, her heart was filled with hope. She hoped there might be a way to cure her curse — so that her hands could birth something other than separation and sorrow. However, the truth remained cruel. Castorice had not yet overcome "Death."

C: 「『君王』…『织者』…『羁客』…『医者』…」迷迷似乎在看卡牌相关的书。发现你之后，迷迷害羞地跑开了。
E: "'Ruler'... 'Weaver'... 'Traveler'... 'Healer'..." Mem seemed to be reading books on cards. After noticing you spying on them, Mem fled, embarrassed.

C: 被黑潮侵蚀的天空眷属显得更为强大。面对无法疗愈的侵蚀，风堇认为最温柔的做法是使其灵魂获得体面的解脱。
E: The black tide-corrupted Skykin seemed to be getting stronger. With the corrosion being incurable, Hyacine believed the kindest thing you could do was to liberate their souls with dignity.

C: 贼灵拒绝交出火种，认为白厄会被神火吞噬。白厄表明自己已经历一百三十四次轮回，承载一千五百九十六颗火种，并与贼灵开战。
E: The Spirithief refused to yield the Coreflame, believing that Phainon would only be consumed by the intensity of the divine fire. Phainon declared he'd endured <unbreak>134</unbreak> recurrences and borne <unbreak>1,596</unbreak> Coreflames, then challenged the Spirithief.

C: <color=#f29e38ff>第<unbreak>33550336</unbreak>次永劫回归</color>的当下，白厄与心中的英雄道别，决心继承火种、记忆与使命。但不同以往，白厄等到了你的到来。
E: By the time of <color=#f29e38ff>the <unbreak>33,550,336</unbreak>th Eternal Recurrence</color>, Phainon said farewell to the hero within, vowing to inherit the Coreflames, the memories, and the mission. But unlike all before, Phainon's long wait finally ended with your arrival.

C: 你们与音符小姐交流情报，得知知更鸟因不明原因分裂为多个形态的自己。
E: You exchanged intel with Miss Note and learned that, for some unknown reason, Robin had split into multiple versions of herself.

C: 下一次「再创世」后，翁法罗斯就会坠入「毁灭」的结局。为了阻止来古士的计划，昔涟提醒你使用识刻锚来与天外取得联系。
E: Amphoreus would fall into an ending of "Destruction" after the next "Era Nova." To prevent Lygus's plan from unfolding, Cyrene urged you to use the Chronocognitive Anchor to make contact with the world beyond the sky.

C: 自称「荒笛」之人出现，称自己并未陨落，而是拜长夜月所赐遁入忆潮，以为存续此身。「荒笛」攻击丹恒，意欲摄取「不朽」之力。
E: The self-proclaimed Terravox appeared, claiming he had not perished but rather escaped into the memoria tide thanks to Evernight, preserving his existence. Terravox then attacked Dan Heng, attempting to seize the power of the Permanence.

C: 白厄曾为纳努克带去毁伤，一滴神血熔进白厄的身躯，成为「毁灭」最后的赐福。来古士请丹恒找到长夜月的所在，并唤醒白厄的怒火。
E: Phainon had once dealt a wound to Nanook. A drop of divine blood melted into Phainon's body, becoming the Destruction's final blessing. Lygus asked Dan Heng to find Evernight and awaken Phainon's wrath.

C: 你在浴室里四下张望，发现周围空无一人。你看向浴缸，锁定藏匿者的踪迹。
E: You glanced around the bathroom and found nobody around. You looked toward the bathtub, certain that something was hiding there.

C: 真理医生称，空间站被「冥火大公」所率的泯灭帮盯上。身为火魔，「冥火大公」擅长人体自燃的把戏。真理医生邀你随他深入调查。
E: Dr. Ratio reported that the space station had been targeted by the Annihilation Gang, led by "Duke Inferno." As a fire Demon, "Duke Inferno" specialized in the art of spontaneous human combustion. Dr. Ratio invited you to join him to investigate further.

C: 阮•梅选择将造物留在空间站，与你道别。「反吐真剂」会模糊你对阮•梅的记忆，但如果你愿意，她等着与你在「无人之地」重逢。
E: Ruan Mei chose to leave her creations at the space station and bade you farewell. The "Anti-Truth Serum" would blur your memories of Ruan Mei, but if you wished, she would be waiting to reunite with you in the "No Man's Land."

C: 你们经过第三处蜃影。这位曾经的云骑战士指责丹枫背叛了他们。
E: At the third Mirage Echo, a former Cloud Knight accused Dan Feng of betraying them.

C: 你们找到最后的铜镜。出于谨慎考虑，藿藿向镜子外的雪衣提问，最终确认对方身份。你们藉由铜镜离开了幻境。
E: You found the final bronze mirror. Out of caution, Huohuo asked questions to Xueyi outside the mirror and finally confirmed her identity. With that, you used the mirror to escape the fantasia.

C: 桑博指认黑天鹅杀死了花火，而黑天鹅则称梦境中不存在死亡，接着她指出，「花火伪装成的另一名角色」就是<color=#f29e38ff>桑博</color>。
E: Sampo accused Black Swan of murdering Sparkle, but Black Swan countered that death cannot occur in dreamscapes, then revealed that the "other identity Sparkle had assumed" was none other than <color=#f29e38ff>Sampo</color> himself.

C: 列车即将开始跃迁。你坐在沙发上，静静等候失重瞬间的到来。
E: The Express prepared for warp. You sat on the sofa, quietly waiting for that moment of weightlessness.

C: 彦卿向你出示与公司相关的案呈，他需要说服公司的人接受检查。若准备好了，彦卿会先带你们前往客栈休息。
E: Yanqing showed you the report related to the IPC. He needed to convince them to accept the inspection. Once you were ready, he would first escort you to the inn for rest.

C: 椒丘探问彦卿与云璃的挥剑动机：彦卿为追寻纯粹剑道，云璃为毁尽父亲所铸魔剑。椒丘暗示彦卿，迴星港有异常现象，尔后告辞。
E: Jiaoqiu asked about Yanqing and Yunli's reasons for wielding the sword. Yanqing sought to pursue the pure swordsmanship, while Yunli vowed to destroy every cursed sword her father had forged. Before departing, Jiaoqiu hinted to Yanqing about unusual phenomena at Stargazer Navalia.

C: 你使用「挑衅」锦囊，沉默地盯着天击将军，嘴角勾起一丝挑衅的笑意。
E: You used the "Provoke Him" Strategy, silently fixing your gaze on the Merlin's Claw, a trace of a provocative smile playing at the corners of your mouth.

C: 三月七在长椅前驻足，心中升起一股与长椅聊天的冲动。云璃感到有些不耐烦，想带三月七去看看擂场。
E: March 7th paused by a bench, feeling a strange urge to chat with it. Yunli seemed impatient, wanting to take March 7th to see what the ring looks like.

C: 白露正准备为麻烦大家而道歉，桂乃芬则以自己的故事开解白露，她说自己就是因为想要逃离束缚，这才离开家人来到仙舟。
E: As Bailu prepared to apologize for causing trouble, Guinaifen reassured her by relating her own experience of leaving her family for Xianzhou to liberate herself from constraints.

C: 「白日梦」酒店-现实
E: The Reverie (Reality)

C: 模拟宇宙
E: Simulated Universe

C: 想不到理由，痛骂客户不守信。
E: You can't think of anything. You curse the client for breaking their promise.

C: 我们不要钱，只要人。
E: We don't want money, just people.

C: 你的口腔里涂满了麻醉药剂。
E: Your mouth is full of anesthetic.

C: 你靠着栏杆，眺望下面的人群。
E: You lean on the railing, observing the crowds below.

C: 热知识：球棒就是用来打棒球的，而不是打破规则的。
E: Fun fact: Bats are for hitting baseballs, not breaking rules.

C: 高兴之余，你发现自己已经超出配送距离了。
E: In your excitement, you realize you've gone beyond the delivery range.

C: 新伦蒂尼恩的工厂里，你正在和工友回收一批不合格零件。据工头说，近来「反物质军团」的活动愈发猖狂，全厂都必须加班生产。但那些焚烧银河的怪物当真存在吗？你从未见过它们，甚至连一张照片都没有……
E: In New Londinium's factory, you're sorting defective parts with your fellow workers. According to the foreman, the "Antimatter Legion" is on the rise, and overtime is mandatory. But do those galaxy-burning monsters even exist? You've never seen them, not even in a photo...

C: 阮•梅的试验舱，会把靠近的家伙关进其中，仿佛某种捕食性植物。
E: Ruan Mei's experimental capsule traps anyone who gets too close, much like a carnivorous plant.

C: 等醒来再哭泣
E: Then Wake to Weep

C: 会场等级3解锁
E: Venue Level 3 Unlocked

C: 放飞星槎
E: Release starskiff

C: 实战演练
E: Combat Drill

C: 戏台后门
E: Stage Backdoor

C: 三月七的房间
E: March 7th's Room

C: 选择「始终保持沉默」
E: Choose "Remain silent throughout"

C: 明星广告牌
E: Celebrity Billboard

C: 游玩「无敌奇物大转盘」
E: Play Unstoppable Curio Wheel

C: 环形餐桌
E: Ring-Shaped Head Table

C: 梦泡上的扑满
E: Trotter Atop A Dream Bubble

C: 战术板
E: Tactics Board

C: 校长海报
E: Dean's Poster

C: 衣柜
E: Wardrobe

C: 花盆
E: Flower Pot
