C:
「丰饶」之主在罗浮仙舟中心埋下因果的种子，赐予求药使们名为「建木」的奇迹。而奇迹之所以被称为奇迹，是因为当它发生时，人们能立刻领会它的意义。

建木缔结神实，满溢生命活力，求药使们所追求的无尽形寿蕴藏其中。从此，古老的禁忌与律法化为一纸废话，衰老与死亡的伦理也成为尘封旧史。人们遵循「仙道」对建木数度开发，使得坌土息壤掘之不尽，自在应身血肉化形，鸡犬得智能言…无数难以想象的技术，也在建木垂枝下化为有形。

然而，建木却在时间催化下逐渐褪去面纱，初露狰狞，使长寿之人开始承受长寿之苦。

仙人们繁衍不尽，却未尝一死。舰船上人满为患、饿殍遍地；仙舟社会少者郁志难伸，老者盘桓高位，更是结构崩溃、大厦将倾…金人叛乱、外敌当头，千年混乱劫余之后，人们又发现了藏在长生血脉中的黑暗，所谓「天人之体」只是超越人智的技术，堕入「魔阴身」的倾向警示仙舟人，自身与孽物仅差一步之遥。

万般绝望之时，英雄长矢破空，天裂一射，斫断建木…尽管建木烬毁成桩，但仙舟命运从未与之断绝。

它招引着外患侵凌，丰饶孽物数度入侵，开凿血肉扭曲形骸，誓将仙舟民吞噬殆尽；它也诱惑着仙舟民，药王秘传破除禁忌，深入建木丰饶之秘，重铸长生强权帝国…在漫长的外忧内患中，建木遗骸如同暗处绵延不绝的藤蔓，潜伏起来，意图择日再起灾祸。

所幸，罗浮仙舟从未对「垂死枯木」放松警惕，他们誓将一切扭曲的源头，带往一切终结的尽头。
E:
The master of Abundance buried the seed of karma in the center of the Xianzhou Luofu and gifted the Elixir Seekers with something named "Ambrosial Arbor," which was considered a miracle as people were able to immediately understand its implications.

The Ambrosial Arbor grew fruits of divinity that brimmed with life and vitality, containing the Endless Lifespan sought by the Elixir Seekers. From that moment, the ancient taboos and laws were rendered useless, and nature's dictum and ethics regarding aging and death became irrelevant history. People followed the way of immortality to exploit the Ambrosial Arbor with increasing intensity, making Fallow Earth that never exhausted itself, molding their own bodies to shapeshift, and giving the gift of thinking and talking to animals... Innumerable unimaginable technologies were brought into existence under the branches of the Ambrosial Arbor.

However, the Ambrosial Arbor took off its disguise as time went by, revealing its hideous visage as the agony of immortality crept upon the immortals.

The celestials ceaselessly reproduced, yet tasted no death. The ship groaned from overpopulation, as hunger and starvation tormented many. Xianzhou's young can never realize their life's ambitions while their elders clang to power, and society teetered at the edge of structural collapse... Rebellions of the aurumatons and external invasions marked a ruinous millennium, after which the darkness hidden in immortal bloodlines also showed its face. The so-called "Body of Celestials" was simply a technology that surpassed human intellect. The propensity to be stricken with mara was a warning to all Xianzhou natives, a reminder that they were a mere step away from becoming abominations themselves.

In desperation, a hero tore through the sky with a powerful shot from their bow, splitting the Ambrosial Arbor in half... Yet even if all there was left of the Ambrosial Arbor was a burnt stump, the fate of Xianzhou could never be separated from it.

It attracted external forces to invade Xianzhou. The Abominations of Abundance launched multitudes of assaults, where flesh was distorted and blood was spilled, for the sole purpose of devouring Xianzhou whole. The Arbor also tempted the Xianzhou residents. The Disciples of Sanctus Medicus broke the taboos and ventured deep into the secret of Abundance within the Ambrosial Arbor, hoping to reforge the once mighty immortal empire... In the long days of foreign and domestic troubles, the remaining corpus of the Ambrosial Arbor lurked like unending vines propagating in the shadows, waiting for an opportunity to wreak havoc again.

Fortunately, the Xianzhou Luofu never lowered its guard against the withered tree. The people had vowed to cast this source of all distortions into the end of all things.

C:
一场意外，慌忙逃生的星际盗贼来到了塔利亚，为了躲避「巡海游侠」的追击。

最开始的时候，塔利亚只是被称为「繁星垃圾场」的荒凉地，曾经的灭星战事给塔利亚表面带来了堆积如山的断迹残垣、弥散不去的辐射污染，同时也带走了这里的仅存生机。慌张的盗贼走投无路，却落入了星球表面之下的洞窟，那是鼠类种族曾经留下的隧道…盗贼们逃过一劫，有关「盗贼公国」的理想在遗落秘境中悄然诞生。

无数的地穴网络，互相连接，如同巨大的迷宫。更多的盗贼团体被理想吸引，来到这里积累财富、交换技术，为公国打下了基础。

越来越多的盗贼在这里定居，蛮荒的星球开始热闹非凡。大盗贼演说着「盗贼公国」的理想，承诺「金库」将用于建立人人公平的国家。但当财富越来越多时，妄图独占它的大盗贼们又撕毁了脆弱的协议。佣兵、暴乱、里应外合…混乱的战争此起彼伏，也许筹划者们从一开始就不相信所谓人人公平的理想。

于是痛恨幻想的盗贼们再次回到了「无知者为王」的混沌时代，他们抢占水源建立城镇，嘲弄着公平正义。

「钉壳镇」里人人皆是悍匪，他们驾驶着气质暴戾的越野车横征暴敛，与荒漠上其他的匪帮争夺资源，用废铁和旧电线创造了机甲和武器…越是贫瘠的废料堆上，反而越能获得末路狂欢的洒脱。那些甜美的理想如同辐射热风中的一缕狗屁，早已经没有留下什么痕迹了。

觥筹交错恍惚间，半梦半醒的盗贼们理解了，「盗贼公国」从来就不是建立什么，而在于摧毁什么。
E:
It was by pure accident that the interstellar thieves came to Talia in their hasty escape from the pursuit of the Galaxy Ranger.

At first, Talia was just a desolate place known by many as the Starry Junkyard. The planet-destroying wars of the past brought mountains upon mountains of ruins and wreckage onto the surface of Talia, resulting in imperishable radiation and taking away the last remaining hope to sustain life. The thieves had nowhere else to go and fell into a cave beneath the surface of the planet, which turned out to be a tunnel left by the rodent race... The thieves managed a narrow escape, and their dream of establishing a Kingdom of Banditry was thus discreetly born in this lost realm of seclusion.

Innumerable caverns were interconnected in a massive labyrinth. More groups of thieves and bandits were lured in by this supposed dreamland meant for them and came to accumulate wealth and exchange technology, subsequently laying the foundation for the kingdom.

As more and more thieves and bandits settled down here, the once desolate planet became extraordinarily bustling with life. Thieves of great renown spoke of their ideal of a Kingdom of Banditry, promising to use the treasury to build a nation of equity and fairness. But as the amount of accumulated wealth grew larger and larger, the same thieves tore up their flimsy promises right away and attempted to monopolize all the wealth. Mercenaries, riots, double crossings, and betrayals... Chaos ensued one after another. Perhaps the initiators never even once believed in their ideal of so-called equity for all.

Henceforth, thieves who resented lofty ideals found themselves in a chaotic age where ignorance was glorified. They seized water sources to build towns of their own and mocked the very idea of fairness and justice.

Everyone in Nailscrap Town was a bandit. They drove violently destructive off-road vehicles and fought for resources with other hordes of bandits in the desert. They created mechanical armor and weapons out of scrap iron and old wires... The more barren the wasteland was, the more freedom they got out of it, like one final frenzy before doomsday. Those sweet dreams were like wisps of nonsense in the radiating heat waves and had long ceased to leave any trace behind.

In a half-awake trance, the thieves came to the realization that the Kingdom of Banditry was never about creation but about destruction.

C:
狐人与步离人远古歌谣的开篇，无不怀念咏诵着「青丘之星」的膏腴沃土与宜居气候。但若仔细辨读，有心人会发现这只是「战争」这一恒久主题的引子。

凭借耕种经商的才能，有狐氏族傍着潺潺河川，兴建起繁华城邦；而犬戎之子则在极光浩荡的苍天下，逐猎放牧于草海之间，聚成星罗棋布的集落。商人嘲笑牧人蛮野，牧人唾弃商人狡诈。但他们都要面对自然循环严酷拷问——「狐夏」与「狼冬」。

狐神恩赐的丰收之夏中，两族休兵罢战，各得满足；一旦狼神降下白霜，雪线自极地蔓延开来，饥馑将迫使双方攻伐不休。

歌谣说到，漫无止尽的狼冬逗留不去，即便青丘的太阳周旋了三十三次。匮乏与饥馁灭顶而来，即便是图腾上崇拜的动物，人们也不得不食之果腹。预见到遍地白骨的结局后，一位救世主攀上了世间至高的山峰——在狐人神话里，人们称她为「涂山」；但在步离人歌谣里，人们称他为「都蓝」。无论那位救主所唤何名，他向长生主许愿赐予众生活下去的给养。于是山巅裂开，甘甜如醍醐的「赤泉」自缝隙中涌出。

吞饮赤泉的人们从摄食的兽肉中取得了力量、灵敏与强韧。他们的血脉中也澎湃起了兽的狂野，兽的形貌越发明显——世界就此变改，不复从前。

以赤泉为媒，新生的犬人们一切器物给养皆从中造出——田野中种植的不再是稻菽而是视肉；遮蔽身躯的不再是葛麻织物，而是胞衣；即便是令青丘文明恐惧不已的寒冷雪境，也变得不足为惧：犬人们在极地培育生物薄膜，塑成温暖的穹帐，自此将狼冬的困苦隔绝在外。

后来，青丘剧变与所有短生种化为长生种时经历的并无不同——人口膨胀、生态崩溃、内部战乱…无论犬人们向长生主如何祈告，再也没有得到回音。于是他们明白了一个道理：长生主赐予的一切已悉数具足，想要活得更好，便要靠自己夺取。

汇聚于伟大的巢父都蓝之侧，犬人们将目光探向长生主高踞的天空。群星熠熠，如同亟待奔逐的牧原。他们将为这些星星上的文明带去「狼冬」。

很久以后，宿敌仙舟人称他们为「步离人」。步离，是青丘语中「狼」的意思。
E:
The beginning of ancient foxian and borisin ballads all nostalgically sing of the "Planet of Verdantia" and its fertile soil and pleasant climate. However, upon closer inspection, the perceptive ones will realize such words are mere preludes to the eternal theme of "war."

With their talents for agriculture and commerce, some fox clans built prosperous towns next to flowing rivers. Meanwhile, the children of wolves roamed with their herd under the aurora-covered sky within the lush grasslands, forming settlements that dotted the landscape. The merchants laughed at the herders for the latter's savagery, while the herders despised the merchants for their deception. However, they both must confront the cruel torments of nature — the "Vulpesummer" and "Lupuswinter."

In the summer of rich harvests blessed by the fox deity, the two clans put down their arms and ceased warfare in mutual satisfaction. But once the wolf deity lets fall the white frost, the snowlines would spread from the poles and hunger shall drive the two clans to unceasing conflict.

The ballads mention that the Lupuswinter once stayed far beyond its due, even after the sun of Verdantia had circled the planet thirty-three times. Poverty and hunger crashed the people, and they resorted to even eating animals they once worshipped as totems. After foreseeing the end where the entire world shall be covered in bleak death, a savior climbed to the peak of the tallest mountain in that world — The foxian legends called her "Tushan," but the borisin sagas called him "Duran." No matter what this savior was called, they made a wish to the Master of Immortality, hoping for sustenance enough to keep the world's people alive. Then, the mountains split, and sweet divine nectar of Redspring poured out from the hilly ravines.

Those who drank from the Redspring obtained power, dexterity, and strength from the beast meat they devoured. Their blood, too, stirred with the ferocity of animals, and their bodily forms became increasingly bestial — Thus was this world changed, never to return to its former days.

With the Redspring as the medium, everything that the reborn canine races needed was made from this miraculous source — The fields no longer grew grain but viscorpi instead, and the garments that covered people's bodies were no longer of linen but of embryonic flesh. Even the chilly snowlands that once terrified the Verdantia civilizations were no longer a concern, for the canine races cultivated biological membranes in the polar regions to craft into warm dome-shaped tents, blocking the impoverished Lupuswinter beyond this barrier.

Then, things changed in the Planet of Verdantia, just like how things changed for every short-life species that became long-life — There was population explosion, ecological collapse, internal warfare... And no matter how hard the canine races prayed to the Master of Immortality, they never heard another reply. Then, the people understood the truth: Everything that the Master of Immortality could give had been given, and if the people wished to have better lives, they must take more by themselves.

Gathered around Duran the great Brood Lord, the canine races cast their sight into the sky where the Master of Immortality dwelled. The stars sparkled like a grassland waiting to be conquered with fast steads, and they will bring the "Lupuswinter" to the civilizations on those planets.

Much later, their sworn enemies dubbed them "borisin," for it signified "wolf" in the vernacular of Verdantia.

C: 「求药使」曾寻得一颗已然腐烂的异木果实：它的表皮色泽变得诡异，由澄黄褪色为粉蓝。为求药理，双胞胎求药使一前一后，分别吞下了异木果实与腐化的异木果实：他们一人拥抱蜕变，一人当场毙命——但因没有第三者在场，无人知晓幸存的是双子中的哪一位，他吞下的又是哪颗果实。
E: The Elixir Seekers once found a rotten Fruit of the Alien Tree. The color of its skin was already odd, having shifted from a faint yellow to powdery blue. To understand the pharmacology behind this fruit, a pair of Elixir Seeker twins separately ingested a normal Fruit of the Alien Tree and a rotten version. One of them immediately welcomed metamorphosis while the other instantly perished - But because there was no third party present, no one could confirm which twin survived, or which fruit he consumed.

C: 委托的讯息落入晶状体深处，准确无误的坐标信息。你穿过认知识别场的屏蔽，买下一张通往市郊的船票和<unbreak>10</unbreak>立方的氧气使用权，踏上摇摇欲坠的公寓楼梯。一台智械，运行时长不足<unbreak>10000</unbreak>个系统时的小年轻。仇杀，情杀，还是商业上的仇敌？你穿过隔离门，将枪口对准他的眉心。\n\n他困惑，逻辑回路迅速理解了现状。他知道是谁想要杀他，也知道为什么。所以，他付给你一笔丰厚的报酬。带着一颗核心回去，带着两颗头颅离开。冤冤相报，以杀相抵，你并无好奇，你只是实现他们的愿望而已。
E: Information of the commission sinks into the depths of the crystal, delivering precise and unambiguous coordinates. You navigate through the shielding of the cognitive recognition field, purchase a ticket to the outskirts of the city and access rights to ten cubic meters of oxygen before ascending the creaky stairs to the rickety apartment. An Intellitron with less than <unbreak>10,000</unbreak> system hours of runtime — a young man. Is it a vendetta, a love affair, or a business feud? You pass through the quarantine door, gun aimed squarely at his brow.\n\nConfused, his logic circuits rapidly process the situation. He knows who is trying to kill him — and why. So, he pays you handsomely. You return with a core and leave with two heads. If revenge breeds more revenge, then let death end the chain of hatred. It's not curiosity driving you. You're merely fulfilling their wishes.

C:
让我来讲述一群报团取暖的懦夫吧，我对他们嗤之以鼻。
人的一生会开启无数道门扉，每扇背后都是未知的风景，
只有最后一扇确凿无疑，它打开的是火与灰烬。
这门散放着腐烂的气息，你不敢靠近，但背后有人推着你进去，
你强装镇定，却抑制不住内心的恐惧。
面对这个万古难题，鼠辈们聚在一起，
他们穿着丧衣招摇过市，说服人们与他们携手同行。
哦，说是同行，只不过是共赴一场盛大的葬礼，
那手挽手奔向死亡之门的模样，多么滑稽。
可塞纳托斯的手轻轻拂过，哪管你是百万还是一。
E:
Let me tell you the story of cowards huddling together for warmth, whom I scorn.
In life, countless doors open, each concealing an unknown landscape.
But the last door is certain. It opens to fire and ashes.
It reeks of decay. Though you dare not to approach, a relentless force behind you pushes you forward.
You pretend to be calm but cannot suppress the fear inside.
Faced with this eternal conundrum, the weaklings gathered.
They paraded in mourning clothes, persuading others to join their ranks.
But what they joined was nothing more than a grand funeral.
How ridiculous it is, rushing hand-in-hand towards the door of death.
Yet, the hand of Thanatos gently swept over, regardless of whether there were a million or just one.

C: 阮•梅（其三）

C: 颓唐的自灭者中流传着一个说法：即宇宙万物并无意义，人类在星神眼里亦不值一提。如果星神当真凌驾众生，高高在上，又怎会在乎凡人的爱恨苦乐？沉眠无相者Ⅸ的存在就是明证。为了向自灭者证明星神在乎，混沌医师结合秘学僧侣的巫神术制造了星神火漆，据说盖下这枚火漆，就会遥遥吸引对应星神跨越时空的瞥视——目前还没有成功案例，不过，确实有些自灭者盖下火漆后，重拾了对宇宙、星神及其它一切的信心。
E: There is a saying amongst the dejected Self-Annihilators that the universe has no purpose and humans are nothing in the eyes of the Aeons. If the Aeons truly stand above all lifeforms and rule supreme, then why would they care about the everyday concerns of mortals? The existence of the sleeping and shapeless IX is proof of that. To show the Self-Annihilators that the Aeons do care, the Doctors of Chaos combined the demon god crafts of the occult monks to create the Sealing Wax of Aeons. It is said that stamping with this Sealing Wax will attract a glimpse from the corresponding Aeon from across space and time — There are no successful examples yet, but some Self-Annihilators did regain their faith in the universe, Aeons, and everything else after stamping with this sealing wax.

C: 仙舟人不认得棺椁。  每当罗刹带着棺材出现在街上时，都会引来好奇的目光。  如果有人问罗刹：「这东西究竟是什么？」  罗刹总会搪塞道：「这是我做生意的用具。」  「『做生意的用具』…希望我没有冒犯到你，」罗刹站在长乐天的亭台上，漫不经心地说道，「不过你我之间的关系，倒也算是一桩生意，不是吗？」  棺材以沉默作答。
E: The people of Xianzhou do not recognize coffins. Each time Luocha emerged on the streets with the coffin, curious gaze followed. If someone were to ask him, "What exactly is this?" Luocha will answer, vaguely, "This is the tool of my trade." "Tool of my trade... I hope I didn't offend you," Luocha stood in a pavilion in the Exalting Sanctum, murmuring to himself, "But then again, our relationship does count as a business relationship, doesn't it?" The coffin responded with silence.

C: 又到了将士出征的时候。 但那恐怖的死状，居高不下的死亡率，终日喧响的炮火，浮现于天空的庞然巨物，预示着这场战争不同以往的惨烈。 直到那一日，高耸入云的「瞰云镜」承载联盟万亿众生的愿力，终于得到了祂的回应。 灼热的气浪毫无征兆地出现，弱小的丰饶孽物化作血雾，不可直视的光撕开天穹。 他看到光浪所及之处，一切山峦化为齑粉。 他看到未来得及撤离的仙舟军团和丰饶孽物一起化为尘埃。 他听说紧跟月御将军的少女在即将覆灭的敌阵中奔走，试图带回剩余的士兵。 在光之海的巨浪到达之前，他尽全力救下少女，而后在光芒的余波中失去了意识。 …… 残破的军旗在风中猎猎作响，寥寥无几的幸存者围在火堆旁，无言对坐。 叮当，叮当，叮当—— 坑坑洼洼的鼎镬被狂风吹着，在原野上滚动。 身体理应早就习惯了所驻扎的这颗星球上的寒冷，但他从来都没觉得那么冷过，从里到外，都是冰凉的。 他拾起铁锅，加水，烧开，放入所剩无几的食材，动作一气呵成。 「还是好冷……」 幸存者默默地咀嚼着食物，没有人说话。 「放点辣吧。」 他取出随身携带的药袋。 「不够辣。」 他放下了更多的辣椒。 「还是不够。」 他将随身携带的香料全数倒进鼎镬中。 「没有更多了。」 红油翻滚，他夹起野菜放进嘴中，当麻木的味觉被激活的时候，他第一次如此强烈地感到生命的存在—— 那是近乎于痛的滋味。
E: It was time once again for the army to move out. However, grisly bodies of the dead, the perpetually high death rate, ongoing blasts of artillery fire, and a monstrous creature that appeared in the air were all portents that heralded a devastating war unlike anything that had ever occurred before. Until one day, when the towering Cloudpeer Telescope that bore the wills of the trillions of living beings aboard the Xianzhou finally received a response from THEM. A searing blast appeared out of nowhere, obliterating the weak Abominations of Abundance into a miasma of blood. A light so blindingly bright that tore the sky asunder. Even mountains and hills that the light reached turned into dust. He saw the Abominations of Abundance and members of the Xianzhou Legion that were slow to retreat crumble to dust. He heard about how the girl always by General Yueyu's side weaved in and out of the annihilated enemy ranks, attempting to bring the remaining soldiers back with her. Before the wave of light could reach them, he dashed in with every last ounce of his strength to save that young lady before losing his consciousness in the afterglow of the obliterating light. ... Tattered banners thrashed in the wind as the few remaining survivors gathered around the bonfire in silence. Clank, clank, clank... A strong gust of wind swept across, rolling a battered cauldron along the barren ground. His body should have long acclimated to the frigid cold climate given the time he had been stationed on this planet. But he had never felt this cold before. He was cold from the inside out. In a seasoned manner, he picked up the iron receptacle, filled it with water, and brought it to a boil before throwing in scraps of leftover ingredients. "It's still so cold..." The survivors ate their food in silence. "Maybe I should add some spice." With that, he retrieved the medicine pouch that he always carried with him. "Not spicy enough." He added more chili peppers to the mix. "Not there yet." He emptied every spice he had on him into the cauldron. "That's it." As oil from the chili bubbled, he used chopsticks to pick up a wild vegetable from the cauldron to taste. When his already numbed sense of taste finally picked up on the spice, it was the first time that he felt so strongly, so utterly alive. It was a sensation that bordered on pain.

C: 天纵之剑的残影
E: Heavenly Blade's Afterimage

C: 赛飞儿：跃然得逞
E: Cipher: Leap to Triumph

C: 你乘上了神奇的星穹列车，现在熟悉一下乘员和设施吧！今后，这里就是你的家了。
E: You boarded the amazing Astral Express, and it's time to get familiar with its passengers and facilities! From now on, this will be your home.

C: 为了逃脱追捕，你们冲进了裂界。可你们怎会突然沦落至此？三月七也无法解释，因为她的人设只是一位单纯可爱的少女。\n不过，你们迅速达成共识：当务之急是找到裂界的出口，其他事项等离开这片险地再作商议。
E: You rush into the Fragmentum to avoid getting caught. How come things went downhill so quickly? March 7th has no clue — she's written as an innocent and sweet teenage girl after all.\nDespite the initial shock, you quickly agree on the course of action: Find the way out of the Fragmentum first. Everything else can wait.

C: 希露瓦轻车熟路地带着你们来到了能源中枢前，但此处仍有面露凶光的银鬃铁卫把守着关口——尽管你根本看不到他头盔下的脸。\n可惜，冰雪聪明的希露瓦此番故技重施没能撬开大兵的嘴…没办法，去找找他提到的那位邓恩吧。\n希露瓦似乎是那位队长的熟人——没准此次交涉将会前所未有地轻松呢？
E: Serval brings you to the energy hub, but there is a ferocious Silvermane Guard watching the place. You can tell his expression even without being able to see the face underneath his helmet. \nClever Serval repeats her tricks but is unable to elicit the desired reaction from the soldier... With no other options left, let's try to find that Dunn person that the soldier mentioned. \nServal seems to be an acquaintance of the captain — Maybe it will be far easier than the previous encounters?

C: 故事尘埃落定，布洛妮娅继任成为大守护者，上下层区再次交融，组建成了完整的贝洛伯格。\n你们与布洛妮娅道别完毕，但在离开雅利洛-Ⅵ之前，三月七似乎还有没完成的心愿…\n再在城市里逛一圈，把那些值得纪念的人和物用快门记录下来吧。
E: The story ended and Bronya succeeded as the Supreme Guardian. The Overworld and Underworld reunited to create a complete Belobog.\nYou bid farewell to Bronya, but March 7th still has some unfulfilled wishes before you leave Jarilo-VI...\nTake another stroll in the city and record with your camera the people and things you want to commit to memory.

C: 工造司，司掌仙舟发明与制造的部门。抵达工造司时，入口处人头攒动。这倒是不出意料：覆巢之灾，难有完卵。只是若不打开大门瞧瞧，也不知里面到底发生了什么麻烦事。
E: The Artisanship Commission is the department responsible for inventions and manufacturing in Xianzhou. People are crowding around its entrance, which is to be expected from individuals when the entire state is in peril. However, it's impossible for you to know what is happening inside without opening the doors to take a look.

C: 流萤向你解释了此处是为何地：黄金时刻的边境，梦境的更深处，家族的建设改造地（换句话说，梦中的工地），她还补充说，自己的「秘密据点」就在深处…只是「家族」眼线密布，两人得偷偷溜进去才行。\n通向深处的道路扑朔迷离，恐怕你得开动脑筋，活用梦境的性质才能继续前进。
E: Firefly explains this place to you: It is the edge of the Golden Hour, the inner depths of the Dreamscape, and The Family's construction and remodeling zone (in other words, a construction site within the dream). She adds that her "secret stronghold" is further on... The only problem is that "The Family" has eyes everywhere, and you will have to sneak in to get inside.\nThe path into the depths is complicated and confusing. You may have to think outside of the box and creatively utilize the characteristics of the Dreamscape to continue onwards.

C: 你似乎在大堂中心看到了一个模糊但熟悉的人影——她是谁？又为什么会出现在这里？\n以及…这真的是个好消息吗？
E: You seem to see a blurred but familiar figure in the center of the lobby — Who is she? Why would she appear here?\nAnd... Is this really a good thing?

C: 你拜托博学的拉帝奥教授帮你前往沉思室找一座弹珠机模型。真为他感到开心！
E: You ask the knowledgeable Dr. Ratio to help you look for a pinball machine model in the Meditation Room. So happy for him!

C: 流萤向你解释了此前她种种不寻常举动背后的深层原因，并指引你下潜至家族宣扬的「噩梦」——美梦之外的原初忆域——「流梦礁」。而这一举动也揭露了「死亡」的部分真相：不过是协助有心之人往返美梦的驯化迷因，而「闭上眼睛」则是唤来它的奇妙咒语。\n你们乘坐电梯向上，轿厢的老旧部件吱呀作响，仿佛旧日的灵魂幽幽哀叹。在这「噩梦」深处等待着你的，究竟会是什么呢？
E: Firefly explains to you the deeper reasons behind her various inexplicable behaviors, and guides you to dive deeper into a place declared as a "nightmare" by The Family... The primitive Memory Zone outside of the sweet dream: "Dreamflux Reef." This move also exposes some of the truths behind "Death" — It is nothing but a tamed memetic entity that assists specific people who wish to travel between dreams. "Closing your eyes" is merely a strange invocation used to summon them.\nAs you ascend in the elevator, the sound of the old car parts creaking and groaning sounds like the lamenting cries of long-dead souls. Just what could be awaiting you in the depths of this "nightmare"?

C: 第二次选择！你和流萤来到了「戏梦奇战•枪火时间•枪火的试炼」的舞台。根据引导员的说法，你们将扮演钟表小子动画系列亦正亦邪、充满魅力的形象——哈努兄弟。\n「这到底是要比什么？」你想，「比谁的『哼』更酷吗？」
E: The second choice! You and Firefly arrive at the Dreamplay Fantasia — Gunfire Time: Gunfire Trial arena. According to the guide's instructions, you need to play the role of the evil-retributing, charisma-overflowing character from the Clockie series — Brother Hanu.\n"What is this competition supposed to be about?" You wonder. "Are we trying to see who has the coolest 'hmph'?"

C: 时间回退至你们尚未离开流梦礁的时间点。姬子从黄金的时刻归来，更捎来了一个强有力的推断：「钟表匠」怀中空无一物的梦泡与门童米沙或许有着千丝万缕的联系。\n为了求证，你们携米沙一道，再次进入米哈伊尔的梦泡——如无意外，一切真相就潜藏在这段稚子的长梦中。
E: Time reverses to the point before you left Dreamflux Reef. Himeko returns from Golden Hour with a powerful deduction: There may be some inextricable link between the empty dream bubble that the Watchmaker is holding and Misha the bellboy.\nIn order to prove it, you take Misha back into Mikhail's dream bubble... If everything goes as expected, the truth may be lurking here in this long dream of the child.

C:
致未来的无名客：

我一直在等你，未来的无名客。虽然我不知道你从哪里来，不知道你的模样，也不知道你的名字…但现在就请让我称呼你为「开拓者」吧。
而你想必已经知道我是谁了——星穹列车曾经的一介机修工，一名才疏学浅的学徒，一个碌碌终身的可怜老人。我踏上「开拓」之旅，只为学习生活本身和与它有关的一切。可当我习得越多，困惑和烦恼便越是加增。我以为自己能够学会如何更好地生活，但我学到的却是如何体面地迎接命中注定的结局——「虚无」。
或与之对抗、或听天由命，人们总会找到答案，但它们都不属于「开拓」。不过，我想这问题太过深奥，就算是阿基维利本人恐怕也无法给出专属于「开拓」的唯一解答。但身为无名客——身为人——我们拥有思考的权利。我们有行动的权利。我们有定义自己结局的权利。我们有前进的权利。走向结局的路上，人能做的事有很多，而结局也会因此展现截然不同的意义。一位无名客不会耽于一时的美梦，更不会因痛苦和磨难放弃与生俱来的权利。

还记得我在邀请函中留下的问题吗，开拓者，「生命因何而沉睡」？

「人们沉睡，是为了最终从梦中醒来」——这就是一位垂垂老矣的无名客穷尽一生得出的解答。
E:
Dear future Nameless:

I have been waiting for you all this time, future Nameless. Though I know not where you come from, what you look like, or even your name... For now, please allow me to call you the "Trailblazer".
I am sure you have learned of who I am by now... A former Astral Express maintenance engineer, an apprentice of little promise, and an old man who lived an entirely unremarkable existence. I set out on the Trailblazing journey so I might learn about life itself and everything within. However, the more I learned, the more I found myself lost in confusion and distress. I thought that I would be able to learn how to live a better life, but all I learned was how to elegantly face the ending fate has paired you with... "Nihility".
Everyone in life will eventually find their own answer — to resist or to obey fate — but these questions do not belong to Trailblaze. Although, I fear this question may simply be too profound. I fear even Akivili THEMSELF would not be able to provide a single answer that is unique to Trailblaze. However, as a Nameless... as a person... we have the right to reflect. We have the right to act. We have the right to define our own endings. We have the right to move forward. As we advance down the road to our own ending, there are many things that people are capable of, and our endings will thus take on a completely new meaning. A Nameless does not indulge in temporary dreams, nor would they forsake their birth rights due to pain and suffering.

Do you still recall the question I left in my invitation letter, Trailblazer? "Why does life slumber?"

"People slumber so that, eventually, they can awaken from their dreams." ...This is the answer that an old Nameless devoted his entire life to finding.

C: 匹诺康尼的故事已经——接近——告一段落，你终于得以和伙伴们共同度过一段清闲的时光。\n列车组在舒翁的酒吧齐聚，并准备以调饮的方式纪念逝去的伙伴、同时也合庆新生的希望。\n姬子发来消息，通知你们可以登船了。
E: The story of Penacony has (nearly) drawn to a conclusion, and you can finally spend some of your free time with your friends.\nThe Crew members gather at Siobhan's establishment and get ready to mix a few drinks in memory of those who lost their lives — while also celebrating the promise of new life.\nHimeko sends a message informing you that you may board the ship.

C: 你终于来到了真正的折纸大学，方才的怪梦可能只是厌学症的表现…但看看这所流光溢彩的华丽校园，看看这群热情洋溢的精英校友，还有什么好怕的呢？让玫瑰色的青春吞噬灰色的你吧！\n去找三月七与丹恒——你未来的好同学打个招呼吧。
E: You finally step into the real Paperfold University. The bizarre dream back then might just be a manifestation of your fear of school... But what is there to fear now that you've seen this glittering and magnificent campus, together with the passionate elite classmates? Let the rosy vitality of youth consume your gray!\nGo say hello to Dan Heng and March 7th, your future classmates.

C: 草原…熟悉的呼喊…麦芽汁的香气……\n大多数人都生活在平静的绝望中。
E: The prairie... the familiar shouts... and the smell of malt juice...\nMost people lead lives of quiet desperation.

C: 「圣城」奥赫玛…据说是如今的末世长夜中，唯一的永昼之地。我们决定在城中游历一番，了解此处风土人情，同时收集可靠信息。
E: Okhema, the holy city... It is said to be the only place with eternal daylight amidst the end times' long night. We decide to tour the city to familiarize ourselves with the area and gather reliable information.

C: 好在「粉霞天女」风波结束得够快，黄金裔们暂未发觉。为感谢我们先前从尼卡多利手中保护奥赫玛，阿格莱雅似有谢礼要送。
E: Fortunately, the "Rosy Celestial Maiden" fiasco was quickly resolved before the Chrysos Heirs discovered it. As a token of gratitude for saving Okhema from Nikador, Aglaea seems to have prepared a special gift for us.

C: 借黄金狮首之口，{NICKNAME}一行人得知疯溃的尼卡多利正在酝酿针对奥赫玛的恐怖袭击。事已至此，唯有继续前进，挫败恶意的源头。
E: Through Chryseus Leo, {NICKNAME} and the party learned that the maddened Nikador is planning a devastating attack on Okhema. With events taking this dire turn, their only option is to press forward and eliminate the source of this malevolence.

C: 尼卡多利以神躯之百死淬炼剑刃，试图挥动「天谴之锋」刺穿远方的奥赫玛城。危急时刻，万敌独自殿后拖住尼卡多利，而其余人则回到奥赫玛，商议破局之法。
E: Nikador invoked the Body of a Hundred Deaths to temper blades, aiming to swing the Blade of Fury to pierce the distant Okhema. In this moment of crisis, Mydei held off Nikador alone, giving the rest of the party a chance to return to Okhema and strategize a way to counter this threat.

C: 我们成功进入了三相神殿。只是，欧洛尼斯并不欢迎我们，反而以各种谜题刁难，阻止我们进入神殿深处。
E: We successfully entered the Temple of the Three Fates. However, Oronyx does not welcome our presence and complicates our path with various puzzles, blocking us from reaching the temple's deeper chambers.

C: 为尽可能安全地推行计划，遐蝶与{NICKNAME}决定融入祭典，与一名沉默的斗士组成三人小组，向悬锋城深处进发。
E: To execute their plan as safely as possible, Castorice and {NICKNAME} decided to blend into the festival celebration, forming a trio with a silent warrior and venturing deeper into Castrum Kremnos.

C: 遐蝶向寡言的斗士格奈乌斯坦露了此行的目的。一行人继续前行，沿途收集情报，誓要将尼卡多利的五瓣神魂归位，阻止不死神躯的诞生、重铸纷争泰坦的荣耀。
E: Castorice reveals the true purpose of our mission to Gnaeus, the silent gladiator. The party presses on, gathering information on the way, vowing to return Nikador's five soul fragments to their rightful place to prevent the creation of their immortal divine body, and to reforge the glory of the Strife Titan.

C: 尼卡多利一战，以黄金裔的胜利作结。我们返回奥赫玛，经过休整，将一同见证泰坦火种的归还与火种试炼的开启。
E: The battle with Nikador ends with the Chrysos Heirs' victory. We return to Okhema to rest and recover. Together, we will witness the return of the Titan's Coreflame and the start of the Coreflame's trial.

C: 故障的根本原因是窃忆者的入侵。将问题连根拔起后，黑塔即将正式进入命途狭间，觐见博识尊。
E: The root cause of the malfunction is an invasion of Memosnatchers. After uprooting the problem, Herta is about to formally enter the Path Space to seek an audience with Nous.

C: 黑潮的造物在树庭四处游荡…这并不是个好消息，临此浩劫，树庭恐怕凶多吉少。向阿格莱雅报告后，{NICKNAME}他们继续向树庭深处前进调查。
E: Black tide creations roaming throughout the Grove... this doesn't bode well. In this calamity, the Grove's fate looks grim. After reporting to Aglaea, {NICKNAME}'s group continues deeper into the Grove to investigate.

C: 浴场中多人离奇昏倒，经风堇诊断，病因竟是水温过高。而其幕后黑手究竟是…？
E: Multiple visitors suddenly pass out in the baths. Hyacine's examination shows an unexpected reason: overheated water. But who is the culprit...?

C: 元老院如你所料派出了使者抢在阿格莱雅行动前将你带到了黎明云崖。在这里，你将接受众元老们的庇护。\n凯妮斯就像是条诡诈的毒蛇，想要获得她的信任并不容易。
E: The Council of Elders dispatched a messenger, as you anticipated, to escort you to Dawncloud before Aglaea could make her move. Here, you will be under the Elders' protection.\nCaenis is like a cunning snake. Gaining her trust will not be easy.

C: 前去友爱之馆前，查看沿途是否有遗漏的资料。\n黑潮怪物袭击了此处的学者，慌乱之中，不少资料也遗落此处。\n希望能有塞纳托斯相关的情报。
E: Before heading to the Library of Philia, look for any documents left behind along the way.\nMany documents were scattered when scholars fled from the black tide creatures.\nThere might be information about Thanatos.

C: 公民大会关于「暂停逐火之旅」的议题也即将迎来尾声，众人也将见证「投票选出的明天」究竟是何模样。\n你的十五个门扉时终将结束，最后一场表演即将开幕。
E: The citizens' assembly on the matter of "Pausing the Flame-Chase Journey" is coming to an end. Soon, everyone will witness what "vote-decided tomorrow" they will experience.\nYour fifteen Entry Hours are done. The last performance is about to begin.

C: 赛飞儿将刻法勒的火种带至斯缇科西亚保护起来，并独自解决了前来抢夺的「清洗者」。只是，威胁并非只有元老院的刺客，于此同时，盗火行者的身影也已触抵冥岸。
E: Cipher brought Kephale's Coreflame to Styxia for safeguarding, then single-handedly fended off the Cleaners who sought to seize it. Yet the threat goes beyond the Council's assassins, for at the same moment, the Flame Reaver's figure has settled upon the nether shore.

C: 你们很强吗？强有什么用？匹诺康尼讲的不是打打杀杀，是人情世故。
E: You think you're tough? So what? Penacony isn't about fists and firepower. It's about people and connections.

C: 退场歌已经奏响，剧目将近尾声…但在此之前，沉默无言的观众将会为你献上掌声，庆贺你完成了这场悲剧，庆贺你将走向下一场悲剧。\n走向他渴望的悲剧。\n将观众逐出神话的剧场，或是让这场剧目成为万物的绝唱。
E: The music for the curtain call has begun to play, and the show nears its end... But before that, the silent audience will offer you their applause, celebrating your completion of this tragedy, commemorating your path toward the next tragedy.\nToward the tragedy he yearns for.\nEither banish the audience from this mythical theater, or let this performance become the swan song of all creation.

C: 烈阳焚毁了神悟树庭之下的祭坛，那是「大地」的封印。在我到达神悟树庭之后，这里俨然已受到了「记忆」的影响，「毁灭」既是偶然也是必然，我必须继续前进，深入迷雾之中。\n在我这副躯体的「记忆」之中的丹枫？若是能助我，不妨与我继续同行好了……
E: The Blazing Sun ravaged the altar beneath the Grove of Epiphany, which was the seal of "Earth." By the time I arrived, the Grove was already warped by the Remembrance. Destruction is accidental, yet inevitable. I must press on, deeper into the mist.\nDan Feng is within the "memories" of this vessel of mine? If you'd lend your strength, then stay your path with me...

C: 多亏了星期日与长夜月的短暂碰撞，得以让潜伏起来的黑天鹅锁定了长夜月的藏身处，并沿着命途的河流逆流而上。\n忆庭决不允许黑天鹅擅自行动，而黑天鹅也不知道自己将面对什么……
E: Thanks to the brief collision between Sunday and Evernight, Black Swan, who had been lurking, managed to lock onto Evernight's hideout and travel upstream along the currents of the Path.\nThe Garden of Recollection would never allow Black Swan to act on her own, while she had no idea what she was about to face...

C: 突破屏障之后，螺丝咕姆发现一处有趣的信号——「神话之外」。去会会现实中的智械哥，从他脑袋里找出德谬歌的线索吧。
E: After breaking through the barrier, Screwllum detects an intriguing signal: Exomyth. It's time to meet the old Intellitron in reality and find clues about the Demiurge from his head.

C: 绝望，是救世主执念的另一部分。唯有同时卸下沉重的愿望与滚烫的绝望，白厄自己的心愿才能够得到解放。
E: Despair is another part of the Deliverer's obsession. Only by letting go of both the heavy wishes and burning despair can Phainon's own heart be set free.

C: 时光归墟…这里是权杖的内核层。白厄就在此处，以怒火铸就监牢，镇压着铁墓的恨意。若想与绝灭大君正面对敌，我们就必须踏上最后一次逐火之旅，收拢由众黄金裔升擢的泰坦们的命运，在他们的帮助下走到白厄面前，消融烈阳的执念。
E: The Ruins of Time... This is the kernel of the Scepter. Here stands Phainon, who forged a prison with rage to contain the hatred of Irontomb. If we wish to face the Lord Ravager head-on, we must embark on our final Flame-Chase Journey, gather the destinies of the Chrysos Heirs who have ascended into Titans, and reach Phainon with their aid to dissolve the Blazing Sun's obsession.

C: 从一页永恒返回战场吧。让记忆与爱成为我们的弓矢，平息那无首巨匠的劫火，为银河的未来做出截然不同的证明——宇宙的答案绝非「毁灭」，在沉重的终幕背后，会亮起希望的起始。
E: Return to the battlefield from An Eternal Page. Let remembrances and love be our bow and arrow to quell the headless giant's karmic flames and prove a different path for the Cosmos's future. The answer to the universe will never be the Destruction. Hope's beginning shall shine forth behind the heavy curtain of the final act.

C: 零件已经到手，修复中继器不在话下。仔细查阅过往那些互通心意的通讯记录，却未料到意外藏于阴影之下……
E: Now that you have the parts, it is only a matter of time before the repeater is fixed. You carefully read through the heartfelt communication records only to unexpectedly find an accident hidden in the shadows...

C: 为了忘却的纪念——阿兰请你帮忙拍下呜呜伯们围在纪念碑旁的照片。
E: A commemoration held in order to forget — Arlan asks you to help snap a photo of Wubbaboos surrounding the monument.

C: 维修工程师为你联通了终端机的数据，现在你可以使用终端机了。
E: The engineer helps you gain access to the data in the terminal. Now you can use it.

C: 黑塔告诉你空间站的泡泡叫做「忆泡」，里面装着流光忆庭从宇宙各地弄来的珍贵记忆（此事须得保密）。现在你拥有了权限，该去看看忆庭收藏的记忆究竟是些什么了……
E: Herta informs you that the space station's bubbles are called Memory Bubbles, and they contain precious memories that the Garden of Recollection had obtained from all over the universe (this needs to be kept confidential). Now that you have clearance, you should go and see what the memories that the Garden had collected are...

C: 虽然一度追上了冥火，但是穿梭空间的特性它又一次成功逃脱
E: Despite catching up to the infernal fire, its ability to shuttle through space allows it to escape again.

C: {NICKNAME}的开拓日报：\n刷脸，见布洛妮娅。
E: {NICKNAME}'s Trailblaze Daily Report:\nUsing my reputation to get an audience with Bronya.

C: 你凭自己的聪明才智，很快便解决了矿车工老师傅布置的矿车难题。\n去问问他有何奖励吧——这种环节通常都会有奖励，不是吗？
E: With your ingenuity, you quickly solve the mine cart puzzle set up by the senior mine cart operator.\nGo ask him about the reward — there is usually a reward for this kind of task, isn't there?

C: 在你帮他找到两件丢失的矿具后，桑博如约给了你报酬——一张神秘的藏宝图。尽管上面的痕迹看上去有些古怪，但你相信桑博应该不敢骗你。究竟埋了些什么宝贝呢，你急切地想去寻宝了。
E: After you help him find two lost mining tools, Sampo gives you the reward as promised, a mysterious treasure map. The marks on it look odd, but you don't think Sampo would dare to scam you. What kind of treasure is buried in this location? You can't wait to start the treasure hunt.

C: 虎克大人自己准备的藏宝图，自己却看不懂，意料之外，情理之中。\n幸好，你还有在矿区捡到的家用寻物仪——查宝。可以用它来找找看看。
E: Hook can't read her own treasure map, which is understandable.\nFortunately, you took Findie, the Home-Use Object Finder you found in the mine, with you. Give it a try.

C: 竟然还有抢走商品委托合同的机器人，这个世界里的机器人比人聪明得太多了吧。\n就在这机械墓场里，有一只鬼鬼祟祟的机器人，你肯定能从一模一样的机器人里找到它…大概！
E: The robots in this world are even smarter than humans, and one of them stole a commodity contract.\nThere is a suspicious robot in this machine graveyard. You're pretty sure you can identify it in an ocean of similar robots... if you're lucky!

C: 拳赛观众们的无情的话语令你越发担心科鲁泽，在苦寻无觅后，你决定找史考特问问科鲁泽的下落。作为俱乐部的老板，你知道史考特肯定知道些内情。
E: The cold words of the boxing audience make you even more worried for Kluzer. Having done a long hard search without success, you decide to ask Scott about Kluzer's whereabouts. As the owner of the club, he must know something.

C: 娜塔莎告诉你诊所一直收到匿名的爱心包裹的隐秘。尽管娜塔莎并不知道背后的好心人是谁，但你和她还是决定把这位匿名人士的爱心，传递到更多有需要的人手里。
E: Natasha tells you that the clinic keeps receiving anonymous care packages. She doesn't know who is doing this, but you two decide to spread their love and care to those in need.

C: 你在铁卫禁区再次遇到了希莉儿…她已经不再是一个小女孩了。\n起效了——希莉儿似乎终于找回了一些属于她的记忆碎片。\n加把劲——再解开一次箱子谜题，或许她就能彻底找回自我……
E: You bump into Cyrille again in the Silvermane Guard Restricted Zone... And she's no longer a little girl.\nIt worked — she finally seems to have regained some of her memory fragments.\nKeep at it. Solve another puzzle for her, and maybe she'll be able to completely rediscover herself...

C: 向邓恩了解现场状况
E: Find out more about the on-site situation from Dunn

C: 享用过露营餐后，两位女孩的目的已十分了然——在极光来临之前，两位女孩决定在营地中促膝长谈，以便打发漫长的时间。
E: After they've had a meal, the girls' goals are now clear. They decide to have a long chat to spend time before the aurora emerges.

C: 卢卡在和史瓦罗的对决中战至昏迷。醒来之后，他仍然不愿意向你和希儿透露这些「试炼」背后的真正意图。\n但希儿并不打算轻易放过卢卡，而是想要一探背后的究竟。\n希儿已经发现了卢卡的行踪，去镇上和她汇合吧。
E: Luka fought until he passed out in his battle with Svarog. He still refuses to tell you and Seele the true purpose behind his "trial" even after he woke up.\nHowever, Seele is not planning to let Luka off the hook. She wants to understand the truth behind it all.\nSeele had already found where Luka is. Go and meet up with her in town.

C: 原来，贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆的展品遭遇了一连串的莫名失窃。\n为了找回失窃的展品，你和佩拉决定前往大矿区调查。
E: It turns out there has been a series of thefts in the Belobog History and Culture Museum.\nTo find the lost exhibits, Pela and you decide to head to the Great Mine to investigate the matter.

C: 工业展区的雕塑「齿轮与智慧」失窃了，你和佩拉来到下层区的机械聚落调查此事。\n没想到，你们居然从故障的机器人体内发现了「齿轮与智慧」的组件。\n继续找到其它出现故障的机器人，收集零件吧。
E: The sculpture Gears and Wisdom in the Industrial Exhibit was stolen. Pela and you arrive at the Robot Settlement in the Underworld to investigate this matter.\nYou did not expect to find parts of Gears and Wisdom inside the malfunctioning robot.\nKeep looking for other malfunctioning robots and collect the parts.

C: 用于投影展示的「微缩胶卷」失窃了，没有了这带胶卷，历史区将无法顺利开放。\n展品失窃案已经惊动了布洛妮娅，去克里珀堡找她聊聊该如何继续开展调查吧。
E: The microfilm used to display projections was stolen. Without this film, the History Exhibit cannot open to the public.\nThe thefts have already reached Bronya's ears. Go to Qlipoth Fort and speak with her regarding how to continue the investigation.

C: 半夏竟然也是「药王秘传」的人，而白露却一无所知。\n在质问半夏之前，要不再问问白露吧，她才是最惊讶的那个人。
E: Banxia's identity as a Disciple of Sanctus Medicus is unknown to Bailu.\nBefore interrogating Banxia, maybe talk to Bailu again, she's the one most surprised by this fact.

C: 铖杰老师需要星槎的影像资料用作参考，帮他拍一张对应阶段的培养舱照片应该就可以了。\n青雀管照片叫作「绘影图形」，仙舟上还有很多这样熟悉又陌生的说法，你得学会适应它。
E: Chengjie requires a visual reference of a starskiff. Take a picture of an incubator in its corresponding phase.\nQingque calls these pictures "visiographs." There are probably more of these familiar-yet-foreign terminology used all over the Xianzhou, you should get used to them.

C: 小聪发来信息了，赶紧确认一下吧，也许是下一位诗人的位置。\n难不成还是来催进度的？你办事，还有人敢不放心？
E: Cong sent a message. Hurry up and check it out. It may be the position of the next poet.\nPerhaps he's still bugging you about the progress? Are there still those who doubt your capabilities?

C: 在尚未踏入下一站旅程前，列车接到了来自罗浮仙舟的通讯，景元向暂无去向的众人发出邀请，参加演武仪典。
E: Before embarking on the next stop of their journey, the Express received a comms from the Xianzhou Luofu — Jing Yuan extended an invite to all wanderers to join the Wardance.

C: 在丹鼎司新任司鼎的斡旋下，你们顺利打发了来自公司专员的责难，随她一同前往丹鼎司小叙。但这场未期的谈话却再起波折，与彦卿交锋的少女剑客早已等候多时。
E: Under the mediation of the newly appointed Alchemy Commission's Cauldron Master, you all successfully fended off the accusatory blame from the IPC Specialist, after which you had a chat with her at the Alchemy Commission. But more speed bumps threatened this doomsday talk, for the swordswoman had been waiting long for a showdown with Yanqing.

C: 另一边，三月七也察觉到了竞锋舰上的异样，试剑的时刻终于来临。
E: Meanwhile, March 7th has also noticed the unusual events aboard the Skysplitter. The time for her to put her swordsmanship skills to the test has finally come.

C: 一切尘埃落定，你与三月七相约前往丹鼎司中探望竞锋舰大战中伤痕累累的人们……
E: As the dust finally settles, you and March 7th arrange to head to the Alchemy Commission and visit those who were heavily wounded in the great battle aboard the Skysplitter...

C: 姬莲小姐是莱斯利•迪恩的狂热粉丝。\n你和莱斯利必须直面由她捏造出的虚影，戳破那些不切实际的、狂热的幻想。
E: Jillian is an ardent admirer of Lesley Dean.\nYou and Lesley must confront the unrealistic fantasies she has created and unveil the truth.

C: 你将柯柯娜从危险的边缘上拉了回来，去看看她现在的情况吧。
E: You have pulled Cocona back from the precipice of danger. Go check on her.

C: 钟表小子表现得十分着急，似乎在柯柯娜的身上发生了什么重大的异变——快去和他聊聊。
E: Clockie is acting all anxious as if some drastic change has occurred in Cocona — Quickly, go talk to him.

C: 求生、财富、信仰、荣耀、所要守护的事物…一切战士都有拼死而战的理由，为战而生的眷属也不例外。这位敌人为何要对自己不可能战胜的城邦挑起争端呢？\n天谴猎手带着商队的商品逃走了，去悬锋城找到她，找回被夺走的宝物，或许能找到问题的答案。
E: Survival, fortune, faith, honor, things they want to protect... Every warrior has a reason to fight to the death, and the Titankin that live for battle are no exception. Why would this enemy initiate a conflict against a city that they have no hope of defeating?\nThe Furiae Archer escaped with the caravan's goods. Go to Castrum Kremnos to find her, retrieve the stolen treasures, and maybe you will receive an answer to your questions.

C: 欧洛尼斯的眷属，为何会对帕西提亚纠缠不休？在散落的天外之音中，是否会有线索留存？
E: Why are Oronyx's kin so intent on bothering Pasithea? Perhaps there is a clue to be found in the scattered celestial echoes?

C: 第三站，匹诺康尼！\n这里的读者口味刁钻啊…爱臣们会给出什么意见呢？
E: Third stop, Penacony!\nThe readers here are rather picky... I wonder what feedback my loyal subjects will give?

C: 这只呜呜伯好像已经吓得动弹不得了…过去确认一下它的状况吧？
E: This Wubbaboo seems petrified with fear... Go and check up on it.

C: 在你的指导下，希拉就「如何做人」这件事取得了阶段性的成果。不过，你有些怀疑古恩能否接受这样的「学习成果」……
E: Sheila has made remarkable progress in acting human. But you're not sure if Gunn will be satisfied with the result...

C: 磐岩镇的矿工马克西姆正在为丢失的记忆发愁，去和他聊聊看吧。
E: Maxime, a miner in Boulder Town, is worried about his lost memory. Go talk to him.

C: 为了「鼹鼠党振兴计划」，尤利安打算继续秘密配送「地火」留下的快递。\n这件快递包裹上的署名模糊不清，也许她是娜塔莎诊所的某位患者？
E: For the Moles' Reinvigoration Plan, Julian plans to keep secretly delivering the packages Wildfire had left behind.\nThe name on this package is illegible. Maybe it's a patient in Natasha's clinic?

C: 民间科学家雷金正在找人帮忙。\n他似乎对贝洛伯格教育部的题库产生了兴趣，还指望你能帮上些忙。
E: The Civilian Scientist, Regin, is looking for help.\nHe seems to have currently taken an interest in the Belobog Ministry of Education's question bank. Maybe you can help him.

C: 你从「正当权益会社」发布的公告中得知拉雯妮发布了委托，想要行使她的正当权益。帮帮拉雯妮！
E: You see that Lavonne has issued a commission on the Rightful Rights Society's noticeboard and wants to exercise her rightful rights. Go help Lavonne!

C: 巡逻的银鬃铁卫在裂界中目击到了幻象回响，它们因夙愿未遂而不得解脱。向它们提供帮助吧。\n开朗的孩子想要为自己拍张照作纪念……
E: Some Silvermane Guard patrols spotted illusory echoes in the Fragmentum who are stuck inside due to unfinished businesses. Help them.\nThe outgoing kid wants to take a photo of themself as a souvenir...

C: 你收到了帕姆的短信，声称列车里出现了奇怪的东西，希望你帮忙抓捕。\n很奇怪，你又能做到什么呢？这又不是《捉*敢死队》，但列车长的请求，你只能听从。
E: Pom-Pom messages you, claiming that something strange has appeared on the Express. They hope you can help them catch it.\nWhat can you possibly do? It's not like you're a member of the Weird-Busters. You've got no choice but to heed the conductor's request, though.

C: 「贼灵」巴特鲁斯讲述起了自己的英雄事迹，究竟它是如何巧妙地化险为夷。
E: Spirithief Bartholos recounts their heroic deeds, telling how they cleverly turned danger into triumph.

C: 请与维修工程师沟通，帮忙补足列车物资。
E: Speak with the maintenance engineer and help to replenish provisions on the Express.

C: 丢失的奇物竟然在一名叫「管家」的造物手里，它是谁？它在哪儿？你和佩佩两眼一抹黑，在走丢的造物处，它们似乎知道「管家」的信息……
E: The lost Curio is currently held by a creation known as "butler." Who is this butler? And where can they be found? Despite lacking any information, you might uncover new leads by locating the lost Curio...

C: 在科员们离开后，这群造物们占据了这个房间。但终端设备仍在正常运转，或许能从中找到什么线索……
E: The creations have occupied the room since the researchers left. The terminal is still operational, so maybe you can get some useful clues from it...

C: 滴答！快，拨动指针，滴答——！\n人们的内心正待你去探索，为他们寻回真正的自我吧！
E: Tick... tock! Quick, Adjust the hands... Tick, tock!\nPeople's minds await your exploration. Help them regain their true selves!

C: 铁墓之战暂时尘埃落定，银河诸文明终于从毁灭手中夺下自己的未来。作为身处事件核心的一方，星穹列车的工作还没停止，联军各势力先后与领航员姬子进行联络。这其中大多是礼尚往来的客套话，但也不乏暗流涌动的交锋与思量……
E: The Battle of Irontomb has temporarily settled, and the civilizations of the cosmos have finally wrested their future from the hands of the Destruction. As a key player at the heart of these events, the Astral Express's work isn't over yet, with various forces in the alliance reaching out to Navigator Himeko one after another. While most exchanges are merely courteous formalities, undercurrents of strategic maneuvering and careful deliberation flow beneath the surface...

C: 现在，就试着去解决这头大地兽的烦恼吧。
E: Now, try to solve this dromas's woes.

C: 你听到爆炸声从极远处传来，但似乎只有你听到了。这可能是错觉，也可能是某种奇妙的感应…不祥的预感充斥着你的内心。\n循着直觉的指引，你赶往爆炸声的源头——迴星港。
E: You hear an explosion from very far away, but it seems only you can hear it. It might be a delusion or some strange sixth sense... Your heart is filled with an ominous premonition.\nYou follow your instincts and head to the source of the explosion — Stargazer Navalia.

C: 与「交易」有关的「物体」…雷金的灵感真的靠谱吗？
E: An object related to "transactions"... Is Regin's intuition trustworthy?

C: 贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆开展在即。为了展览顺利举行，于尔丹正在收集合适的藏品。\n这一次，于尔丹希望你根据旧照片找到合适的藏品。
E: Belobog's History and Culture Museum will be opening soon. Uldan is collecting appropriate exhibits to ensure a successful opening.\nThis time, Uldan wishes you to find an exhibit based on an old photo.

C: 小秘书显然不希望你因为「社交压力」被迫帮忙，但同时她真的希望你能帮忙。于是她提出，希望你和小伙伴们再商量一下。\n交谈结束，素裳和白露都希望你对金人巷伸出援手，你应该告诉小秘书你的决定。
E: Miss Secretary clearly doesn't want you to feel forced by "social pressures" to assist her, but she very much wants your help at the same time. Hence, she put forward her proposal and hopes you and your companions can talk about it.\nBy the end of the discussion, both Sushang and Bailu hope that you can offer aid to Aurum Alley. You should tell Miss Secretary about your decision.

C: 霄老大看不惯金人巷一成不变的状态，被迫相信公司会更好，但是他现在有了新的选择——「金人巷复兴计划」。\n霄老大同意与码头建立商业合作，商会也应该拿出诚意将同功坊纳入规划之中。
E: Mr. Xiao is fed up with Aurum Alley's stagnancy and forced himself to believe that the IPC would provide a better future. However, now he has a new choice in the form of the "Aurum Alley Revival Project."\nMr. Xiao has agreed to establish business relations with the docks, and the merchant guild should also offer something back by including Artistry Hardware into their plans.

C: 谈判将近，先确认一下手上的谈判材料吧。\n与小秘书一起确认材料，争取在接下的言语交锋中取得优势。
E: The time of negotiations is drawing near. You should go over your negotiation materials first.\nConfirm your negotiation materials with Miss Secretary and strive to claim the advantage in the upcoming clash of words.

C: 由于争取到了会长的支持，原本支持会长的商户现在也放下心结，希望能和商会、码头建立合作。\n为什么白露不能在丹鼎司吃到尚滋味的外卖，你们可以好好问问燕翠师傅。
E: After obtaining the president's support, the merchants who once supported him have also let go of their worries and now hope to establish partnerships with the merchant guild and the docks.\nYou can ask chef Yancui why Bailu can't eat Spices Supreme's takeout while she's at the Alchemy Commission.

C: 在你们忙于拍摄宣传材料的时候，靠谱的小秘书已经在和燕翠师傅商量正式合作的事了，现在去找找小秘书吧。\n不知道她会怎么用这些照片呢？还是说，她会重新找人拍摄吗？说不定很有可能……
E: While you were all busy shooting promotional material, the ever-reliable secretary Mingxi already found and broached the topic of a formal partnership with chef Yancui. You should go find Miss Secretary and see how she's doing.\nHow will she use these photos? Or might she look for another photographer? It's definitely a possibility...

C: 金人巷不少商铺与码头建立了合作，码头上的运单也比之前更加复杂。小秘书似乎是有事相求的样子。\n到码头看看，也许有你能帮上忙的部分。
E: Plenty of shops and stores in Aurum Alley have established a collaborative relationship with the docks, and the logistics orders coming in also more complex than before. Mingxi's expression seems to imply a need for assistance.\nHead to the docks and see if you can help with anything.

C: 想要挑战每个决胜乐园的冠军候补，必须先完成乐园对应的试炼。\n空间站的规则仿佛洞窟寻宝。现在，你们需要另一张藏宝图。
E: You must complete the corresponding trials first if you wish to challenge the championship contenders of the Victory Zone.\nThe space station's rules seem akin to hunting for treasures in a dungeon. Now, you must find the other treasure map.

C: 除了你以外，本次大赛还有四匹实力非凡的黑马。若想挑战冠军，必须先将他们一一击败才行。
E: Aside from you, this competition also has four other dark horse contenders with serious prowess. If you want to make a run for the championship, you need to take them out one by one first.

C: 与驭空大人约好在绥园的狐眠冢前见面，驭空大人说「各位所有的疑惑都将会得到解答」，这是什么意思呢？
E: You meet up with Madam Yukong at Foxsomn Tomb in Fyxestroll Garden as promised, and she says, "All your doubts shall be answered." What's that supposed to mean?

C: 黑塔等人给「扩展装置」加了一个新的演算分支：他们给它起名叫「黄金与机械」。斯蒂芬•劳艾德这一次似乎为你制作了一个「自定义骰」，他保证这次比之前的觐见之骰都更加有趣。
E: Herta and others have added a new Calculation branch named "Gold and Gears" to the Expansion Module. This time, Stephen Lloyd has created a "custom dice" for you, promising it to be even more interesting than any previous Audience Dice.

C: 新培育出来的造物有些社恐，吓得从你眼前逃窜了出去。保姆机器人说外面并不安全，还是赶紧去找找它吧。\n但话说回来了，这种喜欢在地上扒着垃圾的行为…你感觉膝盖有点疼。
E: The newly nurtured creation is a little shy and fearfully bolts out of your sight. The Helper Robot tells you it's not safe outside, so you should rush after it quickly.\nBut then again, this kind of sifting around through trash like this... Your knees and back are not going to thank you.

C: 杰伊将今日美食所需的食材整理给了你，搜集齐全之后就交给他吧！
E: Jay has listed all the ingredients required for today's catering menu. Once you have gathered all of the ingredients, bring them to him!

C: 许多区划的囚犯从未喝过苏乐达。哈努兄弟决定用苏乐达支援这些囚犯，将它们变成伙伴。
E: Inmates from many areas have never tasted SoulGlad. Brother Hanu decides to use SoulGlad to assist these inmates, turning them into companions.

C: 「惊梦酒吧」的管理者舒翁向你提出了委托，希望你能暂时接替调饮师的工作。\n听到了怪物们的呼救声，快出去看看究竟发生了什么吧！
E: Siobhan, the manager of Dreamjolt Hostelry, offered you an assignment to temporarily take over the job of drinksmith.\nThe monsters are calling for help. Get out there and find out what's going on!

C: 因为与「钟表匠」的关系，你成为了克劳克影业的特邀导演，开始剪辑《美梦往事》的影片…\n影片的剪辑工作正在继续，帮助克劳克影业完成更多影片吧！
E: Thanks to your relationship with the Watchmaker, you have been made a special guest director for Clock Studios and have begun editing the Dreamjoy Memoir movie...\nEditing is still going on. Help Clock Studios complete more films!

C:
来到罗浮以后，我总觉得有什么压在身上，令我喘不过气。
最初，我以为是运动损伤。后来，又担心是不适应重力。最后，我终于为自己找到了病因——
我是贝洛伯格<unbreak>700</unbreak>年来第一位去天上打比赛的运动员。
我背负着我的整个故乡。
E:
I've felt there's a weight pressing down on me and making it hard to breathe ever since I arrived on the Luofu.
Initially, I thought it might have been an injury, then I was worried it might be my body not adapting to this gravity. At the end, I finally found the cause of the symptoms —
I'm the first athlete in Belobog in <unbreak>700</unbreak> years to go fight a competition in sky.
I'm carrying my entire home planet on my shoulders.

C: 你成为了「音乐派对」表演乐队的经理。现在，你的乐队需要在校园中央的舞台上完成三场演出。\n前往贝洛伯格的地下车站，寻找希露瓦提到的神秘乐队。
E: You've become the manager of the music party's performing band, and now your band needs to complete 3 performances on the stage in the middle of the campus.\nHead to Belobog's underground rail station and find the mysterious band Serval mentioned.

C: 你成为了「音乐派对」表演乐队的经理。现在，你的乐队需要在校园中央的舞台上完成三场演出。\n得到垃圾桶组合的节奏记录，帮助乱破收集作曲用的灵感吧。
E: You've become the manager of the music party's performing band, and now your band needs to complete 3 performances on the stage in the middle of the campus.\nObtain a record of the trashcan group's beats to help Rappa collect inspiration for composing.

C: 你成为了「音乐派对」表演乐队的经理。现在，你的乐队需要在校园中央的舞台上完成三场演出。\n在贝洛伯格的雪原到处逛逛，帮助乱破收集作曲用的灵感吧。
E: You've become the manager of the music party's performing band, and now your band needs to complete 3 performances on the stage in the middle of the campus.\nWander around Belobog's Snow Plains to help Rappa collect inspiration for composing.

C: 你终于拥有了一个宽敞、舒适的房间。快泡一个惬意的热水澡，给这次劳动赋予一个具有仪式感的收尾吧！
E: You finally have a spacious and cozy room. Take a warm, relaxing bath, and give this round of labor a ceremonious ending!

C: 达米亚诺斯的热情已经枯竭，幸好胜利就在眼前…应该吧？
E: Damionis has lost all enthusiasm. Fortunately, victory lies just ahead... Surely?

C: 达米亚诺斯的热情已经枯竭，幸好胜利就在眼前…应该吧？
E: Damionis has lost all enthusiasm. Fortunately, victory lies just ahead... Surely?

C: 你以势如破竹的气势拿下了第一场比赛，但淘汰赛的另一边似乎出现了一些小插曲……
E: You claimed victory in the first match with unstoppable momentum, but it seems a little incident has occurred on the other side of the knockout stage...

C: 迷路迷境盛大的宴会就要开场了，快和餐馆的伙伴们过去吧，可别让妖精们等急啦！
E: The grand feast at Membrance Maze is about to begin! Hurry over with your restaurant companions. Don't keep the fairies waiting!

C: 故事虽然结束了，但你的店长生涯可没有结束，妖精们还等着你去给它们做好吃的呢。所以，有空的话就回餐馆看看吧。
E: The story may be over, but your journey as a manager isn't. The fairies are still waiting for your next great dish. So drop by the restaurant when you have time.

C: 花火自告奋勇替你调制「特调配方」，这果然又是她恶作剧的一部分。赶紧回临时吧台看看吧，希望你缺席的这段时间里，她还没把吧台闹得天翻地覆……
E: Sparkle volunteered to mix the "Special Mix Recipe." That was obviously part of her prank. You'd better check on the makeshift bar. Hopefully she hasn't turned the whole place upside down while you were away...

C: 在银狼的协助下成功取出星核
E: Get the Stellaron with Silver Wolf's help

C: 寻找姬子
E: Search for Himeko

C: 体验「模拟宇宙」
E: Experience the Simulated Universe

C: 与三月七交谈，开启新旅程
E: Talk to March 7th and set off on a new journey

C: 找到所有躲起来的小朋友，赢得胜利
E: Find all the concealed kids to win the game

C: 在克拉拉的帮助下进入史瓦罗基地
E: Enter Svarog's base with Clara's help

C: 穿过流云渡，追上开拓者小队
E: Cross Cloudford and catch up to the Trailblazer's squad

C: 进入工造司一探究竟
E: Enter the Artisanship Commission to see what is happening

C: 接受景元赠予的盟谊信物
E: Accept the token of alliance from Jing Yuan

C: （可选）与列车组交谈
E: (Optional) Speak with the Crew

C: 前往「梦境贩售店」
E: Go to the Dreamscape Sales Store

C: 前往大堂
E: Go to the Lobby

C: 检查沙盘
E: Inspect the sandpit

C: 等待电梯抵达
E: Wait for the elevator to arrive

C: 选择想要挑战的关卡
E: Select the stage you wish to challenge

C: 向引导员了解挑战内容
E: Learn about the challenge from the guide

C: 进入《小小哈努行动》的世界
E: Enter the world of Hanu's Adventure

C: 根据「花火妙妙藏宝图」找到炸弹（<unbreak>132</unbreak> / <unbreak>999</unbreak>）
E: Find the bombs based on "Sparkle's Wondrous Treasure Map" (<unbreak>132</unbreak> / <unbreak>999</unbreak>)

C: 「我的徒弟，我的孩子，爱死天流。」
E: "My apprentice. My child... Aishiteru."

C: （可选）了解之前同学们的情况
E: (Optional) Check on the status of your classmates

C: 前往广场观看校庆开幕式
E: Head to the plaza to attend the opening ceremony of the school festival

C: 根据守则调查附近的异象
E: Based on the rules, investigate the unusual occurrence

C: 与大家谈谈现状
E: Speak to the others to find out what is going on

C: 听听他们在说些什么
E: Listen to what they are saying

C: 参加航线会议，决定列车的下一站
E: Join the navigation meeting to decide the next destination of the Express

C: 继续前进，深入悬锋城
E: Continue onward deep into Castrum Kremnos

C: 继续深入悬锋城，寻找尼卡多利的线索
E: Proceed deeper into Castrum Kremnos and search for clues about Nikador

C: 继续跟随缇安，寻找「番红蕊」
E: Continue following Trianne and look for "saffron"

C: 与涡心附近的黄金裔们对话
E: Speak with the Chrysos Heirs near the vortex

C: 前往生命花园，向遐蝶咨询
E: Head to the Garden of Life and consult Castorice

C: 查看那刻夏展示的「记忆」
E: Check the memory shown by Anaxa

C: 尝试维修「电路」
E: Try to repair the "circuits"

C: 安抚受惊的居民
E: Console the frightened residents

C: 出发吧，追上星穹列车
E: Go catch up with the Astral Express

C: 远离可疑的电视机
E: Stay away from the shady TV

C: 去往决战的舞台
E: Head to the stage for final battle

C: 找回失散的知更鸟们
E: Find the lost Robins

C: 「请晚一些再返回天界。」

(Aeons...)

C: 房门紧闭着…
E: The door is shut tight...

C: 你怎么还在这儿，快去找丹恒吧！又有激动人心的大冒险在等着我们呢。
E: Why are you still here? Go find Dan Heng! Exciting adventures are waiting for us.

C: 那说明你和列车相性很好，是个好兆头。
E: So you have high compatibility with the Express. That's good.

C: 他和你…要逃离的东西有关，是吗？
E: Is he... connected to that past you want to escape?

C: 你们当然可以置身事外。趁现在星核还没污染这片空域，启动跃迁，你们就可以去下一个世界。但假以时日，这段星轨将再度被阻断。
E: You could, of course, not get involved. Knowing that the Stellaron hasn't yet affected this region of space, you could make the jump and arrive at the next world. But sooner or later, the star rail here will be more blocked off than it was before.

C: 因为仙舟需要帮助。
E: Because the Xianzhou needs us.

C: 散落在银河里的星星会被「星核」的危机击垮，但仙舟拥有「巡猎」的岚啊，我不觉得星核在星神眼中会是什么麻烦……
E: Stellarons can lead to the collapse of stars scattered throughout the universe, but the Xianzhou has Lan, The Hunt on their side. I struggle to believe that Stellarons pose a threat in the eyes of the Aeons.

C: 别的仙舟？那是什么？
E: Other ships? Which ones?

C: 你这个深明大义的女人！
E: Oh, how suddenly principled of you!

C: 原来如此——我觉得你做了正确的事。背负着知识的重量砥砺前行，总好过在无知中盲目乐观地活着。
E: Is that so? Well, I think you did the right thing. It's better to move forward with the burden of knowledge than to tread a perilous road with blind optimism.

C: 欢迎来到黑塔空间站，你在这里可以享受到知识之海的馈赠——但也有溺亡的风险，请多加小心。
E: Welcome to Herta Space Station. Here, you can savor the bounty of the ocean of knowledge. However, please also beware of the risk of drowning.

C: ……这样的吗。
E: ... Is that so?

C: ——但这都不重要。重要的是我要走了，要把你一个人丢在这个空间站里。所以从现在开始，你不用再思考过去，也不用再怀疑自己。
E: ...None of that matters. All you need to know is that I'm leaving, and you will be left all alone on this space station. From now on, you needn't think about your past or doubt yourself.

C: 来得早也没用啊。我的轨道炮倒是能打掉一片，不过黑塔回来看见空间站这模样，非找我们算账不可。
E: I wouldn't have made a difference. My orbital cannon can deal with a whole bunch of enemies at once, but I couldn't just blow up the space station with it — Herta would NOT like that...

C: 上，右，下
E: Up, right, down

C: 我们空间站，历来收藏着银河数不胜数的奇物宝贝。但不是所有人都知道，在这藏品之中，也包含着一些活生生的生命！
E: At the space station, we've always collected rare items — countless articles from across the galaxy. But not everyone knows that among these articles are also living things.

C: 睁开你浑浊的眼睛吧，看看我们身边的小生命吧——
E: Open your benighted eyes and look at the delicate life around you!

C: 与星神密卷上所书别无二致！那就是「毁灭」纳努克的追随者，以反物质镕铸而成的银河战争兵器。
E: That's exactly what was written on the Mystic Scroll of Aeons. It refers to the followers of Nanook the Destruction using antimatter to create a galactic weapon of war.

C: 定分枪的眼睛看着米沙：「<unbreak>25</unbreak>分！」它宣布。
E: The rating pistol's eyes look at Misha: "<unbreak>25</unbreak> points!" It announces.

C: 金属外壳上有可疑的油光，看来奇物简介里的后半句是最近才添加上去的。
E: There is a suspiciously oily sheen over the metal casing. It seems like the part about food in the Curio introduction was added recently.

C: 好啦，我也该回去了。
E: Alright, I should go back now.

C: 所以我们才必须离开——而且要带上{NICKNAME}一起走。
E: That's why we have to leave and take {NICKNAME} with us.

C: 哼哼，真是神了，为了拘束这颗未启动的星核，让湛蓝星免于灾祸，我造了一整座太空站……
E: Hmm, truly amazing! I built a whole space station just to contain this unactivated Stellaron and keep The Blue from disaster...

C: 那不一样，你我有商业往来——你叫什么来着？
E: That's different. We have business with each other. Umm, what was your name again?

C: 这我可不能做主，你得问{NICKNAME}自己……
E: That's not up to me to decide. You can ask {NICKNAME} yourself...

C: 信任啊。
E: Uh-huh.

C: {NICKNAME}，幸好你们都没事。
E: {NICKNAME}, thank goodness you're all safe.

C: 「星核」被取出的一瞬间，虽然只有一瞬间，还是侵蚀了空间站，形成一种被称作「裂界」的新空间。
E: When the Stellaron was extracted, even for that brief moment, it corroded the space station and formed a new space — what we now call the Fragmentum.

C: 我和阿兰聊过了，这事儿目前没有解决的好法子，只能增加安保人员，提高巡逻密度，保障科员的研究。
E: I talked with Arlan and there's no easy solution to this problem at the moment. We can only increase the security and patrol frequency to protect the ongoing research.

C: 没事了就起来吧，姬子姐让你醒了就去找她。我还有别的事，就不陪你去啦。
E: Get up when you feel better. Himeko wants you to go find her. I have something to do, so I won't go with you, alright?

C: 我还能回空间站吗？
E: Can I still return to the space station?

C: …你真的很怪哎。这个地方有什么好的？我都不怎么乐意待在这儿……
E: ...You really are weird. What's so good about this place? Even I don't like staying here...

C: 除了整理已有数据，我也会保存本次旅行的档案。
E: Aside from the existing data, I also recorded this trip to the archives.

C: …小点声。
E: ...keep it down.

C: 稍微看看吧？
E: Just a little peek?

C: 你第一次经历跃迁，会感到不安也是难免的。
E: This is your first time experiencing the warp jump, so a little discomfort is unavoidable.

C: 关于三月七…
E: About March 7th...

C: 关于「模拟宇宙」内容…
E: About the Simulated Universe...

C: 有什么疑惑？
E: Got some questions?

C: 为什么要设计战斗？
E: Why is combat a part of the design?

C: 七百年前，来自天外的{RUBY_B#反物质军团}怪物{RUBY_E#}点燃了星球。彼时的大地成了焦土，到处是燃烧的熔火和沸腾的乌烟。
E: Seven hundred years ago, {RUBY_B#Antimatter Legion}monsters{RUBY_E#} from beyond the sky set the world ablaze. The land was turned to scorched earth, with raging infernos and billowing towers of smoke stretching beyond the horizon.

C: 应是我谢谢你们，来自天外的客人。
E: It should be me thanking you, visitors from beyond the sky.

C: 只有我什么都没发现吗…
E: ...Am I the only one that didn't notice anything?

C: 这一天可真漫长呀～咱要好好洗个热水澡，再美美地睡一觉～
E: It was a long day today. All I need is a hot shower and a good night's sleep.

C: 好耶，还有枕头大战！
E: Yeah! About time!

C: 纪念碑的碑体由两部分构成：象征知识与工业力量的齿轮，以及象征寒潮的巨大冰晶。这两个符号紧密嵌合，齿轮束缚住了冰霜，代表着筑城者们不屈服于蛮荒自然的精神。
E: The monument is made up of two parts: A gear that symbolizes knowledge and industrial strength, and huge ice crystals that symbolize the Eternal Freeze. These two symbols are bound together — the gear restricting the ice. It represents the unyielding spirit of the Architects in the face of nature's barbarity.

C: 怎么啦，希儿？
E: What's wrong, Seele?

C: ——毕竟忙起来后，还有心思琢磨细节的人就不多了。
E: ...Most people in a frenzy don't stop to ponder the details.

C: 哟，{NICKNAME}，你怎么来了？有什么东西要修的话就先放那里，等我研究清楚怎么把茉莉小姐的传家宝铁盒拆开再……
E: Yo, {NICKNAME}, to what do I owe the pleasure? If you have something that needs fixing, just leave it there. I'll have a look after I first figure out how to take apart Miss Molly's heirloom tin box...

C: 我想想…我记得《银鬃铁卫密码学》第七版第二章第四节是这么写的：「建军初期，情报官兼技术部总负责人理查德•巴拉金在全军推广了最早的加密文法——」
E: Let me think... I remember that in Chapter 2, Section 4 of the 7th Edition of the Silvermane Guards Cryptology, it says, "In the early days of the Guards, Richard Balakin, the intelligence officer and chief of the Technology Division, popularized the earliest encryption method within the force."

C: 好吧好吧…真拿你没办法。不过先让我去菲丝那里一趟，我心心念念的限定场刊还没拿到手呢……
E: Alright alright... Seems like I can't get out of this one. But let me go to Fizz's place first. I have yet to get my hands on that limited edition magazine yet...

C: 感谢你们的理解。
E: Thanks for understanding.

C: 来，克拉拉！站过来点儿，姐姐教你几个拍照的最佳角度……
E: Over here, Clara! Wanna learn some cool poses?

C: 呃…怎么说呢？只有这块地髓是绝对的「非卖品」……
E: Uh... How do I explain... This particular piece of Geomarrow is definitely not for sale...

C: 兴许是两位首领美言了几句。
E: Maybe Natasha and Oleg helped promote her a little.

C: 太对了——这事让我们姐弟俩自己解决就行……
E: Y'know what, you're right — we should work these things out on our own...

C: 我看你们之间的交情不错，有机会的话，还是让她自己说给你听吧。
E: I can tell the two of you have a close bond. If you get the chance, see if you can persuade her to open up about it.

C: 嗯？你要是问我怎么看……
E: Huh? Hmm. If you want my opinion...

C: 哦？这不是{NICKNAME}嘛。怎么，你不去忙吗？
E: Oh? Well look, it's {NICKNAME}. You don't have any business you need to attend to?

C: 要是不忙就在我这机械屋多坐会儿吧，别客气。
E: If you're not busy, relax at my workshop for a while longer. Make yourself at home.

C: 这只是个装饰，它的转动不产生任何效果。
E: This is just a decoration, its rotation does not produce any effect.

C: 小小的邮筒，将贝洛伯格各区彼此相连。
E: The small mailboxes connect the districts of Belobog.

C: 你握着一柄长枪，它既是拐杖，也是你的兄弟……
E: You hold a spear, which is both your crutch and your dear comrade...

C: 这盆花生有八瓣，瓣尖有白色斑点，如同即将融化滴落的初雪。
E: This flower has eight petals with white dots at the end of each. They look like melting drops of the first snow.

C: 你定睛观瞧。垃圾桶的内部呈现完美的，毫无杂质的黑暗，纯粹的黑暗——犹如环绕IX的暗物质云团。
E: You take a good look at it. The inside of this trashcan is dust-free and perfectly dark. It's the kind of pure darkness that surrounds IX in a nebula of dark matter.

C: 一瞬间你仿佛老僧入定，眼观鼻，鼻观心，迅速伸手抓住了它。
E: Suddenly, like an old monk sitting in concentrated introspection, you reach out and grab it.

C: 你好奇把它扔进垃圾桶的人现在怎样了。
E: You wonder what happened to the person who threw it away.

C: 但只是徒增街道上的垃圾。如今这座城市的人们已经达成共识：垃圾桶，是贝洛伯格的另一张名片。
E: But it only increased the amount of garbage on the street. Now people in this city have come to the consensus that trashcans are Belobog's other business card.

C: 那下层的人民呢？他们会失去筑城者的庇护。他们会视我为…暴君。
E: What about the Underworlders? They will lose the protection of the Architects. They will see me... as a tyrant.

C: 那找的是牙吗？那找的是拳击牙套。
E: Really? At least he still has his mouthguard...

C: 所以，这个「地火」平时都干什么呢？
E: So... what does Wildfire do all day?

C: 据说是第一矿队发现了一片「地髓」矿脉，储量惊人…初步估计，大概是近三十年发现的最大矿藏。
E: I heard that First Mining Team found a Geomarrow vein with incredible deposits... The initial estimate put it at the largest discovery in the last thirty years.

C: 但是矿队瞒不过这儿的流浪者，毕竟他们眼睛也不瞎。有些流氓地痞想借此捞一笔，向矿队勒索封口费…这就触犯了他们的底线。
E: But the vagrants here have keen eyes — they couldn't keep it hidden from them. Some local gangs wanted to profit from the situation, so they blackmailed the mining team for hush money... and that was the final straw.

C: 该聊聊这位「大佬」了。
E: We need to talk about this "boss..."

C: 首领！大家都还好吗，有没有人受伤？
E: Chief! Is everyone okay? Is anyone injured?

C: 嗯，记得这个世界在好几百年前，遭到过军团的入侵。
E: Yeah, I remember hearing this world was invaded by the Legion hundreds of years ago.

C: 不要学小孩子说话的语气！
E: Quit acting like a child!

C: 要打要罚，随你们处置吧！
E: Do your worst! I'm not afraid.

C: 第一条规则是…
E: I thought the first rule was...

C: 想听听你对其他人的看法…
E: I want to hear what you think about the others...

C: 不过，她现在不打算逮捕我们了，这就挺好的呀。
E: At least she's not trying to arrest us anymore.

C: 又是休息时间，希望这次别再出什么幺蛾子了。
E: Time to rest again. I hope there aren't any surprises this time.

C: …原来是你。下次别再从背后接近了，你该庆幸我手上没拿武器。
E: ...It's you. Don't sneak up behind me next time. Lucky for you I wasn't armed.

C: 要是我们没有刚好路过…你真打算一个人冲进裂界？
E: If we hadn't happened to be passing by... were you really planning to go into the Fragmentum alone?

C: 聚沙成塔。先好好休息一晚，明天找「地火」的人一起研究吧。
E: We solve a puzzle one piece at a time. Let's get some rest. We'll talk to Wildfire tomorrow and get to the bottom of this.

C: 别急，问你点事。
E: Hold on, I have a question.

C: 下层区？啊…我知道了。
E: The Underworld? Oh... I see.

C: 我们还打败了名为史瓦罗的远古机器，了解到了一些真相…有关「星核」的真相。
E: We also defeated an ancient robot known as "Svarog," and learned some truths... about the Stellaron.

C: 虎克？这是……
E: Hook? What are you...

C: 娜、娜塔莎姐姐！「菌菌」坏掉了，我想请你帮忙修好……
E: N—Natasha! Junjun's in bad shape. Can you help me fix him...?

C: 很值钱吗？
E: Are they worth a lot?

C: 卖掉，当然要卖掉！如果宝石能卖个好价钱，那虎克就能给老爹准备更豪华的生日礼物啦！
E: Of course I'll sell him! If the gems are expensive, Hook can buy a better birthday gift for daddy!

C: 你在说什么呢，当然要卖掉！如果宝石能卖个好价钱，那虎克就能给老爹准备更豪华的生日礼物啦！
E: What are you talking about? Of course, I do! If the gems are expensive, Hook can buy a better birthday gift for daddy!

C: 被叫作「菌菌」的大熊玩偶
E: Junjun, the Cuddly Bear

C: 那就别磨蹭了，快点出发吧。
E: Alright, then let's cut the chat and move out!

C: 欢呼声在哪里？你们都没吃饭吗？再响点，再来一轮！掌声和欢呼声送给史考特俱乐部冉冉升起的超级新星——{NICKNAME}！
E: Where are your cheers? Did you not eat? Louder, encore! Applause and cheers to Scott Club's newest rising superstar— {NICKNAME}!

C: 那我先走了…谢谢你，陌生人。
E: I'll leave now then... Thank you, stranger.

C: 里面装的东西总是差不多，都是些给孩子们的食物、玩具弹珠，还有一些简单的衣物。
E: The contents are always roughly the same: Food, toys, and simple clothes for children.

C: 这几罐奶粉送给你吧。
E: I happen to have some baby formula. Take these.

C: 这家伙是个过气又学不会研究观众口味变化的人…哼哼，我看他就是成心骗我给他发底薪！
E: He's just another has-been who can't adapt to the audience's tastes... Hmph. He's now just in it for the base wage that I charitably trickle down to him!

C: 嗯。他的故事不该被遗忘。
E: Agreed. His story should not be forgotten.

C: 所以甭担心——赛程安排那都是小意思，我们拳馆的业务既全面又灵活，绝对没有疏漏。
E: So don't you worry, schedule arrangements are trivial matters. Our services are comprehensive and flexible. You will definitely be well taken care of.

C: 真能立刻安排吗？
E: Can it be arranged now?

C: 三月，丹恒还有{NICKNAME}——能再请你们帮一个忙吗？我想把象征希望的好消息告诉大家，缓解紧张情绪。
E: March, Dan Heng, and {NICKNAME}... can I ask for your help again? I want to get this news out to everyone. It'll lift their spirits and bring them hope.

C: 我坐小孩那桌。
E: I'll go sit at the children's table.

C: 您没说错，布洛妮娅大人始终在担心这件事。
E: Rebuilding trust between the two worlds has always been a priority for Lady Bronya.

C: （大家全都冲出去了…也去查看一下状况吧。）
E: (Everyone rushed outside... I should probably see what's happening.)

C: 恪尽职守的军人，还有奋力抗争的民间战士…跟他们比起来，我还真是一点儿也不摇滚啊。
E: A duty-bound soldier and a resistance leader... It's hard to be rock 'n' roll in front of people like that.

C: 心理健康问题值得关注……
E: Mental health is always important...

C: 嗐，别这么客气！他们两个才是大功臣。要不是他俩，我恐怕都要交代在矿区里了。
E: You're too kind, they deserve the real credit. I doubt I'd have come back in one piece without them.

C: 杰帕德大人……
E: Captain Gepard...

C: 我…我明白了！齐诺以后一定会保护好姐姐的！
E: O—Okay sir! I'll protect my sister when I grow up!

C: 三个小鼹鼠你都不知道吗？
E: Don't you even know the three little moles?

C: 这样你才算是收集齐了一整本《冒险鼹鼠队》，真不愧是{M#大哥哥}{F#大姐姐}，我可没有这样的耐心。
E: Now you have collected the whole book of The Adventurous Moles, great job. You did great, {M#Mister}{F#Miss}, I myself wouldn't have the patience to find all these missing pages.

C: 哎，那我只能让自己别那么期待了。
E: Hey, then I should look forward to it less.

C: …想看是想看的，但是只有我自己能看到的话，太没有意思了。
E: ...I do want to read it, but it's boring if it's just me by myself.

C: 你依稀记得某部游戏里，身手高强的主角钻进这样的垃圾箱，当敌人走近时，他如同黑夜将对方掩藏，没有发出任何声响。
E: You vaguely recall a video game in which the protagonist hid inside one of these dumpsters and quietly took out the enemy when they approached.

C: 走开。
E: Leave.

C: 这很正常。
E: This is normal.

C: 一直以来，帝皇鲁珀特一世为宇宙留下了诸多恐怖遗迹，其中「械皇遗冢」自被发现起就备受各方关注。
E: Emperor Rubert I left many horrific relics across the universe, and one of them, the Mechanical Emperor Tomb, has captivated the interests of countless people since its discovery.

C: 在上述疑团查清前，你们不得离开天舶司。
E: You are forbidden from leaving the Sky-Faring Commission until the aforementioned questions have been investigated.

C: 审讯刃的期间，太卜司——仙舟负责情报与信息推演的部门——截获了他潜藏在仙舟上的同党「卡芙卡」发出的通信。至于通讯对象嘛……
E: During our investigation, the Divination Commission — the department in charge of intelligence processing — intercepted a transmission sent out by his accomplice, Kafka, who has managed to hide aboard the ship. As for where that transmission was destined...

C: 是谁？！
E: Go on! Where!?

C: 嗯，寻常的手段许是不好使，不过，我们太卜司有独门的办法……
E: Hmm, ordinary means may prove futile when it comes to this individual. But the Divination Commission has ways of...

C: 看来小女子和恩公们的缘分不浅呢。
E: Seems like we were destined to be in each other's company...

C: 哼。
E: Hmph.

C: 哈哈，丹恒才不是「冷」哩，他那叫「愣」。
E: Haha, Dan Heng's not icy. He's nerdy.

C: 怎么？恩公想要约我共游「长乐天」吗？嘻嘻……
E: Oh? Did you want a tour of Exalting Sanctum? Heh heh...

C: 我长这么大还没见识过「魔阴身」的症状…没想到竟是这般可怕。
E: My first time seeing these symptoms up close... Being stricken with mara is more terrible than I imagined.

C: 对了，我们还会向各位发放蛋白米一袋，应急药物若干。这些物资找我当面申领，或是晚些由地衡司勤务送上门都行。
E: Oh, we will also be distributing a bag of protein rice and emergency medicine to each of you. You can collect the supplies from me in person, or the commission can deliver them to your door.

C: 什么意思…？
E: Meaning...?

C: 我这人或许有些惹祸上身的本事吧，本来寻思到了罗浮总该安全了，可又出了这样的事情……
E: It would seem I am a magnet for such misfortune... I thought I would be safe on the Luofu, but now...

C: 没事，叨扰了。
E: Never mind. Excuse me.

C: 没事，叨扰了。
E: Nothing. Please excuse me.

C: 我爹我娘都是「曜青」的名人！…要不然也不会有我了，所以打我落生起，他俩就特别严格地教育我。
E: My parents are both famous on the Yaoqing! ...I wouldn't be here otherwise. They've been training me ever since I was born!

C: 请说。
E: Please do...

C: 请问，您有没有见过这位小姐姐？
E: Any chance you've seen this lady?

C: 这位客人这个时候来「赎珠阁」…嗯，面无愁容戚色，看来您不是来典当的。
E: Curious timing for a visit to Jeweler's Pagoda... Hm, your faces... no sadness or misery. I take it you're not here to pawn anything?

C: {NICKNAME}，看来咱们在这儿也没什么收获啦，换个地方找找吧？
E: {NICKNAME}, doesn't look like we're gonna get anything from him. Let's go search somewhere else.

C: 罗浮内外的通航全都仰赖星槎往来。迴星港的生产线一断，仙舟内外航行的路线恐怕也得暂歇一段时日。
E: The Luofu relies on the starskiffs produced here to transport people and goods. Now that work in the shipyard has stopped, our internal transport and outbound flights might also grind to a halt.

C: 停云小姐，你看起来倒是一点也不为仙舟担心啊？
E: You don't seem to worry too much about the Xianzhou, Miss Tingyun.

C: 司舵大人只是命我接引诸位通行星槎海。和我平常出使天外，周旋客商没什么不同。
E: Besides, the Madam Helm Master simply asked me to assist you in navigating around Starskiff Haven. It's no different to any other diplomatic mission or delegate reception.

C: 不要抬举我们，瓦尔特，星核猎手也只是「命运的奴隶」。
E: You speak too highly of us, Welt. The Stellaron Hunters are merely destiny's slaves.

C: 有朋远来，本当旨酒倒迎，然天、地、人三元不在当位，只能往后推些个时辰了。咱们先谈正事。
E: Far-flung friends ought to be received with fine wine, but alas, the heavens, earth, and body are not aligned for such an occasion. You'll allow for a postponement of the usual formalities, I trust? We should begin with the matter at hand.

C: 她好像是在跟咱玩游戏一样，可恶！
E: Rats!? She's playing games with us — I hate her!

C: 关于停云…
E: About Tingyun...

C: 要让你感受这种痛苦，「丹恒」，我要让你知道「死」的痛苦！
E: I will force this suffering upon you, "Dan Heng." You will know the pain of death!

C: 不必伤心，持明一族生灭循环，常存此世。
E: No need to feel aggrieved. Vidyadhara go through cycles of life and death, existing forever in this world.

C: 她蜕生了…抛下我独自一人。
E: Her hatching rebirth is complete... she left me all alone.

C: 切断与鳞渊境的感应。
E: Cut off the spiritual link with Scalegorge Waterscape.

C: 这是…最初接受了镇压建木使命的那位龙尊……
E: This must be... the first high elder that accepted the mission to quell the Ambrosial Arbor...

C: 下一出戏目里，我要将各位炮制成虚卒。
E: For my next trick, I shall turn each of you into my Voidrangers.

C: 难怪药王秘传自信高人一等…这建木仙迹确有化生再造的力量。
E: Now I see why the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus hold themselves in such high regard... the Arbor's traces really do possess the power of metamorphosis and resurrection.

C: …我和停云分属不同的商团，大家虽是同事，但彼此也是竞争对手。
E: ...Tingyun and I were from different guilds. We were competitors... but also colleagues.

C: 我想看看那把刀…
E: I want to take a look at that knife...

C: {NICKNAME}，你来啦。最近是不是闲了，有空在仙舟上到处逛逛了？
E: {NICKNAME}, how's it going? Did you take some time off? See any more of the Xianzhou?

C: 罢了，我一个厨子，讲这些没用的做什么。辛苦几位，我来为你们做一道菜吧，就当是给你们，也是给停云小姐的回礼。
E: *sigh* Forget it... matters like these are beyond the control and understanding of a cook like me... Thank you, all of you. Let me prepare a dish for you... as a gift for Miss Tingyun.

C: 虽然升任司舵，我却是行伍出身，本不擅长这些心思细密的经营。停云她却是个天生的商人，职分上是我的下属，但她总爱和我谈论商事，给我建议。
E: Despite rising to Helm Master, my military career hadn't prepared me for the type of meticulous planning work now confronting me. Tingyun, on the other hand, was a born merchant — always discussing business matters with me and offering up advice — even if she was my subordinate.

C: 反物质军团出现在仙舟上？「停云」她…是某个绝灭大君的伪装？我不相信……
E: The Antimatter Legion on the Xianzhou? And Tingyun... a Lord Ravager?

C: 通常来讲是不会有什么大问题…但每个人的身体情况不同，一旦出现晕眩、幻觉或者记忆紊乱等问题，一定不要轻视！
E: Usually, this wouldn't be a huge problem... but everyone's different, so if you exhibit any signs of dizziness, hallucination, distorted memories or any other symptoms, you should take them seriously!

C: 这事很少见吗？
E: Is this a rare happening?

C: 随缘就好。考虑到无名客的多样性…我们说不定还能找到他们的后代，甚至有极小的概率——能见到本人哦。
E: We'll just leave it to the stars of fate. Considering the Nameless' diversity... Perhaps we might even stumble upon their descendants, or, against the slimmest of chances, the very individuals themselves.

C: …跟我来吧。
E: ...Come with me.

C: 这些问题…没有意义，但我会尽力为你说明：这里是现实与忆域的交界，一片…「梦境」。
E: These questions... have no meaning. But, I will answer you as best as I can: This is the border between reality and the Memory Zone, a... dreamscape.

C: 家族信仰「同谐」，他们救苦援弱的善迹在星间闻名遐迩，匹诺康尼的稳定与繁荣与之息息相关。
E: The Family believes in the Harmony, and their altruism is well-known across the stars — a trait that is intimately tied to Penacony's stability and prosperity.

C: （算了。虽然一波三折，但现在总算可以入梦了吧…嗯？）
E: (Forget it. It's taken a while, but at least I can finally enter the dream... Hmm?)

C: 以及「列车智库条目集体失踪案」、「用苏乐达浇灌观景车厢植物盆栽事件」、「休息时间针对列车长的噪音袭击」、「列车长专用零食储藏保险库入侵案」……
E: There are cases of entire entries disappearing from the Express data bank, the plants in the Parlor Car being watered with SoulGlad, disrupting the conductor's rest with noise, and a break-in to the conductor's exclusive snack vault.

C: 这是你自己做的吧…但我确实拿走了列车锅。
E: The first one is clearly a result of your own doing... But I do admit to consuming the last serving of the Express Special.

C: 当然有。
E: Of course there is.

C: 这是你自己做的吧…但我确实拿走了列车锅。
E: The first one is clearly a result of your own doing... But I do admit to consuming the last serving of the Express Special.

C: （重申——我不会对这枚梦泡的内容作出任何解释性或暗示性的评论。）
E: (Let me reiterate that I won't make any explanatory or leading comments on the content of this dream bubble.)

C: 那会儿就有苏乐达了？
E: Did SoulGlad really exist in that era?

C: 那个把列车炸成两截的家伙帕。
E: That guy who blew up the train into two pieces.

C: 我是想说，你是受家族邀请来的吧？我…我可以担任你的向导！
E: The Family invited you here, right? I—I'd be happy to show you around!

C: （借机了解一下当地，也不是坏事。）
E: (It's not a bad idea to get to know about this place.)

C: 这边这边，给你看个有意思的东西～
E: Please come this way. Let me show you something interesting.

C: 小事～来，把手机给我吧。
E: My pleasure! Here, give me your phone.

C: 我去帮你领些「艾迪恩代币」吧——这样你就可以随意游玩这些游乐设施了。
E: Let me get some Aideen Tokens for you. With those, you'll be able to try any of the attractions here that you fancy.

C: …我叫流萤，是鸢尾花家系的艺者。
E: ...My name is Firefly. I'm a stage performer from the Iris Family.

C: 你现在只能发出一声很酷的*哼*作为回应。
E: You can only make a cool grunting noise as a response right now.

C: 这里是…商业区下层吗？
E: Is this... the lower level of the Commercial District?
Two...

C: （感受到了锐利的视线，还是回头吧…）
E: (I can sense his penetrating gaze. Let's turn around...)

C: 这里是真正的梦境…？
E: This is the real Dreamscape...?
████No█ █ no█ █ stay ███ don't█ come ██...

C: 好熟悉的谏言…
E: This all feels so familiar...

C: 你的意思是，要我团结你们？
E: Are you saying you want me to rally you all together?

C: 何不与我一起对抗塔塔洛夫？
E: Why not stand with me against Tatalov?

C: 住客们的安全，也许这一点也无法保障哦…{M#他}{F#她}遭遇的那只怪物不就是最好的证明吗？要我再提示一遍吗，它是忆域迷因……
E: Even the guests' safety cannot be assured now... Isn't the monster that {M#he}{F#she} encountered indisputable proof? Need I remind you that it is a Memory Zone meme...

C: …而我将成为祂的尖兵，亲自为你{RUBY_B#送葬}报喜{RUBY_E#}——「钟表匠」。
E: ...And I will join THEIR vanguard to announce this {RUBY_B#funeral}good news{RUBY_E#} to you personally, "Watchmaker."

C: 哎呀，不是啦。姬子姐姐说，她们是在调查梦境的过程中偶遇的。
E: Oh, not exactly. Miss Himeko said that they were investigating the incidents happening in the Dreamscape.

C: （怎么回事，那种微妙的感觉又来了……）
E: (What's going on? That weird feeling is back again...)

C: 我从忆域中采撷了几缕她的思绪，这能帮助你们对她建立印象。现在，牢牢抓住这些思绪，在脑海中把它们整理成型。
E: I picked up slivers of her thoughts in the Memory Zone. These will help you form an impression of her. Now, you must hang on to these thoughts with all your might, and shape them in your mind.

C: 或者，从结果而言…这才是那个人真正的*计划*。
E: Perhaps, judging from the outcome... this is that person's true intention.

C: 你回到现实，与同伴们会合。经过慎重讨论，星穹列车决定对匹诺康尼出手相助。在你们和家族的共同努力下，真相很快水落石出：一切都是公司的阴谋。
