E: Returning to reality, you reunite with your companions. After a thorough discussion, the Crew decides to assist Penacony, leading to the revelation of a conspiracy orchestrated by the IPC.

C: 如何，能感受到忆质在你身边流淌吗？
E: How about it? Can you feel the memoria flowing around you?

C: 二位，走这边。我尽量为你们创造平稳的捷径。
E: You two, this way. I'll try to create a stable shortcut for you.

C: 和你猜的一样：外头没人知道知更鸟遇害了，连一点捕风捉影的流言都没有。电视还在转播她的典礼彩排——大概是个替身吧——人们都在做梦呢。
E: Just as you guessed: Nobody outside knows about Robin's death, there aren't even baseless conspiracy theories. They're still streaming the rehearsal for her ceremony — using a stand-in, I guess — *ahem* they must be dreaming.

C: 但如果你只是管不住手，想找个人碰碰运气，那正巧有个合适的人选……
E: But if you simply can't control yourself and want to try your hand, then there just so happens to be a suitable candidate...

C: …看来胜负早已注定。
E: ...It appears the outcome has already been determined.

C: 也可能是因为流萤小姐一事目击者众多，不方便掩盖，不如顺水推舟，让更多人入场控制局势。
E: It may also be that Miss Firefly's murder had so many witnesses that it couldn't be covered up, so they went with the flow and let more people on the scene to control the situation.

C: 这次我们要实打实扮演一次大侦探了…但在调查开始前，该怎么答复家族和砂金？
E: This time we're playing the role of a real detective... But before we start, what are we going to say to The Family and Aventurine?

C: 不对——这不是一段「记忆」？
E: No — is this not a "memory"?

C: 正在在在在为您生成指引，请耐心等候候候候候……
E: Gen—n—n—n—n—n—nerating guide. Please wait pa—a—a—a—a—a—atient—t—t—t...

C: …已已已已已检索到最近的打卡点！
E: ...Fo—o—o—o—und the nearest check-in spot!

C: …你之前指控的可是那个巡海游侠。
E: ...Do you mean the Galaxy Ranger whom you accused previously?

C: …如此贵重的物品，恐怕只比其他回报更为昂贵。
E: ...For an object so precious, it probably comes at an even higher price than other forms of recompense.

C: 「试问：你是否持有基石？」
E: "Question: Do you own a Cornerstone?"

C: 铭牌上写着：<color=#dbc291ff>格列佛拱门</color>。这么个小玩意儿你都能记得一清二楚？这东西的外观让我想起一种通过就能使人缩小的隧……
E: The nameplate reads: <color=#dbc291ff>Gulliver's Arch</color>. I'm amazed you can remember something this tiny. You know, this reminds me of a tunnel I once saw that could shrink people who passed through it.

C: 忆者拥有常人难以理解的能力，在匹诺康尼的忆域中可谓如鱼得水，黑天鹅已经向我们证明了这点。
E: The Memokeepers have abilities that are difficult for normal people to comprehend. In the Memory Zone of Penacony, they thrive effortlessly, a fact proven to us by Black Swan.

C: …不是，你还来真的啊？
E: ...Wait, are you for real?

C: 抵抗只会白白送死，为什么就是不明白——上吧，美梦剧团！给我狠狠地教训{M#他们}{F#她们}！
E: There is no meaning to death in defiance, why do you not understand... Sweet Dreams Troupe, charge! Teach them a lesson they won't forget!

C: 从此，那巨人立于天地之间，成为整个世界存续的支柱。而作为代价，那些难以前进，无法前进的人…他们将永远失去「未来」。
E: Since that moment, the giant stood between heaven and earth, becoming the pillar of the world's existence. As a price, those who found it hard to move forward, who could not advance... forever lost their "future."

C: 我有什么理由帮你？
E: Why should I help you?

C: 投入「一袋垃圾」…
E: Give a bag of trash...

C: 可这么一算…「钟表匠」岂不是活了好几百年？
E: But if you do the math... doesn't that mean the Watchmaker was around for several centuries?

C: 他们对外依旧称赞「钟表匠」的美名，暗地里却悄悄地将他钉上耻辱柱。
E: While they continue to praise the Watchmaker's name to the world, behind closed doors they condemn him on a pillar of shame.

C: 稍等。
E: Just one moment.

C: 未经允许，擅闯禁地，这恐怕不是作客之道吧？瓦尔特先生，还有……
E: I don't think trespassing on forbidden areas is the way to be a guest, Mr. Yang, and...

C: 啊，先生…你也有双漂亮的眼睛。真好看！
E: Ah, Mister... You have pretty eyes too. Beautiful!

C: 好啊，那观众席给我留个位置，我倒要看看你有多大本事。不过，我还是很好奇……
E: *laugh* Alright then, reserve a seat for me in the audience. I'm curious to see just how capable you are. Still, you never answered my question:

C: …就在这片梦里。
E: ...In this dream.

C: 你明明知道。只是答案没有意义。
E: You DO know. But there's no point pressing the issue.

C: 你的「过去」…和「未来」。
E: Your past... and future.

C: 已经不是第一次了…这是你最擅长，也最渴望的方式。这场闹剧以一场「死亡」开始，也将在一场「死亡」中落幕。
E: This isn't the first time... you've been an escape artist from day one. This fiasco started with a "Death," and its curtains will fall on another "Death."

C: 那孩子…会在这里面么？
E: That child... Could he be in here?

C: 也许…会途经你所说的地方。
E: Perhaps... I might pass through the place you mentioned.

C: 有人已经做到了。
E: Someone already has.

C: 那他们在哪儿？
E: Then where are they?

C: 而现在，在深不见底的梦中，那颗下落的骰子…终于坠地了。
E: And now, in the unfathomable depths of dream, the once falling die... has at last landed on its earthly rest.

C: 按照计划，你的「基石」已被顺利送入家族的领地中。那么——
E: As planned, your cornerstone has been successfully sent to The Family's territory. Then—

C: …你醒了。
E: ...You're awake.

C: 无论如何，得离开这里。
E: Doesn't matter. I need to get out of here.

C: 哈哈……
E: Haha...

C: 于你而言，这的确是唯一的道路。请时刻记得，你和匹诺康尼不属于一个世界，生于彼岸者，无法在此岸寻得归处。
E: To you, that surely is the only option. Please bear in mind, you and Penacony are of different worlds — those born on the far bank cannot seek solace across the river.

C: 我还遇到了那位慷慨的先生，他的样子很不对劲，始终在自言自语，难道这也是剧本的布景？
E: Plus, I met that generous gentleman. He looked really out of it and kept talking to himself. Is this also part of the performance?

C: 难怪黄泉小姐始终不愿拔刀…难以想象那朴素的刀鞘里竟蕴含着如此恐怖的力量。若非砂金的力量源自「存护」，恐怕整片梦境都会受到波及。
E: No wonder Miss Acheron is so averse to drawing her blade... it's hard to imagine such terrifying power could reside in an ordinary sheath. If it weren't for the fact that Aventurine's power originated from the Preservation, the entire Dreamscape would have been affected.

C: 两位客人又是怎么来的？按理说，这片梦境应该没有对外开放…难道是「眠眠」？
E: How did you two get here? This Dreamscape isn't supposed to be open to the public... I wonder if it has something to do with Sleepie?

C: 你在这里做什么？
E: What are you doing out here?

C: 哎呀，都说了我是活人，你也是活人，正常点好不好……
E: Oh my, I'm human and so are you. Can you get a grip...

C: 这边走，各位。流梦礁的道路年久失修，注意脚下。
E: This way, please. The roads here in Dreamflux Reef are a bit run-down, so watch your step.

C: 说得对，又到咱们星穹列车拯救世界的时候了！
E: Exactly! It's time for the Crew to save the world once more!

C: 哦？竟然是知更鸟小姐…真是荣幸。
E: Oh, Robin? Can't believe I'm meeting you in person here... What an honor.

C: 怎么了，妹妹？
E: What's up, sister?

C: 你是想说…事情不应该是这样的，对吧？
E: Are you suggesting that... this is not how things should be?

C: 想想星穹列车吧，这正是个好例子。无名客为联结诸界付出了巨大努力，誉满寰宇…然而，能坚持在如此苦旅中奔波的无非寥寥数人，更非等闲之辈。
E: Let's take the Astral Express as an example. The Nameless made tremendous efforts to bridge worlds, gaining fame across the universe... However, only a few extraordinary individuals can endure such a perilous journey.

C: 她应该不是有意刁难我们，而是真的不知道该怎么办。
E: I don't think she's trying to give us a hard time. She really just doesn't know what to do.

C: 哥们姐们，你们都是来参加谐乐大典的？
E: Hey, are you guys here for the Charmony Festival too?

C: 请您耐心等待盛会吧。家族绝不让您败兴而归。
E: Please be patient as you await the festival. The Family will spare no effort to ensure your satisfaction.

C: 两位英武的先生，晚上好。
E: Good evening, gentlemen.

C: 无所谓，你懂我意思就行。总之，别看巡海游侠销声匿迹那么多年，我们一直盯着这片宇宙呢。很多傻宝宁可冒犯泯灭帮，也不敢得罪游侠。
E: Well, you know what I mean. Even though the Galaxy Rangers have been out of sight for years, we've been keeping an eye on this region. Even the dumbest criminals know better than to mess with the Annihilation Gang, much less the Rangers.

C: …「我在星穹列车上等你。」
E: ..."I'll be waiting for you on the Astral Express."

C: 我们一定会胜利的！
E: Nah, we'd win.

C: 各位，离「谐乐大典」的时间越来越近了，我们必须尽快抵达终点…考虑到效率和安全，两两组队行动是最好的选择。
E: Everyone, as the Charmony Festival is drawing closer, we must reach the end as quickly as possible... Factoring in efficiency and safety, splitting up into two groups is the best choice.

C: 现在考验的是「肢体语言」…应该不能用台词糊弄过去吧？
E: The test now is about body language... I don't think dialogue is allowed here.

C: 这战斗和剧情也太脱节了吧……
E: Isn't this fight way off from the actual storyline?

C: 你们会知道的，但前提是，二位能成功通过接下来的考验！欢迎来到由苏乐达™有限公司赞助的第二十届第三十三场热砂盛典第二关——「枪火时间」！
E: You'll find out eventually, but only if you clear the next test first! Welcome to the second stage of the thirty-third Scorchsand Festival in the twentieth season, sponsored by SoulGlad™ Enterprises — Gunfire Time!

C: 「筑梦拼图」很紧张刺激吗？
E: Is Dream Jigsaw really that intense and thrilling?

C: 流程越来越复杂了，救命…
E: Ah, the plot thickens. Help!

C: 拯救世界？多么「纯美」的义举！既然如此……
E: Saving the world? What a righteous act of Beauty! If that's the case...

C: 唔…究竟要如何抉择才好……
E: Hmm... What would be the noblest choice...?

C: 正是。不过这又和星核有什么联系？
E: That's right. But what does this have to do with the Stellaron?

C: 预祝你们获得圆满的成绩！
E: I wish you a successful performance!

C: 这么随便的引导真的没问题吗……
E: Are such haphazard instructions really okay...

C: 可如今的匹诺康尼一点也看不到星核污染的迹象，家族也向来以播撒和谐闻名…我该如何确信你们所言非虚？
E: However, present-day Penacony bears no marks of the Stellaron's taint and The Family has always been renowned for spreading Harmony... How can I be sure your words hold truth?

C: 您误会了，姬子小姐。他们很安全，正如家族一如既往的承诺，没有人会在梦境里受到伤害，更遑论属于「秩序」的美丽新世界。
E: You're mistaken, Miss Himeko. They are in very safe hands, and just as The Family has always proclaimed — no one can be harmed in the Dreamscape, least of all in the beautiful new world belonging to the Order.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>要选择为小谐乐鸽打造鸟笼，在温暖的屋宇中精心饲养鸟儿吗？</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Or build a cage for it, and feed it, giving it the utmost care from within the warmth of a home?</color>

C: 做出选择。
E: Make the decision.

C: 知更鸟小姐竟然遭遇过这种事…「以强援弱」固然伟大，但如果要付出这种代价…我、我有点不知道了……
E: I can't believe that happened to Miss Robin... "The strong defending the weak" is a great mantra, but if I had to pay such a price... I, I don't know what I'd do...

C: 你可以这么认为，但逃避并不可耻。恰恰相反，每个人心中都有逃避的种子。
E: That's another way of understanding it, but there is no shame in escape. On the contrary, the seeds of escape exist in everyone's hearts.

C: 看，就是这儿。
E: Look, there it is.

C: 咦，感觉路不太一样了？
E: Huh? Something feels different about this place?

C: 就是这儿。这里…是我的<color=#dbc291ff>「钟表房」</color>。
E: This is it. This... is my <color=#dbc291ff>room of clocks</color>.

C: 钟表小子，我应该…不会再去哪里了。
E: You know, Clockie. I don't think... I'll be going anywhere else.

C: 既然这样，投票结果就是二比一。
E: In that case, the vote stands at two to one.

C: 如果我们找不到出路，匹诺康尼又该怎么办？
E: But what will happen to Penacony if we don't find a way out?

C: 是啊，但我没告诉你，这故事背后…还有一场美妙的误会。
E: Yes, but what I didn't mention was... there's a funny misunderstanding behind it.

C: 嗯…你说得对。咱们连「毁灭」的绝灭大君都收拾过了，区区「秩序」肯定也不在话下！
E: Yeah, you're right! We've even dealt with a Lord Ravager of the Destruction, so a follower of the Order won't be a big deal!

C: 「琥珀历<unbreak>2147</unbreak>纪，囚犯哈努努掀起了声势浩大的战火，并获得胜利。公司称其为『边陲战争』，而阿斯德纳人称其为『独立战争』」。
E: "In <unbreak>2147</unbreak> AE, a prisoner named Hanunue ignited a struggle for liberty and emerged triumphant. IPC referred to it as the 'War of the Frontier,' while the Asdanians dubbed it the 'War of Independence.'"

C: 看！他就在那儿！
E: Look! There he is!

C: 各位来的正是时候。谐乐大典即将揭幕，「{RUBY_B#「秩序」}同谐{RUBY_E#}」的序幕若是少了各位在场，那可太教人遗憾了。
E: You've arrived at the perfect moment. The Charmony Festival is about to commence, and it would be a shame if you were absent for {RUBY_B#The Order}the Harmony's{RUBY_E#} prologue.

C: 请容我再次向各位表示欢迎——欢迎来到「匹诺康尼大剧院」——美梦的中心，星核之所在，谐乐大典的绝对舞台……
E: Allow me to extend my warmest welcome once more. Welcome to Penacony Grand Theater, the very core of the sweet dream, the abode of the Stellaron, the grand stage of the Charmony Festival...

C: 是调律的力量…不要被歌声吸引注意力！
E: It's the power of tuning... Don't let the song distract you!

C: 太阳不是已经被我打下来了吗…
E: Didn't I shoot the sun out of the sky...

C: 甭客气！咱们巡海游侠主打一个「路见不平拔刀相助」——丹恒兄弟，你们仙舟老话是这么讲的吧？
E: No need for thanks! The Galaxy Rangers' principle is "Correct every injustice one sees." That's how you lot on the Xianzhou put it, right, Dan Heng?

C: 我在心里时时念着你。
E: You're always in my heart.

C: 那么，准备好了么？
E: Are you ready for it?

C: 这一击不仅将砂金击落，也撕开了美梦与原初忆域的通道。你们抵达流梦礁，得知了<color=#dbc291ff>「死亡」实为「沉眠」</color>，更得知了梦境、星核乃至门童米沙的真相。
E: That strike foiled Aventurine's plan and opened a passage between the sweet dream and the original Memory Zone. Upon your arrival at Dreamflux Reef, you learned the truth that <color=#dbc291ff>"Death" was actually "Dormancy"</color>, as well as the truth about the Dreamscape, the Stellaron, and the bellboy, Misha.

C: 看来我们已经得出结果了——下一站就是「玛瑙世界」梅露丝坦因了帕！
E: Looks like we have a winner. Next stop: The Agate World, Melustanin!

C: 砂金
E: Aventurine

C: 铁尔南
E: Tiernan

C: 她是「梦想之地」真正意义上的奠基人。
E: She was the true founder behind the Land of the Dreams.

C: 我回到故事开头了？
E: I'm now back at the beginning of the story?

C: 你看，海面上的影子已经全部消散了。还记得么？你说过，等亡者的遗憾悉数平息，天就放晴了。
E: You see, the shadows on the sea have vanished. Do you remember? You once said that the sky would clear when the regrets of the departed had faded away.

C: 还有那个再也回不去的故乡，匹诺康尼。
E: And Penacony, the hometown to which you could never return.

C: 不是在做梦啦，这是在现实，「白日梦」酒店！「秩序」的美梦已经结束了。
E: You're not dreaming. We're in The Reverie Hotel, in the real world. The Order's dream is over.

C: ——可别当着翡翠女士的面叫她「大老板」，会出人命的~不开玩笑。
E: Don't call Miss Jade "Big Boss" in front of her, or there will be serious consequences. I mean, really serious.

C: 账账狼吞虎咽地吃下了「薯条圣代」，然后发出了一个满意的饱嗝。
E: Numby gulps down the Potato Fries Sundae, then lets out a satisfied puff.

C: 你好。能和我说说这艘「晖长石号」吗？
E: Hello. Could you tell me more about the Radiant Feldspar?

C: 你怎么也在？
E: How come you're here too?

C: 「秩序」是何时出现的？
E: When did the Order infiltrate Penacony?

C: 你在太一之梦里遭遇了什么？
E: What happened to you in Ena's dream?

C: 死亡是如此苦涩的事实，但你们所奉献的一切将被历史所铭记。
E: Death is a bitter truth, but what you did will be remembered by history.

C: 你觉得你能做到？
E: You really think you can pull that off?

C: 老奥帝，你是个聪明人，如此大费周章和我下这盘棋，不就是为了展现自己的商业手腕，好为家族谋求更多利益么？
E: You're a smart merchant, Old Oti. Isn't the whole purpose of this elaborate game to showcase your business acumen and seek more benefits for The Family?

C: 一个宇宙，不需要两种「秩序」。
E: This universe doesn't need two types of Order.

C: 提案的大致内容，各位已经有所了解了。按照设想，这轮融资结束后，公司将持有匹诺康尼<unbreak>30%</unbreak>的股份。
E: I believe everyone here is familiar with the general contents of the proposal. After this round of financing, the IPC is expected to hold <unbreak>30%</unbreak> of Penacony's shares.

C: 去找这几个人吧，他们都光顾过我的典押行。用你的眼睛去见证，看看他们的愿望有没有实现。
E: Go and talk to these people. They're all customers of my pawnshop. See for yourself if their wishes have come true.

C: 是真的…那位慈玉女士是货真价实的……
E: It's true... Lady Bonajade has truly blessed me...

C: 你的宝箱就归我了！
E: Your chest is mine!

C: 你在说什么啊，别睡糊涂了吧…「秩序」的美梦已经结束了。
E: What are you talking about? Are you still half-asleep or something...? The Order's dream is over.

C: 你一直没反应，我担心还不行吗？幸好，「秩序」的美梦已经结束了。
E: Hey, I was seriously worried when you didn't respond. Thank goodness. The Order's dream is over.

C: 多谢，也祝你玩得开心，匹诺康尼的大英雄！
E: Thank you, and I also hope you enjoy yourself, great hero of Penacony!

C: 我叫{NICKNAME}。
E: My name is {NICKNAME}.

C: 好了，既然你找到了我，轮到我完成使命了。接下来，我将倒数五个数，然后爆炸！
E: All right. Now that you've found me, it's my turn to complete my mission. Next, I'll count down from five, and then explode!

C: 嗬，真是令人羞耻！难道小时候派克叔叔没有好好地教导你么？要在合适的场合提出合适的问题！
E: Hmph, how shameful! Did Uncle Parker not teach you properly? One must pose appropriate questions at the appropriate time!

C: 我正在这艘豪华游轮上品尝匹诺康尼消费主义糖衣炮弹。你呢？是来观光的吗？
E: I'm currently on this luxury cruise ship enjoying Penacony's consumer-friendly sugar-coated cannonballs. What about you? Are you just seeing the sights?

C: 换句话说，「『芙莫』娃娃」的意思是「毛绒娃娃娃娃」。听起来有点奇怪，但考虑到是花火，倒也合理。
E: In other words, "furmur doll" translates to "fluffy doll doll doll doll." It may sound peculiar, but considering its Sparkle origin, it actually makes lots of sense.

C: 只要承受住忆质重压带来的痛苦，我就可以下潜至美梦之外的原始忆域中，而这将会为「晖长石号」提供一线生机。
E: As long as I can bear the pain of the memoria pressure, I'll be able to dive into the primal Memory Zone beyond the dream, and extend a lifeline to the Radiant Feldspar.

C: ——敬坚忍的岁月、每个悲伤的夜晚，和终将到来的黎明。
E: ...To your tenacity throughout time, to each sorrowful night, and to the dawn that is finally upon us.

C: 你今天好多愁善感…
E: You're awfully sentimental today...

C: 又要去找「钟表匠」的遗产？
E: Are we going to look for the Watchmaker's Legacy again?

C: 宝了个贝的，是他啊！
E: You mean Mr. Holy Forkeroni!?

C: 看！你的*蕉声*吸引来了更多可爱的猴子。
E: Look! Your Banagibberish has attracted more adorable monkeys.

C: 你是谁？
E: Who are you?

C: 《银河忍法帖》有云：「当断则断，不受其乱。」仍有邪祟在附近徘徊，我们速速离去。
E: As stated in the Cosmic Ninjutsu Inscriptions: "Be decisive, lest we be overwhelmed by the consequences." There are still fiendlings roaming nearby. Let us be on our way.

C: 算算时间，校庆开幕式也该开始了。我们这就去见校长吧！
E: Look at the time. The anniversary celebration's opening ceremony should be starting soon. Let's go see the dean.

C: 让我看看这场戏的台本。「在考官主持下，家族对考生进行调律，探寻其灵魂旋律中的天赋……」
E: Let me see what the script for this scene says: The examiner presides over the exam as The Family tunes the students to discover their talents within their soul's melody...

C: 脸皮厚。
E: I'm thick-skinned.

C: 她没出声啊。
E: She didn't say anything.

C: 是椒丘的食疗秘方！
E: It's a secret recipe from Jiaoqiu!

C: 指、指点？我应该不行的，还是交给筑梦设计课吧……
E: Q—Questions? I'm not that good... You should ask them in Dreamweaving class...

C: 靠谱的丹恒，上！
E: The ever-reliable Dan Heng, you're up!

C: 行啊，那就准备听个响？
E: Alright then! Hope you're ready to get shot.

C: 喵！喵喵？哈——可算回来了。
E: Fork. Fudge? Fudge! Holy shirtballs, I'm back to normal!

C: 听好了，现在我会把皮带解下来挂在旁边，然后我问一句，你说一句。
E: Listen up. I'm gonna take off my belt and hang it up here. After that, I'll ask a few questions, and you're gonna answer every one of 'em.

C: 你知道什么了？这会儿就别追星了吧，我是看不出来这哪像个能避难的样子。
E: What do you know? Now's not the time to be a fan. How's this place even going to be a shelter?

C: 哈！没那么复杂，导演哥们，要我说——
E: Bah, don't make things sound so complicated, director pal! If you were to ask me...

C: 苦茶大师明白，乱破正在向一名真正的忍者蜕变，她的使命也终将到来……
E: Master Kucha is aware that Rappa is maturing into a true ninja, and her destined mission will soon unfold...

C: 评点个蕉皮啊！这玩意擦得掉吗？！
E: Peel that thought out of your head! Is that permanent ink!?

C: 不愧是咱们仨，还是这么默契。
E: Good job playing along back there, guys!

C: 来，仔细品读一下这句话，为什么睡蕉小猴能在匹诺康尼引发香蕉热潮？
E: Now, let's take some time to think about this slogan. What is it about Slumbernana Monkey that allowed it to spark a banana frenzy in Penacony?

C: 那位灰头发的同学——你怎么在这？！算了，就你了，你来回答一下。
E: How about that gray-haired student— Wait, what are you doing here!? Oh, never mind. You can answer the question then.

C: 同学们，先别激动，让我说几句。
E: Hold your bananas, students. Allow me to explain myself.

C: 谐乐蕉师，人家已经尽力了——可扮演猴子也太难了吧！
E: But I'm already doing the best I can, Charmony BananAdvisor! It's so hard to play a monkey!

C: 我老爱小猴了。
E: Ooh, I absolutely adore monkeys!

C: 如无意外，龙•邪祟也会在这「课堂」上露出马脚。
E: If things play out as I expect, dragon fiendling will let slip her true nature in this class.

C: 相信自己。
E: Believe in yourself.

C: 你这个*银河粗口*！别在这*银河粗口*了，我*银河粗口*！
E: You little *cosmic profanity*! Give up on that *cosmic profanity* act of yours already, or I'm gonna *cosmic profanity* you upside-down!

C: 在下认为伎乐忍徒的演技全无不妥，是阁下太过吹毛求疵了。
E: If you want my opinion, there's nothing amiss with Ninja Initiate Gigaku's acting. In fact, you are being overly critical of her.

C: 你的坦白比预想中更快。所以，这果然是原始博士的阴谋？
E: Your confession came sooner than we expected. So, is this one of Dr. Primitive's schemes?

C: 你在做什么，<color=#dbc291ff>忆者</color>？
E: Just what do you think you're doing, <color=#dbc291ff>Memokeeper</color>?

C: 听听而已嘛，我又没信。他们说话都不押韵，肯定不靠谱。
E: Well... I was just listening to what they had to say. It's not like they managed to convince me anyway. Plus, if they don't talk in rhyme, it's probably just nonsense.
...Huh?

C: 巡海游侠。
E: ...Galaxy Ranger.

C: 嗯，只要将这些含有「忍者」模因病毒的记忆投入联觉梦境，就可以覆盖睡蕉小猴在梦境中的存在。
E: As long as we insert memories containing the ninja memetic virus into the Synesthesia Dreamscape, it will overwrite the existence of Slumbernana Monkey in the dream.

C: 在下已将虾蟇•忍者提炼的往事灌注于缭乱•忍法的异彩之中，令此物在邪恶国度爆发四散，便可破除邪忍阵法——此乃在下曾经修习过的忍•科学。
E: I have infused all the memories that Ninja Gama extracted into Dazzling Ninjutsu's colors. Spread this all over the evil realm, and it shall break the Evil Ninja's matrix. This is the ninja tech I previously studied.

C: 欸？什么？
E: Huh? What?

C: 恰丽卡，你做的点心太好吃了！
E: Chaletka, the desserts that you made are so delicious!

C: 没错，这里无疑是在下曾与{NICKNAME}•忍者到访过的幻境，但当时还未有如此多的邪祟。看来受到邪术迫害的人越来越多了……
E: That is true. This is undoubtedly the illusory realm Ninja {NICKNAME} and I had once visited. There were not as many fiendlings around back then. Looks like more and more people are being afflicted by the sorcery...

C: 呃…这…这是不同的语境，你不能一概而论……
E: Ugh... This... The context is different. You can't generalize it in this manner...

C: 别慌，相信白厄。
E: Don't worry. Have faith in Phainon.

C: 两位贵客没有为逐火之旅出生入死的义务，还是由我和万敌阁下同行吧。
E: Our two distinguished guests are not obliged to risk their lives for the Flame-Chase Journey. Let me join you instead, Lord Mydei.

C: 「相拥之后，便是永恒的离别。」
E: "And after an embrace... there shall be eternal separation."

C: 出发吧，去找白厄。
E: Let's go look for Phainon.

C: 你那位同伴似乎不在附近…我们先走。但愿他平安。
E: I don't see him around here... We should go first. Let's pray he stays safe.

C: 为何要将我们…弃置于异邦的屠刀下？
E: Why... why did you leave us to the mercy of these foreigners?

C: 白厄一定是被这战吼冲昏头脑，迷失了自我…哼，没用的家伙。
E: This battle cry must have gotten to Phainon. That's why he lost himself... Hmph, what a useless fool.

C: …是个很深奥的问题，我恐怕难以解答。
E: ...That's a complicated question. I'm not sure I can answer that.

C: 但缇宝大人觉得只是仿制品，说要真是雅努萨波利斯的手艺，玻璃制品如此易碎，怎么可能从黄金战争的动荡里幸存下来？
E: But Lady Tribbie believed it to be a counterfeit. She said it couldn't possibly be from Janusopolis — the likelihood of such fragile glassware surviving the Chrysos War is simply too low.

C: 神悟树庭是奥赫玛的友邦学院——他们保管着{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}的火种，是研究黑潮、泰坦等神秘事物的前沿机构，也为逐火之旅提供学术研究支持。
E: The Grove of Epiphany is Okhema's partner academy. They look after the Coreflame of {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#} and are the organization at the forefront of researching phenomena such as the black tide and the Titans. They also provide academic research support for the Flame-Chase Journey.

C: 只要人家在寻找记忆的旅途中留心寻找，然后让{NICKNAME}「嘭」的一下——小缇安不光能想起妈妈的模样，甚至还能和她对话了，没错吧？
E: If I keep a lookout for it while searching for memories along our journey, then {NICKNAME} can go "boom"... and not only will Trianne be able to remember what her mama looks like, she'll even be able to talk with her! Right?

C: 这是什么仪式祷文吗？
E: Is this some kind of ritualistic prayer?

C: 一切皆有可能，但要注意，炼金并非万全之术。各位所能听到的内容取决于我付出的灵魂当量，并非无中生有。
E: Nothing is impossible. Having said that, alchemy is not omnipotent. Each time you hear from me, an equivalent part of my soul is being consumed as the price. In other words — this voice isn't created out of thin air.

C: 那是保管{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}火种的地方，就在巨木顶部。照他的说法，火种应该还在那里。
E: It is located at the top of the giant tree and is where {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces'{RUBY_E#} Coreflame is kept. According to Anaxa, the Coreflame should still be there.

C: 「十二星宿如目，巨人举杯对酌……」
E: "Giants raised their glasses in a toast beheld by the twelve constellations..."

C: 你怎么还干过这个…？
E: Why do you even have experience in that...?

C: 仙女木？
E: White Dryads?

C: 两位，介意吾也加入这场密谈么？
E: Do you mind if I join your private conversation?

C: 不过，接下来我会向你提问，还请如实作答——如果你能对答如流，那我们便暂时当你不是敌人。
E: However, I'm going to ask you some questions. Please answer them truthfully. If you can do so without hesitation, we won't treat you as an enemy for the time being.

C: <size=40>吔——！</size>
E: <size=40>Haaa!</size>

C: ——没有，因为水车得有水才能动。真是太让人遗憾了。
E: — No, because it needs water to turn. What a pity.

C: …我没有。
E: ...I'm not.

C: 取来可以，但劝你别费心思打别的算盘。
E: We can retrieve it, but I advise you not to waste your time on any schemes.
Hehe...

C: 这「威胁」与黑潮有关？
E: Is this threat related to the black tide?

C: 哇…原来花是这样长出来的呀！
E: Wow... So, this is how flowers are grown!

C: 你究竟是什么人…？
E: Who exactly are you...?

C: …失礼了，我不该这么粗鲁。那个男人能挺过去，我心里清楚。
E: ...I'm sorry, that was rude of me. What I meant was, I know that man can pull through for sure.

C: 好了，这场闹剧就到此为止吧？勇士们，该动起来了。
E: Very well, let us bring this farce to a close, shall we? Warriors, it is time to get moving.

C: 嗯，我看见了，燃烧的哀丽秘榭，我的亲人、朋友、同族…所有人都倒在火海里。
E: Yes, I saw it all. Aedes Elysiae ablaze, with everyone — my family, friends, and my kin — lying in a sea of flames.

C: …瞧你说的。我家的阿塔卡玛，即便并非预言中的黄金裔，但不也是英雄么？
E: ...Don't put it that way. Even if my Artakama wasn't one of the Chrysos Heirs mentioned in the prophecy, she was still a heroine, wasn't she?

C: 去道别吧█ █ 缇里西██ █庇俄丝███  █ █
E: Go █ █ bid your farewells, Tri ██ █bios███ █ █

C: 只能先试试看了。如果真的无路可走……
E: We will have to give it a try. If there is truly no other way...

C: 第二条论据就更直接了：它早前陷入混战时，虽然多有分心，但从始至终都在盯着我，或者说，我体内的{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}。
E: The second premise is even more explicit. When it was engaged in fierce battle with many of us and was heavily distracted, it remained consistently focused on me — or rather, on the Titan {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#} inside me.

C: 我们回来了，阿格莱雅。
E: We're back, Aglaea.

C: 你身上的「引力」。人们会自愿聚集在你的身边，聆听你的指引。
E: It's the magnetic allure in your presence. It draws people to gather around you willingly, to seek your guidance.
Oh...

C: 代我们还乡吧，守护者！
E: Return home on our behalf, Guardian!

C: 那为什么……
E: Then why...?

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「众人将与一人离别，惟其人将觐见奇迹……」</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>"All shall bid farewell to one, and that person alone will witness the miracle —"</color>

C: 我想，现在是时候了。
E: This, to me, feels like the right opportunity.

C: 听听*我们*与{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}的最后一次长谈吧。
E: It's time to witness our last conversation with {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}.

C: 是缇里西庇俄丝……
E: It's Tribios...

C: *我们*出发了。
E: We finally set off.

C: 圣女大人，怎么了？
E: What's wrong, Lady Maiden?

C: 你们都认得我，我就在这里——动手吧！
E: I'm right here. You all know who I am — go ahead.

C: 怎么…可能……
E: How's... that possible...?

C: 她听不见，也看不见我们。
E: She can neither see nor hear us.

C: 「羔羊的热血不会白流，一如我与母亲。」
E: "The hot blood of the sacrificial lamb will not be spilled in vain, like my mother and I."

C: 「泼洒的奠酒必得馈答，正如我紧握利刃的右手并非虚设的仪酬。」
E: "The libations poured are guaranteed to bear fruit, just as my blade-wielding right hand is not a hollow formality."

C: 来吧，傲慢的「大表演家」，是时候聊聊你与{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦，瑟希斯}那位泰坦{RUBY_E#}的机缘巧合了。
E: Come now, conceited "performer." It's time to address your relationship with {RUBY_B#Reason Titan, Cerces}that Titan{RUBY_E#}.

C: 我今天来是受人所托，为你带来一件礼物。
E: I'm here today on someone's behalf, to bring you a gift.

C: 虽然还记得我们一起经历了这场冒险，但事后回想起来，有些细节却变得模糊起来了。
E: Even though I still recall that adventure we went through together, some of the details get a bit hazy when I think back on it.

C: 看起来，这个叫做「圣杯」的奇物确实很古怪。虽然还记得我们一起经历了这场冒险，但事后回想起来，有些细节却总会变得模糊起来。
E: It's indeed bizarre. This so-called "Holy Grail" Curio... Even though I still recall what we went through together, some of the details always get a bit hazy when I think back on it.

C: 喔！荣誉队员在回避本记者的提问哦，该不会是有什么不可告人的愿望吧？
E: Whoa! Looks like our honorary member is dodging the question! Could it be they've got a secret wish they don't want anyone to know?

C: 我势在必得。
E: You betcha.

C: 哎呀，{F#姐妹}{M#兄弟}，咱贝洛伯格人难得走一趟天外旅行，能在异星和自己的老友不期而遇，心里面真是装满了高兴。虽说场合有些不太对，但你该不会装作不认识咱吧？
E: Oh, c'mon, {M#buddy}{F#girl}, it's a rare treat for us Belobogian folks to travel off-world. Running into an old friend on an alien planet? That's pure joy. Sure, the occasion might be a little weird, but don't tell me you don't recognize us?

C: 呵呵，你是说那个星穹列车无名客吗？那可是个爱出风头，实力强劲的选手。
E: Emm... Let me guess. You mean that Nameless from the Astral Express? A real showboat and a tough competitor, I'd say.

C: 嗯？匹诺康尼第一届「圣杯战争」…诚邀星穹列车参与？这样凑热闹的事情，{NICKNAME}乘客也许会感兴趣帕。
E: Huh? The First Penaconian Holy Grail War? Inviting the Astral Express to join? Sounds like the kind of spectacle that might interest you, {NICKNAME}.

C: 在我们那里也不至于「很常见」。但你们肯定是搞错了，首先，「圣杯」不是玩具。尤其不是你们这些魔术外行该去乱碰的玩具。
E: It's not exactly normal in our world, either. But you guys definitely screwed it up. First off, the Grail is not a toy. And it surely isn't something amateur mages like you should be messing with.

C: 还是请叫我「知更鸟」吧。我不太习惯这样的称呼。
E: Just call me Robin. I'm not used to being called anything else.

C: 而这恰恰是武器力有未逮，唯有歌声才能做到的事。
E: And that's something weapons can never achieve. Only song can do that.

C: 只要跑得快，就是免费的。
E: Well, if we run fast enough, it's free.

C: 啊？你已经能脑内自动转码他的脏话了吗？
E: Huh? You've already figured out how to automatically translate his swearing in your head?

C: 不过，像你这样的小个子，拔出选定之剑成为王，我实在是没法想象那样的情景啊。
E: That being said... A little fellow like you drawing the sword and becoming king? I really can't picture that.

C: 我不知道。
E: I don't know.

C: 看在你初来乍到的份上，就不为难你，赶紧干活吧。
E: I'll cut you some slack given that you're new. Now get to work.

C: 在我到来之前，他曾统领不列颠的子民。而在我到来之后，为了捍卫不列颠的子民，他向摧毁一切的白龙发起进攻，以败北告终。
E: He ruled the people of Britain before I showed up. And after my appearance, he launched an attack against the White Dragon to protect his people, a battle that ended in defeat.

C: 十年后。
E: Ten years later.

C: 赔偿精神损失费！
E: Make him pay for our emotional damage!

C: 嗯？圣杯里有什么东西——致{NICKNAME}，这张纸条好像是给你的。
E: Hmm? There's something inside the Holy Grail — I think this is a note for you, {NICKNAME}.

C: （还有工作没做完……）
E: (There's still work to be done...)

C: 还有斯科特，他谁来着？擅长模仿动物的公司专员？总之，市场开拓部也干了！
E: And then there's Skott... Wait, who? That IPC Specialist who's good at mimicking animals? Well, anyway, the Marketing Development Department is in on this too!

C: 两位，我们在这儿！
E: You two, over here!

C: …不愧是真正的领袖，总能准确地判断局势。
E: ...You really do have the mind of a leader, always so sharp on reading the situation.

C: 没有出逃的方向，没有谁会伸出援手，在此，你们的任何挣扎都是无意义的。
E: Nowhere to escape, and no one will ever come to help. In here, any struggle is just wasted effort.

C: 幸存的主角终于来到酒店深处，恶灵借由屏幕现身。而我将灯光与特效全都聚拢在你的身上，你将被我「塑造」成无敌的怪物。
E: The surviving protagonist finally reaches the heart of the hotel. The evil spirit appears through the screen. Then, I gather all the lights and effects on you, "shaping" you into an invincible monster.

C: 「邪恶的钟表匠从地狱带来掌管不同诅咒的恶灵，它们伪装成乐园里人畜无害的玩偶，将受害者拉入睡梦，无休止地折磨他们的灵魂。」
E: "The wicked Watchmaker brought from hell evil spirits that wield different curses, disguised as harmless amusement park mascots. They drag victims into sleep and torture their souls for eternity."

C: 不要在意你看到的东西，那些不过是我心中的疑虑，不会伤害到其他人。
E: Ignore whatever you see — these are just my internal doubts and won't hurt anyone else.

C: 谁让我抽签运气这么差呢？我早说过，一个浑身金光闪闪的男人绝不会是什么好东西。
E: What did I expect with my awful summoning luck? I told you — a guy covered in gold is never good news.

C: 「在进影院前和观众签生死状」、「让真正的忆域迷因在恐怖片场中进入影厅」…这些互动和营销手段，完全超越了所处的时代！
E: Now, you had each moviegoer sign a death and liability release waiver before entering the theater... And you released Memory Zone Memes into the theater at intermission... These interactive marketing tactics were way ahead of their time.

C: 既然如此，不妨留点时间多考虑下吧。
E: In that case, we'd best take the time to think this over.

C: 数周后 匹诺康尼 黄金的时刻
E: Several weeks later, Golden Hour, Penacony

C: 太不讲道理了吧，这也是你订下的规矩？
E: This is absurd! Did you make this rule too?

C: 看来够了，运气还行。
E: Whew, luck's on our side. Looks like we scraped together just enough.

C: 先不论猎犬是怎么发现这个事实的，感觉后果顶多也就是被翻回正面，要不你试试？我想看你倒立的样子。
E: Let's not worry about how the Bloodhounds figured this one out. Hm, I reckon the worst that can happen for this one is that they'll flip you back onto your feet. Say, why don't you test it out this time? I'd love to see you do a handstand!
Ah...

C: 简单来说吧。
E: Let me explain.

C: 停云小姐本是仙舟人，此前不幸遭遇绝灭大君，被对方窃夺了身份，濒临死境。虽然逃得生天，却身受重伤，依照常理不可能恢复。
E: Miss Tingyun is originally from the Xianzhou. She had an unfortunate encounter with a Lord Ravager, who robbed her of her identity and left her on the verge of death. While she miraculously escaped with her life, her body suffered terrible injuries, beyond all power to heal.

C: 若是自幼习武，莫非便能……
E: If you have been refined since birth, perhaps you could...

C: 还以为是追捕卡芙卡那会儿，停云小姐消失了一阵，再出现时被掉包的。
E: I figured it happened when we were after Kafka. You vanished for a while, I thought you must have come back as a double.

C: 这点倒没错呢，但小女子向来只算计事，从不算计人。
E: That part is true. I'm always calculating when it comes to business, but never with people.

C: 看来是个不错的开头嘛。今后，小女子还会做出更多类似的尝试。
E: Looks like we're off to a good start! Moving forward, I'll definitely be trying more things like this from now on.

C: 而其中一位，当时她走得太过遥远，以致未能回顾此身，直到现在。
E: And one of them hasn't returned to me because she ventured too far. Until now.

C: 那是她与「天空」的初次邂逅。
E: That was her first experience with the "sky."

C: 你…不打算在她面前亮明真身？
E: You... don't intend to reveal your true identity to her?

C: 这是……
E: Is this...

C: 再和其他人聊聊吧。
E: Chat with the others some more.

C: 我也这么认为。
E: I agree. That's likely the case.

C: 我可是黑塔本塔，「智识」的令使，货真价实的天才——控制成本？这种事太庸俗。
E: I am Herta herself, the Emanator of Erudition and a true-blue genius. Why would I be holding the purse strings? That menial task is beneath me.

C: 既然如此，黑塔本塔，「智识」的令使，货真价实的天才…您现在打算怎么办？
E: With that said, Herta herself, Emanator of Erudition, and true-blue genius... What do you plan to do now?

C: 此外…还有另一位同伴，<color=#dbc291ff>身上出现了我们难以解释的可怕症状。</color>
E: And that's not all... One of our other companions is <color=#dbc291ff>suffering from a serious and inexplicable affliction.</color>

C: 使用三月七的相机拍摄吧！
E: Let's use March 7th's camera to take photographs!

C: 不妙……
E: Something's wrong...

C: 就这么招了？
E: You're telling them everything already?

C: …你好像很失望的样子。
E: ...You sound disappointed.

C: 命运会将我们带往何处啊……
E: Where will fate take us...?

C: 出发吧。在{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}尚未沉默的年代，无人能当它的敌手。而今，将由我等接过神明的职责，庇佑翁法罗斯众生——
E: Let's get going. In the era when {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#} had not yet fallen silent, none could stand as their equal. Today, we inherit the duty of the gods, safeguarding the inhabitants of Amphoreus.

C: …你想说阿基维利，对吧？
E: ...I'm going to assume you meant Akivili.

C: 你向左侧移动了下身子。真是神奇，仅仅挪动几公分的距离，周身的水流却明显变得更加温暖了。
E: You move to the left. How wondrous — You've only moved a few centimeters, but the water around you has become distinctly warmer.

C: 我们初来奥赫玛，希望能留下些纪念，所以来到视野宽阔的地方…嗯，制作…不对，捕捉？总之，想留住这片风景。
E: It's our first time in Okhema, so we thought we'd find a nice vantage point to... uh, create...? No, capture...? I mean, to remember this city and its sights by.

C: …也不尽然，或许只是在遇见你们之前，我从来没有认真考虑过这事。
E: ...Or perhaps I've just never given it much thought until I met you two.

C: 啊…是两位贵客。
E: Ah... It's our two distinguished guests.

C: 出乎你的意料，它并不坚硬，但这未必是一件好事——咀嚼了几下之后，带有粘性的红土碎末全都糊在了你的牙齿上，无论如何用舌头搜刮都无法将它清理干净。
E: Surprisingly, it isn't hard, but that's not necessarily a good thing. After chewing it a few times, the sticky flecks of redsoil stain your teeth. No matter how you use your tongue, you can't get rid of it.

C: 呜嗡嗡嗡！
E: Grumphhh!

C: 它好像很开心。或许…你可以试着摸摸它？
E: It looks very happy. Perhaps... you could try petting it?

C: 你不来摸摸看吗？
E: Don't you want to try petting it as well?

C: 嘿，你在<color=#dbc291ff>辩论场</color>里吗？
E: Hey, are you in the <color=#dbc291ff>forum</color>?

C: 阿雅，*我们*回来啦。
E: Agy, we're back.

C: 世界上的其他黄金裔呢？
E: Where are the other Chrysos Heirs in the world?

C: 你休息得如何？
E: Did you sleep well?

C: 呜呼！小白，小敌…来飞呀，我们一起飞过去！
E: Woohoo! Snowy, De, let's fly together! All the way across!

C: 不，只是想起从前的勇士也是沿着这条廊道，向{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}「天谴之矛」{RUBY_E#}的城池进发，为自己的名字镀上金边。
E: No, I'm just thinking about the warriors who also braved this very corridor in the past. They all ventured towards the city of {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}the Lance of Fury{RUBY_E#}, all just to set their names in gold.

C: 你和白厄合力打倒了4个泰坦眷属，并从它们身上收集了悬锋徽记……
E: You and Phainon defeated 4 Titankins together, and you collected Kremnos crests from their bodies...

C: 你看见那男人刚才的眼神了吗？他乡愁犯了，不想在旁人面前流露。
E: Did you see the look in his eyes? He's wracked by homesickness and doesn't want to show it to anyone else.

C: 咦，你什么时候跑那边去的？
E: Huh? When did you get over there?

C: 他的族人到底是谁？
E: Who are his people exactly?

C: 怎么又让你抢先一步…不过这里还剩下不少敌人啊。怎么，累了？
E: How did you beat us here again? But there are still plenty of enemies around. What's wrong? Already tired?

C: 伟哉，{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}…君临万邦。壮哉，{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}…举世畏栗。
E: The all-powerful {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}, ruler of all lands. The all-divine {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}, bringer of a thousand fears.

C: 看来它已经彻底失去了战士的尊严。你带领族人离开是正确的决定，万敌。
E: They seem to have forfeited all their dignity as a warrior. Leading your people away from here was the right choice, Mydei.

C: 做好准备了吗，救世主？
E: Are you ready, Deliverer?

C: 「——还有银河球棒侠！」
E: "And the Galactic Baseballer!"

C: 怎么楼梯口也被堵住了，这是人住的地方吗？
E: Why's the staircase blocked? Weird to think that people lived here.

C: 此处已被断壁残垣封锁，你们曾与尼卡多利鏖战的那片战场，如今已随慑人的战吼一同成为追忆。
E: This place has been sealed off by the crumbled walls. The battlefield where you once faced Nikador has now become nothing more than a memory alongside the terrifying howls of battle.

C: 是万敌生来就背负的赐福，但也是诅咒。那是他身为黄金裔的表征。
E: Something Mydei was born with. A blessing and a curse — the true mark of a Chrysos Heir.

C: 是万敌生来就背负的赐福，但也是诅咒。那是他身为黄金裔的表征。
E: Something Mydei was born with. A blessing and a curse — the true mark of a Chrysos Heir.

C: 阿格莱雅——等等，缇宝老师在哪？
E: Aglaea— Wait, where's Tribbie?

C: 我们到啦——「百界门」只能把各位送到这里。
E: This is it! The Century Gate can only take you this far.

C: 理智尚存的泰坦…真是神秘又伟岸。
E: A Titan who still possesses reason... both mysterious and awe-inspiring.

C: {RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的疯狂正将翁法罗斯推向末日。它摒弃了荣耀，以疯狂的手段复制自身，意图毁灭天父和它庇护的文明。
E: The madness of {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} is pushing Amphoreus toward the end times. They have abandoned their honor, replicating themself through crazed means, and are fully intending to destroy the sky father and the civilization they protect.

C: 我什么都吃。
E: I'll eat anything.

C: 记忆，存在…一直。
E: Memories, remain... Always.

C: 我们真的见过面？
E: Have we really met before?

C: {NICKNAME}，我们一同起舞吧。
E: {NICKNAME}, let's dance together.

C: 当然，「百界门」就交给*我们*吧。
E: Of course, just leave the Century Gate to us.

C: 记忆…气味，浓烈。
E: Memories... Smell, intense.

C: 啊，居然是「异乡人」阁下，别来无恙啊？离我们上次见面还没过去多久……
E: Ah, it's the esteemed "outlander." How've you been? It hasn't been all that long since we last met...

C: 你、你在说什么可怕的话啊！别、别这样吓*我们*，阿雅！
E: Wh—What are you talking about!? D—Don't scare us like that, Agy!

C: （那个年轻的卫士能读懂我的言中之意…若非末日临近，他必然前途无量。）
E: (That young guard reads between the lines well. If the end weren't so near, he would have a bright future ahead of him.)

C: （聚焦于眼下的麻烦吧……）
E: (I'd better focus on the matter at hand first...)

C: （没关系，虽然我听不太懂，但还是谢谢姐姐的提醒！我以后会注意的。）
E: (That's alright. I might not understand everything, but I still appreciate your advice. I'll be careful!)

C: 只要坚定地站在他身边，我们就能找回昨日的荣光，继续给敌人带去血光和征服……
E: As long as we remain steadfast at his side, we'll reclaim our former glory and sow bloodshed and conquest amongst our foes...

C: 但他并非因为怯懦出走…相反，那是勇敢的决定。
E: But he did not leave out of cowardice... It was, in fact, a courageous choice.

C: 从武器的制式可以判别年代…浅浅浏览一下商品也无妨。
E: The craftsmanship of a weapon reveals the time period it's made... We can afford to take a quick look.

C: 来吧——「生存」就是唯一的规则！只要你们还有一丝呼吸，要么克服所有难关，赢得此世的荣耀——要么把灵魂留在悬锋城，成为「纷争」的养料！
E: Let the trial begin, then! Your only goal is to survive! As long as you still hold the breath of life, you'll either triumph over every trial and claim worldly glory — or leave your soul in Kremnos to become fuel for Strife!

C: 大门不能在这个时空下打开…去典籍那里回收「奇迹」吧？
E: The gate won't budge in this time dimension... How about recovering the "miracle" from the tome?

C: …格奈乌斯阁下？
E: ...Lord Gnaeus?

C: 你不必这么坚持……
E: Why don't you take a break...?

C: 身躯…不灭…！
E: Indestructible... body...!

C: 不…恐怕没那么简单。
E: No... I doubt it'll be that simple.

C: 再仔细思索一下呢？
E: Wanna brainstorm a little?

C: 这样就完成了吗？
E: Is... that it?

C: …身为「纷争」的化身，却在向我讲述世界的壮美吗？真是讽刺……
E: ...The embodiment of Strife telling me about the majesty of the world...? What an irony...

C: 明天这个时候，阿格莱雅会召集我们前往创世涡心，进行归还火种的仪式。
E: Aglaea will gather us at the Vortex of Genesis this time tomorrow, where we'll perform a ritual to surrender the Coreflame.

C: 虽然她的原话里只提到了「黄金裔」…但如果是我邀请你们到场，她一定不会拒绝。
E: She only mentioned the Chrysos Heirs, but if I invite you two... I'm sure she'll welcome your presence.

C: 哎呀…困了吗？人家看你，眼皮都快睁不开啦。
E: Aww, are you sleepy? I can see your eyelids growing heavy~

C: 你要回家了吗…要是不着急，我们再去和小妖精们玩玩，好不好？
E: Are you going home already...? If you're not in a hurry, should we go play with the fairies again?

C: 「我们于此索求神性，以填补世界的裂缝——」
E: "We seek your divinity, to mend the rifts of the world—"

C: （缇里西庇俄丝的回忆揭示了最初的预言……）
E: (Tribios' memory has unveiled the very first prophecy...)

C: 从此，你的命运将和我等交织在一起，再无分离的可能——直至创世的终点。
E: From that point onward, your fate will be forever intertwined with ours, never to be separated again — until the end of Genesis.

C: 总是在麻烦你们，真不好意思。希望{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}能仁慈一些，多通融通融。记得当时在重渊，它还挺青睐你的。
E: Allow me to apologize for the fact that we always seem to be troubling you. I hope that {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#} will show more benevolence and be more accommodating. I remember that they seemed quite fond of you back in the Abyss.

C: 狭间…在崩塌……
E: The space... is collapsing...

C: 凯妮斯一派此前得知{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}与{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}先后陨落，便在元老院中大肆鼓吹逐火派已无力抵抗灾厄，独木难支……
E: Once Caenis and her followers learned of {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#} and {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx's{RUBY_E#} fall, they proclaimed in the Council that the Flame-Chasers could no longer stand against the calamity alone...

C: 哼，那你恐怕要失望了。
E: Hmph, I'm afraid you'll be sorely disappointed if that's what you truly think.

C: 既然见过她最后一面，我已别无所求……
E: Since I was able to see her one last time, I have no other desires...

C: 我想继续塞勒苏斯的研究。
E: I wish to continue Thalesus' research.

C: 阿格莱雅专制、自负、傲慢，这让她在绝大多数时间里主宰一切，却也是她的软肋。只要令其经历惨痛的背叛而无能为力，就能使她一蹶不振。
E: Aglaea's authoritarianism, conceit, and arrogance have granted her unfettered control for the most part. Yet, these traits are also her greatest weakness. If I can render her helpless by forcing her to experience the agonizing pain of betrayal, I am certain she will never recover from such a setback.

C: 以{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}的名义，奥赫玛感谢您的诚意和宝贵意见。
E: In the name of {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}, Okhema thanks you for your sincere and valuable thoughts.

C: 老实说，这是我第一次登上黎明云崖的山巅……
E: Honestly, this is my first time going up to Dawncloud's peak...
This is...

C: 那刻夏老师，他与凯妮斯达成一致：回收{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}的火种后搁置试炼，以求让「死亡」从世界上消失。这样不必继续逐火之旅，奥赫玛也能永享安宁。
E: Professor Anaxa has come to a consensus with Caenis — They want to suspend the trial once {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#}' Coreflame is reclaimed, hoping thus to eradicate "Death" from this world. If they're successful, then the Flame-Chase Journey will cease, and Okhema can enjoy everlasting peace.

C: 还是再出门逛逛好了。
E: Maybe I can go for another walk outside.

C: 不是重物，请阁下放心。
E: Not to worry — it's nothing heavy.

C: 仿佛世间最可怕的幽暗，所有人都在讲述它的沉重，或是抵抗、或是崇拜、或是敬畏……
E: It seems the most terrible darkness in this world. Everyone talks about its heavy weight. Some resist it, some worship it, and some even revere it...

C: 想要阁下陪我取的东西，是我为你准备的一件小礼物，手工制作的，就像先前送给缇安大人的饰品…我想给大家都留下一份心意。
E: I want to retrieve a small gift I specially prepared for you. I made it myself, like the trinket I gave Lady Trianne... I want to leave something for everyone, if possible.

C: 礼物是首饰？
E: The gift is a piece of jewelry?

C: 噢，我可算是听明白了：你想让遐蝶白白送死，还想搭上我。
E: Oh, I get it now. You're sending Castorice to her death, and you want me to die with her.

C: 你还会瞬间移动？
E: Can you teleport too?

C: 被称作「渎神之举」的炼成，也许能使凡人的灵魂与泰坦相互吸引……
E: This alchemy, considered a sacrilegious act, might actually make the souls of mortals and Titans attract each other...

C: 就像现在，她似乎没有多待一秒的打算…接下来的路，看来只能靠我们自己了。
E: ...Just like how she clearly had no intention of lingering here for even a second longer. We can only depend on ourselves for the rest of the way.

C: 这是…遐蝶的礼物？
E: This is Castorice's gift...?

C: 对不起，我的积蓄所剩无多。但或许有别的办法，能解脱你的痛苦。
E: Apologies, I don't have much in the way of savings, but perhaps there's another way for me to release you from your suffering.

C: 实在看不过眼，所以东边偷了点，西边骗了点，希望给他们的生活多添一点盼头。
E: I couldn't take their behavior anymore, so I stole some things here and made up some lies there... Just trying to give them something to look forward to, you know?

C: 这里也有游荡的亡魂……
E: There are wandering souls of the deceased here as well...

C: 还有，这边这位…我能认出来，你是哀地里亚的「死亡」圣女吧？
E: And you... You... I recognize you. You're the Holy Maiden of "Death" from Aidonia, right?

C: 别、别过来……
E: D—Don't come near me...

C: 你怀疑自己有些幻听——那满足的叹息似乎又响起过一次。
E: You begin to suspect that you might be hearing things — that satisfying sigh seems to have echoed once more.

C: 伟业？
E: Great work?

C: 我可想死你啦…呃，双关了。
E: I missed you so much that it almost killed me... Uh. Pun unintended.

C: 那是…我的宿命。
E: That is... my destiny.

C: 不过，既然知道那个名字，就代表你已经知晓有关「{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}」的全部了吧？
E: However, since you recognize the name, you must already know everything about {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#}, right?

C: 那敢情好。可是，汝为何能如此断定？倘若这猜想出了差池，那女孩岂不是要败兴而归？
E: That is all well and good, but how can you be so sure? If there is even the slightest error in your hypothesis, the girl will be shattered.

C: 你还在等什么，快投票——
E: What are you waiting for? Just cast your vote—

C: 嘘——都安静——！
E: Silence! Silence, everyone!

C: 你的冥界很美。
E: It's a beautiful place.

C: ——我也终于能够以最美丽的姿态，为它写下句点。
E: I can finally end it in a way that is as beautiful as it deserves.

C: 但最后的那番话…你已经知道了？我对白厄的安排。
E: But what you said at the end... Did you already know what I had planned for Phainon?

C: 老师，你……
E: Professor, you...

C: 算了，就用我本人的样子吧。反正那里也没熟人。
E: Forget it. Just use my own appearance. There's no one there that'll recognize me anyway.

C: 这可算不上什么理由。
E: That's not a good argument.

C: 阿那克萨戈拉斯阁下，久等了。
E: Sorry to keep you waiting, Lord Anaxagoras.

C: 哼，渎神的学者也能来到这里？
E: Hmph, even blasphemous scholars can come here, it seems?

C: 那不是「穿着华服的大地兽」吗？
E: Isn't that the "dromas draped in finery"?

C: 我也没想到，竟会在无意中成为一位本地神的眼中钉。
E: Yes, I didn't count on provoking the ire of a local god.

C: 说是审判，其实是辩论。他需要一一回应学者们的控诉，否则就要被逐出树庭。
E: Though what he took on in the end was more a debate than an actual trial. He had to address every one of the scholars' allegations, or face expulsion from the Grove.

C: 这就是「趋近于至纯」的含义吧。可是…将泰坦造物和人体都视为炼金的材料，未免有些太过疯狂了。
E: This must be what he means by "close to true purity." But... treating both Titan creations and the human body as materials to be used in alchemy experiments? That's rather extreme.

C: 呵呵，就当是这样吧，是吾唐突了……
E: Heheh, let's just leave it at that. That was rude of me...

C: 自诞生起，我们存在的事实就已注定，任何事物都无法将其抹消。也正因此，我会一直、一直与你同在……
E: Ever since we were born, the fact that we existed was predestined, and nothing could erase it. This is why I will always, always be by your side...

C: 这是……
E: This is...

C: 我能嗅到你们的绝望，天空之子…清洗者与凡人站在统一战线，我们会协助各位铲除那渎神的混血儿。
E: I can smell your despair, Skyfolk... The Cleaners are on the side of mortals. Together, we'll erase that blasphemous bloodline from this world.

C: 我…没有。
E: I... did not.

C: 这声音是…怎么可能……
E: Isn't that sound... How's that possible...

C: {NICKNAME}…你的确擅长拯救世界！
E: {NICKNAME}... you do have a knack for saving the world!

C: 得亏「盗道酬勤」，嘿嘿……
E: Good thing persistence pays off, heh...

C: 可话说回来，我是真没想到你们这些家伙会这么执着……
E: Honestly, I'm surprised at your persistence...

C: 你…要留在这里？
E: You're... staying?

C: 但我是昏光庭院的医者呀，丹恒。面对被病痛侵扰的患者，不露出让人压抑的悲伤表情可是最基本的素养哦。
E: As a healer from the Twilight Courtyard, Dan Heng, it's my duty to stay composed in front of those suffering from illness. A sorrowful expression would only add to their burden.

C: 终有一日，你会理解的。但不是现在。
E: One day, you will understand. But not now.

C: 不知道，可是这气息…有点熟悉……
E: I don't know, but this aura... feels so familiar.

C: 劳你费心了，伙计……
E: Thanks for worrying, buddy.

C: 不过，白厄，倒是你这边，人家一直有些在意……
E: But, Phainon, I've been somewhat concerned about you...

C: 读完这篇令你三观震颤的小文，你的脑海中只剩下一个画面……
E: After finishing this mind-shaking piece, only one image remains in your mind...

C: …可不能让贵客不明不白地离去。
E: ...We can't let our esteemed guests pass away without understanding.

C: 失去光明的滋味，你比谁都清楚。想象一下，千年以前，倘若年少失明的你又被剥夺了声带和听觉——你还能成为现在这个阿格莱雅吗？
E: You know better than anyone what it feels like to lose your sight. Imagine if a thousand years ago, you, already blind, had also lost your voice and hearing in your youth — would you still have become the Aglaea you are today?

C: （好可疑，完全不像平日的它……）
E: (So suspicious, not like their usual self...)

C: 你怎么了？
E: What's wrong?

C: 让我来好好闻一闻，这空气里的味道……
E: Let me take a good sniff of this air...

C: 赛飞儿大姐头，现在轮到你……
E: Cipher, it's your turn now...

C: …别了，阿格莱雅。
E: ...Goodbye, Aglaea.

C: 唔，难道就是那个时候……
E: Hmm... could it have been back then when...

C: 我绝对…<color=#dbc291ff>绝对不可能和任何人提及那事。</color>
E: I... <color=#dbc291ff>absolutely wouldn't have shared that with anyone.</color>

C: 在树庭出现的家伙，还有在重渊和丹恒对峙的那些，都没有立刻诉诸暴力，只是监视和威慑。
E: The ones who appeared in the Grove, and those who confronted Dan Heng in the Abyss, didn't immediately resort to violence. They were just watching and trying to intimidate.

C: 径自臆测意义不大。去找缇宝女士吧，她最懂得阿格莱雅的心思。
E: Speculating blindly won't help. Let's go find Lady Tribbie, as she understands Aglaea's mind best.

C: 若我的离去平静而无波澜，接踵而至的会是倾巢而出的蛇灾。很遗憾，安享平静的死亡注定是我不可企及的奢侈。
E: If my departure were to be calm and uneventful, it would only lead to a swarm of those serpents emerging from their nests. Regrettably, a peaceful death is a luxury I cannot afford.

C: 精确，你的形容。
E: Precise, your description.

C: 因为在场的每个人都心知肚明，防止我们被彼此心底阴暗所伤的最后保障已经消失。从此，除了我们为自己捏塑的道德律令，再也没有哪股神力能替我们抵御恶意。
E: Deep down, we all know — the last safeguard against the harm we may do to each other is gone. No divine power will protect us from the malice in our hearts. From now on, only the moral code we choose to uphold for ourselves will stand between us and the abyss.

C: 我唯一擅长的东西…就只有在街头领悟的，那些在大家眼里见不得光的活计而已！
E: The only things I'm good at are the underhanded street smarts that no one even respects!

C: 哈哈哈…我可没想瞒过你的耳朵，赛飞儿小姐。我只是隐隐感觉到你被思绪缠住了，不想贸然打扰。
E: Ahaha... I never thought I could slip past your sharp ears, Miss Cipher. I just didn't think it'd be right to interrupt when you're obviously lost in thoughts.

C: …以上，就是你们在树庭的最后一堂课了。
E: ...And that was your last lesson in the Grove.

C: 对，这就是天空一族的圣物，「彩虹匣」。
E: This is the divine object of the Sky people, the Chroma Coffer.

C: 还记得么？一段时间以前，你推荐我学习法吉娜祭司们的「灵水秘术」……
E: Remember how you suggested I learn the "secret arts of water" from Phagousa's priests?

C: 你还真是宠溺他啊，缇宝阿姐。唉，可惜我已经过了那个处处需要被护短的年纪咯……
E: You really spoil him, big sis Tribbie. Guess I'm past the age for someone to look after me...

C: 这里的人们，是来为黄金裔们送行的吗？
E: Are these people here to send off the Chrysos Heirs?

C: （敷衍）我可真舍不得你们啊！
E: *Insincerely* I'll miss you all!

C: 那，眼前这个正在被侵蚀折磨的生灵…一定就是索拉比斯阁下了。
E: Then... that corrupted being before us must be Lord Solabis.

C: 请等一下，索拉比斯阁下。我…还有一件事想做。
E: A moment please, Lord Solabis. I... have one more thing I wish to do.

C: …黄昏之女，你终于还是步入疯狂了吗？
E: ...Daughter of Dusk, have you finally gone mad?

C: 但脱离了天空文明的昏光庭院来到凡间生活时，才发现大地同样有着温柔宽厚的一面。
E: But when the Twilight Courtyard left the sky civilization and came down to the mortal realm to live, they discovered that the earth also possessed a gentle, benevolent side.

C: 这是艾格勒在神话中最常见的形态。
E: This is Aquila's most common form in the myths.

C: 聆听塞涅俄丝童年的故事。
E: Listen to Seliose's childhood story.

C: 这猩红的天空，还有遍地的烈焰和魔鬼，会洗涤他们的愚蠢……
E: This bloodred sky, and the raging flames and demons throughout the land, will purge their foolishness...

C: {NICKNAME}，你要去哪？
E: Where are you going, {NICKNAME}?

C: 回来吧，解开火种匣需要借助你的力量。
E: Come back. We need your powers to open the Coreflame Casket.

C: 至少，到今天为止…我不记得有哪位参与到逐火之旅中的黄金裔辜负过自己的使命。
E: At least, to this day... I don't recall any Chrysos Heirs failing their mission for the Flame-Chase Journey.

C: 她的所作所为的确无可饶恕，但……
E: Her actions may have been deplorable, but...

C: 路径上的碎石都清空了。
E: The rubble blocking the path has been cleared.

C: 揭秘需要时间。在那之前，若有一位无名客愿意留下，见证世界的命运，或在必要时推动其进程——将会是莫大的帮助。
E: It will take time to uncover the reason. Before then, if one of the Nameless is willing to stay and witness the fate of this world — or to push it along when necessary — it would be of great assistance.

C: 我来负起这个责任。
E: I will shoulder this responsibility.

C: 嗯！我们一起，去见证最后一颗火种归位吧！
E: Right! Time to see the last Coreflame restored!

C: 是你！
E: It's you!

C: 嗯～没什么，只是…忽然有种莫名的心灵感应？
E: Oh~ nothing much, just... suddenly felt a strange connection.

C: …话说回来，这谷仓里是有什么宝贝不成？看你们翻了半天了。
E: ...By the way, what are you looking for in here? You've been searching quite thoroughly.

C: 是我的，是我钓上来的！
E: It's mine. I caught it fair and square!

C: 啊，是妈妈！
E: Coming, Mom!

C: 好伙伴，这里留给我，咱们比比谁先找到神谕牌。
E: Leave this to me, partner. Want to bet who finds the oracle cards first?

C: 小妖精？
E: Fairies?

C: 吾师，不妨也说说你的心愿吧。
E: Teacher, perhaps you could share your wishes with us?

C: 我应做的工程已毕，只差你用最后一步践行那最终的实证——
E: My life's work is done. All that remains is for you to take the final step and prove the ultimate truth—

C: 他走得茫无端绪，如同枯叶随风飘落。他走过无数城邦，刻下白发剑士的笑貌。
E: He wandered without direction, like a withered leaf drifting in the wind. Through countless city-states, the smiling visage of the white-haired swordsman was etched into memories.

C: 光是想起故乡被黑潮吞没的景象，双手就颤抖不已。我忘不了那场大火，人们的哭喊，我无能为力，什么也保护不了……
E: Just thinking about how my village was swallowed by the black tide makes my hands shake. The flames, the screams, my utter failure to protect anyone...

C: 由泰坦揭示的未来……
E: The future revealed by the Titan...

C: 似乎在哪里见过这段对话…
E: Haven't I... seen this scene before?

C: 什么？连你也……
E: What? No, not... not you too...

C: 我听到：死者们在为你喝彩…他们已经做好准备了。
E: I hear them: The dead hail you... they're prepared.

C: 我能在这儿钓一整天的鱼……
E: I could just fish here all day...

C: 我是否可以理解为：你那跨越无数轮回的意志，已经出现了裂痕？
E: Shall I take that to mean the will you've carried across countless cycles is finally starting to fracture?

C: 呵呵，没错。如果您还记得，我在戏剧开幕时提起过它，那遭受星神抛弃的，本属于「智识」的天体神经元……
E: Heh... that's right. If you recall, I mentioned it at the very start of our play: the Celestial-Body Neuron, once belonging to the Erudition, abandoned by the Aeon...

C: 因为怎么想都很奇怪嘛。明明只要冷眼旁观，看着我们完成仪式，被黑潮吞噬，你的目的自然就能达成。
E: It's strange when you think about it. If you just stayed back, watching us complete the ritual and get consumed by the black tide, your goal would naturally be achieved.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>那便是尘封于历史中，以失败告终的…第一次逐火之旅。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>And that was the first, doomed Flame-Chase Journey, sealed away in history.</color>
How...

C: …况且，照你的说法，在踏上这无尽的轮回以前…你可是我的门生啊。
E: ...Besides, according to you, before stepping into these endless cycles... you were my pupil.

C: 窃火的盗贼…你们真以为，靠虚张声势就能镇住树庭的贤人？
E: Coreflame thieves... You really think you can scare off a Sage of the Grove with nothing but empty threats?

C: 不错不错，本大爷很欣赏你。作为回敬，我就当场用这{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}的火种饱餐一顿——
E: Not bad, not bad, I kind of like you. As a return favor, I'll feast on {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#}' Coreflame right here—

C: 小鬼…你要是真有种，就先跨过本大爷的尸体…！
E: Brat... if you've got the guts, you'll have to first step over my dead body!

C: 但当我靠着自己的双腿，踏入被诸神写就的「毁灭」中时，你会见证——
E: When I walk into the "Destruction" written by the gods with my own two legs, you will witness—

C: 四百万次…整。
E: Four million... exactly.

C: 身为「天空」的半神，昏光庭院的医者…我一定能够治愈你，直到……
E: As the demigod of the Sky, a healer of Twilight Courtyard, I will heal you. And then...

C: 在犹疑之时，你从我这里得到的答……
E: And when hesitation took hold, the answer you sought from me...

C: <color=#dbc291ff>铭记过去，成为明天的英雄吧。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Remember the past, and become the hero of tomorrow.</color>

C: 若你能找到阻止「铁墓」{RUBY_B#完成}诞生{RUBY_E#}的办法，那这三千多万世的轮回也并非徒劳。
E: And if you can stop Irontomb from ever {RUBY_B#completion}being born{RUBY_E#}... then these thirty million cycles will have not been in vain.

C: 我们都做好了全军覆没的打算……
E: We've all made preparations for total annihilation...

C: （我…是睡着了吗？这…是什么奇怪的梦吗？）
E: (Hold on... am I dreaming? This is way too strange...)

C: 听起来…还真是诱惑满满呀。既能找回我的过去，还能和你们一起继续「开拓」新的世界……
E: That sounds... really tempting. Finding my past and continuing to trailblaze new worlds with you...

C: 我决定走进这扇门，进入翁法罗斯。
E: I'm going through that gate, into Amphoreus.

C: 迈入过去吧，三月……
E: Step into your past, March...

C: 来古士，他是一切的元凶。
E: Lygus is the primary culprit behind everything.

C: 是呀，它的背后是「来古士」，妄图操纵一切的黑幕，真是不可饶恕。
E: That's right. "Lygus" is the mastermind behind it, the one who's trying to control everything. How unforgivable.

C: 若无法进行有效干涉，预测：十四个系统时后，铁墓将完成自我加冕，启动对「智识」命途的毁灭计划。
E: Prediction: If effective intervention is not performed, Irontomb will complete its Self-Coronation in <unbreak>14</unbreak> system hours and initiate its plan to destroy the entire Path of Erudition.

C: （翁法罗斯还有太多没被揭开的秘密，但愿那其中埋藏着扭转一切的关键。）
E: (There are still too many secrets yet to be unveiled in Amphoreus. Here's hoping that one of those secrets can end up turning the whole situation around.)

C: 我还是不明白，为什么是我？
E: I still don't get it. Why must it be me?

C: 这是…什么地方？
E: What... is this place?

C: 星核是祸种，只会带来不幸。
E: The Stellaron is a seed of ruin and will only bring misfortune.

C: 「直至天崩地裂，众人的乞求终于得到回应。但那并非神明，而是一支分血海而出的军团。」
E: "Until the heaven and earth cracked open... not the gods answering the people's prayers, but a legion rising from the sea of blood."

C: 你知道第二次逐火之旅？
E: You know about the second Flame-Chase Journey?

C: 是阿格莱雅，还有缇宝…
E: It's Aglaea, and Tribbie...

C: 好好享受她自由的风吧，两位。任何人…只要为凯撒尽到应尽的义务，这风便会永远为他驻足。
E: Bask in her free-spirited winds. For anyone who fulfills their duties to the Imperator, these winds shall forever remain at their service.

C: 我还有要事与二位商议。
E: I still have important matters to discuss with the two of you.

C: 很好，救世主，你很有胆识！明知「律法」的继承者就站在你眼前，竟还敢如此放肆——
E: Very good, Deliverer, you have courage! To say such presumptuous things, even knowing that the inheritor of the "Law" stands before you...

C: 两位英雄，我知道凯撒的行事风格在旁人看来有些独断。但很快，你们便能在战场上见证<color=#dbc291ff>凯撒的刀锋</color>为敌人起舞……
E: Heroes, I know the Imperator's way of doing things may seem a bit autocratic to outsiders. But soon, you will witness <color=#dbc291ff>her blade</color> dance with enemies on the battlefield...

C: 分不清过去与未来的水域了吗？这里可一直是我的居所。
E: Can't tell the difference between past and future waters? This has always been my home.

C: 啊，残破的蟹壳浮出水面了。我还担心他被水流冲走了呢。
E: Ah, the broken crab shell surfaces. I was worried it had been washed away by the current.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>来古士一定和天才俱乐部脱不了干系，千万提高警惕。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Lygus is definitely connected to the Genius Society, so stay alert.</color>

C: 两位不妨先随客人们一道入场，好好享受。
E: Why don't you head in with the other guests first and enjoy the feast?

C: 直接告诉她不能说。
E: Tell her bluntly that we can't do that.

C: 然后，为凯撒展示正确的道路。
E: Then, we can show the Imperator the right path forward.

C: 您时常以这种方式考验臣子的忠诚么？
E: Do you often test the loyalty of your subjects like this?

C: 说正事吧，神礼官：倘若我通过试炼，将此世「律法」执握在手。下一步，你打算怎么做？
E: Let's cut to the chase, Theoros. If I pass the trial and grasp this world's "Law" in my hands, what will you do then?

C: 不要笑…挑战。
E: A try-not-to-laugh... challenge.

C: 若一切按约定进行，你会建议我如何处置那位「救世主」？
E: If everything happens according to our agreement, how would you recommend I deal with that "Deliverer"?

C: 区区凡人，要如何才能与「神礼观众」抗衡？
E: Yet, as a mere mortal, how will you contend against the Theoros?

C: 以螺丝星君主之名：您的盟友响应召唤而来，尊贵的凯撒。
E: In the name of the sovereign of Planet Screwllum, your allies have responded to your call, esteemed Imperator.

C: （「时间流速慢于翁法罗斯」…？如果来古士没有撒谎，那留给我的时间不多了。）
E: ("Where time flows slower than within Amphoreus..."? If Lygus spoke the truth, then I don't have much time left.)

C: （可是…该怎么离开呢？）
E: (But... how can I get out of here?)

C: （这里呈现的…是我过去的记忆吗？）
E: (Are these... showing my memories?)

C: 果然，仅凭记忆的掠影，无法骗过「无名客」的牵绊呢。
E: As expected, a glimpse of memory is not enough to deceive the bonds of friendship forged between the Nameless.

C: 我说…你不会是要被她们的花言巧语打动了吧♭
E: Say... You aren't seriously gonna be moved by their pretty words, are you?♭

C: 所以，把这件礼物拿去吧……
E: So, take this gift...

C: 识刻锚？
E: The Chronocognitive Anchor?

C: 这是欧洛尼斯的神谕？这一次，她选择站在人类这边，藏匿一位同胞的火种？
E: Is that a prophecy from Oronyx? She chose to side with humanity this time and hide one of her kin's Coreflames?

C: 接下来，鄙人要将诸位的胸膛剖开，用滚烫的金血为人们施以洗礼，请容我先行致歉——就从你开始，昏盲的「金织」女士。
E: Now then, I'll be cutting open your chests and using your scalding golden blood to baptize the masses. Allow me to apologize in advance. We shall start with you, blind and foolish Lady Goldweaver.

C: 缇宝，有什么东西正在朝奥赫玛飞来，特别特别快——
E: Tribbie, something's flying towards Okhema, and it's really fast...

C: 同样地，我会把和{NICKNAME}一同经历的时光讲给每个人听。这样一来，我们走过的路就会成为所有人的记忆。
E: And I'll share the moments I spent with {NICKNAME} with everyone. That way, the path we walked becomes a memory shared by all.

C: 我们会修好您的圣杯，接下诅咒的污秽。
E: We'll mend your sacred chalice and take in the cursed filth.

C: 我摆脱了漫无止境的劳役，奔赴斯缇科西亚的典仪……
E: I am freed from endless toil and now walk toward the rites at Styxia...

C: 曳石爵…不能在这里放弃！
E: Dux Helkolithist... we can't give up here!

C: 现在，你已看到：那残暴的凯撒不惜以五百名英雄的鲜血作为祭品，完成「律法」的试炼…而我那位可怜的典狱官，她的苦难也自此掀开了扉页。
E: Now you've seen it: The brutal Imperator was willing to spill the blood of five hundred heroes to complete the Trial of Law. As for my poor warden... her suffering had only just begun.

C: 什么时候更新的慢放功能？
E: When was the slo-mo feature added?

C: 令人叹服的意志。同为「智识」行者，我完全能理解您追求真理的执念。
E: What an astounding strength of will. As a fellow pathstrider of Erudition, I fully understand your obsession with seeking the truth.

C: 当然。你平安无事就好。
E: Of course I missed you. It's good to see you're doing well.

C: 上吧，一同战胜来古士。
E: Come. Let's defeat Lygus together.

C: 和卡厄斯兰那一样，在那近乎永恒的刹那中，最先崩溃的会是你。而我只需等待——等待另一只徒劳的若虫跌下悬崖，坠入深渊。
E: You will crumble before I do in this moment stretched out to an eternity, just like Khaslana will. Yet all I need to do is to wait, as yet another futile bug falls down the cliff and into the bottomless abyss.

C: 在阿斯德纳，人们利用这种现象——加以「同谐」和「记忆」的触媒——建造了一片梦中的国度。
E: In Asdana, people made use of that phenomenon to build a nation within a dream... after adding in the catalysts of the Harmony and Remembrance, that is.

C: 有机会的话，说不定您可以问问黑塔女士本人。
E: You might be able to ask Madam Herta herself when you get the chance.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>改写一条律令，仅需一位半神的性命。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>One rule change... for the life of one demigod.</color>

C: 若此战必将落败，您又为何要亲自出征？逐火之旅不能无人引领……
E: Why are you personally leading this battle if it's doomed to fail? The Flame-Chase Journey cannot be without a leader...

C: 「这是凯撒所能留予一位臣子的——最后的赐赏。」
E: "This is the final gift... that the Imperator can leave for her subject."

C: 「智识」、「毁灭」，还是「开拓」？不，我会证明命途即谬误。
E: Erudition? Destruction? Or Trailblaze? No. I will prove that the very idea of Paths is a fallacy.

C: 「救世主」的征途…让我拜读一番吧。
E: The journey of the Deliverer's conquest, heh... Let me partake in it.

C: 该谈谈你的事了…
E: We need to talk about what's going on with you...

C: 而且，这也是三月七所希望的喔。
E: Besides, that's what March 7th wanted.

C: 「{NICKNAME}，发生了什么？你的意识…突然变得好遥远？」
E: "{NICKNAME}, what's going on? Your consciousness... suddenly went so far away."
"Cost"...

C: 「我还在尝试，但这里不在星际和平通信的服务范围内，能用的手段有限。」
E: "I'm still trying, but this place is outside the Interastral Peace Communications' coverage zone, so there's a limit to what we can do."

C: （我始终觉得这个角落有些诡异。{NICKNAME}也经常在这里发呆……）
E: (I always thought this little corner felt odd. {NICKNAME} often got lost in thought here too...)

C: 承蒙夸奖，举手——呃，举镜之劳！
E: I appreciate the praise, but I didn't have to lift a finger — I mean, mirror!

C: 通过一面镜子？
E: You did this through a mirror?

C: 什、什么意思？封装谁…我？
E: W—Wait! What? Encapsulate? Encapsulate... me!?

C: 以及，她提到的<color=#dbc291ff>那本书</color>……
E: And <color=#dbc291ff>that book</color> she mentioned...

C: 至于为何要以人形，通过「讲述故事」的形式……
E: As to why she insisted on keeping her human form and offering the memories through "reading a story"...

C: 这是多少次啦？它忠实地履行使命，响起、格式化……
E: How many times has it been? It faithfully fulfills its duty, activating and formatting...

C: 不知不觉中，这座与你共筑的宫殿，已经不再是「昔涟」独自沉醉的梦境。
E: Before I knew it, this palace we built together was no longer a dream that "Cyrene" alone indulged in.

C: 记忆的质料，被保存在数之不尽的支柱中……
E: The texture of memories is preserved in countless pillars...

C: 所以，伙伴们，还是不愿和我一起吗？挽救美丽的银河，甚至不留下一道伤疤。
E: Will you still not stand with me, my companions? We'll save the beautiful cosmos, and we won't leave even a single scar behind.

C: 那证明你一点也不了解三月七。
E: That just proves you don't understand March 7th at all.

C: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>>OreXis<unbreak>945</unbreak>，已下载。</color>
E: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>> OreXis<unbreak>945</unbreak>, downloaded.</color>

C: 这扇门后，就是那位「倾听者」的居所。
E: That "listener" lies behind this door.

C: 你还要旁观到什么时候？
E: How long are you going to stand there and watch?

C: 另一边，则是一个简单的按钮：<color=#dbc291ff>「忘却」会烧尽他们存在的痕迹，你对这段旅途全部的记忆。</color>但它能令酝酿中的灾祸骤停，让宇宙免于「毁灭」。
E: On the other side, there's a simple button: <color=#dbc291ff>The "Oblivion" will burn away all traces of their existence, as well as your entire memory of this trip.</color> But it will also halt the brewing catastrophe, and spare the universe from Destruction.

C: 那就是<color=#dbc291ff>「我」</color>。
E: A weakness in the shape of <color=#dbc291ff>"me."</color>

C: 跃迁仙舟「罗浮」前夜 星穹列车
E: Astral Express, the night before warping to Xianzhou Luofu...

C: 不愧是我！啊对了，这张如何：{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}永夜之帷，欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}，藏在迷雾背后的泰坦…够震撼吧？
E: That's how awesome I am! Oh right, how about this one: The {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Veil of Evernight, Oronyx{RUBY_E#}, the Titan lurking behind the mist... Pretty epic, right?

C: 能从你口中听见这句话，我已经心满意足了呀。
E: Just hearing those words from you makes me feel super satisfied.

C: 三月七不在……
E: March 7th isn't here...

C: 昔涟呢？她在哪里…
E: What about Cyrene? Where is she?

C: <color=#dbc291ff>黑天鹅女士的行动，是否还顺利？</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Has Miss Black Swan's progress remained on track?</color>

C: 所以，那巨人是谁？
E: So, who is that giant?

C: 我是一名「无名客」，而我要做的事……
E: I am a Nameless, and what I'm going to do...

C: 他们到了……
E: They are here...

C: 老友啊，看吧……
E: Watch, my old friend...

C: 你的声音怎么了？
E: What happened to your voice?

C: 该撤退了，巴特鲁斯大人来救我们了！
E: It's time to retreat. The Great Bartholos is here to save us!

C: o((◣'ω´◢ )o「朝灵液匣开炮吧！狠狠豹杀它们」)∋
E: o((◣'ω´◢ )o "Fire at the ichor vessel! Slam them dead!")∋

C: 若不做兽行，持明更遑论为人！
E: Vidyadhara might not even be considered people if we did not resort to beastly actions!

C: 离开这里，去找那疯狂的半神…做个了断。
E: Let's leave this place and go settle things with that mad demigod.

C: 看见了，「毁灭」指向的终点。
E: I see the destination that the Destruction points to.

C: 这处禁地，「赞达尔」无从察觉，白厄的一击也只能洞穿入口，可「长夜月」却能在其中随意溯游……
E: This forbidden realm remains undetectable to "Zandar," and even Phainon's strike merely opened the entrance, yet "Evernight" can freely swim through it as she pleases...

C: 记忆戛然而止，仿佛被一只无形的手掐灭了烛火。
E: This memory ends so abruptly, as if a shapeless hand snuffed out its candlelight.

C: 螺丝咕姆先生，你为我编写的密钥能坚持多久？
E: How long can the encryption key you wrote for me last, Mr. Screwllum?

C: 等到救世主和{F#她}{M#他}的伙伴彻底揭露那「第十三泰坦」的秘密……
E: When the Deliverer and {M#his}{F#her} companions fully uncover the secret of "The <unbreak>13</unbreak>th Titan"...

C: 来日的命运，可会记得他们的姓名？
E: Will destiny remember their names in days to come?

C: 一同抵达鲜花芬芳的西风尽头——明天见！
E: Together, let's reach the end of the west wind where flowers bloom in spring. See you tomorrow!

C: 一同抵达鲜花芬芳的西风尽头——明天见！
E: Together, let's reach the end of the west wind where flowers bloom in spring. See you tomorrow!

C: 务必小心。论军备、兵卒，烬灭军团不值一提，公司，甚至丰饶民都能与之一战。但虚卒不过是「毁灭」的耗材，真正的变数——
E: Be extremely careful. The Ruin Legion's troops and weaponry are nothing to write home about. The IPC, even the Denizens of Abundance, could take them on. However, while Voidrangers are just expendable pawns of the Destruction, the real wild cards are—

C: 还记得么？联盟誓言的开篇：「欲令后世免于侵凌攻伐、危疑苛暴之衅」。
E: Do you still remember the beginning of the Alliance Oath? "To save future generations from war and bloody dispute."

C: 帝弓的锋镝，从来指向一切威胁寰宇的灾祸。既然「开拓」道与我同，那云骑也当守誓如初……
E: The Reignbow's arrows have always aimed at any force that threatens the cosmos. Now that the Trailblaze walks alongside us, the Cloud Knights shall keep their oath as they have from the beginning...

C: 但愿战线最前方的{RUBY_B#星穹列车}他们{RUBY_E#}，也能够平安哪。
E: I just hope {RUBY_B#Astral Express}those{RUBY_E#} on the frontline will remain safe.

C: 与此同时，我和螺丝会继续从外部攻击<color=#dbc291ff>德谬歌矩阵</color>，也就是权杖的内核层。
E: Meanwhile, Screwy and I will continue attacking the <color=#dbc291ff>Demiurge Matrix</color>, that is, the Scepter's kernel, from the outside.

C: 久违了，翡翠女士。
E: It's been quite a while, Madam Jade.

C: 恐怕不止「不久前」，姬子小姐。
E: It seems it was even more recent than "not long ago," Miss Himeko.

C: 会是当地的某种习俗吗？
E: Could it be some kind of local custom?

C: 所谓的「愚人」和「世界」…本就只有一步之遥。
E: The so-called "fool" and the "world"... are merely a step apart.

C: 几乎没反应，果然没那么乐观。
E: Almost no response. Just as I feared. Not promising.

C: 在世界内部，它是不为人知的第十三位泰坦，也是昔涟三千万世「记忆」的倾听者。
E: Inside that world, it was the <unbreak>13</unbreak>th, forgotten Titan, the one who listened to thirty million cycles of Cyrene's "memory."

C: <color=#dbc291ff>毕竟，死者可听不见「诡计」的谎言哪。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>After all, the dead can't hear Trickery's lies.</color>

C: 既然这样，我们也得加倍努力才行。和凯撒的约定，可万万不能食言呢。
E: In that case, we must double our efforts. A promise to the Imperator is not one we take lightly.

C: *我们*得留在这里，尽力把它们打扫干净。
E: We need to stay here and do our best to clean them up.

C: 他们是……
E: Who...

C: 是有什么大事要发生了吗？
E: Is something big about to happen?

C: 各司其职，我们会赢。胜利属于银河联军！
E: Let's each do our duty. We've got this. Victory belongs to the Cosmic Alliance!

C: 银河，会推翻「毁灭」的判决！
E: The cosmos will overturn the Destruction's judgment!

C: ▀█▄循环▄█▀轮回▀█▄永劫
E: ▀█▄Cycle▄█▀Eternal▀█▄Recurrences

C: 谢谢姐妹，咱们一起把这铁皮人射穿！
E: Thanks, sister! We'll shoot through that tin man together!

C: 「我看见，无数『记忆』飘荡在星空中。它们是受难者的心识，在现实的下一秒就会被『毁灭』污染。」
E: "I see endless 'memories' floating in the starry skies. They are the consciousnesses of the victims. In the cosmos's real space-time, they'll be stained by the Destruction in the next second."

C: 「是个好问题呀，我也不知道自己身在何方。」
E: "Good question. I don't know where I am, either."

C: 星穹列车，马上就要进站了。途经站点：「智识」、「毁灭」、「记忆」——
E: The Astral Express is about to arrive. Calling at: the Erudition, the Destruction, and the Remembrance!

C: 「预言从不落空。『救世主』将自神战中凯旋！」
E: "The prophecy never falters. The 'Deliverer' will return victorious from the war of gods!"

C: 哎呀，先停一停——
E: Oh! Hold on a second...

C: 但现在，大家都会好好的。
E: But now, everyone will be alright.

C: 「迈德漠斯，加冕为王吧。」
E: "Mydeimos, become king."

C: 不开玩笑啦，我想在故事的尾声留下的话语——
E: Jokes aside, I want to leave these words at the end of the story...

C: 昔涟小姐的笔迹…绵柔中透着刚韧。
E: Miss Cyrene's handwriting is gentle yet steely... with an underlying strength.

C: 因果？
E: Causality?

C: 「我们有很多时间。」
E: "We have plenty of time."

C: 而无论是我们已经写成的，还是你将在未来写下的……
E: Whether it is one we have already written, or one you are yet to write...

C: {RUBY_B#「记忆」浮黎}梦中的神明{RUBY_E#}告诉我，世界是从一枚「种子」中发芽的。
E: {RUBY_B#Fuli, the Remembrance}The god in my dream{RUBY_E#} told me that the world sprouted from a "seed."

C: 不知为何，忽然想起了小时候呀。当我一个人躲在树洞旁，偷偷抹眼泪的时候……
E: I'm suddenly reminded of my childhood for some reason. When I was hiding alone next to the tree hollow and wiping my tears away...

C: 如果没有新的「空白」，史诗又该如何被续写呢？
E: If there are no new "blank spaces," how can a saga continue?

C: 现在。我会听、说、读、写。会跳舞。会唱歌。
E: Now. I can listen, talk, read, and write. I can dance. I can sing.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>所有人，听好了：攻克「铁墓」是本人的课题。我将在<unbreak>1.5</unbreak>个系统时内接管权杖δ-me<unbreak>13</unbreak>，阻止「毁灭」——</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>So listen up, all of you: conquering "Irontomb" is my research topic. I will personally take over Scepter δ-me<unbreak>13</unbreak> in one and a half system hours and stop the Destruction.</color>

C: 仰赖列车组牵头组建银河联军，寰宇文明才能够免于「毁灭」的摧残——这样的套话，我就不赘述了。
E: Let's skip the formalities about how the Express Crew led the formation of the Cosmic Alliance and saved civilization from the Destruction.

C: 如此…甚好。我谨代表仙舟联盟，对那名为翁法罗斯的世界，和她伟大的英雄子民，致以崇高的敬意。
E: In that case... very well. On behalf of the Xianzhou Alliance, I offer our deepest respect to the world of Amphoreus and her brave, noble heroes.

C: 我不在乎，只想拯救翁法罗斯。
E: It matters not, as long as Amphoreus is saved.

C: 祂观察、计算、求解一切。祂提出疑问、进行验证、获取解答。现在，无所不知的存在向你发问——
E: THEY observe, compute, and seek to solve all. THEY question, verify, and obtain resolution. Now, the all-knowing entity questions you...

C: 迈德漠斯
E: Mydeimos

C: （看起来只是普通的终端，显示屏的内容也没什么可疑的地方……）
E: (It just looks like an ordinary terminal. There's nothing unusual on the screen...)

C: 越简单的手法越不容易识破，这不是我们的座右铭吗？
E: The simplest method is the hardest to spot, isn't that our motto?

C: 你叫鸭脖拉罕？
E: Your name is Aburgerham?

C: 唉！只怪我的心理素质不够过硬，否则真假早已见分晓。
E: Ugh! Wish I wasn't so worked up, otherwise we would've been able to tell by now.

C: 兵不厌诈。
E: All's fair in love and war.

C: 我们应物科受上边之托，正在盘点空间站的各项亏损。其中，月台区域由我负责。
E: We in the Department of Implement Arts have received orders to take stock of the various losses of the space station. That includes evaluating areas like the railway platform.

C: 感觉这清单怪怪的。
E: It seems like there's something odd about that list.

C: 我告诉你啊，这<color=#dbc291ff>「卡利白」</color>曾经可是空间站的专利，风靡星系的反重力饮品，我手上的存货就剩这最后几瓶了。
E: Let me tell you, the patent for this <color=#dbc291ff>Kapo-Kali</color> used to belong to the space station. This anti-gravity drink was once all the rage across the cosmos. I only have a few bottles left.

C: 这一方面，是因为他自己喜欢私下鼓捣；另一方面，是他几乎天天到机修间来，跟我学上两手。
E: On one hand, it's because he likes to tinker with things in his spare time. On the other hand, it's because he would come to the maintenance room to learn from me almost every day.

C: 算你有良心！千万别有样学样，着了何塞•拉萨罗的道。
E: I am glad to hear you have a conscience after all! Never be like that Hosea Lazaro.

C: 其实，老爹我从来都不在乎他给我造成的损失。
E: Of course, I never cared about all the mess he left me with.

C: 拜托了！
E: Please!

C: 她说拿你的照片来换。
E: She wants your picture in exchange for information.

C: 在「波少」群情激昂的粉丝脚下，发现了奇怪的卡片。它狡黠闪烁，像在嘲讽这场闹剧。
E: Under the feet of Master Capote's passionate fans, a strange card was found. It flickered cunningly, as if mocking the farce.

C: 上一个能够跟我产生灵魂共振的，还是我母星的一位「编剧」——所谓编剧，也就是银河中的说书人。
E: The last person I connected with was a "screenwriter" on my home planet — we call them screenwriters. In the cosmos, you call them storytellers.

C: 不就是爆炸头协会吗…
E: It's just the Curlcademy, right?

C: 你不用上班吗？
E: Don't you have to work?

C: 出事了？
E: Did something happen to her?

C: 就这样，群星依旧在头顶赏乐，沿途将是它们优雅的倦容。
E: And with that, the stars continue their enjoyment above as their elegant smiles fill the way forward.

C: 哥们儿你要是也这么觉得，也别憋着，就笑出来吧。
E: Bro, if you want to laugh, laugh. There's no need to hold back.

C: 嗯，这都要归功于艾丝妲小姐和各科室负责人思路清晰，规划得当。
E: Well, it's all due to the clear thinking and proper planning by Lady Asta and the heads of the various departments.

C: 有{NICKNAME}协助复兴计划的稳步推进，希望艾丝妲小姐今后能多睡几个好觉……
E: Hopefully, with your help in Project Revival, Lady Asta will finally get a good night's sleep.

C: 今天，我就要杀杀这坏风气。
E: Today, I'm gonna show them all what real work is about!

C: 嗯，<color=#dbc291ff>务必修复道路缺损，清除扼守终点的怪物。</color>
E: Yes, <color=#dbc291ff>make sure to repair the road and eliminate the monsters at the end of it.</color>

C: 报酬在哪？
E: Where's my reward?

C: 别敷衍我。
E: Don't try to fool me.

C: 希拉•诺娃。
E: Sheila Nova.

C: 希拉，歌唱。
E: Sheila, sing.

C: 放心吧，不会有任何人发现。毕竟那里是除了议事间之外我最熟悉的地方，长眠着无数我呕心沥血却终告失败的实验品。
E: Don't worry, no one will find out. After all, it is the place I am most familiar with outside of the Conference Room. My countless previous failed experimental objects sleep there.

C: 哦是吗？可我好像什么都记不得了。
E: Oh, really? I don't seem to remember anything.

C: 如果真的被销毁，不得不说是一种巨大的遗憾。
E: I have to say, it would be a shame if it really were destroyed.

C: 说说看吧。
E: Go on.

C: 听上去似乎有点道理…
E: Sounds reasonable...

C: 才不是呢，要是我能去我早就去了。
E: It's not like that. I would have gone if I could.

C: 你就是{NICKNAME}吧？艾丝妲站长说要来用终端机的那位——她之前已经跟我交代好了。
E: Are you {NICKNAME}? Asta already gave me a heads up that you are going to come use the terminal.

C: 非常抱歉，刚刚隔壁机组的系统突然自动更新了，有几个科室的研究员还没来得及保存成果，我得过去帮忙。
E: I'm terribly sorry. The computer system in the next room suddenly initiated an auto-update. The researchers didn't have time to save their results. So I went to help them just now.

C: 放心吧，绝不外泄。
E: Don't worry, they will never leak out.

C: 黑塔•全景系统提示您：已锁定监控目标，无特殊光学反应。
E: Prompt from the Herta Panopticon System: Locked on to target, no special optical response.

C: 咳咳…我刚才说的应该是：「人生就是一场修行，做人也要从心如一。」
E: Ahem... What I said was "Life is a trial, and you need to be true to yourself."

C: （可不能让他就这么溜了，如果他实在不肯说的话，那就——）
E: (I can't let him get away like this. If he doesn't want to tell me, then...)

C: 今天回去我就把当时的<color=#dbc291ff>「录音稿」</color>打印下来，我们粉丝会必须全文朗读并背诵！
E: I'm gonna print out the <color=#dbc291ff>transcript of the conversation</color> as soon as I get back today! The fan club needs to recite and memorize it!

C: （只是给佩佩看了一下三月七的照片，它就能确认她的位置吗？）
E: (So Peppy can locate March just by looking at a photo of her...)

C: 对不起！
E: I'm sorry!

C: 你太天真了…我已经打听到，那东西可以占据人的躯壳，令人沦为行尸走肉…到时候别说课题了，你连命都没了……
E: You're too naive... I heard that thing can take over one's physical body and turn its victims into mindless zombies... By that point, never even mind the research. Your life would be gone...

C: 有奇物跑了？
E: There's a runaway Curio?

C: 而且「呜呜伯」是出了名的喜欢戏弄人心，所以民间绰号才会叫做「戏命鬼」。
E: More importantly, the Wubbaboos are infamous for their manipulation tactics, which is why they have been nicknamed Jinx.

C: 阿德勒，在我看来，你刚刚的回答避重就轻，模棱两可，提供的帮助实在有限。
E: Adler, in my professional opinion, your answers were vague, evasive, and only offered VERY limited help.

C: 如果你不承认，我只好去找界种科的负责人了……
E: If you insist on being tight-lipped about this, I will have to find the director of the Department of Ecology...

C: 礼物就是这个吧。
E: A gift?

C: 我不清楚对方的长相——确切地说，我正要调查此事呢。
E: I don't know who or what it was. Actually, I'm investigating that right now.

C: 完全不。
E: Not at all.

C: 以太卡带是骇客生命的记录，存在的证明。而被空间站收容的这一张，更属于其中的一位传奇。
E: It's a recording of the hacker's life and proof of their existence. The one on the space station belonged to someone truly legendary.

C: {NICKNAME}{F#女士}{M#先生}，你还好吗？
E: {F#Young madam}{M#Young sir}, are you alright?

C: 所以，她其实是…
E: So she's actually...

C: 要问什么人能同时满足所有条件——朋友，那一定是你！
E: Who could satisfy all of those requirements? My friend, that's you!

C: 那就开始吧。
E: Then let's go.

C: 开始吧。
E: Let's begin.

C: 哦…没关系，这事也不急。等你准备好了，随时和我说。
E: Oh... never mind then, it's not urgent. Come talk to me whenever you're ready.

C: 嗯，开始吧。
E: Alright, let's begin.

C: 正是！对此我深感抱歉，特此前来，希望能为星穹列车解决困境。
E: Indeed, and I extend my deepest apologies for doing so. I wish to remedy the situation, hence my arrival on the Astral Express.

C: 行吧，反正我也没别处可去，就先跟你——
E: *sigh* Alright, I have nowhere else to be. Let's go.

C: …只凭这些恐怕得不出什么结论。
E: ...I'm afraid that's not enough information for us to draw a conclusion.

C: 若要我评价这场较量——精彩绝伦、酣畅淋漓！有幸遇见这样的对手，我也以身证明了「纯美」的存在。
E: Extraordinary and enjoyable in equal measure! Encountering an opponent of your caliber proves the existence of "the Beauty."

C: 哎呀，好担心……
E: Tsk, I hope he made it...

C: 所以，你和黑塔的最后一面是在她的办公室。你接下委托，为寻找奇物四处奔波，而对其他事浑然不知，直到艾丝妲小姐联络了你。
E: So, to sum it up, the last time you laid eyes on Herta was in her office. She sent you on a wild goose chase for some trinket, the Curio, after which you knew nothing else until Lady Asta contacted you.

C: （记忆有些模糊了，那之后我做了什么？）
E: (My memory is kind of hazy. What did I do after that?)

C: 袭击过后，科员中就一直有人对空间站的管理和安保抱有质疑。
E: Some researchers have been questioning the management and security of the space station ever since the invasion.

C: （有必要调查一下……）
E: (We need to investigate this...)

C: 通过实际接触，我确认阿弗利特的火焰只是原始灵火的火星，不具备相位变换能力。逻辑：艾丝妲仍在空间站内。
E: Based on firsthand experience, I have ascertained that Ifrit's flame is simply a splinter of the primordial Phase Flame — lacking any phase-shift ability. Logic: Asta is still within the confines of the space station.

C: 好多人啊。
E: There's quite the crowd here today...

C: 一口气喝两瓶卡利白的勇气！
E: Courage to drink 2 bottles of Kapo-Kali in one go!

C: 觐见芝士流心！
E: I am humbled to meet the Molten Cheese Tart!

C: 不，怎么会？斯蒂芬不想掺和这事，投了弃权票——行吧，我尊重每个人的生活方式，但他没机会参与这场决策了。
E: No, of course not! Stephen doesn't want to get involved and voted to abstain — whatever. Look, I respect the way people want to live, but he doesn't have the chance to be involved in this decision-making anymore.

C: 自懂事起，我就乐于观察微观生物的生命痕迹，譬如黏菌吞噬物体的速率；我也将宏观的世界尽收眼底，研习宇宙至今的发展进程——都很简单。
