E: Ever since I was a child, I have always delighted in observing aspects of microscopic creatures... such as the speed with which slime molds devour objects. I have also gazed far and wide across the macroscopic world, investigating the progress of the universe up to this day — it was all very simple.

C: 异界物种，嘶嘶。
E: Alien species, *buzz*.

C: 正在清扫中……请稍候。
E: Cleaning in progress... Please wait.

C: 恭喜啊，你俩都圆梦了。
E: Congratulations, you have both fulfilled your dreams.

C: 那是从前，现在的人可拼了。
E: That was before. People are going all out nowadays.

C: 那些花在我眼里全长一个样，实在不知道怎么选，这委托就一直搁置着。你愿意帮帮她么？
E: Flowers all look the same to me. I'd have no idea how to pick a bouquet, so I put her assignment aside. Would you be willing to help her?

C: 我也一样，这里的花比军需物资种类还多，我都挑昏头了。
E: Me too. There are more varieties of flowers here than I've seen military supplies! Trying to decide is making my head spin.

C: 你还是那么乐于助人啊。
E: I see you're as helpful as ever.

C: 您的花包好啦，时候不早了，我们也要回家了。
E: Your flowers are all wrapped up. It's getting late. I should head home.

C: 我还担心你不喜欢。
E: I was worried you wouldn't like them.

C: 除了金人巷，我们还得去丹鼎司——当时无名客曾帮助过那里的持明族人跃渊，但我目前联系不到她。
E: We must visit the Alchemy Commission as well as Aurum Alley. The Nameless had assisted Yueyuan of the Vidyadhara in the past, though I am currently unable to contact her.

C: 新品研发计划就这样中断了一阵子，直到有一天我突发奇想，其他人也许没你懂茶，但只要参与试茶的人够多，百十张嘴总能挑出一碗好茶。
E: So my product research and development plans stopped for a while. That was when I had a moment of inspiration: Though others may not understand tea like you do, as long as I have enough people sampling my teas, I will eventually be able to select a perfect brew based on their feedback.

C: 看，什么叫行家啊，我一说你就懂了。
E: See? That's expertise for you! You understand what I'm talking about immediately.

C: 喝就完事了。
E: I'll just drink it and get it over with.

C: 你看看信里写的东西，不知道这个写信人是脑洞太大还是日子太闲。
E: Here's what is written in the letter if you'd like to read it. I don't know if the writer's imagination has run away with them, or if they just have too much time on their hands.

C: 但与此同时，我们却在不断成长。无名客的一举一动，或许都能在普通人的生活里泛起不小的涟漪。
E: But we are always growing. Every action that a Nameless takes is capable of creating huge waves in the lives of normal people.

C: 它自己提出想升级新的通讯模块，这样就能方便你随时和这一路上认识的朋友们联系。
E: It suggested that it wanted to update its communication system to the latest model to make it easier for you to contact the friends you have met along your journey whenever you want.

C: {NICKNAME}身体里有颗星核，我有独一无二的{RUBY_B#神秘的晶体}六相冰{RUBY_E#}，丹恒有…呃，不知道是啥的神秘过去。
E: I mean c'mon, {NICKNAME}, you've got a Stellaron in your body, I have my special {RUBY_B#Mysterious Ice Crystal}Six-Phased Ice{RUBY_E#} powers, and Dan Heng... Uhh, he's got that mysterious past thing going for him...

C: 让一下，三月。
E: I got this, March.

C: 得，规矩我懂，大家都是干这行的，有点戒心，能理解！怪我桑博天性热情，太真诚……
E: Then again, I know the rules, vigilance is the name of the game in our profession. It's my fault for letting my enthusiasm and sincerity get the better of me...

C: 我的遗器带的都是速度词条。
E: My relics all have speed attributes.

C: 他们来这里干嘛？
E: What are they doing here?

C: 我也在好奇…不会是来找「查宝」的吧？那他们可真是晚了好几步。
E: That's what I'd like to know. If they're here to look for Findie, then they're more than just a little late.

C: 托帕到底和你说了什么？
E: What exactly did Miss Topaz say to you?

C: …哎呀，差点把商业机密泄露出去了，好险好险~
E: Oops! I almost gave away trade secrets there, didn't I? That was a close one.

C: 话说回来，托帕小姐看上去这么年轻，居然已经当上了公司的高管，真让人羡慕……
E: Wow, Miss Topaz, you're really young for an IPC executive! That's impressive!

C: 你喜欢小动物？
E: You like animals?

C: 居然还认识托帕总监？看来身份确实不简单……
E: You know Topaz? Interesting...

C: …综上所述，托帕，部门将对你作出如下处分——
E: In light of the events that have transpired, we will be taking the following disciplinary measures against you.

C: 梦想被夺走的感觉…克拉拉不知道，但只是想象一下…一定很不好受吧？
E: Just taking away people's dreams like that... I don't know... It feels wrong.

C: 有件重要的事需要你的意见。
E: We need your opinion on an important matter.

C: 不知道还能不能过「煦日节」…
E: I wonder if we'll have time to celebrate the Solwarm Festival.

C: 没错。
E: That's right.

C: …卧什么底，你在跟谁说话呢？
E: ...Your cover? What are you talking about?

C: 像我这种情况，就算去复诊也只是浪费时间和金钱…哦，还浪费了医生开的药。
E: For people in my situation, a follow-up visit is just a waste of time and money... not to mention medicine.

C: 路过这儿的穷酸流浪汉都跟你一个样——想买药的话直接跟我说就行，没必要再往前走了。
E: You're the same as everyone else that comes through here. If you want medicine, you don't need to go any further — you talk to me.

C: 「羽量级」、「轻量级」、「沉量级」、「中量级」、「重量级」——每个排行榜的积分各自独立计算！
E: Featherweight, lightweight, welterweight, middleweight, and heavyweight... And the score on each board is calculated individually!

C: 那些事又不是我干的……
E: I didn't do those things...

C: 我们可以找找房间里的使用痕迹，通过新旧程度，大致能够推算水魈离开的时间。
E: We can look for traces left by the Xenohydro in the room and use them to work out when it was last here.

C: 「咕噜噜，一派胡言，别想抓老子！」
E: "*gurgle* Nonsense, you'll never catch me!"

C: （怪物的突然袭击造成了严重的伤势……）
E: (The monster's surprise attack caused some serious injuries...)

C: 我发现这里有怪物游荡，就先躲起来了。怪我没有出声警示，才害{NICKNAME}中了水魈的陷阱。
E: I found a monster wandering around here, so I hid away. It's my fault that I didn't warn you. That's why you fell for the Xenohydro's trap.

C: 拉明娜，你叫这么多人来干什么？
E: Lamina, why did you invite all these people?

C: 拉明娜某种程度上可是我们的粉丝头头啊，连她都离开你了，那不是说明，你根本不值得……
E: Lamina is the leader of your fanclub to some extent. If even she has left you, then maybe you're really not worth it...

C: 他…他是对希莉儿来说很重要的人。
E: He... he's a really really important person... to me.

C: {F#姐姐}{M#哥哥}还不走吗？没事的，不用担心我……
E: {F#Ma'am}{M#Sir}, you're still here? All good, don't worry about me...

C: 难道有什么东西被埋在下面了？
E: Maybe something is buried underneath?

C: 喂——{NICKNAME}——你能听到吗——
E: Hey! {NICKNAME}! Can you hear me?

C: 抱歉，我也希望这能是一次温情的重逢…但现在下层区还有很多我关心的人，他们正在遭受病痛的折磨，而你是我眼下唯一能求助的人。
E: I apologize. I wish this were a happier reunion... but there are too many suffering with sickness in the Underworld. You're the only person I can go to for help.

C: 我了解哥哥，他对医学实验的态度严谨得可怕。不管条件有多艰辛，他也绝对不会漏记任何一次实验结果。
E: I know my brother he's — meticulous when it comes to medical experiments. There's no way he wouldn't document his results.

C: 人们会记得瓦赫医生。
E: People will remember Dr. Vache.

C: 很好的选择呢，{NICKNAME}。不知道爸爸他还会不会在结婚纪念日的时候给妈妈送花……
E: Nice pick, {NICKNAME}. I wonder if dad still sends mom flowers on their anniversary...

C: {NICKNAME}，你回来啦。如何，有查出什么关键信息吗？
E: Oh good, you're back, {NICKNAME}! Did you find out any critical intel?

C: 但是也不应该坐视不管，毕竟咱们这趟都已经下来了……
E: ...but since we're already here, they could use our help.

C: 那么显眼的一尊艺术雕像，不管放在哪肯定都有被发现的风险。所以这些滑头贼另辟蹊径，把它拆解了以后植入到机器人体内保存……
E: Keeping such a conspicuous piece of art around wouldn't go unnoticed... the thieves must have disassembled it and hidden the parts inside the robots.

C: 可怜的小灰熊…它体内肯定被植入了很多不匹配的零件。
E: Poor little grizzly... there must be a lot of sculpture parts jammed inside.

C: 冬城的孩子，「存护」骄傲的子民，抬起你们的头来！不要被忙碌且庸俗的日常磨平了棱角，时刻铭记筑城者和大守护者的教导！
E: Children of the Everwinter City, proud citizens of the Preservation: Hold your heads up high! Grind NOT against the mundane vulgarities of your everyday lives. ALWAYS remember, deep in your hearts, the teachings of the Architects and the Supreme Guardian!

C: 原来只是酒肉朋友…
E: So more like a drinking buddy than a friend...

C: 一段时间过后，卫兵凯尔回到了克里珀堡……
E: After some time, Kyle heads back to Qlipoth Fort...

C: 对不上口令的都不许放进来，哪怕是只虫子也不行！听见没有？
E: Don't let anything in that doesn't know the password — not even a fly! You got that?

C: {NICKNAME}，我们上！让这些冒牌货吃点苦头！
E: Come on, {NICKNAME}! Let's give these imposters a taste of justice!

C: 小子，有件事我突然记不清了，你提醒我一下——
E: Y'know, I just realized there's something I forgot — maybe you could help me remember.

C: 噢…好像拆成了<unbreak>20</unbreak>个。
E: Uhh... around <unbreak>20</unbreak>.

C: 这次行动就到这里结束吧，{NICKNAME}。你已经帮了我们太多了，后面的追查交给铁卫巡逻队就好。
E: This operation ends here, {NICKNAME} — you've helped us enough already. Leave the rest to the Silvermane Guards.

C: 阅读便笺上的内容。
E: Read the message.

C: 虽然这个问题与志愿导览员资质无关，但出于好奇，我还是想要提问——
E: Now, this question actually has nothing to do with the requirements to become a volunteer guide, but I just want to ask out of curiosity —

C: 叶甫尼•赫罗瓦和凡妮莎•赫罗瓦，他们俩可能是贝洛伯格史上最知名的外科医生夫妇了…当然，也是我的养父母。
E: Yevgeny and Vanessa Harrower: They might just be the most renowned couple among Belobog's surgeons... Of course, they were also my foster parents.

C: 嗯…是这样没错。然后，佩拉小姐委托我来进行今天的面试……
E: Yup... That's right. By the way, Pela asked me to help conduct the interview today...

C: 没错，克拉拉——你如实回答就好了，不用害怕！我们的面试很轻松的啦！
E: Exactly, Clara. Just answer truthfully, and don't be scared! We're just having a casual conversation here!

C: 咳咳……
E: Ahem...

C: 好的，那就写不好说。
E: Okay, I'll write down "no comment" here.

C: 对不起，这还是我的恶作剧。
E: Sorry. It's yet another prank of mine.

C: 喂喂喂——谁逼你了啊？！
E: Nobody forced you to do that!

C: 你没有错，只是事与愿违。
E: You did right, but maybe that's how the problem started.

C: 嗨，这群家伙……
E: *sigh* These guys...

C: 轮子已经坏彻底了，不过连结部件勉强还能用，先卸下来吧。
E: The wheels are completely broken, but the connecting component should be pretty much okay. Let's remove it.

C: 这下就齐全了！
E: That's everything!

C: 依我看，你这老头就是欠教训。兄弟们，抄家伙！
E: Well, I think someone needs to teach you a lesson. Guys, get him!

C: 被人说自私也好，背叛也好，这都不重要。重要的是，等我走了以后，虎克你也能靠着这笔钱照顾好自己，生活下去…
E: People say I'm selfish, think I'm a traitor, but it doesn't matter to me. All you need to know is, when I'm gone, you will have the money to take care of yourself and survive on your own...

C: 没有。
E: No.

C: 干我这行就得学会察言观色，那厨子心术不正，我老早就看出来了——不信你问别人。
E: In my line of work, I've learned to read people. And something's definitely fishy with that cook. I could tell from the start. If you don't believe me, just ask anyone.

C: 骗你我能捞着什么好处，等着「地火」半夜来敲我门么？
E: What do I have to gain from lying to you? Wildfire coming for me in the night?

C: 也没干什么特别的事，只是出去透了透气。
E: Nothing special. I just went out to get some fresh air.

C: 这叫什么话，我桑博向来深明大义——想想我过去帮过你的忙，这点你总不能否认吧？
E: What do you mean by that? I've always had a big heart — think about how helpful I've been to you in the past. You can't deny it, can you?

C: 这图，保真吗…
E: Is this map... legit?

C: 好消息？和我们有关的？这我可得好好听听……
E: Oh? To do with us? I'm listening...

C: 呜呜，这里好冷…好可怕……
E: *sob* It's so cold here... I'm scared...

C: 冷静，不要主动邀战！
E: Calm down, don't engage the enemy!

C: 要先找一处合适的露营地。
E: We need to find a good place to set up camp first.

C: 呃，这是……
E: Uh... what exactly are—

C: 这个…好像是萝卜？
E: Is this... a radish?

C: 啊…好香！我要开动了——！
E: Ah... It smells so good! I'm gonna dig in!

C: 那个…要不让我来做吧！玲宝你就休息一下……
E: Um... Why don't I cook tonight? You can take a break...

C: 真好呀，吃了玲宝做的饭，还看到了极光…这次雪原之行，圆满结束啦——！
E: So awesome... I got to taste Lynxy's cooking and see the aurora... This Snow Plains adventure was the best!

C: 我来了。
E: Yep.

C: 可可利亚竟然允许外出科考？
E: Cocolia allowed explorations outside of the city?

C: …怪人。
E: ...Weirdo.

C: 你不用跟他客气，这小鬼是出了名的毛贼。没记错的话，你这衣服也是从其他孩子那儿偷来的吧？
E: Don't be so polite to him. Everyone in the Underworld knows this brat is a no-good thief. If I remember correctly, even the clothes you're wearing came off another kid's back?

C: 这是一枚奖章，筑城者授予我的…看见中间这块蓝色的石头了吗？那是纯度最高的地髓结晶。
E: This is a medal given to me by the Architects... See that blue stone in the middle? That's a Geomarrow crystal of the highest purity.

C: 这是……
E: This is...

C: 不是的，我现在记起来了……
E: No, I remember now...

C: 谁知道还有没有下一次。
E: Will this really be the last time...

C: 就是它，就是它！这是老巫婆奖励虎克的大熊玩偶！
E: Here it is — my teddy bear! The old witch gave it to me as a gift!

C: …好、好啦！不许哭，尤利安！你可是鼹鼠党的二把手，才不能给大人看笑话！
E: ...H—Hey! Wipe your tears, Julian! You're second-in-command — no crying in front of grown-ups!

C: 等待，大家，帕斯卡，不停！离开，大家，回来，有一天！
E: Waiting, everyone, Pascal, non-stop! Leave, everyone, come back, one day!

C: 没啥，只是觉得一宿不见，大家的氛围好像变好了呢……
E: It's nothing, it just feels like people are getting along better since your unannounced disappearance...

C: 请伸出右手。
E: Please extend your right hand.

C: 修复失败。核心模组遭到破坏，发现外部威胁。
E: System restoration failure. Core module damaged. External threat detected.

C: 你看着也很柔弱啊。嗨，赶紧去找她吧，史瓦罗还在门后等着咱们呢。
E: You don't look so tough yourself. Well, let's find her. Svarog's not going anywhere.

C: 欸？大哥哥怎么知道？
E: Huh? How did you know?

C: …你还真信任我啊，{NICKNAME}。
E: ...You might be putting a little too much faith in me, {NICKNAME}.

C: 疑问缺乏必要的情境，无法作答。
E: Said question lacks the necessary context to be answered.

C: 我、我们是「变量」！
E: W—We're a variable!

C: 调用数据库中…访问受阻。与未经授权的目标谈论「星核」：禁止。
E: Searching database... Access denied. Discussing "Stellaron" with unauthorized targets: Prohibited.

C: 没有证据表明你们会是「例外」。维持原有的计算结果。
E: There is no evidence to suggest you are an exception. Calculation result remains unchanged.

C: 没反应呢……
E: It's not responding...

C: …怎么，还想忽悠我？你不让我竞，那我偏要竞！我才不会吃这哑巴亏！
E: ...Trying to dupe me into not bidding on it, huh? Fine, then I will bid for it! I won't let this opportunity slip!

C: 「军军」？那是什么…
E: Hehe, Junjun? Who's that?

C: 请稍等一会儿，拍卖会很快就要开始了。
E: Please wait a moment. The auction will begin shortly.

C: （将纸和笔交给他。）
E: (Give him a pen and paper.)

C: 唉，真是诸事不顺…拿不回合同的话，大熊玩偶也要离我远去了……
E: *sigh* Just my luck... If I can't retrieve the contract, I won't be able to buy that bear...

C: 我也不清楚，都是听巴列维老板说的。他要这玩意干什么用我也不清楚。
E: I'm not sure, but it was Balaway that told me. I'm not sure why he wants it.

C: 七百五十！
E: <unbreak>750</unbreak>!

C: {NICKNAME}，谢谢你…要是没有你的帮助，虎克肯定拍不到探针！
E: {NICKNAME}, thank you so much... Hook would never have won the probe without your help!

C: 把鼹鼠党老大的位置让给我！
E: How about you let me be the boss of The Moles?

C: 话说回来，你的生日聚会准备得怎么样了，虎克？邀请了这位{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}吗？
E: By the way, Hook, how are your birthday party plans coming along? Have you invited this {F#young lady}{M#young man}?

C: …真的？
E: ...Really?

C: 我、啊…不是，谁、谁在那里？！
E: Ah, wh—who's there!?

C: 哎哟、哎哟，有这样的大能人来抓小偷，那我可安心了…让、让我组织一下语言，把昨晚的经历告诉你，你等下……
E: Oh, wow. I feel way better knowing that a big shot like you is here to catch the thief... H—Hold on, I'll explain what happened last night. Just let me gather my thoughts first...

C: 仔细看来，这个小机器人…不像是贝洛伯格制式的机器人呢。简直像是…用废弃金属材料随意焊接出来的——咦，它好像还有一只小小的机械臂……？
E: This small robot... doesn't appear to be a Belobog creation. It looks like it's been welded together from random scrap metal materials... Huh, it appears to have a small mechanical arm...

C: 怎、怎么办…只能想办法先制止它了！{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}，拜托了，下手轻一点！克拉拉之后会想办法修好它的……
E: What should we do? We gotta stop it! But, please don't be too rough on it! I'll figure out a way to repair it later...

C: 听起来还挺有意思的。
E: That sounds pretty interesting.

C: 我在解析过程中挖掘出了该个体的序列号，并在下层区的自动机兵数据库中依次检索——
E: During my analysis, I extracted the robot's serial number and searched for it in the Underworld's automaton database...

C: {F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}，你的选择是……
E: So, what's your decision...

C: 邓恩队长在前面休息，你们自己去找他吧。要是他同意授权你们，我自然放行。
E: ...Captain Dunn's resting up ahead. Go and find him. If he grants you permission, I won't stand in your way.

C: 我是银鬃铁卫的戍卫官，职责所在，必须执行「大守护者」的命令。
E: As a captain of the Silvermane Guards, I am duty-bound to carry out the orders of the Supreme Guardian.

C: 对银鬃铁卫而言，守护者的命令是至高、绝对的。但在誓言里，还有一样东西和她的命令同等重要……
E: For the Silvermane Guards, the guardian's orders are paramount and absolute. But there is something of equal importance in the oath we take...

C: ——准备御敌！
E: Steel yourselves!

C: …混账！这都什么时候了，还在这儿踢皮球？
E: That's ridiculous! How can they shirk their responsibility like that?

C: 我来帮忙解决次品机器人事件。
E: I am here to deal with those defective robots.

C: 至于那些<color=#dbc291ff>「核心模组」</color>，你就先交给我吧。
E: As to those <color=#dbc291ff>"Core Modules"</color>... hand them to me first.

C: 你安全了。
E: You are safe now.

C: 你先带着她回机械屋吧，我还得去处理这次事故的后续事宜……
E: Take her back to the workshop. I have to follow up on this incident...

C: （保持沉默，继续聆听。）
E: (Stay silent and keep listening.)

C: …这次有什么其它反应吗？
E: ...Any other side-effects this time?

C: 对不起，我不能…如果可以的话，请你把希莉儿这个名字也从记忆里抹去吧！就假装…假装我们从来都没见过面。
E: I'm sorry. I just can't... If you can, please remove the name Cyrille from your memory, too! Just pretend... pretend that we've never even met.

C: 但也不必悲观。裂界的污染越重，就证明我们离根源越近了。
E: Don't be disheartened. The stronger the Fragmentum contamination, the closer we are to the source.

C: 至于现在…只是一座被废弃的回廊，处处回荡着旧世界的残响。
E: Now... it is nothing more than an abandoned corridor, filled with the sounds of Old World echoes.

C: 走吧，去找下一个！
E: Come on, let's find the next one!

C: 我从来没见过这么荒凉的地方…至少铆钉镇上还留存着矿民的生活气息。
E: I've never seen such a desolate place... At least in Rivet Town, you could tell that people used to live there.

C: 你试图回忆那个怪梦，随着思绪的深入，那声音也适时闯入你的脑海……
E: You try to recall the dreams. As your train of thought deepens, the voice comes to you...

C: 看起来…像不像一只巨大的手掌？
E: Does it... look like the palm of a huge hand to you?

C: ——无论如何，绝对不能给这些东西解冻。
E: —Either way, you think that it's best not to unfreeze them.

C: 在下层，我们每天都在对小孩子重复同一句话：「明天会好起来的」——谁都知道那是在骗人，但至少能让他们带着希望入睡。
E: In the Underworld, we tell the kids "things will be better tomorrow." Everyone knows it's a lie, but it gets them to sleep with some hope.

C: 谢谢你的理解，{NICKNAME}。
E: Thank you for understanding, {NICKNAME}.

C: 我能为你做些什么？
E: What can I do for you?
(Huh? This is...)

C: 看来我们列车组的大忙人{NICKNAME}又接到新任务啦，加油喔。
E: Looks like the go-getter on our crew, {NICKNAME}, has another new mission. Good luck!

C: 不过，如果你之后还需要用到它的话，随时和我说——它毕竟是你捡到的，随便你怎么用都可以哦。
E: If you need to use it in the future, you just let me know. After all, you were the one who picked it up. You can use it however you like.

C: 需要我来做些什么？
E: Is there anything I can do?

C: …原来是这样啊。她既不用玉兆设备，也无亲无故的，联系我算是联系对人了，要不是您好心相助，我肯定什么都不知道。
E: ...I see. She doesn't use the jade abacus and has no relatives, so I'm the right person for you to contact. If it weren't for you, I wouldn't have known about this.

C: 音效很丰富，到底发生了什么？
E: Very descriptive sound effects. So, what happened?

C: 我这个人天生听力就很好，刚才那些也不是我胡编的。
E: My hearing has always been great. I didn't make those up.

C: 抱歉，是我输了。有机会的话，我还要和它再比一场！
E: Apologies, I lost. If there is a chance, I would very much like to have a rematch!

C: 是你…俺还记得你，{F#小姑娘}{M#小伙子}你有看到俺的笔记吗？
E: It's you... I remember you. {F#Young lass}{M#Young fella}, did you find my notes?

C: 哎呀，可不能让芦慧姑娘担心俺呀，她还有好多重要的事需要担心……
E: Oh, I can't let Ms. Luhui worry about me. She has so many important things to worry about...

C: …这位女士，我是认真地向您询问事故的情况。
E: ...Madam, I'm seriously trying to ask about the traffic incident.

C: 照片就交给我和檀檀吧。
E: Leave the photo to me and Tantan.

C: 我说过，对方同意了我的借阅请求。
E: I've stated that they've already approved my request to borrow it.

C: 在会见丹鼎司的丹士长时，她批复了我的请求。
E: The Alchemy Commission's chief alchemist approved my request when I met her.

C: 我猜，是魔阴身的枝叶？
E: I'm guessing it's a twig from the bodies of the mara-struck.

C: 有什么事就直接说。
E: Just spit it out already.

C: 这里并没有《要药分剂》，还是到别处转转吧。
E: The Compendium of Remedies isn't here. I should check somewhere else.

C: 不知死活的东西！
E: You scoundrel!

C: 噢，是它呀，忧郁的诗人。你找到了什么线索吗？
E: Oh, that one. The Gloomy Poet. Have you found any clues about it?

C: 对这种矫揉造作的家伙，无需多言，直接上手把它拽走就好。
E: There's no need for more words with a pretentious thing like this. Just drag it away.

C: 你回去就这样告诉小聪吧。
E: Just tell Cong that when you get back.

C: 与主人一样是持明，与静斋相爱，持有同心锁，可能蜕生……
E: Just like you, Guyu is a Vidyadhara, loves Jingzhai, has a Unity Lock, and has probably gone through the hatching rebirth...

C: 你再仔细看看你的同心锁。
E: Take a closer look at your Unity Lock.

C: 他一个搞物理研究的，搞什么文化调查啊？这跨度未免也太大了吧！
E: He's a physics researcher, what is he trying to do with a cultural study? This is too big a jump!

C: 可恶，要是我的外驻申请批准下来，我就能亲手送出这份心意。真羡慕你们啊……只要乘上列车就能去想去的地方。
E: Darn it, if only my off-station research transfer application had been approved, I would be able to deliver the gift on my own. I envy you... You just had to hop aboard the Express, and you can go anywhere you want.

C: 哪儿凉快哪儿待着去。
E: Get out of my way.

C: {F#小妹妹}{M#小弟弟}，问这样的问题也太冒犯了吧？
E: {F#Young lady}{M#Young man}, that is quite an offensive question.

C: 法律管不着！从来没有人能找到黛青小姐姐。
E: The law has no hold on this! No one has ever been able to find Ms. Daiqing.

C: 啊这…你不是说那经纪人是个男的吗？
E: Uh... didn't you say the manager was male?

C: 你得到了「美丽狐仙聊天」的真相，去把它带给艾丝妲吧。
E: You have uncovered the truth behind the Foxian Beauty Chat. Go and inform Asta.

C: 我肯定会把礼物送到黛青小姐姐的手上，接下来的事儿，你们不用管。
E: Rest assured the gift will be delivered to Ms. Daiqing. As for how it gets to her, you needn't worry about that.

C: 我听说过，不过嘛，在我看来那只是一种逃避的借口。
E: I have heard as much. But I think that's just an excuse people tell themselves.

C: 请注意，侦测到特定反应，附近存在学会通行光学标识，所属学士：贝尼尼•赛拉诺。
E: Note: Specific response detected. An optical marking of the guild is nearby. Owner: Scholar Bernini Serrano.

C: 嘿，年轻人真是缺乏耐心。焦虑本该属于我这样时日无多的老头才对。
E: Tsk, youngsters nowadays are so impatient. Only dying old people like me should feel anxious.

C: 也许他得偿所愿，会就此离开。<color=#dbc291ff>也许明天他还会联系我</color>？谁知道呢……
E: Perhaps he got what he wanted and left. <color=#dbc291ff>Or maybe he'll contact me again tomorrow.</color> Who knows...

C: 不必惊慌，当巨富和掌权者都能从中获益时，你会有无数的保护伞。仙舟将对你无可奈何。
E: Don't panic. You'll find you have plenty of protection when the super-rich and powerful can profit from something. The Xianzhou will be helpless.

C: …我其实看见了，在相反的方向。
E: ...Come to think of it, I did see her — she was going in the opposite direction.

C: 哦，你也是？
E: ...You too?

C: （能够指出丹鼎司医士要找的人就是半夏，这样的证据是什么？）
E: (How can I prove the doctor from the Alchemy Commission was looking for Banxia?)

C: 等等，{NICKNAME}，我听说过「药王秘传」。
E: Wait, {NICKNAME}, I've heard of the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus.

C: 我已有堕入魔阴身的征兆了。
E: I'm already showing symptoms of the mara-struck...

C: 你好，阿刃。
E: Hello, Bladie.

C: 从测试结果看，这个逆向生长的过程不会停止。要不了多久，我就会再也认不得字，看不懂自己写的报告，这和老年痴呆似乎没什么不同。
E: Test results indicate that this de-aging process seems to have no endpoint. It won't be long before I'm illiterate and won't be able to understand my own reports — which would seem no difference from regular dementia.

C: 劳烦你去替我——
E: Can you please ask for me...

C: 嗯嗯！
E: Uh-huh!

C: 糟了，她开始胡言乱语了。
E: This is bad. She's starting to lose touch with reality.

C: 继续说话，继续回忆他…
E: Tell me, what do you remember...

C: 我确实很想见到她，但是她要是在忙的话，我也不会强求的。半夏托你们来，她也有不能成行的苦衷吧。
E: I did want to meet Banxia, but I know how busy she is. She must have had a good reason for sending you.

C: …这阵子罗浮仙舟上到处都有怪事，可能刚才也是。
E: ...Strange things are happening on the Luofu these days... What happened to you isn't so surprising.

C: …这是我和半夏姐姐的约定。
E: ...I promised Banxia.

C: 就算你自问无愧，只要你还在罗浮，便会受种种看不见的力量裹挟。离开，才是对所有人好的选择。
E: You may have a clear conscience, but even so... As long as you remain on the Luofu, invisible forces will try to coerce you. Leave now. It's the best outcome for everyone involved.

C: 果然是你，丹枫。你回来了，哈哈哈哈…
E: As I expected... Dan Feng... you have returned... hahahaha...

C: 好啊，我会在渡口附近等着你们。
E: Very well. I will await all of you at the ferry.

C: 请跟紧我，我会带你到发现隐形怪物的事发地点。
E: Please come with me. I'll take you to the scene where the invisible monsters were found.

C: 对不起，这只是我的臆测罢了。
E: Apologies, I realize this is personal speculation.

C: 哎…有各种各样的原因吧。就算这份工作再琐碎，我也有不得不在这里的理由…况且，丹鼎司的门槛…呵呵，对我来说太高啦。
E: *sigh* A number of reasons. This job may be trivial, but I have my reasons for being here... Plus, hehe, the threshold for the Alchemy Commission was too difficult for me to reach.

C: 这应该能查到，不过要稍等一下，虽然大部分影像都丢失了，但终究是一整天的录像，要查看的东西很多，我需要确认一下……
E: I can find out, but you'll have to wait awhile. Most of the footage was lost, but at least there was a whole day of recording. There's a lot that needs checking and confirming first...

C: 现在还没到闭店时间，她应该不会去太远的地方才对。你们两个去吧，我在这里等等，也许她一会儿就回来了。
E: Business hours aren't over yet, she should be nearby. You two go ahead, I'll wait here in case she comes back.

C: 放心好啦，我们嘴巴可严了。但是下次还是不要这么做了哦。
E: Don't worry, we can keep a secret. Just make sure it doesn't happen again!

C: 怪了…那么一小块地，他在里面待了两小时？这个罗刹在干什么……
E: Strange... Why spend two hours in such a confined area? He must've been up to something...

C: 小三月打算怎么做呢？要去现场看看吗？
E: Oh? And what do you have in mind, detective? Fieldwork?

C: 现在，本姑娘就是罗刹～
E: Aaaand now I'm Luocha~

C: 哼，这种等级的门锁，还想拦住本姑娘？
E: Hmph, you think a lock like this can stop a girl like me!?

C: （看来这招是行不通的。）
E: (This isn't working.)

C: 罗刹真的是这种形象吗…
E: Is that... something Luocha would say?

C: 我怎么躺着也中枪…
E: How come I got dragged into this...

C: 对，他将药方写在上面，叠成了一朵纸花。
E: That's right, he wrote down the prescription and folded it into shape.

C: 找到了。那应该就是夕葵小姐拜托我们救的人。她被孽物困住了，咱们得加紧脚步。{NICKNAME}，你也要注意安全。
E: There — that must be who Miss Xikui asked us to save. We need to hurry — those abominations have trapped her. Be careful, {NICKNAME}.

C: 不说这些，咱们还是早点到司辰宫比较好。别让驭空等我们。
E: Anyway, let's head over to the Palace of Astrum — best not to keep Yukong waiting.

C: 哪条路上捡来的？下次我也去找找。这种品相的圣物，在市面上至少值两万巡镝。
E: Which road? I should head there myself — a divine object like this possesses a market value of at least <unbreak>20,000</unbreak> strales.

C: 是啊，体积较大的斗舰，需要飞行士两两成对合作。一人掌舵飞行，另一人操控武器。
E: Yes. Large fighter starskiffs need to be operated in pairs. One pilot takes the helm, the other controls the turrets.

C: 这件圣物…如果我没记错，是驭空大人一直随身携带的那件吧？
E: This divine object... If I remember correctly, it's the one Madam Yukong always carries with her?

C: 不过我们要找的东西似乎不在这里。
E: ...but what we're looking for isn't here.

C: 采翼！采翼！采翼…采翼……
E: Caiyi! Caiyi! Caiyi... Caiyi...

C: 但我不会因此而退缩，我并不害怕自己和她走上同样的道路…如果牺牲能换来仙舟上黎民苍生的幸福，那我甘愿慨然赴死！
E: ...but I won't hide from it — I'm not afraid to walk the same road as her. If my sacrifice can bring happiness to the citizens of the Xianzhou, then I'm ready for it!

C: 嗯…这就不了吧。我不会再飞了。
E: Hehe, I... I'm afraid I can't. I won't be flying anymore.

C: 嗯，毕竟你需要我的帮助。
E: Yes, it sounded like you needed some.

C: 可是，我已经都告诉你了。
E: But I've already told you.

C: 说真话。
E: Tell the truth.

C: …这是比喻。
E: ...It's a metaphor.

C: （…是想的吧。）
E: (...I guess I do want to see her again.)

C: （当我在空间站苏醒时，我记得卡芙卡…但别的事情都很模糊，是不是该问问我自己的事呢？）
E: (When I came to on the space station, I remember seeing Kafka... but everything before that is a blur. Shouldn't I ask about my past?)

C: （卡芙卡希望我给她点惊喜，那么，试试提出这个问题吧……）
E: (Kafka wants me to surprise her... Let's try this on for size...)

C: 她一定做了很多事情才让你活到现在，{F#小姑娘}{M#小子}。
E: She will have done many things to keep you alive until now, young one.

C: 证据就在天上。
E: The evidence is above us.

C: 没错。仙舟这般质量巨大的星舰，航行时应该格外注意，避免靠近行星被引力捕获。
E: You're right. Something with a mass as huge as a Xianzhou ship should keep clear of any planets on its course... otherwise, it risks being caught up in the gravitational pull.

C: 倒不是贬低各位的本事。恩公若是一不留神闪了腰，我心里也过意不去呀。
E: Not that I'm doubting your skill, but I'd feel terrible if you hurt yourself in the process.

C: 你还想真让这位狐狸小姐动手？就她那懒惰性子，多少年才能打开这扇门啊。
E: What, you'd rather leave it to our fox lady here? She'll probably break a nail, and then we'll never hear the end of it...

C: 这样就好，星槎的流水线动起来了。
E: That'll do it. The starskiff assembly line has been activated.

C: 我们几人中，要说谁和他走得最近，那只能是你。真是奇怪，眼高于顶的家伙竟会和另一个拿鼻孔瞧人的家伙相谈甚欢。
E: Out of all of us, you were the closest to him. It was strange, really — to see someone so arrogant get along with someone so proud.

C: 刃冷冷看向你。
E: Blade coldly looks at you.

C: 对新生的你来说，这一切也许看起来像一出拙劣的表演一样。看着老朋友们刀兵相见，我却无法阻止。
E: All this must have seemed like a silly performance to someone newly reborn... but I am unable to prevent my old friends from taking sides against one another.

C: 聪明如他，竟妄想用那位丰饶令使的血肉，帮助饮月将阵亡入灭的挚友带回人世。
E: As smart as he was, he made the foolish attempt to use the flesh of the Abundance Emanator to aid Imbibitor Lunae in resurrecting his deceased companion.

C: …身为帝弓的追随者，将军必然见识过寰宇诸界遭受寿瘟荼毒的惨状。那些生灵或化作不死的魔物，或沦为献祭丰饶的羔羊。
E: As a follower of the Reignbow Arbiter, you have witnessed the catastrophe brought upon by the Plagues Author, General. Living beings turning into undying monsters, eventually used as sacrifices to the Abundance.

C: 很显然你搞错了应该「喵喵喵喵」的对象。
E: Clearly, you are meowing up the wrong tree.

C: 意思就是：「尊敬的{NICKNAME}，您好，我在流云渡港口的某个地方发现了一个奇怪的东西。您也许有兴趣瞧瞧？」
E: Meaning: "Hello, dear {NICKNAME}. I found a strange thing at the port of Cloudford. You may want to come and have a look for yourself."

C: 彦卿还安全吗？
E: Is Yanqing safe?

C: 就像乐师听琴，诗人听韵。剑招变化流转之间，高明的剑士绝不会留下滞涩的杂音。能在一息间同时控御六柄飞剑，有这般实力的云骑应该屈指可数了。
E: As a musician listens to the notes of a song, so a poet listens to its rhyme... and in the flow of combat, a skilled swordmaster delivers both with their blade. I'll wager the Cloud Knights capable of wielding six flying swords at a time number few indeed.

C: 僵卧不动的遗骸微微颤抖起来，空洞的眼神中突然现出一股怒意。
E: The stiffed remains started trembling with a sudden anger out from its hollow eyes.

C: 比起旦夕即死，我给你一个更体面的选择——在目睹我千锤百炼的一剑后，以剑士的身份赴死。
E: I can give you a more dignified end than dying at his hands... To die as a swordmaster having witnessed the perfection of my technique — refined a thousand times over.

C: 走吧，你最好别骗我。
E: Yes, but don't even think about lying to me.

C: 怎么了？还有什么事要问吗？
E: What's on your mind? Did you want to ask about something else?

C: 彼等猎狗，窜伏皆鼠辈，安能与我匹敌！还不速速引颈受戮！
E: You think you're a match for me, devil!? Your death is inevitable — surrender and I'll make it quick!

C: 现在！马上！
E: Now! Move it!

C: 看表情也能猜到吧…
E: Well, the look on her face says it all, doesn't it?

C: 你不是还能凝结六相冰吗？
E: ...What about your Six-Phased Ice?

C: 桑…桑博宾馆？这不是歌德宾馆吗？
E: ...Th—The Sampo Hotel? This is Goethe Hotel!

C: 这宾馆保安怎么这么全副武装…贝洛伯格的治安很差吗？
E: Why would hotel security need to be armed to the teeth? Is there great lawlessness in Belobog?

C: 不意外。人心总是追求合理，拼拼凑凑便把不相干的东西组成了一出看起来有意义的幻戏故事，取名人生。
E: It isn't so surprising. In attempting to pursue the rational, we piece together the unrelated. The result is a seemingly meaningful fantasy — a fantasy called life.

C: （触碰梦泡）
E: (Touch the dream bubble)

C: 别担心，我带钱了。
E: Don't worry, I've got enough money with me.

C: 这把宝剑还能选贤任能？
E: That sword can actually appoint worthy monarchs?

C: 你来了，走吧，一起去赠剑仪式！
E: There you are! Come on, let's go to the ceremony together!

C: 用不了多久，就不再是由人役使剑，而是人成了一具被剑驱遣的行尸走肉，脑袋里充塞着种种嗜血好杀的念头。
E: Soon enough, it will no longer be a person wielding a sword but a mindless killing machine consumed by bloodlust and murderous thoughts.

C: 那就给你个报仇的机会，来送我最后一程吧？
E: How about one last chance for revenge? Come and bid me farewell for the final time.

C: 别管那忆者了，来聊聊我的事吧。该帮的忙我都帮了，按照约定——
E: Don't worry about that Memokeeper. Let's talk about my thing. I've helped you out with everything you've asked, as agreed...

C: 事实上，来到匹诺康尼的忆者不止一人，她把我和其他人弄混了。不过也无妨……
E: There's actually more than one Memokeeper who's come to Penacony — she mixed me up with someone else. But no harm, no foul...

C: 这是否有些多此一举了？
E: Isn't that a bit unnecessary?

C: 证据就是这张板凳，对么？
E: This stool is a piece of evidence, right?

C: 美梦剧团。
E: Sweet Dreams Troupe.

C: 是你干的，对不对？在梦里杀人…只有「记忆」的力量能做到这事！你从一开始就计划好了，就因为她捉弄你，跟你开玩笑…你就要杀她灭口！
E: You did this, didn't you? Killing people in their dreams... only the Remembrance has the powers to do that! You planned it out all from the start. Because she teased you and was pranking you... you wanted to kill her!

C: 解谜的关键在于侦探提出的两个信息：第一，现场有很多血迹。第二，受害者明显已死去多时。
E: The key to solving the puzzle lay in two pieces of information put forward by the detectives: First, the large splatter of blood at the crime scene. Second, the victim had been dead for some time.

C: 可怜的人，脸上受了重伤，就算能保住美貌，最近也不得不缠着纱布出行吧。如此一来，他是无法通过金槌府邸的人脸识别系统的。
E: Poor guy. He was seriously injured and was all wrapped up in bandages to keep his good looks safe. If that's the case, then he couldn't have made it through the Goldhammer residence's facial recognition system.

C: 只是有些好奇，花火小姐一人分饰多角，不会感到累吗？
E: I'm just a little curious. Isn't it really tiring for Miss Sparkle to play so many different roles?

C: 「御用」这词不是这么用的吧？
E: That's not how you use the word "Imperial"...

C: 这回总该是在说我们了吧？
E: Are you talking about us this time?

C: 哈哈，在我眼前的可是人称「未卜先知，法眼无遗」的符卿啊，趋吉避凶不是你的看家本领么？
E: Haha, but you're Fu Xuan the seer — the boundless omniscient! Bringing luck and avoiding misfortune is your strong suit, isn't it?

C: 说出那个有魔力的字眼！
E: Just say the magic word!

C: 「穷观阵」的算法「大衍万化之道」会对事物命途中所有捉摸不定之处，以无可计数的枚举法加以占算。一旦将尺度放眼万古与星海，世间便不存变数了。
E: The Matrix's algorithm is known as "the way of all change" — it accounts for every unpredictability on the Path of all things with uncountable enumerations. When your objects of measure are eras of time and oceans of stars, there are no true variables in the world.

C: 不要紧张。仙舟上哪有什么鬼魂精怪，不过是个把守阵法的金人罢了。这样的东西在仙舟重地里到处都是。
E: Take it easy, there's nothing supernatural on the Xianzhou. It's an aurumaton — it's guarding the Matrix of Prescience. They're stationed at various strategic places.

C: 第一、概念重叠的命途之间会产生碰撞。更宽广的命途将吞并狭隘的那条——「秩序」的太一，就是这样被「同谐」的希佩所同化。
E: One: Paths with overlapping concepts will eventually collide, and the broader Path will engulf the narrower one. That's how Ena the Order was assimilated by Xipe the Harmony.

C: 寰宇虫灾诞生之后，多位星神将祂杀死。
E: ...When the Swarm Disaster began to take hold, Tayzzyronth was attacked and killed by multiple Aeons.

C: 你又要使唤我们了？
E: Let me guess, more errands?

C: 毕竟是工作嘛，要靠它生活的。成年人的世界…呵呵，没有轻松二字。
E: *sigh* At the end of the day, work is work — you need it to live. Y'know March, adults forget what "relaxation" means after a certain age, hehe...

C: 咱们是将军的人，就没点特权？
E: The general sent us here — surely we get a pass?

C: 这东西在守卫「建木」根须和洪炉……
E: It's guarding the Ambrosial Arbor's roots and the furnace.

C: 要是你们听到铃铛响起，就记得离那远点儿……
E: If you hear the ring of a bell, keep away...

C: 等老夫片刻，让我把装置架上！
E: Give me a moment — I'll set up the device.

C: 景元将军说，「建木」是不可思议的仙道神通……
E: General Jing Yuan said the Ambrosial Arbor was an unfathomable celestial blessing...

C: 一路承你们恩惠了。剩下的麻烦，就让我和那些不成器的弟子们慢慢解决吧…实在不行，还有云骑军嘛。
E: Thank you for your help. Those useless students and I will take care of the rest here... If worst comes to worst, we still have the Cloud Knights.

C: 「罗浮三少」是干啥的？
E: What is this "Luofu Trio"?

C: 可是……
E: But...

C: 老大？真是粗鄙的称呼。在下是药王秘传众兄弟姐妹之首，是慈怀药王的子裔，我们会带领整个仙舟联盟走向「丰饶」的道路。
E: The head? What a crude way of putting it. I am Master of the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus, scion of Merciful Medicus, and I shall lead the entire Xianzhou Alliance onto the Path of Abundance.

C: 这真的很遗憾…身为朋友，在下尊重你的选择。
E: Such a pity... though as your friend, I respect your choice.

C: {NICKNAME}！{NICKNAME}！快醒醒，你还好吗！
E: {NICKNAME}! {NICKNAME}! Wake up, are you okay?

C: （楠楠在那边…但似乎没看到钟珊和其他人…先去问问楠楠吧。）
E: (Nannan is there... but I can't see Zhongshan and the rest... Let me ask Nannan first.)

C: （钟珊这家伙到底在搞什么鬼，去机巧鸟架那儿看看吧。）
E: (What on earth is Zhongshan up to? Let me take a look at the cycrane stand.)

C: 想要借一只谛听…
E: I'd like to borrow a Diting...

C: 因为他致力于放生矿泉水…里的微生物。三位大佬都觉得这种「放生」过于糊弄事，说他是「糊弄派」的，把他给排挤出去了。
E: It's because he likes to release... the microorganisms in water. The other three leaders think he's not taking the act of releasing life seriously, so they called him leader of the Fooling Around Faction and kicked him out.

C: 当然了，如果有某个地方的无机生命，因为某种原因很难继续生产和维修了，这样也许能符合条件，不过我没听过这样的地方？
E: If there exists a mechanical lifeform species that is unable to be repaired or manufactured for some reason, it might fit the criteria. However, I've never heard of such a place.

C: 你向希露瓦讲述了自己加入「放生帮」的来龙去脉。
E: You tell Serval the whys and wherefores of how you joined the Unshackled.

C: {NICKNAME}，当心，听这家伙的响动，似乎不太对劲！
E: {NICKNAME}, careful! You hear that sound? There seems to be something wrong!

C: 噢，听起来真是让人心碎。所以…这是一个衰退文明遗留下的最后一批机械生命？
E: Oh, it breaks my heart to hear this. So... is this the last batch of mechanical lifeforms left behind by a declining civilization?

C: 哈哈哈哈哈，这不好笑吗？
E: Hahahaha, isn't this hilarious?

C: 别问那么多，咱俩师徒一场，我总要给你保留一些小惊喜，对吗？
E: Don't ask so many questions. As your tutor, I must prepare some surprises for you, right?

C: 抛下放生帮的事情，走了？贝娜，有这种可能，但冬妮娅和希斯曼却不一定。
E: Have they decided to leave the Unshackled behind and go away? Benna might do such a thing, but not Tonya or Heathmann.

C: （这里也放着和之前差不多的话本，会和这里的谜题有关吗？）
E: (There's a book of ghost stories here, just like before. Could it have anything to do with this puzzle?)

C: 但我明明看见了，那些家伙冒着吱吱鬼火，发出桀桀怪笑，再说了，素裳也瞧见了——
E: But I saw them! They had ghostly flames coming out of their body, and they were cackling! And Sushang saw them too—

C: 你以为我愿意跟你呆一块呀？
E: You think I like spending time with you?

C: 这是…镜子？看着怪瘆人的。
E: Is this... a mirror? It looks a little creepy...

C: （总之，先往前走走看吧。）
E: (... I should keep moving.)

C: 谁跟你达成交易了？
E: I did NOT make a deal with you.

C: 因为在一千多年以前，这片绥园曾是大岁阳「燎原」与罗浮某位将军激斗的战场！
E: Because over a thousand years ago, this very garden was the site of an epic battle between the general of the Luofu and the great heliobus Ignamar.

C: 我一时心软，就把它放到了我的尾巴上…结果…结果没想到尾巴大爷竟然想吃掉我！得亏判官们及时出现，我才逃过了一劫。
E: I felt sorry for it, so I picked it up and put it on my tail... and then... Mr. Tail tried to eat me! If the judges hadn't arrived, it would've been over...

C: 听听浮烟的计划。
E: Let's listen to Cirrus's plan.

C: 接下来，该是将藏月瓠里吸入的碎片封进「束形却邪阵」里。恚炎的力量被剥离，它便无法再对绥园里的人和事施加影响了。
E: Now, we shall seal the fragments absorbed by the Lunaumbra Gourd into the Evil Binding Matrix. Once Furynox's power has been stripped, it will no longer be able to influence reality in Fyxestroll Garden.

C: 一场意料之外的「岁阳之祸」，化作了漫天火雨。浮烟趁乱附身于冥差，被十王司及时控制。但是尾巴的下落，已经是无处可寻……
E: The unanticipated turmoil of the Heliobi Disaster turned in a rain of fire. Cirrus grasped the chance to possess a spiritfarer, only for the Ten-Lords Commission to subdue it. Tail, however, is nowhere to be seen...

C: 接下来就交给十王司吧，吾…也想好好休息一番了。
E: We can leave the rest to the Ten-Lords Commission from here... Even I feel like I need a rest.

C: 没有一面是真的！
E: Not a single one is the real thing!

C: 你觉得藿藿性格怎么样？
E: What do you think about Huohuo's personality?

C: 人各有秉性，担任判官不同于从军上阵，要的不只是一腔血勇。
E: Everyone is different. A judge is not a soldier, and they need more than just courage.

C: 年轻真好啊。看到您，我就想起了我还是学生的那段岁月——作为匹诺康尼本地人，那时的我连一句话都不敢多说…一步都不敢走错。
E: It's nice being young. Seeing you reminds me of the times when I was still a student. Back then, as a native of Penacony, I dared not utter a wrong word more... nor take a wrong step.

C: （诶，这是什么东西？）
E: (Hmm, what's this?)

C: 感谢您的好心。
E: Thank you for your kindness.

C: 等你上台演绎这首歌的那天，你的梦想一定会和匹诺康尼的十二时分交相辉映…想想就觉得了不起！
E: Wait till you're performing this song on the stage. Your dream will shine as bright as Penacony's Twelve Hours... I'm impressed just thinking about it!

C: 给你五个系统时的期限——业绩再上不去，你就回家吧。
E: I'll give you a deadline of five system hours — if you can't get your performance up to par by the end of it, just go home.

C: 专辑？
E: A record?

C: 柯柯娜转过头去，直面远方的一片虚空。你似乎还能看到她微微上扬的嘴角。
E: Cocona turns back, facing the curtain of void in the distance. You think you can see the corners of her mouth curl slightly.

C: 你松开了手。
E: You release her.

C: 「只是那来自未来的玫瑰，还未盛放……」
E: "But that rose from future has yet to bloom..."

C: 有辨识度，也很动听。
E: It's iconic and melodious.

C: 眼前的男人没有注意到你的存在。这不怪他——你的眼神不由自主地顺着他雕塑般分明的下颌线漫游，而后浸溺在他如涓流般温润的眉目余光中。你差一点也忘记了自我。
E: The man before you has not noticed your presence. You do not blame him — You find your eyes tracing his chiseled jawline and becoming immersed in the glow of his residual radiance. You almost lose yourself.

C: 果然，像迪恩先生这么完美的人，连「纯美」都舍不得让他轻易离开吧？
E: I would expect no less, even the Beauty could not allow someone as perfect as Mr. Dean to just leave us that easily?

C: 和家族的人聊聊吧。
E: I'll try talking with The Family.

C: 至少现在，我还能看、能听、能感知到周身的事物…谁又知道在现实中我的身体经受了什么样的异变呢？
E: At least now, I can see, hear and sense the world around me... Who knows what kind of changes my body has undergone in reality?

C: 你找到它了——<unbreak>1007</unbreak>号客房，莱斯利•迪恩口中的房间。
E: You've found it... Room <unbreak>1007</unbreak>, the room that Lesley Dean mentioned.

C: 在这个故事里，「我」不过是一个替代者；必须让哈里重新成为罗伯特心中的那颗明星。
E: In this story, "I" am no more than a scapegoat. We have to allow Harry to become Robert's star once more.

C: 真是狂热。
E: That's insane.

C: 谁说不是呢，{NICKNAME}{F#小姐}{M#先生}。
E: That they are, {F#Ms.}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME}.

C: 是芙洛拉帮你看清的吗？
E: Was it Flora that helped you realize this?

C: 没问题。
E: No problem.

C: 虽然是垃圾桶，但这个形象莫名地给我一种英勇无畏的感觉，在梦里反倒有一种强烈的个人风格，这很难得。
E: A trashcan might be unorthodox, but that visual imbues an inexplicable sense of heroic staunchness in me — an intense personal style that stands out in a dream. This is a rare feeling.

C: 稍等，我捣鼓下这玩意……
E: Hang on, let me figure out this thing...

C: 涂装和更换船名的事项我跟大家说了，受到大家的一致好评。
E: I've informed everyone about the change of the paint and the airship's name. They are all singing praises.

C: 既然是船长室，就该放您的画像，这样一来，别人来跟您谈事，你就往沙发上一坐，背后是您的画像，这样才够威严。
E: Since it's the captain's cabin, your portrait should be hanging there. That way, when people come in for discussions, you'll be sitting on the sofa, with your painting behind you, that'll show em' who's boss!

C: 你的雕像被放置在长廊的中心位置，仿佛是船上的守护神，默默注视着过往的船员和客人，传递着一种无形的力量。
E: Your statue is placed at the central location of the long gallery, like a guardian of the ship, silently watching over the passing crew and guests, radiating an unseen strength.

C: 呃…您教训的是，艾弗法先生。
E: Err... Yes, you're right, Mr. Alfalfa.

C: （让他们都去享受一天的假期吧！）
E: (Let them all enjoy a day off work!)

C: （不能再拖延了…工作时间到了！）
E: (No more delays... Time to work!)

C: …咿、咿呀！{NICKNAME}、是{NICKNAME}吗？！
E: ...Yikes! {NICKNAME}? Is that {NICKNAME}!?

C: 不如去仙舟联盟看看。
E: You can visit the Xianzhou Alliance.

C: 我知道了，弗雷迪，谢谢提醒。
E: Got it. Thanks for reminding me, Freddy.

C: 我愿终止生长！
E: I'm willing to cease my growth!

C: …这也太恶毒了吧！我才不到两百岁，还能长个呢！
E: ...That's way too vicious! I'm less than <unbreak>200</unbreak> years old! I can still grow taller!

C: …什么神王啊领袖的，你们都被这家伙忽悠瘸了吧？
E: ...Aeon? Leader? I guess you guys have been taken for a ride by this dude.

C: 怕什么？简单得很，一学就会。
E: Don't worry! It's super easy, you'll pick it up in no time.

C: 唉，为了大家好，我们还是换一个话题吧。
E: *sigh* For everyone's well-being, we'd better change the topic.

C: 我才疏学浅，一直以来我都觉得自己还没有足够的资历去面对这份手稿。
E: I am not very learned, and I've always felt intimidated and under-qualified to face this manuscript.

C: 唉，我要是工作时心情低落，就会选个开阔的地方散散心。
E: *sigh* If I'm in low spirits at work, I'll simply pick out a wide open space to take a wee stroll.

C: 要不怎么说，我是个不争气的学生啊……
E: Why else would I say I'm a failure as a student...

C: 在你出现之前，留在工造司是一条孤独又难以为继的道路；有了你之后，他就能继续坚持下去了。你是他的徒弟，也是他漫漫长路上的朋友。
E: Before you showed up, staying at the Artisanship Commission was a lonely and unsustainable path. But with you, he could keep on with his work. You were his apprentice and his friend along that long road.

C: …很遗憾，我没有，我师傅大概也没有。
E: ...Unfortunately, I don't. And I don't think my master does, either.

C: 看不懂你还要造它？
E: You sure you wanna make it when you can't understand it?

C: 嘶…我心底毫无波动，甚至还有点想笑？我想想，你该这么骂我……
E: Tsk... It does nothing to me. In fact, I even have an urge to laugh! Well, I think you should say something like this...

C: 我来看你设计顺利不顺利。
E: I'm here to see how you are faring.

C: 你是打算让我修理玉兆设备吧。
E: You need my help to fix the jade abacus, don't you?

C: 将凭依之物准备妥当。
E: Please prepare the body needed for Master Ryan to inhabit.

C: 你去吧，希儿。别太着急了…我可不想看到你们吵架。
E: If you must, Seele. Try not to worry... I don't want to see you two fighting.

C: 不…不可能！{F#姐们}{M#哥们}，这你得信我，我对住在这附近的人可是再熟不过了。
E: T—Trust me! I know the people here — it's extremely unlikely.

C: 老实说，这点事…我感觉你一个人也能搞定。
E: To be honest, I think you could've handled it yourself.

C: 这么一想，咱们「开拓之旅」就要变成了到处吃吃喝喝玩玩的「快落之旅」。
E: Why not think about it this way. Our trailblazing expeditions are turning into "blast expeditions," where we eat, drink, and play wherever we go.

C: {NICKNAME}，别太想我们喔。要是看到什么有趣的古兽化石，我会带上几块作为伴手礼送给你的。
E: Don't miss us too much, {NICKNAME}. If I stumble upon some cool Leviathan fossils, I'll bring a few back as souvenirs for you.

C: 而且瓦尔特先生说的没错，建木灾异刚刚平息，无论是长生种还是短生种都对灾难心有余悸。景元选在此时举办演武仪典，显然是为了对外彰显罗浮的安定。
E: Plus, Mr. Yang is right. The Ambrosial Arbor Crisis just ended, and both the long-life and short-life species are still feeling uneasy. And that's why Jing Yuan wants to organize the Wardance, to show that the Xianzhou Luofu is stable and safe.

C: 那你可问对人了！
E: You've come to the right people!

C: 拜见怀炎将军。
E: It's an honor to meet you, General Huaiyan.

C: 正是。丹恒，三月七，还有{NICKNAME}…若无这几位朋友力挽狂澜，罗浮怕不能轻松渡过此劫。
E: Indeed. There's Dan Heng, March 7th, and {NICKNAME}... Without their help, I'm afraid the Luofu might not have easily overcome this crisis.

C: 怀炎将军言重了。
E: You needn't apologize, General Huaiyan.

C: 与此同时，司辰宫外…
E: In the meantime, outside the Palace of Astrum...

C: 自从军之日开始，我就立下誓愿，余生要成为仙舟的锋镝，射向丰饶孽物。
E: Upon starting my military career, I made a pledge that the rest of my life would be dedicated to being the Xianzhou's spearhead, hunting down the Abominations of Abundance till the end of my days.

C: 那咱们连夜打包走人？
E: Perhaps we should just pack up and leave tonight?

C: 你该不会想一个人偷偷教她吧？太卑鄙啦！
E: Wait, were you trying to teach her in secret? That's sneaky!

C: 洞天昼夜流转，演武仪典召开的时间不知不觉悄然临近。
E: Days and nights fly by in the delve, as the Wardance fast approaches.

C: 被选为演武仪典的守擂者时，我也曾问过将军，云骑上阵杀敌是本分，为何还要在擂台上挥剑取悦观众？
E: When I was appointed as the ringmaster for the Wardance, I asked the general: "We Cloud Knights are supposed to charge into the fray and slay enemies. Why do we have to swing swords in a ring just to please an audience?"

C: 椒丘先生想去观赏「竞锋舰」？好啊！云璃和三月小姐也一定没见过。这样吧，我带各位去见识见识。
E: You want to see the Skysplitter ship where the Wardance will be held? Let's go! I bet Yunli and Miss March haven't seen it either, right? Well then, I'll give you all a tour.

C: 以我身为医士的专业眼光来看，两位的生命力充沛健旺，气息流转如猛火烈风。这场比斗…一定好看的很。
E: Judging from my professional perspective as a healer, both of you possess remarkable vitality, your energies flow like raging fires and mighty gales. The upcoming fight... will definitely be impressive.

C: 哼，临阵磨枪，一点儿用场也派不上。
E: Hmph, you know cramming before a fight never works out.

C: 说是检修，但看起来他们似乎并不知道怎么摆弄那条星槎制造的流水线？
E: They said they were doing an overhaul, but it looked like they had no idea how to operate the starskiff production line, right?

C: 口口声声计划计划，这些人到底是从哪儿来的？他们想在仙舟上干什么？
E: They're keep talking about their "plans," but where did they come from? And what do they want to do on the Xianzhou?

C: 这些家伙怎么又折回来了？快退后！
E: Why are they coming back? Quickly, retreat!

C: 步离人？！
E: Borisin!?

C: 这不是简单换上仙舟的服装，剃去须发的伪装。这几个步离人不知用了什么手法，将自己的模样变得与狐人毫无二致。
E: It's not just a simple disguise of wearing our clothing and shaving their whiskers. They're somehow able to alter their appearance to be indistinguishable from foxians.

C: 我曾见过丹枢本人
E: I've personally met Dan Shu.

C: 踏进去，里面便是幽囚狱？
E: Once I step through that door, I'll be inside the prison?

C: 不过判官之间流传，有短生种犯人试图逃脱，却不慎坠下…当我们寻到他时，他已是个垂垂老者了……
E: But there's a legend among us judges that a short-life prisoner once tried to escape but ended up falling into the depths... and when we found him at the bottom, he was already an old man on the brink of death...

C: 听闻阳世即将召开演武仪典。寒鸦犹记得自己小时候曾与姐姐观赏过其中一场剑斗。
E: I heard the Wardance is about to be held in the mortal world. I remember watching a sword duel at the Wardance with my sister when we were young.

C: {NICKNAME}，这一回演武仪典，星槎海的人流多吗？
E: Are there a lot of people in Starskiff Haven due to the Wardance, {NICKNAME}?

C: 貊泽，找机会离开。
E: Leave if you can, Moze.

C: 姐姐，你要坚持住啊！
E: Hang in there, sister!

C: 寒…寒……
E: Han... Han...

C: 那我也豁出去了。
E: Well, then I'll give it my all.

C: 快到了！前方不远处就是门关！
E: We're almost there! The gate is just ahead!

C: 闭嘴，末度！至于你，奴隶…从现在起，你必须寸步不离地跟在我身边。我让你开口，你才能开口；我让你迈步，你才能迈步。否则我会将你从头到尾，寸寸剐碎。你明白吗？
E: Silence, Mok Tok! And you, slave... From now on, you'll stay by my side. You'll only speak and move when I allow you to. Otherwise, I'll dismember you, from head to tail, inch by inch. Got it?

C: 呃，虽然以眼下的情况不知道该不该说「太好了」三个字…但{NICKNAME}和丹恒没事，我就放心了。
E: Um, I know I shouldn't use the word "great" given the current situation... but I'm relieved that {NICKNAME} and Dan Heng are safe.

C: 地衡司就在不远处，我这还有生意要做，要不您就自己去跑一趟吧！
E: The Realm-Keeping Commission? It's right up ahead. Look, I've got a business to run, so why don't you go there yourself?

C: （看来拖延时间没有意义，该是去面对呼雷的时候了。让我看看他到底想玩什么把戏……）
E: (Stalling won't help... It's time to confront Hoolay and see what tricks he's up to...)

C: 封锁倒也没封锁…只是我在这儿排查一个古怪的问题。
E: No, not at all... Actually, I'm here to address a peculiar issue.

C: 可恶，久闻彦卿骁卫的大名，来这儿也就是想见见他，和他切磋一下。
E: Argh! I came here because I wanted to meet the great Lieutenant Yanqing I've heard so much about and finally cross blades with him myself!

C: 汪汪汪汪汪汪汪。
E: Woof woof woof woof, woof woof woof.

C: （这就是可疑的星槎？乘船的人呢……）
E: (So, this is the suspicious starskiff? Where did the passengers go...?)

C: 没时间解释了，「演武仪典」应该已经开始了！如果我猜的没错，在步离人登舰之后，他们极有可能在仪典上大肆杀戮。
E: There's no time to talk about this. The Wardance has already started! If my guess is correct, the borisin will most likely use the ceremony to begin their slaughter.

C: 不久之前…
E: Not long ago...

C: 我会用你的力量压垮你！
E: I will crush you with your own strength!

C: 你根本不配成为我的对手。
E: You were never a match for me.

C: 不能去现实里叫他吗？
E: Can't you return to reality to get him?

C: 怎么说呢…虽然不知道她为什么自称「皇帝」，但她确实是个「好人」。
E: How do I put this... Although I don't know why she calls herself "Emperor," she's definitely a good person.

C: 哈哈，可能是吧。朕猜想，比起寻人，你大概更擅长硬碰硬的差事。
E: Haha, perhaps. I'm guessing that, instead of searching for missing people, you're more suitable for jobs that require your fists.

C: 还有别的事。
E: Nah, I've got better stuff to do.

C: 可我听说皇帝驾崩了。
E: But I heard that the crown has fallen.

C: 灰骑士，朕最信任的人……
E: Gray Knight, my most trusted one...

C: 已经不止一位臣民给朕讲过这些事了。朕已经知悉了！
E: More than one subject has brought this issue up to me. I am fully aware!

C: 我叫查德威克。能告诉我你的名字吗，孩子？
E: My name is Chadwick. May I have yours?

C: 原地等待了许久之后，守在查德威克身边的猎犬成员终于离开了……
E: After a long wait, the Bloodhound Family Member guarding Chadwick finally leave...

C: 毫无疑问，「钟表把戏」成功了…但查德威克的表情没有丝毫波动。
E: Without a doubt, the Clockwork is successful... However, Chadwick's expression remains unchanged.

C: 你愿意为了一位萍水相逢的老人伸出援手吗，孩子？哪怕你根本不知道他是个什么样的人？
E: Would you be willing to lend a hand to an elderly man you barely know?

C: 他还活着，但被夺去了记忆。
E: He's alive, but his memory has been stripped away.

C: 恐怕只有一种方式能解开眼下的谜团。
E: I'm afraid there's only one way to unravel the mystery.

C: 在那之前，希望你能从查德威克那里了解到事件的全貌——也包括在他失联之后发生的事。
E: Until then, I hope you'll learn the full story from Chadwick, including matters that happened before he went missing.

C: 咦？！但、但是……
E: Eh!? B—But...

C: 不按起爆按钮。
E: Do not press the button.

C: 可惜咱们没机会一起共事了。听螺丝和那个小鬼说的，你这辈子可真是遭了不少罪——那就睡个好觉吧，博士。
E: It's a shame we never had the chance to work together. From what I've heard from Screwy and that troublemaker, you've had your share of hardships in your lifetime. Rest in peace, Doc.

C: …谁？是谁？！你们、你们刚才听见那个声音了吗？
E: ...Who? Who is it!? D—Did you all hear that voice just now?

C: 他对你说什么了？
E: What did he say to you?

C: 祝你好梦，{NICKNAME}{F#女士}{M#先生}。
E: May you have a nice dream, {F#Madam}{M#Sir} {NICKNAME}.

C: …哼，我会再提醒您的。哎，现在的筑梦师已经是一代不如一代了……
E: ...Hmph, I'll be sure to remind you. Bah, the current generation of Dreamweavers is always more lacking than the last...

C: 咳咳——迷因的数量还在增多，他们的增援马上就会过来……
E: *cough* The memes' numbers are increasing. Their reinforcements should be here any minute...

C: 折纸筑梦师们已经完成了他们的承诺，但…我不能接受没有他们的梦境。
E: The Origami Dreamweavers have fulfilled their promise, but... I cannot accept a Dreamscape without them.

C: 你还有其他的折纸小鸟。
E: You still have the other origami birds.

C: 不要被梦境操控！
E: Don't be controlled by the Dreamscape!

C: 令人倍感亲切的*啾啾*声，叫声来自头顶的星空——四只圆滚滚的鸟从天而降，落在湛蓝爵士身边。
E: A familiar tweeting sound comes from the starry sky above — four chubby birds descend from the sky and land beside Dr. Blues.

C: 后到场的朋友们别担心吃不着瓜，我这就把来龙去脉再讲一遍……
E: Those who have just arrived, worry not, for I shall reiterate the story once more...

C: 你又是哪根葱？
E: And who're you?

C: 哎呀，老先生…多谢，多谢……
E: Ah, Mister... Thank you so much...

C: 所以，你到底是谁？
E: So, who exactly are you?

C: 之前来到圣城的外邦人数量不多，元老院就同意他们按批次进城。没想到这帮家伙…都太能干了。他们找工作只有两个要求，包吃、包住，连工钱都不需要付。
E: There weren't many outlanders who came to the holy city in the past, so the Council of Elders agreed to let them enter in batches. But who would've thought that these ruffians... were so exceptional. They had only two conditions while looking for a job: Food and lodging. You didn't even have to pay for their work.

C: 乖，再吃一口就好。下次我们不吃硬面包了，我保证……
E: Be a good girl and have one more bite. We won't have to eat hard bread next time, I promise...

C: 哟，欢迎光临维比娅的小店。能有您这样的英雄眷顾，我这摊位都蓬荜生辉了。
E: Ooh, welcome to Vibia's little shop. It's a great honor for a hero such as you to be gracing my humble store.

C: 你交出了那几个竹篮，里面的食物虽不算珍馐，却也是这些人最需要的。
E: You hand over the baskets. The food inside isn't exactly delicacies, but they are just what these people need.

C: 曾有贤者说，「想要别人善待你，你得先善待别人。」这话我觉得很受用。
E: A sage once said: "If you want someone to be kind to you, you must first be kind to others." I think this is most appropriate here.

C: 作为罪人，我申请先对诸位公民说几句话。
E: As the sinner, I request to say a few words to everyone present.

C: {F#好丫头}{M#好小子}，我就知道你是深明大义之人。
E: {F#Lass}{M#Lad}, I knew you were a righteous character.

C: …什么歪理？他能凭本事偷药，我们也能凭本事处死他啊。
E: ...What rubbish reasoning is this? If he wielded his ability to steal medicine, it is within our ability to sentence him to death.

C: …二位，有关黄金裔和泰坦的话题未免太过敏感，还是别再提及为好……
E: ...Both parties, subjects regarding the Chrysos Heirs and Titans may be too sensitive to discuss. It would be best not to pursue this line of reasoning...

C: 公民们动容了——善行远比善心更加珍贵，人们用掌声表达了对这位学者的钦佩。
E: The citizens are deeply moved — good deeds are more precious than good intentions. They express their admiration for the scholar with applause.

C: 啊？你在说什么？
E: Huh? What are you saying?

C: 原来如此，感谢阿格莱雅老师的指点…啊，来客人了！
E: I see. Thank you for your guidance, knowledgeable Aglaea... Ah, a customer!

C: 我们现在能做的，也只有快点了解她的内心，帮她找到想要见到的人了。
E: All we can do for now is try to understand what she wants and help her meet the person she longs for.

C: 我是来找人的。
E: I'm here to see someone.

C: 我是来看戏的。
E: I'm here to watch the show.

C: 你们…竟然敢在悬锋城中侮辱尼卡多利——守卫！有闯入者……
E: You... You dare insult Nikador within the walls of Castrum Kremnos... Guards! There is an intruder...

C: 我先切切你的。
E: Not if I slice yours off first.

C: 唉，这姑娘…恩人，麻烦你看着她点，别被戍卫当成敌人给敲碎了。
E: Ah, that girl... My savior, could you keep an eye on her? Please do not allow the guards to mistake her for an enemy and reduce her to rubble.

C: 呵，这儿的人都在赞颂墨涅塔的痴情，原来只是个一厢情愿的愚神。
E: Hah. The people here praise Mnestia for their unconditional love. Turns out they are no more than a foolish deity caught in a one-sided infatuation.

C: 但在这圣城之中，云石天宫的泉水涤去了沙与血，黎明云崖上的歌声盖过了号角声。站在无云遮蔽的天空下，我反倒是什么也看不清了。
E: But in this holy city, the spring water of Marmoreal Palace has washed clean all the blood and sand. The song of Dawncloud silences the horns. Standing under a clear sky, I instead find that I can see nothing at all.

C: 姑娘，等等——
E: Miss, wait...

C: 应该到外面去了。
E: I think she went outside.

C: 是不是又要我帮忙了？
E: Do you need my help again?

C: 姑娘，这是怎么回事？
E: Girl, what is the meaning of this?

C: 小心！
E: Look out!

C: 伙伴…这里的记忆开始变淡了，后面是雕像小姐不知晓的事情，我们已经没法再探寻了……
E: Partner... The memory here is starting to fade. The statue lady doesn't know what happens after this, so we cannot investigate any further...

C: 咦？这里的剑已经归位了…估计是那两个笨家伙没注意吧。
E: Huh? The sword here is back in its place... I'm guessing those two idiots didn't even notice it.

C: 我汗毛立起来了。
E: I've gotten goosebumps.

C: 夫人，您还能养育她多久呢？黑潮正在吞没磐岩之脊的大地，麦田被侵蚀，土壤被淹没，您要怎样抵抗这场饥荒？
E: Madam, how long can you keep raising her? The black tide swallows the lands of the Pillar of Stone as we speak. Wheat fields are corroded, and the soil is flooded. How will you withstand this famine?

C: 未来根本就不存在，只能看到一片漆黑的世界，废墟，死亡，疯狂的泰坦和已死的泰坦。
E: The future doesn't even exist. All I can see is a pitch-black world. Ruin, death, the maddened Titan, and other dead Titans.

C: 如果我什么都改变不了，为什么要让我看到这些？难道只是想要让更多的人和你一同沉沦在绝望里吗？
E: If I can't change anything, why do you let me see these? Do you want even more people to wallow in despair like you?

C: 那孩子的身体状况不太乐观，尽快找医生去给她看看为好。
E: The child's health is deteriorating. Please find a doctor for her as soon as possible.

C: 至于和各个星球接洽的部分，就交给无名客了。
E: As for liaising with the various planets, we'll leave that to the Nameless.

C: 呜哇~传说、星系、大怪兽…好酷！
E: Wowza~ Legends, galaxies, giant monsters... so cool!

C: 你转述了《如我所书》背后的故事，和翁法罗斯的现状…
E: You recounted the story behind As I've Written, and the current state of the Amphoreus...

C: 风割旌旗，雨打残军。遍原哀鸿，但闻狮啸。你道这万敌是何许人也？其乃悬锋王储，为父不容，数载冥海沉浮，炼就不坏之身，蒙千面童姥所召，遂投身逐火大业。
E: The wind tore through the banners, and rain beat down upon the remnants of the army. Across the plain rose cries of sorrow, yet only the roar of the lion was heard. And you ask: What manner of man was this Mydei? He was the crown prince of Kremnos, cast off by his father, drifting for years upon the Sea of Souls, where he forged an indestructible body. Summoned by the Thousand-Faced Matriarch, he threw himself into the great cause of Flame-Chase.

C: 空归去，依然稻实垂穗、炊烟斜阳。又近黄昏。
E: Returning in vain, he found yet again the heavy heads of ripened grain, the cooking smoke curling beneath the slanting sun. And dusk was near once more.

C: 你转述了《如我所书》背后的故事，和翁法罗斯的现状…
E: You recounted the story behind As I've Written, and the current state of the Amphoreus...

C: 我念书那会儿，选修过「边缘星球史学」。第一堂课，老师就告诫我们：不要当真。
E: I took an elective called "History of Frontier Planets" back in my student days. The professor warned us on the first day not to take everything at face value.

C: 新的翁法罗斯要多久才能诞生？
E: How long until a new Amphoreus is born?

C: 那我先挂了，还有许多事要处理呢——黑塔，已下线。
E: Then I'll disconnect for now. Got lots of stuff to deal with. Herta, signing off.

C: 没错。我在一趟旅途中认识了许多同行者，留下了弥足珍贵的回忆……
E: That's right. During my journey, I met many fellow pathstriders and made precious memories...

C: 「开拓」不只是向前迈步，也同样是一份连结诸界的责任。经此一站，你似乎对阿基维利启程的信念有了更多理解。
E: "Trailblaze" isn't just about moving forward, it's also the responsibility of connecting worlds. After this stop, you seem to better understand the conviction behind Akivili's departure.

C: 回家，回来，归来，呜呜～团圆，团结，团建，呜呜～
E: Home, back, here, wooo... Together, unity, team building, wooo...

C: 你大爷还是你大爷。
E: Wow, that's so cool.

C: 好再来！
E: Okay, laters!

C: 好的，笔记已记录。
E: Got it, note recorded.

C: 你有什么兴趣爱好吗？
E: Do you have any hobbies?

C: 并没有呢。是老师教会了我，用分数来衡量人生的价值。有了这么精确的目标，我感觉自己的生活也充实了起来。
E: Not at all. {M#Mister}{F#Miss}, you taught me to use scores to measure the value of life. With such a precise goal, I feel my life has been enriched.

C: 他之前做的实验失败了，我看他一直很自责，说不定是精神上受了点刺激才会胡思乱想。
E: His previous experiment failed, and I think he's been blaming himself ever since. Maybe he got rather traumatized and got delusional.

C: 最后一次重申！这不是我虚构的事情，这是其他科员的真实故事！
E: For the last time, this isn't a story I wrote! This is something that happened to another researcher!

C: 这个我可以告诉你详细的位置，故事里也是有伏笔的。因为终端的功能完善，所以我可以清晰地定位。嘿嘿，我严谨吧？
E: I can tell you exactly where it is, and there's foreshadowing in the story too. Since the terminal's functions were all intact, I could locate that place precisely. Hehe, aren't I meticulous?

C: （这东西竟然是件奇物，赶紧记下来回去告诉阿德勒吧。）
E: (So, this is actually a Curio. Let's note this down and tell Adler.)

C: 目前已经有人说自己听到过，没过多久这人就晋升为某个科室的技术骨干！！
E: Someone had claimed to have heard it, and soon got promoted to technical leader in their department!

C: 年轻就是要奋斗！
E: Youth is all about working hard!

C: 小孩子才做选择…
E: Why have to choose?

C: （将拍好的照片交给她）
E: (Give her the photos.)

C: 年轻人的脑子转速就是快，那我就听你的！这次的事情谢谢你啦！你也可以考虑换个发色试试哦。
E: Young people do think fast. I'll defer to you on this! Thank you. You can try a different hair color yourself, you know.

C: …是粪便。乍一看，其中包含了动物毛发、骨头碎片、以及果实残块。是杂食动物。
E: ...Feces. At first glance, it contains animal fur, bone fragments, and digested fruits. The animal must be an omnivore.

C: 不对…是令人绝望！
E: No... devastating!

C: 那个…接下来聊聊别的吧，你懂作战吗？我虽然服了二十多年役，但是一次前线都没上过，武器也用的不怎么顺手。
E: Then... Let's talk about something else, do you know how to fight? Although I have served for more than <unbreak>20</unbreak> years, I have never been on the front line once, and I am not very good at using weapons.

C: 别出声！哦，你没出声…那你也不要突然出现！给我思路都打断了！
E: Shhh! Oh, you didn't say anything... Then don't just show up like that and break my train of thought!

C: 星空是我的学校…
E: The sky is my alma mater...

C: 年轻人，有缘再见吧。
E: Until we meet again, youngster.

C: 让我看看…质数和自然数哪个比较多…是这道题对吧？正确答案是…咳，稍等……
E: Let me see then... prime numbers or natural ones, which are there more of... This is the first question, right? The right answer is... ahem, hang on a sec...

C: <unbreak>18000</unbreak>。
E: Eighteen thousand.

C: 您今天特地前来，是有什么事务需要教育部协助吗？
E: For what purpose have you come today? What task requires the support of the Ministry of Education?

C: 能帮上您的忙是教育部的荣幸。什么时候您又想活动活动脑筋了，欢迎再来找我。
E: It's an honor for the Ministry of Education to serve you. When you want to exercise your brain, please come again.

C: 您是不是漏读了题面的信息？这嘈杂的环境确实不适合深度思考。我相信以您的聪明才智，只要有足够的时间，一定能给出正确答案……
E: Did you miss all the info in the question? It really is too noisy in here for cognitive testing. I'm sure with your wits, it's only a matter of time before you come up with the right answer...

C: 不过…只靠这些显然还不够……我记得，上次那位瓦丝卡小姐说，塔米拉和她对小说的品味不一致…那么也许，也许她喜欢什么样的小说，也能够展现出她的部分灵魂。
E: But... it's obviously not enough... I remember Miss Vaska was saying that Tamila and her have different tastes in novels... then, maybe her taste in fiction can showcase a little more of her soul?

C: 啊，真对不起~小女子又开始自说自话了，希望没有让你困惑~
E: Ah, sorry~ I was talking to myself again. I didn't mean to confuse you~

C: 你为小女子带来的情报虽然都很重要，但毕竟还是二手信息…等传到小女子耳朵里，那都成了三手信息啦~
E: All this intel you've brought me is fantastic, but it's still second-hand info... and by the time it reaches me, it's already third-hand...

C: 没什么，歌德先生，这同样很好。请给我来一杯下午茶吧。
E: It's really nothing, Mr. Goethe. This is fine as well. I'll have a cup of tea, please.

C: 哦，是你。看来这世上还是好心人多…我放心了。
E: Oh, it's you. Seems like there are still plenty of good people in this world... That's good.

C: 我经常在广场上一站就是一天，有时候很晚才回去。结果，我家女儿就不乐意了，非说我不愿意陪她玩；其他家人也怀疑我在外面做些不三不四的事……
E: Sometimes I stay out in the Plaza all day and only get home late at night. My daughter got upset and said I don't want to play with her, and my family also thinks I'm doing some shady business out here...

C: 我要「风味红肠拼盘」。
E: I want a Special Sausage Platter.

C: 拉雯妮在老歌德处买了单……
E: Lavonne settled the bill with Old Goethe...

C: 「裂界」？虽然不知道你在说什么，但我会注意的。谢谢你啊，年轻人。
E: Fragmentum? I don't know what you're talking about, but I'll be careful. Thank you, kid.

C: 不客气，你多保重。
E: You're welcome. Please take care.

C: 啊啊…不好意思，请问你能帮我修理一下这个屏障发生器吗？
E: Ahh... Excuse me, could you help me fix this Barrier Generator?

C: 前段时间，我抓住了不少「放生帮」放生的现行，他们好像已经盯上我了。我去海岸巡逻期间，他们假装老实；一旦我该休息了……
E: Recently, I caught many of them red-handed during their acts of "liberation," and I think they have me on their radar. They have been on their best behavior when I'm patrolling the coast. Once I take a break, however...

C: 他们又开始放生了。
E: They go back to their old ways again.

C: 不过，我也建议你不必抱太大希望。鳞渊境存在着特殊的洞天技术，别说是落难者，就连我们也无法前往古海深处，这漂流瓶造假的可能性极高。
E: Still, please don't expect too much from this operation. Due to the special technologies in Scalegorge Waterscape delve, not even we can reach the depths, let alone the castaway. This makes me highly suspect that this letter is a fake.

C: 你们休想阻止我！
E: People like you won't stop me!

C: （看来海滩也没有其他情况了，巡逻就到此结束吧。）
E: (It seems there is nothing else out of the ordinary happening along the beach. I'll end my patrol here.)

C: 只要你不断挣钱，你会有花不完的钱。
E: As long as you keep earning it, you will never run out of money.

C: 味道不错，喝完后会莫名昏睡…
E: It tastes good, but somehow it makes me feel drowsy...

C: 「忘情茶」啊，立意深远，讲究一个太上忘情的物理体验。我将这个玄而又玄的哲学概念与「烈焰浓茶」结合，是不是很酷？
E: Unsen-tea-mental Tea — sounds really profound, right? The name emphasizes an esoteric philosophical concept and fits perfectly with the taste of my Flaming Potent Tea. That's a pretty cool idea, isn't it?

C: 听起来有点像你刚才的症状…这么说来，是因为「烈焰浓茶」太「燃」了，看来我得重新调整下配比了。
E: Perhaps that's why you acted weird... Looks like the Flaming Potent Tea was a bit too flaming and potent. I'll have to adjust the recipe.

C: 尽管宇宙中的人们彼此生活的环境千差万别，但他们对自然风光的审美却出人意料地一致——甚至在翁法罗斯这个与外部几无瓜葛的世界，人们喜爱的也是流水、假山、绿植……
E: Even if the lives of people dwelling in the universe are light-years apart, their aesthetics towards nature's sights are surprisingly similar — even on a secluded world like Amphoreus, severed from external communications, its people still favor flowing water, faux mountains, and verdant flora...

C: 旧日岗哨
E: Former Watchtower

C: 一望无际的楼梯
E: Infinity Stairway

C: …不知道这是否和大地兽能够如此强壮有关。
E: ...I wonder if this is the reason for a dromas' toughness.

C: 怎么还真是盆栽？
E: It actually tastes like a potted plant?

C: 在这片创世涡心，你与黄金裔们闹出误会、又解开了误会。你有想过离开这颗星球，却最终获得一位泰坦的力量，和黄金裔们站在了同一阵线。
E: Inside this Vortex of Genesis, you and the Chrysos Heirs came to a misunderstanding that you were fortunately able to resolve. Though you considered leaving this planet, you ended up gaining the power of a Titan and standing alongside the Chrysos Heirs in battle.

C: 欧洛尼斯的神像默然。
E: Oronyx's statue stands quietly.

C: 在树下缔结美满的姻缘，庆祝生命的降生。
E: People form joyful unions under the tree and celebrate the birth of life.

C: 「永恒之城」奥赫玛
E: Okhema, the Eternal City

C: 那么您所纺织的明日，这些能拥有一席之地吗？
E: So, will these things have a place in the tomorrow that you weave?

C: 眼下只是一瞬的「悲观」，又或一瞬的「残忍」。
E: What you are seeing is just a moment of "pessimism," or perhaps a moment of "ruthlessness."

C: 我需要你，马上想办法离开树庭，前往奥赫玛求援。树庭不知能否度过劫难，若我们能撑到援兵前来则万事大吉。若不能……
E: I need you to find a way to leave the Grove immediately and head to Okhema to request aid. I do not know if the Grove can withstand this threat. If we can just hold out until reinforcements arrive, then all will be well. If not...

C: 忽然之间，周遭的一切都安静了下来，世界很近，却又好像离你很远。
E: Suddenly, everything around you goes silent. The world feels so close, yet it's as if it's miles away.

C: 浓雾吞去星光，你感到一阵晕眩。
E: The dense mist swallows the starlight, and dizziness overtakes you.

C: 好消息是，英杰们追求的逐火并非一纸空谈。但…倘若前世的黄金裔们已经完成了再创万物的旅途，那此世的灾厄又是因何而生？
E: The good news is, the heroes' pursuit of Flame-Chase is no mere myth. But... if the Chrysos Heirs of the past have already completed their journey to recreate all things, then what has brought about the calamity of this age?

C: 预言…解封……
E: Prophecy... unsealing...

C: o((•'ω´• )っ「没错——力大豹飞，才是碰碰大作战的浪漫啊！」)∋
E: o((•'ω´• )っ "That's right — With enough power, you can make a seal fly! That's the beauty of the Slammers Fight!" )∋

C: 我还能用什么献给你？
E: What else can I offer you?

C: 你听到某种朦胧不清的响动，像是树木抽枝绽叶、花苞盛放的声音。年纪最大的祭司转过头，他浑浊的目光穿越迷雾与时空，定定地望着你。
E: You hear a vague, indistinct sound, like the sound of branches and leaves growing and flower buds blooming. The eldest priest turns his head. His murky gaze pierces through fog and time, and fixes upon you.

C: 这木马曾是由雅努萨波利斯派遣至此的灵器，于雅努斯所掌管，如今虽然破败，却还留有远距离输送的权能……
E: This wooden horse was once a divine instrument sent by Janusopolis under Janus' rule. Though it's now in ruins, it still has the power to send things across long distances...

C: 大工匠，白厄大人先前委托我们前去贵客们的私人浴宫待命，无奈我们一直抽不开身。
E: Grand Craftsman, Lord Phainon had tasked us with waiting for further instructions at the guests' private bath chamber, but we still haven't had the time to carry out that order.

C: 救赎不过是愚不可及的空想。
E: Redemption is but a dream foolish beyond reach.

C: 这些元件里面传出了嘀嗒声，该不会——虽然可能性不大，但还是希望它别炸。
E: A ticking sound emerges from within the components. Could it be...? Though unlikely, you still hope it doesn't explode.

C: 可惜大地兽已经被巡街的队伍征用，不会再回应你的呼唤。
E: Too bad the dromas has already been requisitioned by the patrols. It won't answer you again.

C: 哼，能和神驹对话可是种荣耀。要不是背井离乡，我本该向你收取报酬的…算了，你说吧。
E: Hmph. Consider yourself lucky — talking to a divine foal is an honor. If I hadn't left my hometown, I'd charge you for this... Forget it. Just speak your mind.

C: 你想起自己第一次来到哀丽秘榭，是在来古士的叙述中。而当你从再创世的光中苏醒时，便已身处这方美好的小村落。
E: You remember hearing about Aedes Elysiae for the first time from Lygus's tales and when you awakened from the light of Era Nova, you found yourself in this peaceful village.

C: 如果迷迷还在的话，估计会和妖精们成为朋友吧？
E: If Mem were still around, she would've gotten along famously with the fairies, wouldn't she?

C: 神性即为「尽却凡性之陷漏，唯神完整独有之相」。这个定义，我们方才已达成共识。
E: Divinity is "the absence of mortal flaws, a state of completeness unique to gods." That's the definition we've all agreed on.

C: 你记得在此地，她乘上死龙沿着冥河回到冥界，接过{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}的权柄，并将你轻轻推回了人间。
E: You remember her, here, riding Netherwing down the River of Souls, returning to the nether realm to claim the authority of {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#}, and gently pushing you back to the world of the living.

C: 我感到身下的电流奔腾不息，我听到电荷在我的外壳上滋滋作响！
E: I feel endless currents flowing beneath me, and hear electrical charges sizzling against my outer shell!

C: 应该在下面的某个地方…
E: It should be somewhere down below...

C: 明明胸膛已经被贯穿，却始终没有倒下…真是难以想象的意志喀。
E: Even with their chest pierced through, they still did not fall... What unimaginable willpower, crrk.

C: 但树桩怎样才能飞向天空呢？真是让虫费解。
E: But how can a tree stump fly into the sky? Truly baffling.

C: （「沿着仪式剑的源头而下」…莫非起点位于高处？）
E: ("Follow the source of the ceremonial blade"... Could the starting point be somewhere up high?)

C: 看不见的镜子？我好像听说过……
E: An invisible mirror? I think I've heard something about that...

C: 嗯，就把我当成招贴画上的人好了。你总不能指责海报里的卡通角色偷渡吧？
E: Yup, just imagine me as someone from the posters. It would be strange if you were to scold someone from the cartoons for smuggling, right?

C: 来吧，我以旧身的记忆发誓：你不会有任何损失。
E: Come, I swear on the memories of my past self that you won't be at a loss for anything.

C: 我已经把禁区里的年轻铁卫都动员起来了，他们听说能跟你这个传奇人物交手，都兴奋得不得了。
E: I've mobilized all the young Silvermane Guards in the restricted zone, and they're all beyond pumped to be fighting against a legend like yourself.

C: 随时可以开始铁卫军事演练。一切听您部署，教官。
E: Silvermane drills are ready to go. Everything is waiting on your command, drillmaster.

C: 哦，我听说了！你的表现之精彩，让参加了演练的铁卫都心服口服。
E: Oh, I heard that! Your performance has been so wonderful that all the Silvermane Guards you faced off against have been won over.

C: 所以你在这儿干嘛？
E: So what are you doing here?

C: （{NICKNAME}，「管家」的事，我要回去问问小姐，等查什么了，我再喊你。）
E: ({NICKNAME}, I'll have to ask Missy about the butler. I'll let you know when I've found something.)

C: （和这家伙讲不通，还是等你来给它点教训吧。）
E: (Can't get through to this guy. Better wait for you to lecture him.)

C: 够不着就不能锁门吗？万一你跳起来了呢？又或者是谁托举你呢？
E: Who says that you can't lock the door when it is out of your reach? What if you can jump? Or with someone lifting you up?

C: （不对，门禁是自动感应的，由安保机器人管理！{NICKNAME}，它是在故意带偏话题，<color=#dbc291ff>我们有什么证据可以打它脸吗？</color>）
E: (That's not right. The access control system is auto-sensing and managed by security robots! {NICKNAME}, it is purposely diverting the topic. <color=#dbc291ff>What evidence do we have as rebuttal?</color>)

C: 佩佩嗅了嗅「分装快乐」，尾巴摇得飞快，看来这就是丢失的奇物。
E: Peppy sniffs the Joy Filtration Set, its tail wagging furiously. Seems like this must be the missing Curio.

C: 好可爱！心有灵犀！！
E: How cute! It's as if we're fated to be connected!

C: 很适合当武器…
E: Sounds like it'd make a great weapon...

C: 不过，有关迈德漠斯的传闻也太多了。如果都是真的，他恐怕连吃饭的时间都没有吧？
E: Still... there really are way too many rumors about Mydeimos flying around. If they were all true, he wouldn't even have time to eat, would he?

C: 喜欢瞥视人的…
E: Always peeking at others...

C: 哇哦！也可以这么说啦，那{NICKNAME}就当人家的神吧，要保佑我哦？
E: Whoa! I guess you could say that! So, {NICKNAME}, how about you become my god? Please protect me, okay?

C: 不过，人家现在也没有刨根问底的心情…小蝶的故事迈向下一阶段了，有种说不上来的感觉，既像悲伤，又像欣慰……
E: But right now, I'm not really in the mood to dig too deep... Cas's story is stepping into the next chapter, and I can't quite explain how I feel. It's like sadness, but also like some strange sense of relief...

C: 人家是记忆的精灵，都不知道能不能流眼泪…人家要是信以为真，却哭不出来，你会难过的！
E: I'm the spirit of memory, and I'm not even sure if I can cry... If I believe it's real but can't shed a tear, you'd be sad, wouldn't you?

C: 呼…呼……
E: *snore*

C: 流云渡堆积的货物也太多了，这我怎么忙得过来啊……
E: The Cloudford pile of goods is too much. How can I keep up with this...

C: 可我们没有脚…
E: But without legs...

C: 何苦自己为难自己呢？
E: Why are you being so hard on yourself?

C: 祝您一…
E: I wish you...

C: 不管他们了，要是你准备好了，咱们就开始。你才是老夫最好的助手！
E: Forget about them. Let's get started if you're ready. You are my best assistant!

C: 穷观阵真是大材小用。
E: This really is overkill for the Matrix of Prescience.

C: 啧…占算结果甚为不利。不过{NICKNAME}若能守口如瓶，还有转圜的余地。
E: Tsk... This result really is unfavorable. But {NICKNAME}, if you can keep your mouth shut, then there's still scope for change.

C: 大师，还可以下棋吗？
E: Can we play chess again, master?

C: 废话少说，试试你就知道了。
E: Shut your mouth and face me to find out.

C: 真磨蹭。
E: Stop dillydallying.

C: 除了你。
E: ...You.

C: 为了宝箱，我必须赢你。
E: I'll win this game. I want that chest!

C: 喔！你来了呀。
E: Oh! You've arrived.

C: 那么，就敬请期待了。
E: That's all. Stay tuned!

C: 你觉得，什么难度能给你带来最大的乐趣？
E: What level of difficulty do you think would bring you the most enjoyment?

C: 当然，没必要勉强自己来迎合我的想法。试试其他难度吗？
E: Of course, there is no need to force yourself to accept my perspective. Care to try other difficulties?

C: 其实不管选择什么，只要它能给你带来乐趣，那就再好不过。这也是我们共同的……
E: In truth, no matter what you choose, as long as it gives you enjoyment, that is the best outcome. This is also our shared...

C: …滴答，说得有点多了。我打算去派对逛逛…等我那两个朋友都到齐了，就来舞池找我们吧。
E: ...Tick-tock, I have said too much. I intend to go wander around in the party... When both my friends are here, come to the dance floor and look for us.

C: 没问题。瞧好，游客！
E: No problem. Watch this, guest!

C: 再来一次，欢迎光临「心静空间」——
E: Once more, welcome to the Calmscape...

C: 那么，请听好：<color=#dbc291ff>「明明是瑟希斯的造物，却将浪漫的线相连。若你触碰它的根须，便能打下缘分的结。」</color>
E: So, listen carefully. <color=#dbc291ff>"Created by Cerces, yet bound by the string of romance. If you touch its roots, you can create a knot of destiny."</color>

C: 去寻找那位织者的藏身之处吧，我在那里为你准备了一份礼物。
E: Seek out that weaver's hidden place — I've left a gift there, just for you.

C: 衣匠能顺着金丝找到它们的踪迹，但这需要消耗<color=#dbc291ff>「记忆残晶」</color>才能做到。
E: The Garmentmaker can follow the golden thread to ascertain their whereabouts, but consumes <color=#dbc291ff>Memory Crystal Shards</color> in order to do so.

C: 竟然如此坚定，看来您也是同道中人啊！
E: That resolute determination. I see that we are of the same mind!

C: 有点太离奇了…
E: Now that's a little farfetched...

C: 所以我苦思冥想，应该偷些什么，才能彰显我的高超技艺呢？
E: So, I racked my brain trying to decide what I should steal to show off my amazing talents.

C: 您铁定想不到——我打算偷走元老院大殿的拱心石，让整座殿堂轰然倒塌！
E: You'll never guess it... I am planning to steal the keystone from the main hall of the Council of Elders. I'll bring that entire hall crashing to the ground!

C: 越是向前狂奔，就越是往后倒退。想骂上一声，污言秽语反倒钻进了自己的肚子！
E: The more I try to rush forwards, the more I end up going backwards. I want to swear at you but all my dirty words feel like they're rushing into my stomach instead!

C: 来点治愈金句？
E: Some adages for the soul?

C: 没错没错，就像我说的，诡计在泰坦的<color=#dbc291ff>眼皮子底下</color>！
E: Indeed, as I said, the tricks are under the Titan's <color=#dbc291ff>nose</color>!

C: 灵魂不灭。
E: The soul is eternal.

C: 这里也曾是一座美丽的城邦吧？可只要世界的齿轮稍加转动，灰飞烟灭，也不过是弹指瞬间……
E: This used to be a magnificent city-state, right? But with just a turn of the cosmic wheel, it all vanished in a moment...

C: 「人生是一个宝箱游戏：一切都可以被隐藏，一切都可以被打开，一切都可以被操纵，一切都可转化成数据。」
E: "Life is a game of mystery chests: Anything can be hidden, anything can be revealed, anything can be manipulated... and anything can be turned into data."

C: 好耶，去寻宝咯！
E: Nice! Let's go on a treasure hunt!

C: 你的肚皮好像流不出黏液。
E: Seems your belly won't ooze any goo.

C: 帮帮我，巴特鲁斯！
E: Help me, Bartholos!

C: 我们每个人都是「忘记了自己是泰坦」的泰坦！是的，在过去，人类和泰坦的关系不仅仅远比现在更亲密，甚至根本就是同一存在！
E: We are all Titans who have forgotten our identity as a Titan! That's right. Humanity and the Titans had a much closer relationship in the past, to the point where we were one and the same!

C: 利用「瑟希斯之心」核对我们研究成果的事就拜托你了，{NICKNAME}。
E: I'll leave the task of verifying our research with the "Heart of Cerces" in your hands, {NICKNAME}.

C: 这位虔诚的卫兵估计要烦恼好一阵了，据说妨碍恋爱的人会被大地兽踢，还是悄悄离开吧。
E: This devout guard is likely to stew over this for a while. They say interfering in love can get you kicked by a dromas, so let's quietly slip away.

C: 接下来是积压委托中的最后一件，也是唯一一件因报酬不足，且推演过于繁琐而被其他祭司放弃的委托。
E: Now for the final request in the backlog. This is the only request that the other priests abandoned due to insufficient pay and excessive complexity.

C: 伟大的{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}，万千道路的化身啊！我们请求您的指引！
E: Great {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#}, embodiment of countless ways! We seek your guidance!

C: 唔，死去的祭司在念叨我——也可能是我对花粉过敏…明明我是只虫。
E: Ugh, the dead priest must be cursing me — or maybe I'm just allergic to pollen. Strange, since I'm an insect.

C: 呵呵…原来我是那样一个人吗？
E: Heh... So that's the kind of person I was, huh?

C: 巴特鲁斯，平账的神！
E: Bartholos, the god of accounting!

C: 这难道是个圈套…
E: Could this be... a trap?

C: 你好，女士。
E: Hello, miss.

C: …向你问候。
E: ...Greetings.

C: 啊这…
E: I, ah...

C: 怎么了？我只回答「模拟宇宙」相关的问题喔。
E: What's up? I'll only answer questions about the Simulated Universe.

C: 为什么需要我？
E: Why do you need me?

C: 等一下，聊聊卡芙卡嘛。
E: Wait, let's talk about Kafka.

C: 祂控制了我的脑子！
E: THEY have controlled my brain!

C: 接着，空气立刻被掀起热浪，痛苦猛烈袭来——你突然意识到，这就是<color=#dbc291ff>死亡来临的瞬间。</color>
E: Immediately, the air suddenly heats up, and the pain hits you hard. You realize that this is <color=#dbc291ff>the moment of death</color>.

C: 「我得跟你道歉，真的。我埋伏在你列车上一整年，只为炸掉它和你的无名客。我忍不住，抱歉。」祂愧疚地把手放在胸前，郑重鞠躬。
E: "I have to apologize to you, really. I lay in ambush aboard your train for a whole year just to blow it up with your Nameless followers. I couldn't resist, I'm sorry." THEY put THEIR hand to the chest guiltily and bowed solemnly.

C: 继续…
E: Continue...

C: 购买一个随机普通祝福
E: Buy a random normal Blessing

C: 这是二倍速宇宙。
E: This is the 2× Speed Universe.

C: 不知为何，你的行为激怒了它！它变化面容，以无言的沉默介绍自己：一个被赐予了「喜悦」的士兵；一个遗忘了自灭的「自灭者」！
E: Somehow, your actions seem to have agitated it. It alters its appearance and introduces itself in silence as a soldier imbued with "joy," and a Self-Annihilator who has forgotten how to erase itself from existence.

C: 「秩序」古老帝国般的光辉消失之后，数个未受到克里珀庇佑的世界皆有记载：他们的太阳曾经消失，一座缠成双胞胎形状的雕塑自天空中示现，像是漫漫长夜的预兆……
E: Countless worlds untouched by Qlipoth's graces recorded when the light of Order faded like the radiance of old empires: Their suns had once disappeared, a statue of an entangled pair of twins appeared in the sky, like an omen of a coming long night...

C: 等螺丝咕姆聚拢完位面数据，我就把之前的星神资料接进来。
E: After Screwllum has finished gathering the planar data, I'll add in the previous Aeons' information.

C: 就这么结束了？
E: It's over already?

C: 我给你些「鸭鸭秘闻」。
E: I'll give you some Ducky Anecdotes.

C: 「一些熟悉的数据在善见天浮现，于我而言意义非凡。」螺丝咕姆沉默片刻，他说道，「现象：星际和平公司造成『边星贸易战争』后，无机生命无端于宇宙中活跃。逻辑：「公司」威胁「无机」。」
E: "Some familiar data has surfaced at the Eden of Blessed Insight, which is of great note to me." Screwllum is silent for a moment, after which he speaks. "Phenomenon: After IPC caused the Borderstar Trade War, inorganic life began their activity in the universe for unknown reasons. Affirmation: IPC is a threat to inorganics."

C: 她同意了。
E: She agrees to do it.

C: …和中断的「反有机方程」。
E: ...And the thwarted Anti-Organic Equation.

C: 极致无机：「神的三个启示」•其一
E: Supreme Inorganic: God's Three Revelations (I)

C: 监护员记录，远航的第九千零八个标准年，共计摧毁中大型陨石和障碍物三百二十个，消灭危险飞船十一条，其中有三条向远航舰发起反击，造成一定损伤，均已通过敌方残骸完成修补。
E: Guardian records show that in the <unbreak>9008</unbreak>th standard year of the voyage, a total of <unbreak>320</unbreak> medium- and large-scale meteorites were destroyed. <unbreak>11</unbreak> dangerous spaceship were eliminated, three of which launched damaging counterattacks on the voyager ark. All damages have been repaired by scrapping enemy vessels.

C: 主动诱发变量。
E: Actively induce variables.

C: 触手啪嗒啪嗒地拍打着浪花，他们在为你的到来感到喜悦。当然，你没有告诉他们，有多少艘梭子舰没能挺过天上的反物质雷区。
E: The tentacles slap against the sea waves. They are expressing joy at your arrival. Of course, you did not tell them just how many shuttles were unable to make it through the antimatter minefield in the sky.

C: 如同照镜子。
E: It's like looking in a mirror.

C: 坚持。
E: I do.

C: 「这可不是三流的凶案推理小说，让你随便猜猜」
E: "This is not some third-rate murder mystery novel for you to play detective."

C: 他本想实现相乘的演算效果，组建一套完整的神经系统。可帝皇制造的无机细胞超越人智，学士们无从激活。已死的天才，在静默里讥讽无能的庸人。
E: He intended to carry out a multiplicative extrapolation effect and build a complete neural system. However, the inorganic cells constructed by the Emperor far surpass human intellect, and the scholars have no means of activating them. The deceased genius silently mocks the incompetent Mundanites.
