E: ...How could you say no?

C: 解释刚才的行为。
E: Explain what you just did.
Woo...

C: 这些人心里没数的吗？编织美梦本就不易，还非得用针把梦泡戳破才行？
E: Are these people really so clueless? Weaving a sweet dream is no easy task, so do you really have to pop that dream bubble with a needle?

C: 唱给公子哥听的无病呻吟，唱给贵妇人听的情情爱爱。
E: Singing about nonsensical sentiments for the young masters, and singing about lovey-dovey junk for the ladies.

C: 拿去吧…把这东西拿去吧。它对我来说已经没有意义了，留它在身边…除了折磨自己之外…毫无作用。
E: Take it... Keep it for yourself. It no longer has any meaning for me, and there's no point in keeping it around anymore... other than to torture me...

C: 挺好的，就是有点怪。
E: Okay... It still sounds a little weird.

C: 他们行动力高得吓人：开店的想法是某天晚上突然冒出来的。我原以为只是说着玩，谁知道他们第二天中午就把事情都办妥了。
E: They're fast and furious; the idea of opening a store popped into their head one night. I thought they were kidding, who knew they'd have it all done by noon the next day.

C: 关于你的丈夫和女儿…
E: About your husband and daughter...

C: 为什么要待在这里？
E: Why do you choose to stay here?

C: 你可以去别的地方找她。
E: You could go somewhere else to search for her.

C: 什么蜜月，什么忠诚，什么真挚不渝！假的广告，假的爱情！
E: So much for "honeymoons," "loyalty," and "true love"! It's all false advertising! Fake love!

C: 节拍陡然一转，现场的气氛变得热烈起来。
E: The beat intensifies, and the atmosphere grows heated.

C: 想象一下猎犬的品质吧——机灵，善战，而且忠诚。这也是每名猎犬成员的美德。我们是匹诺康尼美梦的后盾，宾客安全的保障。
E: Think about the characteristics of a hound: Clever, battle-hardy, loyal. These are also the virtues of each Bloodhound member. We are the shield of Penacony's beautiful dream, safekeeping the well-being of our guests.

C: 生不了气的。
E: The one who can't get angry.

C: 我来这匹诺康尼是为了养老，但那些新鲜刺激的已经不适合我了，所以平日里没事就喜欢和年轻人聊聊天……
E: I came to Penacony as a retirement plan, but those intense experiences don't suit me at all, which is why I prefer talking to young people in my spare time...

C: 当然，如果你不能理解我的想法，就让我给你举个例子吧——你是做什么的？
E: Of course, if you don't understand me, allow me to give you an example — what do you do for a living?

C: …我就是到处逛逛。
E: ...I'm just window shopping.

C: 好！从现在起，我们就是共同进退的玩伴了。
E: Okay! From now on, we are ride-or-die party partners!

C: 何必反思过去？何必焦虑未来？我们唯一要做的就是享受当下，纵情玩耍。
E: Why dwell on the past? Why worry about the future? The only thing we need to do is enjoy the moment and have fun!

C: 这也许会带来更好的作品，但也可能会导致极为惨痛的失败……
E: This may bring higher-quality works, but it may also lead to a disastrous failure...

C: 我在他们眼中就是那种典型的智械教授，呆板、守旧、无法理解有机生命的追求…像从什么歧视智械的有机至上主义电影中走出来的角色一样。
E: In their eyes, I am just a classic Intellitron professor, inflexible, outdated and incapable of understanding the pursuits of organic lifeforms... They're like characters out of some organic-supremacist film that looks down on Intellitrons.

C: 坦白说，我不太看得起很多「伟大」的建筑师。他们的思维方式非常诡异，充满了不合逻辑的倒果为因。
E: I'll be frank. I do not hold many "great" architects in high regard. They use bizarre methods of thought which are full of illogical decisions that mistake effect for cause.

C: …很好， 看来您也是我接下来需要重点关注的对象了。
E: ...Very well. It seems that you are also a target that I shall have to focus on in the future.

C: 没什么想问的了。
E: I have nothing else to ask.

C: 为我介绍一下酒店吧。
E: Tell me more about this hotel.

C: 他垂颈弓背、摇头晃脑、昏昏欲坠，似乎全凭一双手扎根琴键之上。
E: His neck is bowed, his head swaying as if he has entered a trance, rooted to the keys with only his hands.

C: 如果不急着入梦，您倒是可以常来坐坐。这吧台虽小，但舞台很大——
E: If you are not in a rush to enter the dream world, please feel free to frequent here. This small bar has a huge stage...

C: …我是{NICKNAME}。
E: ...I'm {NICKNAME}.

C: 哎呦，我虽不认识您，但您这长相、这气度，怎么可能是一般人呢！
E: I may not know you personally, but your appearance and demeanor convey to me that you are no ordinary person!

C: 我是入梦护理师总管，乔凡娜。如果您需要任何帮助，欢迎随时与我交流。
E: I am Giovanna, the Chief Dream Nurse. If you require any assistance, please don't hesitate to approach me.

C: 匹诺康尼的梦境结构复杂，不稳定的通道将大概率导致难以预估的后果。
E: Since the dream structure within Penacony is complex, unauthorized entries may lead to unpredictable consequences.

C: 聊聊客人。
E: How about the guests?

C: 窥梦电话已拨通——您将会听到：银狼的梦境。
E: The Dreampeek Call connected. You are about to hear Silver Wolf's dream.

C: 窥梦电话突然爆发出一阵脆生的「叮铃」声——你听不出那是嘲弄还是爽朗的笑。
E: The phone suddenly emits a crisp ring, leaving you uncertain whether it is a taunt or a hearty laugh.

C: 要收钱吗？
E: Do you charge for the ride?

C: 送我去「黄金的时刻」。
E: Bring me to the Golden Hour.

C: 「嘴下留情啊！」你似乎听见脆筒这么说道——但是太晚了，现在你只能回味它的甜美了。
E: "Please have some mercy!" You seem to hear the crisp cries of the cone, but it's too late. You can only relish its lingering taste in your mouth.

C: 「这是给予勤劳的小镇居民的奖励。」那个叫「猫头鹰老师」的角色是这么说的，拿去吧。
E: According to Professor Owl, this is a reward for hardworking residents. You may have it.

C: （还是保持沉默）
E: (Remain silent again)

C: 你好。
E: Hello.

C: 怎么能这么说呢？这叫「经典设计」，「经典」懂哇！
E: How can you describe it that way? It's called a classic design. A classic, you know?

C: 没错。除了有入梦权限的「家族」成员外，就只有像您这样被直接邀请的贵宾知道抵达朝露公馆的方法。
E: That's correct. Aside from Family Members with dream access, only VIP guests such as yourself that have been directly invited know how to reach the Dewlight Pavilion.

C: 公馆很少有人拜访，这份工作倒是难得清闲…但有的时候也让人难以忍耐……
E: The pavilion rarely has visitors, so this job offers a lot of leisure time... But sometimes it can be unbearable...

C: 哎，大概这就是清闲的代价吧……
E: Ah, I guess this is the cost of having a leisurely job...

C: 你是来告解的吗？如果不是的话还请不要于此逗留，你身后还有其他人在等待。
E: Are you here for a confession? Please do not loiter if you aren't. There are people waiting behind you.

C: 每当看见钟表小子和伙伴们在荧幕上舞蹈，我都要由衷地发出赞叹——大家居然能将那些虚拟角色演绎得如此惟妙惟肖。
E: Every time I see Clockie and his companions dance on the screen, I can't help but marvel in earnest at how everyone brought those fictional characters so vividly to life.

C: 高级打工人挺好的。
E: A highly paid employee sounds good.

C: 或许是时候改掉这副冷脸了…从现在起，我要热情接纳身边的每一个人——就从你开始吧。
E: Perhaps, it's time I get rid of this poker face... From now on, I must treat everyone around me with warmth. Let's start with you.

C: 我可以邀请你上车。
E: I can invite you to the Express.

C: 星际冒险是严肃的、郑重的，我需要提前做出完备的计划，等待一个完美的时机，这才能表现出我对这件事的重视……
E: Interstellar adventures are serious and solemn. I must make flawless preparations and wait for the perfect timing to show how serious I am about this...

C: 果然和那种大老粗玩不来……
E: I just knew that I could never spend time with those oafs...

C: 你今天怎么怪怪的？
E: Why are you acting so strange today?

C: 可以聊聊吗？
E: Are you up for a chat?

C: 不过这些信息在梦境护照上就能查到，您想听点不一样的吗？
E: But, you can find all of this information on the Dreamscape Pass, do you want to hear about something else?

C: 您回头在这边游玩的时候可以稍微留意些，说不定正巧就能遇见他呢。
E: You can keep an eye out the next time you're here to have fun — you might just run into him.

C: …关于鸢尾花家系。
E: ...About the Iris Family.

C: 据说有些侍者会在无人注意的角落将雕像当做标靶——不知道那些手感火热的投手们还能不能享受来自家族的包容。
E: Rumor has it that some servants use the statues as targets when they are out of sight... You wonder if those hot-handed pitchers will ever receive forgiveness from The Family?

C: …你是什么意思？
E: ...What do you mean?

C: 我…我个人在这方面还是保守派，所以…那个…对不起，不可以的！
E: I... I'm a bit conservative when it comes to that sort of thing. So... umm... sorry! No can do!

C: 虽然生活的现状不佳，但，走一步算一步吧。
E: My life might not be great at the moment, but a step forward is still a step forward, I guess.

C: 呃。没关系，从你脸上的表情看得出来，你肯定很想知道。
E: Er, fine. That's okay. I can tell just by the look on your face that you'd love to know.

C: 嘿，朋友，你知道「美梦剧团」吗？就是那些梦里随处可见的小畜生……
E: Hey, my friend, do you know the "Sweet Dreams Troupe"? They're the little wretches you can see all over the place in the dream...

C: 哈哈，我同意。有时候，我甚至觉得梦里比现实还要清醒呢。
E: Haha, I agree. Sometimes, I feel more awake in a dream than I do in real life.

C: 这道题对我来说有点超纲…
E: I think this question is a little outside my pay grade...

C: 哈哈，星穹列车啊…真不愧是无名客最大的牌面。实不相瞒，你们名气越大，我们也就越跟着沾光。
E: Haha, the Astral Express... truly lives up to its reputation as Nameless' greatest asset. Truth be told, the more your fame grows, the more we bask in your glory.

C: 不过，为表歉意，我还是送你个赔罪礼吧——拿好哦！
E: To show my remorse, here's a token of my apology. Please keep it!

C: 哈哈哈，田里怎么能长出钞票来呢？
E: Hahaha, how would money grow in the land?

C: 没什么想问的了。
E: That's all the questions I have.

C: 不对，你是不是在和我开玩笑…算了，我都习惯了。
E: No way. Are you messing around with me...? Never mind. You're not the only one anyway.

C: 可以聊聊吗？
E: Are you up for a chat?

C: 看看家族现在所做的，简直是在玷污匹诺康尼的过去！
E: Look at what The Family is doing now. They are just tarnishing Penacony's past!

C: 就这样吧，拜拜。
E: That's all. Bye-bye.

C: 为什么会开这家店？
E: Why did you open this kind of store?

C: 你和这只蓝色的小鸟面面相觑。它似乎没有要开口的意思。
E: You and the blue bird stare at each other, but it doesn't look like it's going to speak anytime soon.

C: 玩游戏要遵守游戏规则，一枚硬币对应一条线索，多了少了都不行啾——你还没找到上一只小鸟呢。
E: There are rules to playing a game. A coin for a clue. No more, no less, tweet. You haven't found the previous bird.

C: 小鸟向你挥了挥翅膀，应该是让你「赶紧走」。
E: The birdie flaps its wings at you, supposedly trying to urge you to go.

C: 这是本鸟的谢礼。拿好，慢走不送啾。
E: This is a gift from me. Take it, and don't let me keep you, tweet.

C: 嘿呀，有问题尽管问，上至痛打石头老板，下至装点美梦小镇，就没有我不知道的啾。
E: Oho, don't hesitate to ask me anything. Whether it's beating Boss Stone to a pulp or prettying up Dreamville, there's nothing I don't know, tweet.

C: 细说毕生难忘。
E: Tell me about this unforgettable experience.

C: 我看见行经至此的旅者，与我同将壮丽绝景仰望\n原初之梦如此令人神往，你可情愿在此驻足徜徉……
E: I see travelers who come here, admiring the magnificent scenery with me.\nThe primitive dream is so truly mesmerizing, would you rest your journey and linger here...

C: 我是说…这座流梦城寨当真是个美妙又奇妙的地方。
E: I mean to say... This Dreamflux Fortress is truly a beautiful and wondrous place.

C: 我梦见繁华光景、灯火通明，疯狂与混沌滋生于阴影\n我梦见苦痛魂灵、憔悴多病，美梦的疗救痛苦且致命
E: I dream of prosperous flourish, lights radiating, insanity and chaos spawned in shadow.\nI dream of suffering souls, emaciated and sick, the dream's healing, pain and death.

C: 现在的年轻人啊，和我们那时候不同，有主见、有思考、有想法，但缺少了信念，做事情常常三心二意，半途而废。
E: Young people nowadays, they're different from us back then. They now have opinions, freedom of thought, ideals, but lack resolve. They're usually hesitant when embarking on matters, and give up halfway.

C: 多么好的年轻人啊。如果有一天你不想做无名客了，欢迎来苏乐达工作！
E: You're an outstanding youngster. You're welcome to work at SoulGlad if the day comes when you don't want to be a Nameless any longer!

C: 裁员会给赔偿吗？
E: Will retrenched staff get severance pay?

C: 你现在还想出去看看吗？
E: Do you still wish to take a look outside?

C: 无名客帮助阿斯德纳的原住民们建立起了最初的梦境城市，一个仅存于忆质中的完美避难所。
E: The Nameless helped the indigenous Asdanans establish the first Dreamscape city, a perfect shelter existing within memoria.

C: 你尝试用钟表把戏触碰米凯的内心……
E: You try to use Clockwork to touch Micah's heart...

C: 我当时十分好奇，这个猎犬家系与匹诺康尼的成立者究竟是什么人？我问了我那狼影中的家主，但他却以沉默为应。
E: I was restlessly curious: What kind of a person was he? This founder of both the Bloodhound Family and Penacony? I asked The Family Head draped in wolven shadows, but my request was met with silence.

C: 有人觉得这是在娱乐这位英雄和过去的苦难…我起初也很反感，但后来才发现，要想向别人诉说那些故事，最适合匹诺康尼的就是这种做法。
E: Some think this is deriving entertainment from this hero and the suffering of the past... Initially, I was very averse to this as well, but I later realized that if we were to narrate such stories to others, this would be the most Penaconian way to do so.

C: 「钟表匠」的小把戏对我这个级别的家徒并不好用。如果你想了解我，可以不必采取这种方式。
E: The Watchmaker's paltry tricks are no match for a Family member of my level. You don't have to resort to such antics if you want to learn about me.

C: 你不知为何，开始忍不住这般想象起来——
E: For some unknown reason, you can't help but start imagining.

C: 我个人名下有几颗用以度假的小行星，还算是风景优美、气候宜人。若是今后您在旅途中恰巧经过，还请务必赏脸，让我一尽地主之谊。
E: I happen to be the titleholder of several asteroids that are mainly used for vacationing, due to the beautiful scenery and pleasant climate afforded there. If you are to pass them by in your future travels, be sure to visit them, so that I can show you some hospitality of my own.

C: 只有值得做的事…才会做得糟糕也值得。但显而易见，现在是完全相反的情况。
E: Only things that are worth doing... will be worthwhile to do, even if they're terribly done. However, you can clearly see that the situation at hand is the exact opposite of the aforementioned scenario.

C: 我是不大喜欢站在这里，但话也不能这么说……
E: While it is true that I don't like to stand here very much, you still can't ask these sorts of questions...

C: 这些年来，无论是在这艘晖长石号 / 开拓之尾号 / 塔塔洛夫号 / 飞翔时针号上，还是匹诺康尼的别处…各种餐品都力求复古。
E: Every dish must be retro. That has been the trend on board not just The Radiant Feldspar / The Trailblaze's Stern / The Tatalov / The Soaring Clock Hand, but the rest of Penacony too.

C: 在那时的我看来，就算世上的食材如同音符那样可以穷尽，但它们的组合，用一生的时间也难以探寻。
E: At the time, I believed that even if the potential of every ingredient in the universe is finite like musical notes, they hold infinite potential in combinations.

C: 这个世界需要更多雅各布大厨这样，具有冒险精神的厨师。
E: The world needs more bold and adventurous chefs like Jacob.

C: 家人嘱咐我，一个人出门在外，要尽量让自己看起来*老练*一些…免得遭人欺负。
E: My family said I should act more seasoned out there to avoid being exploited.

C: 这么豪华的头等奖，抽中概率真的相当小，我完全没想到自己会是那个幸运儿。可等我真中了大奖…才发现情况和想象中完全不一样，哎。
E: Winning such a luxurious grand prize is incredibly rare. I never imagined I'd be the lucky one. But when I claimed the grand prize, I had won... I was disappointed to realize it wasn't as I had envisioned.

C: 你瞧我这件怎么样？我身上这件可是限量版，羡慕吧～
E: How do you like my dress? It's a limited edition piece. Jealous?

C: 这算哪门子抠门，匹诺康尼…还是「晖长石号 / 开拓之尾号 / 塔塔洛夫号 / 飞翔时针号」，多少人花重金都求不来的地方呢！
E: I'm not cheap! Penacony and The Radiant Feldspar / The Trailblaze's Stern / The Tatalov / The Soaring Clock Hand aren't accessible to just anyone, even those with plenty of money!

C: 不说了，我得继续工作了，还有一大堆邮件没看呢。
E: Alright, time to get back to work. There's a ton of mail I have to read and respond to.

C: 你不怕公司报复你吗？
E: Aren't you worried about the IPC getting back at you?

C: （拿出一枚艾迪恩代币）
E: (Take out an Aideen Token)

C: 因为…您的嗓音太好听啦，我总感觉自己模拟得不像，有些发音的细节上处理得很粗糙。听到您开口，我就忍不住学了……
E: Because... your voice is too beautiful. I always feel that my imitation is not accurate and that the way I pronounce words is too crude. After hearing you speak, I couldn't help myself from trying to learn...

C: …真的吗？！
E: ...Really!?

C: 你可以工作生活两不误啊。
E: But you can work and pursue your interests.

C: 对于住客们的反馈，我已经详细记录在案并一一分析过了。
E: I've already recorded their feedback in detail and analyzed it.

C: 不过，我也收到了一些员工们自发性的反馈，有船员指出了我们服务中的一些潜在改进空间。上述内容我已记录在册，之后会利用恰当的时机来逐步改进。
E: Some employees also came to me with feedback, though these mainly pointed out service aspects with room for improvement. All of these have been duly recorded and changes will be gradually rolled out at appropriate junctures.

C: 船长！您误会了！不是您想的那样，不是我刻意偏袒。您可以去打听一下——干这行的皮皮西人实际上都是同源，在世代传承之后，几百号人多少都沾亲带故的。
E: No, no, no, captain! You're mistaken! It's not that I'm not looking after my own. Maybe you'd like to ask around. Every Pepeshi in this industry can be traced back to the same ancestor, so it's only natural to find a relative — be it close or distant — among the many Pepeshi from later generations.

C: 音乐不以形式论高尚——当年搞摇滚的时候，我的钢琴老师还是我的头号粉丝呢。
E: The genre of music is never indicative of how good it actually is. Back when I was playing Rock 'n' Roll, my piano teacher was even my number one fan.

C: 我，堂堂折纸大学派对王，全校最盛大的派对居然敢不邀请我？
E: Me! I'm Paperfold University's Party King, but I'm not invited to the biggest party of the entire school!?

C: 校球笼赛的预热派对？
E: The kick-off party for the university's Spheroid race?

C: 还不如把学费交给街边的逐梦客！说不定能给你带来点商机和人脉！
E: You're better off paying your tuition fees to those hustling Dreamchasers instead! They might just offer you a business opportunity or become your business partner!

C: 但没想到吧，哼哼，赛车运动中，更小的身形意味着更小的负重，就等于更快的速度！
E: But I bet you never imagined, hehe, that when it comes to racing, a smaller body means a lighter load for the vehicle, meaning greater speed!

C: 校园里的小报写手格外偏爱我的坐骑。自从我跑出了点成绩，他们从未间断过猜测它的来历，各式各样传言都有——
E: The campus reporters just have a bias towards my Spheroid. Ever since I started to get results, they have not stopped speculating about its origins. I've heard all kinds of rumors...

C: 这次的展览，从收集作品到展馆规划，我们都花了很多功夫。虽然中间产生了点小插曲，但…无关紧要，哈哈。
E: We have put a lot of work into collecting display pieces and planning how the hall would be laid out. We had a little trouble along the way, but... It's nothing serious, haha.

C: 是吧。这种老师还能留在折纸大学任教，简直离谱！
E: Right? It's outrageous that a teacher like that would be able to stay and serve as a professor at Paperfold University!

C: 我们这些所谓的*学者*啊，整日在知识的田野中躬耕不辍却收获寥寥，还得为了教学资源明争暗斗，恨不得大打出手。
E: We so-called scholars spend all day toiling in the fields of knowledge to come back with dry harvests. Then, we plot and scheme over academic resources and can't wait to get into disputes.

C: 虽说初衷是为社团创收，筹备点翻修舞台的资金。但这些贴子在我们社团内传疯了，现在内部争议挺大的——究竟该不该商业化发展，大家都说不准。
E: Although these were originally intended to generate income for the club and raise funds to repair our stage, these posts have been shared like crazy throughout our club. There's a lot of internal conflict now about whether we should allow ourselves to commercialize and develop. No one is quite sure.

C: 我没什么想问的了。
E: I have nothing else to ask.

C: 至于那些梦泡的评价，我不建议你去看。不管是好评还是差评，我觉得都不够客观…但没办法，哈，屁股决定脑袋…人生来如此。
E: As for comments on the dream bubbles, I would advise against reading them. Be it good comments or bad ones, I don't think they're objective enough... Can't be helped though. Your perspective defines your logic... That's just how life is.

C: 说不定下一个爆红的就是我…未来的事情谁说得准呢。
E: Who knows... I might become the next big star... Who can tell with the future?

C: 你不是要去学忍术吗？
E: I thought you were gonna go learn some ninjutsu?

C: 打算彻底改变音乐风格了？
E: You're deciding to totally change up your music style?

C: 啊哈哈，可能这就是贵人多忘事吧，咱们以前做过生意的啊。
E: Ahaha, benefactors do tend to forget the people they help out. We used to do business together.

C: 不过…我现在做生意的时间也不多了。之前一心想着赚钱，差点被退学。好在学院给了我补考的机会，我之后得把主要精力放在学习上面。
E: But... I don't have much time to run my business now. I almost got kicked out of school because I wanted to earn money. Luckily, the school gave me a chance to retake the exam, so my main focus has to be on studying now.

C: 恭喜你如愿以偿了。
E: Congratulations on getting what you wished for.

C: 在年鉴上每个学生都有个人页面，「同学寄语」就是在页面的最下方，由其他同学写下对该生想说的话。
E: Every student has a personal page in their yearbook. A graduating message is right at the bottom of the page for other students to leave something they want to say to that individual.

C: 不过…目前给我发邀请的都是些短剧剧组，说是现在比较流行这种一分钟看完的故事…唉，芮克先生一定不会认可这种理念的。
E: But... the invites I've been getting had all been for shorts — the sort that's trending right now, where you can finish the plot in a minute... *sigh* Mr. Reca will never approve of such a concept.

C: 感觉有人重视自己很开心，但也很累…看来哪怕在梦里，我也没法完全自由起来呢。
E: It feels nice to have people pay attention to me, but it's also exhausting... It seems like even in my dreams, I can never be completely free.

C: 我也去影院看了《银河忍法帖》，虽然不太明白里面的故事，但{NICKNAME}同学和乱破小姐并肩作战的样子还真是华丽呢…简直就和千层梦境舒芙蕾一样！
E: I also went to the cinema to see Cosmic Ninjutsu Inscriptions. I didn't really get the story in it, but {NICKNAME} and Miss Rappa fighting side-by-side was so cool... Like a multi-layered dreamscape souffle!

C: 瓦尔特先生在同行时，向我展现了令人折服的「开拓」之道。实不相瞒，在我眼中各位都是良师。
E: Mr. Yang showed me the captivating way of the Trailblaze during our travels. Truth be told, you've all been great teachers.

C: 在抵御外敌的那段日子里，营地里的苏乐达，是猎犬战士们为数不多的一点享受。
E: While holding against the enemy during the war, the SoulGlad on the base was one of the few things a Bloodhound could enjoy.

C: 按照标准流程，下一步是不是就该有人来找你接广告代言了？
E: According to the standard procedure, shouldn't someone come and ask you to be an ambassador and shoot some ads for them?

C: 你决心加大开拓力度，用三月七拍下的旅途风景图填满书架的空白。
E: You are determined to fire up your Trailblaze Power, to fill up the shelf with all those photos that March 7th took on your voyages.

C: 还记得与那刻夏熔为一炉的「理性」之泰坦，曾亲手洞穿过一位黑袍剑士的胸膛。如此相似的方式……
E: Remember the Titan of "Reason" that fused with Anaxa, who once pierced through the chest of a black-robed swordmaster in such a similar way...

C: 还剩这么多份报纸…
E: So many unsold newspapers left...

C: 不，报社最重要的是搞清楚什么能说，什么不能……
E: No, what's most important for a newspaper is to figure out what can and can't be said...

C: 怎么又晚点了…
E: Why is it late again...?

C: …不可理喻。
E: ...Inscrutable.

C: 真普通人进不来梦里。
E: True ordinary folks can't get into the Dreamscape.

C: 我抢到知更鸟的票了！
E: I got the tickets for Robin's concert!

C: …行了，别一天到晚惦记着打你那个破游戏了。再这样下去，看你用什么交房费。
E: ...Enough with obsessing over playing that silly video game. If you keep this up, you won't be able to afford the room.

C: 唉…你说要是梦里也有宝箱该多好，我们随随便便开几个，不就发财了吗？
E: If only there were treasure chests in our dreams. Open some chests and we'll be rich, right?

C: 真是一片欣欣向荣的景象。看来这「奥帝购物中心」算是办起来了。
E: It's bustling here. Looks like Oti Mall is finally up and running.

C: 你说它一个美梦排排乐，劝我戒赌？是它有病、我有病、还是我俩都有病？！！
E: What the heck? This Dreamy Slots is urging me to quit gambling? Am I off my rocker, is it made, or are we both insane?
Uhh...

C: 欢迎您，贵客。
E: It's a pleasure to have you here, dear guest.

C: 前方有惊梦剧团活动…
E: There's Dreamjolt Troupe activity up ahead...

C: 邪恶无处藏身！
E: Evil has nowhere to hide!

C: 当然可以，我们会在这里等待您的答复。
E: Of course, I shall be here awaiting your answer.

C: 与往年相比，本届海选…
E: Compared to the previous years, this round of auditions...

C: 这个…可以商量嘛。
E: This... can be discussed, right?

C: 这个问题触及了我们的商业机密，我这样说，大家心里肯定也会有所定论。
E: This question encroaches on our trade secrets, but I think most can probably draw their own conclusions when I put it like this.

C: 听说船长是个无名客，别的我一无所知。所以…对于这件事，你那边有什么内幕消息可以分享下吗？
E: I hear the captain's a Nameless, and I don't know much else besides that. So... you got any insider info to share on your end about this?

C: 那时候我们都雄心勃勃，但还是屈服于世俗了。
E: Back then, we were both ambitious. But now, we've succumbed to the material world.

C: 不玩即为赢。
E: You win by not playing.

C: 最近收到好多投诉！
E: So many complaints recently!

C: 嗯，这件事我也有所耳闻。
E: Yeah, I also heard about this.

C: 要我说，咱俩不如直接官宣得了，反正没有规定教师间不能恋爱，大不了我主动避嫌，转去谐乐学院呗。
E: If you ask me, we might as well make it official. There's no rule against teachers dating. If needed, I'll just transfer to Charmony Academy to avoid gossip.

C: 到了某天，学生们即将毕业的时候，他们的肩头会接过各种各样的重担，不知道哈努兄弟坚毅的身影是否仍会留在他们心间。
E: One fine day, when the students eventually graduate, their shoulders will bear all sorts of responsibilities. You wonder if Brother Hanu's resolute figure will remain in their hearts.

C: 你下意识地去触摸屏幕，但什么也没有发生——这不能怪你，它们长得也太像了！
E: You touch the screen without thinking, but nothing happens — You're not at fault for this, as they all look the same!

C: 衣柜里整齐排列着款式相同的套装。
E: The wardrobe is neatly arranged with identical outfits.

C: 我是来监督你的！
E: I'm here to supervise you!

C: 嘿，你这小怂包，有种把刚才的话再对着老子说一遍？
E: Hah, you sure are a bratty one. How about saying that one more time to my face?

C: 一台设计十分荒诞的电话机被固定在这里，等待路过的好奇宾客拿起它的听筒。
E: A peculiarly designed telephone is fixed in place, waiting for curious passersby to pick up its receiver.

C: 垃圾猫糕的桶里是什么呢？
E: What's inside the trash cat cake's can?

C: 嘿嘿，倒头就睡～
E: Hehe, just flop down and sleep~

C: 你的目光扫过收藏架上的藏品，最后停留在「穷观阵摆件」上。
E: As you cast your gaze across the collectibles on the display shelf, it lands on the "Matrix of Prescience ornament."

C: 这种错位，多少让人有些吃不消啊。
E: Such complexity can be overwhelming at times.

C: 我也只有隐忍，白天配合他之意看店，晚上偷偷写稿。
E: So, I have to juggle running the store during the day and writing novels in secret at night.

C: 客人不考虑制定一套本地的服饰吗？你的皮肤很白，头发和眼睛的颜色也很漂亮，穿起来一定非常有气质。
E: Have you thought about ordering a set of our local attire? Your fair skin, lovely hair, and beautiful eye color would make you look stunning in one.

C: 没什么想要的。
E: Maybe next time.

C: 相信您怎么都不会是那种肆意糟蹋食物的人，对吧？
E: I trust you wouldn't deliberately ruin a good dish, right?

C: 坏了，饮下女口止匕烈性的一木不，你的目艮前出王见了重重重重影，亻尔有点看不氵青这都是亻十么宇宇宇字宇了。
E: Uh-oh, after drin king the potent brew, everyt hing around you starts to bbbblur, and y ou see mmmmultiple versions of the same scene. You can't quite make s ense of iiiit all.

C: 耳边传来心电图机「哔哔」的声音，也许是有人在正在观察你的每个心跳周期。
E: You hear the "beep beep" sound of an electrocardiogram in your ears. Maybe someone is observing every heartbeat cycle.

C: 但是我没有那个本事，所以，你应该适度娱乐，理性消费。
E: But I don't have that kind of ability, so you should play in moderation and spend rationally.

C: 后来「智慧花园」的园丁们提取了其中的生命质素，对那些种子进行改良与再培育，才又有了现在的麦迪特瑞恩蜜果。
E: Later, the Gardeners in the Garden of Wisdom extracted the life essence within, improved and re-cultivated those seeds, and recreated the Mediterrana figs you see today.

C: 异乡人，不好意思。要是你饿了，请你吃别的。
E: I'm sorry, outlander. If you're hungry, I'll cook something else for you.

C: 能看出这只箩筐并非等闲之辈，这一点值得赞许。
E: It's commendable that you recognize this is no ordinary basket.

C: 人们都说，如果{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}为你关上了一扇门，那么它一定还会为你打开一扇窗。
E: People say: If the {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#} closes a door to you, you can be certain that they have opened a window somewhere.

C: 这首「最后的庭园」献给您——可爱的{F#女士}{M#先生}。
E: This poem, "The Last Veranda," is dedicated to you, adorable {F#lady}{M#mister}.

C: 狩猎颓堕神明、还其荣耀安宁
E: Restoring former glory, the tale untold. In echoes of history, a new chapter unfolds.

C: 没关系，利波就在这，随时等候着您的到来~
E: No worries. Lipos is here, patiently awaiting your return.

C: 「旧诗浴盐」
E: Classical Bath Salts

C: 「投票给蓝色的蘑菇，下次购物满十万将立减十利衡币。」
E: "Cast your vote for the blue mushroom, and receive a discount of ten Balance Coins for your next purchase of a hundred thousand."

C: 切记，切记，切记……
E: Remember, remember, remember...

C: 但如今雅努萨波利斯已殁于黄金战争，那滋味也在漫长岁月里消耗殆尽……
E: However, Janusopolis perished in the Chrysos War and that delicious flavor has long since been lost...

C: 纷争世以来的漫长岁月，有无数世人、无数眷属、无数黄金裔与我、与奥赫玛、与泰坦们产生了命运的交织。不知你要问哪些人？
E: Over the many long years since the Era Bellica, there have been countless people, Titankins, and Chrysos Heirs who have formed bonds of destiny with myself, Okhema, and the Titans. Which ones are you referring to?

C: 小灰要是实在分不清，其实还有一个笨办法……
E: If you still cannot tell the difference, there is actually a simpler method...

C: 你是从哪儿找到这块石板的？悬锋城么？
E: Where did you find this slate? Castrum Kremnos?

C: 好小众的爱好。
E: Very niche hobbies.

C: 等得久就算了卖得还贵，结果现在质量差还不管赔！以后就算他家的神像再怎么样式新颖造型独特，老头子我也绝对不买了！
E: If I have to wait, fine, I can deal with that. But they ask an exorbitant price, the quality is rubbish, and they won't refund me! I don't care how novel and interesting they make their divine statues... I'm not buying a single one!

C: 我过去也在云石市集摆过一个小摊，结果只一趟小解的功夫，摊子上的外地香水就被不知道什么人全都倒进了下水沟里……
E: I set up a stall in Marmoreal Market once, but when I came back from relieving myself, all my exotic perfumes had been dumped into the gutter by an unknown vandal...

C: 虽说在我这个外地人看来，言必称泰坦多少有点多此一举…但肥皂确实就是这回事儿。
E: As an outlander, I still find it a bit too much to keep mentioning Titans all the time... But that's what soap is.

C: 发生什么事了？
E: What happened?

C: 是有点，但一切为了研究嘛，就不要在意这种繁文缛节了。
E: Yes, kinda. But it's all in the name of science, so don't worry about any red tape.

C: 还有一次，我弄到了一些据说是尼卡多利神殿赐下的圣水。结果培育出了一些相当好战的藤蔓。它们会用根须主动攻击路过的小动物！
E: And this other time, I scored some holy water that was apparently from the Temple of Nikador. It ended up cultivating some pretty aggressive vines. They would actively attack small animals passing by with their roots!

C: 您慢慢逛，有需要再叫我。
E: Take your time. Call me if you need anything.

C: 有种说法是，最早的躺椅是给黄金世的祭司们专用的，一般人不能享受。
E: Some say that the earliest loungers were used by the priests of the Era Chrysea. They were not to be enjoyed by the commoners.

C: 不过就我自己的看法…这大概只是卖躺椅的木匠为了让自己的产品卖得更好而想出的推销话术。
E: If you ask me, though... This is probably nothing more than a glorified sales pitch made up by carpenters to increase the sales on loungers.
...I understand.

C: 别太为难人家小年轻了。
E: There's no need to be so hard on the young.

C: 倘若每场败仗都是全军覆没，我们永远也不会知道失败的原因。没有永恒的胜利，唯经验长存。
E: If every failed battle left no survivors, we would never know what it was that led to our defeat. There is no such thing as an eternal victory. Only experience lasts forever.

C: 所以我一遍遍练习，等待着用枪尖刺穿敌人、或被敌人用枪尖刺穿的那天。
E: So I practice every strike, over and over, waiting for the day I will thrust the tip of my lance through an enemy, or be impaled by my enemy.

C: 跟我聊聊秘酿。
E: Talk to me about ambrosia.

C: 感觉还不够…
E: I need more...

C: 秘酿淡雅的风味滑过舌尖，海面波光粼粼——
E: The subtle flavors of the ambrosia glide across your tongue, the sea's surface a glistening crystalline...

C: 一位生命花园的园丁被你的「球棒动力学理论」深深折服，盛情邀请你加入奥赫玛权威的学术组织。可你深知一切仅是享乐女神的愚弄，你的智慧会在系统时午夜<unbreak>12</unbreak>点后消失……
E: A Garden of Life Gardener is deeply engrossed in your "Baseball Bat Dynamics Theory," and heartily invites you to join a prestigious academic organization in Okhema. But you are deeply aware that this is but a trick by the goddess of pleasure — your intellect will fade when the system time strikes midnight...

C: 非也，我来自塔拉，塔拉萨……
E: I'm not a guest, I am from Th-Thalassa...

C: 容许我稍微掀起这夜帷的一角么？
E: Will you permit me to slightly lift a corner of that veil?

C: 这天外之音来自雅努萨波利斯覆灭的哀嚎，黑潮如洪水袭来，将那荣光显耀的圣殿冲垮，从中滋生的魔物撕碎了三位泰坦的眷顾，让恐惧吞没了这座城，直到……
E: This celestial echo comes from the wails of Janusopolis' razing. The black tide assails the city in a deluge, crashing through that glorious, sacred temple, the monsters spawning from its midst tearing through the three Titans' kin, sowing horror that devoured this city, until...

C: 阿基维利在上，这沉默寡言的人你是聊定了。向他展示你「开拓」友谊的妙着吧！
E: Akivili above, you've marked this silent one for conversation. Now, show him what it means to forge a Trailblazing friendship!

C: 是我刚才的表述有误。我曾来自阿卡索斯，那是我的故乡，黑潮来临前，我携带所有财产逃来了奥赫玛。我来自尚未覆灭的阿卡索斯，这点千真万确。
E: I made a mistake in my last remark. I originally came from Icatus, and that is my home. Before the black tide descended, I took all of my worldly belongings and fled to Okhema. I come from an Icatus that has not yet been destroyed. This point is absolutely true.

C: 当然。无论何时，那里都是我的家乡。
E: Of course. No matter what time we speak of, Icatus is my hometown.

C: 论辩不过是言语间的游戏，得不出真理，更无法改变信念。
E: The art of debate is simply no more than a game of words. There is no truth to be gained, nor can it change my beliefs.

C: 听好了。「阿卡索斯」无法借由感官认知，我们也缺少观察它的方式，无非是人们通过想象编造出的谎言。没有任何实际证据，你该如何证明它的存在？
E: Listen. Icatus cannot be known through our senses, and we lack any method of observing it. It is no more than a lie created by the imagination of mankind. If there is no real existing evidence, how can you prove its existence?

C: 就这么几句话，却彻底改变了我的人生。我找到了属于自己的创作方式，自那以后，我画画时常常会进入一种奇妙的状态。
E: Just a few words, yet they completely transformed my life. I discovered my unique style of creation, and ever since, I frequently find myself in a marvelous state while painting.

C: 我没什么想聊的了。
E: That's all for now.

C: 你即是大地。
E: You are the earth.

C: 而那些强健的青年们闲庭信步，对周遭的歆羡装作不在乎，却又刻意摆出媲美雕塑的优美姿势。人坐在水里，胳膊展得老开，生怕别人看不清他胸肌的轮廓。
E: Meanwhile, the muscular young men stroll around casually, feigning indifference to the admiration of others, yet deliberately striking poses as elegant as sculptures. They sit in the water with their arms spread wide, as if afraid no one will notice the contours of their chiseled chests.

C: 至于那个看起来三天没睡的阴沉家伙，隶属于本地一个还算有些名气的探险队，他本人是队长的弟弟。
E: As for that gloomy guy who looks like he hasn't slept in three days, he belongs to a fairly well-known local expedition team. He's actually the younger brother of the team's leader.

C: 什么？利比斯叔叔不可能……
E: What? Uncle Libius would never...

C: 哈哈，来和我讲讲你的家乡吧，朋友，我真的真的很感兴趣~
E: Haha, come and talk to me about your home, friend. I'm very interested.

C: 你好，年轻人，欢迎来到云石天宫的书库…记得找书前先去把手擦干。翻阅可以随便找个墙边一靠，若是要借出…去找那边的阿波罗尼娅，填个调书单。
E: Hello, youngster, welcome to the repository of the Marmoreal Palace... Remember to wipe your hands before looking for any books. You can browse freely while leaning against any wall, but if you wish to borrow something, go find Apollonia over there and fill out a book request form.

C: 消失的物种无法重现…这是怎么抱怨都不会有改变的事情。
E: Disappeared lifeforms can't be restored... This is something that will never change, no matter how prevalent the complaints are.

C: 顺便一说，有种观点认为大地兽就是得到了吉奥里亚赐福，并因此变得巨大的地行龙…但这应该只是两个物种在外形上略有相似之处罢了。
E: To add on, there is an opinion that dromases are gigantic Terrazards because they received Georios' blessing... but this is probably just due to the vague resemblance in these two species.

C: 行吧。古生物的知识…对翁法罗斯的未来可能确实没有什么帮助。
E: Fine... Knowledge on prehistoric creatures... probably isn't of much help to Amphoreus' future.

C: 还挺有互联网精神的！
E: It's got an internet vibe to it!

C: 随着时间流逝，神驹的灵智也会逐渐磨损。或是遭受误导，迷失在无尽的旅途之中；或是彻底消失，成为徒有其名的空壳。
E: As time passes, the sentience of a divine foal will gradually erode. Or it may be misled and get lost in an endless journey. Or perhaps it might vanish completely, becoming a husk of its former self.

C: ——嗷呜！嗷呜呜！
E: ...Awoo! Awoowoo!

C: 你满心期待地拆开了箱子，出现在眼前的是……
E: With great anticipation, you tear open the crate and find...

C: 四个字，热火朝天。创刊才短短几个月，我就收到了几百篇来自社会各界的科学论文。
E: In two words: On fire. Just a few months after launch, I've already received hundreds of scientific papers from across society.

C: 重要之物…我、我有一条绿宝石项链，是母亲送给我的成年礼，价值…啊，抱歉，我不该用世俗的价值去亵渎神明……
E: Something of importance... I—I have an emerald necklace. It was a gift from my mother when I reached the age of majority. As for the price... Ah! Sorry, I should not blaspheme against the Gods with a mortal definition of value...

C: 但即便是贵客，这等污蔑也着实太过冒犯了！
E: Even if you are an esteemed guest, this level of defamation is a complete violation!

C: 您…呃，您好，请问有什么事呢？
E: H—Hello, can I help you with something?

C: （讲讲缇安吧）
E: (Talk about Trianne)

C: 啊，谢谢夸奖…这大概要多谢我与死亡打了千年的交道，作为刽子手，对将死之人的心理已经训练出极为细腻的揣度……
E: Ah, thank you for the compliment... I suppose I have to thank the thousand years I've spent brushing shoulders with death. As an executioner, I've trained myself to deeply understand the minds of those nearing their end...

C: 啊，小灰或许还不知道。*我们*的妈妈叫做莫忒丝…这正是我们身上所佩五瓣花的名字。这种花在雅努萨波利斯的传说里，象征着思念、感恩，以及跨越时空的爱。
E: Ah, Little Gray, you might not know — our mother's name is Mortis, and this flower we wear is named after her. In the legends of Janusopolis, this flower symbolizes longing, gratitude, and love that transcends time and space.

C: 嗷、嗷…嗷嗷……
E: Awooo! Howhowhowooooo...

C: 结果…大家就把昏光庭院当作是医疗机构，把我叫做首席护理师啦。
E: And so... everyone started treating the Twilight Courtyard like a clinic and calling me the chief healer!

C: 应该不会太棘手…大风大浪都挺过来了。
E: It shouldn't be too troublesome... we've weathered far greater storms.

C: 你说你是刚从树庭结业的学生？
E: You mentioned you just graduated from the Grove?

C: 啊，这位贵客，请留步——您不是奥赫玛土生土长的住民，对吧？
E: Ah, esteemed guest, please wait a moment — you're not a native of Okhema, are you?

C: …听上去那是您离开家乡时的声音。
E: ...That must be the sound you heard when you left your homeland.

C: 负世的至高之神，您是否会再度回应我们？
E: Worldbearing Titan most high, will you once again answer my prayers?

C: 这里为什么会有蝴蝶？
E: Why are there butterflies here?

C: 能多给我点提示吗？
E: Can you give me more hints?

C: 这里是专为虔诚信徒提供的朝圣平台。你向刻法勒行礼致意，而它却没有做出回礼——可能是因为手都占着吧。
E: This is a pilgrimage platform dedicated to devout believers. You bow to Kephale, but they do not return the gesture, probably because their hands are full.

C: 与其让乐曲分毫不差地重演，不如去期待未来，会有怎样不同的旋律被人们写下。
E: Rather than having music replayed exactly the same way, it's better to look forward to what new melodies people will write in the future.

C: 「再创世」的承诺，是身在此处的人们唯一的慰藉。所以现阶段，只要这样就好…嗯。
E: The promise of "Era Nova" remains the only solace for those of us here. So for now, this will suffice... yes.

C: 再会。
E: Farewell.

C: 啊，阁下你还有正事，我就不多耽误你的时间了。请多保重，我们新世界再会吧！
E: Ah, I think you might have important matters to attend to. I won't take up more of your time. Please take care. We'll meet again in the new world!

C: 或许这已经没有意义…但它是我现在唯一能做的事。
E: Perhaps it no longer matters... but it's the only thing I can do now.

C: 嗯…有位织者重视荣誉。金丝带来消息，它正率领着忠实的仆从<color=#dbc291ff>飞天坛递</color>践行求索之旅，追寻着真理的足迹呢。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver who values honor. The golden thread brings tidings: They are leading the loyal servant, the <color=#dbc291ff>Flying Amphora</color>, on a journey of discovery that follows the footsteps of truth.

C: 我想它们孤悬此处，一定思乡心切，便在白厄阁下的同意下，追随诸位的足迹而来。
E: I think they were left stranded here, filled with homesickness. So, with Lord Phainon's permission, I followed your path to come here.

C: 喜欢这样悠闲的时光吗？我很喜欢哦，美好的一天，从见到你开始。
E: Do you like relaxing days like this? I love it! Seeing you is the start of a beautiful day.

C: 这朵花送给你！它就像少女的心房，要用心呵护哦。
E: This flower's for you! It's just like a girl's heart, so you better take good care of it!

C: 你记得倒是很清楚嘛。
E: You've got a good memory, I'll give you that.

C: 要我说啊，年轻人该多出去闯荡闯荡，肯定怎么都比一直窝在这里强。
E: If you ask me, I'd say young folks should go out there and see the world themselves. It's gotta be better than staying stuck here forever.

C: 求你了，来猜吧！回应我嘤！
E: Come on, pleeease. Take a guess! Say something, eep!

C: 好呀！那我们就放轻松，随便逛逛。我来当{NICKNAME}的导游吧？
E: Great idea! Let's take it easy and go for a walk. I'll be your personal guide, {NICKNAME}, how's that sound?

C: 我给你，四个选项：石榴，苹果，还有…还有石榴！
E: I'll give you four options: pomegranate, apple, and... pomegranate!

C: 我来看望看望大家。
E: Just dropping by to see how everyone's doing.

C: 那是因为你最近忙过头了。听说过劳逸结合吗？适度的休息会让你对工作再次产生激情。
E: That's because your schedule has been too hectic recently. Heard of work-life balance? Taking timely breaks will invigorate your passion for work.

C: 好吧，抱歉，实在是太可爱了，我就摸最后一次！嘬嘬嘬！
E: Fine, I'm sorry. They're just too adorable, let me pat it just one more time! *smooch*

C: 工作~工作~我爱工作~
E: Work, work, I love work!

C: 咕咕——以前没见过你，是新来的转校生吗？
E: Hoot hoot... I've never seen you before. Are you a new transfer student?

C: 咕咕——年纪大了，脑子也不好使了。
E: Hoot hoot... The mind gets hazier with age.

C: 猫头鹰老师优雅地叼过你拿出的代币，然后…吃掉了它！
E: Professor Owl augustly takes the token from you with his beak, and then... swallows it!

C: 咕咕，你已经在其他地方见过它们了，还有什么好奇的吗？
E: Cuckoo, you've already seen them in other places. Why the curiosity?

C: 咕咕……
E: Hoot hoot...

C: 咕咕——当然可以，老师相信你们。
E: Hoot hoot... Of course, I believe in you all.

C: 咕咕——所以，孩子们，谁想去小镇里吃好吃的美梦脆筒？
E: Hoot hoot... Now, children, who wants to go to town for some Dreamy Cones?

C: 比如呜呜伯的短呜和长呜，就是截然不同的含义。
E: For example, Wubbaboo's short and long whines mean completely different things.

C: 那些事情我会处理的，您不必担心。
E: I'll take care of those. Don't worry.

C: 孩子，这是一场灾难，如你所言。
E: Kid, as you said, this is a disaster.

C: 我给波少分发的奇物，那，那可都是走正规流程的。你别多想啊。
E: The Curios I distribute to Master Capote are through the normal procedure. Don't think too much about it.

C: …加油。
E: ...Good luck.

C: 「但是『在洞穴中生活下去』又何尝不是一种选择呢？来吧，我会引导你来到我身边，你不会走投无路的。」
E: "But hey, 'living in a cave' is a valid choice too, right? Come on, I'll guide you to my side. You won't be left with nowhere to go."

C: 嗷呜…于是，荒笛大人耐心地引导着我走过无数黑暗，来到它沉眠的深处。
E: Awoo... And so, Lord Terravox patiently guided me through countless shadows to reach the depths of their slumber.

C: 只要我躲在阴暗的角落，一定不会有人发现的！
E: As long as I hide in this dark corner, no one will ever find me!

C: 想我一生四方偷盗，最后竟被洪水堵住了去路…
E: After a lifetime of stealing from all corners of the world, who'd have thought a flood would be what finally stops me in my tracks...

C: 嗯…有位织者正为了心中的信仰而冲锋。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>裂分之枝的树根下</color>立下豪言壮语呢。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver who is charging forward for their beliefs. The golden thread brings tidings: They're making bold declarations beneath the <color=#dbc291ff>roots of the Bough of Rift</color>.

C: 临时的哲思涌上了心头——就像是星空中那微弱颤栗的星光，也许正是数万光年外的一次刻骨铭心的燃烧。
E: A fleeting philosophical thought washed over me, like the faint, trembling starlight in the cosmos, perhaps it was the echo of a soul-searing blaze from tens of thousands of light-years away.

C: 我听说——只是听说哦——就在前不久，才有对兄妹为你「更喜欢他们哪一个」的问题打起来了……
E: I heard — just rumors, mind you — that not too long ago, a pair of brother and sister got into a fight over which one of them you liked better...

C: 这主意不错…等等，怎么听上去就像是做生意的常识。
E: That's not a bad idea... Wait, why does this just sound like basic business sense?

C: 您来得正好，客人——我和西塔罗斯正在筹备个美食艺术基地！
E: Perfect timing, dear guest — Theodoros and I are planning to set up a culinary art base!

C: 不如…就和我一同在欢宴里沉醉…忘记始终折磨你的回忆，忘记刻骨铭心的憎恨，也忘记自己……
E: Why don't we... lose ourselves in the revelry together... forget the memories that torment you, forget the deep-seated hatred, and forget yourself...

C: 老爷子很有人气。
E: The old man's quite popular.

C: 所托，一定不负。
E: Let you down, I won't.

C: 唉…我想像往常一样祈祷，但现如今还能向谁祷告呢？
E: *sigh* I want to pray like I used to, but who is there left to pray to nowadays?

C: 这可就冤枉我喽。我就是觉得啊，老先生有见识有智慧，年轻人有勇气有家底，相辅相成嘛，做起事来肯定事半功倍。
E: Now that's unfair! I'm just saying that when you combine the old man's wisdom with the young fellow's boldness and resources, you get a winning combination. You two could move mountains together!

C: 合订版好像有新的插画。
E: The bound edition comes with new illustrations.

C: 下一次演讲的主题是「探寻山之食堂」，在那之前，我得让这些沉默的大家伙认识我。
E: My next lecture's theme is "Exploring the Mountain's Diner." But before that, I need to get acquainted with these silent giants first.

C: 哈哈，喝！贵客来了，可不得喝点嘛。
E: Haha, bottoms up! When an honored guest arrives, we've gotta have a drink!

C: 话是这么说，现在不是没这条件了吗。
E: That's all well and good, but we don't really have those conditions anymore.

C: 爬上小丘就可以跨过灌木…原来如此迷……
E: Climb up that small hill to get past the bushes... So that's how it works...

C: 相声社翁法罗斯分社？
E: Is this a duo comedy act, Amphoreus chapter?

C: 现在，我们都是救世主。
E: Now, we are all Deliverers.

C: 我印象里的卡厄斯兰那，若要向凯撒进言，可要更坦率直白些。
E: The Khaslana I know would be far more straightforward in his counsel to me, his Imperator.

C: 知道了，我马上蹲下！
E: Alright, I'll crouch down right now!

C: 有百界门，不管多远，都能马上送到！
E: With the Century Gate, we can deliver things instantly, no matter the distance!

C: 我说什么来着？就算没了金线，大名鼎鼎的「金织」女士还是那么爱监听人们的动向。还有你，白厄——
E: What did I tell you? Even without the golden thread, the illustrious Lady Goldweaver still loves keeping tabs on everyone. And you, Phainon...

C: 问我干什么？写的是瑟希斯，关我阿那克萨戈拉斯什么事？
E: Why are you asking me? It's about Cerces, what does it have to do with me?

C: 接下委托时还不觉得，真正编织起来才意识到，这副挂毯可是个大工程。
E: I didn't realize it when I took the assignment, but now that I'm actually weaving it, this tapestry is turning out to be quite the undertaking.

C: 这两个消息我怎么都没听说？
E: How have I not heard about either of these?

C: 那万敌带来的食材？
E: What about the ingredients Mydei brought?

C: 你为荒笛讲述了梦想之地匹诺康尼，包括梦中和梦外的时刻，和一场回到「大地」的飞行……
E: You tell Terravox about Penacony, Land of the Dreams, including moments both inside and outside the dream, and a flight back to "Earth"...

C: 嗯…有位织者正在拷问自己的内心。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>黑潮封闭的门扉前</color>思索自己的答案呢。
E: Hmm... There's a weaver who is questioning their inner self. The golden thread brings tidings: They're contemplating their answer <color=#dbc291ff>in front of the door sealed by the black tide</color>.

C: 在这方心绪构成的世界里，唯有<color=#dbc291ff>「记忆残晶」</color>能为我们指引前路。
E: In this world woven from emotions and thoughts, only the <color=#dbc291ff>Memory Crystal Shards</color> can guide our way forward.

C: 但这并不是心急就能解决的问题，能在各世界往来的办法并不多，而星穹列车慷慨接纳了我。
E: But this isn't something that can be solved with impatience. There aren't many ways to travel between worlds, and the Astral Express has graciously accepted me.

C: 你在哪里找到的后记？
E: Where did you find the postscript?

C: （三把兵器便是一座岛屿，重兵器好像也是兵器，但是直觉告诉我并不是这里…）
E: (Three weapons make an island. Heavy weapons are weapons too, but my intuition tells me it's not here...)

C: （既然在这里捡到了缺失的书页，那么跟战壕、兵器有关的谜题就在前面吧…）
E: (Since I found the missing pages here, the riddles about the trenches and weapons should be up ahead...)

C: 怎么样，能帮我这个忙吗？
E: What say you? Can you do me this favor?

C: 不过你来都来了，我也不能让你闲着。
E: But now that you're here, I can't let you just hang around and do nothing.

C: 嘁，臭小子…刚才怎么没见你这么有干劲？我看你平时就是抽懒筋……
E: Tsk... So now you are getting motivated? Were you just slacking off most of the time?

C: 我爹妈都走得早嘛。生活所迫，加上师傅以前是我爹的朋友，我就被那老头子收养咯。
E: Well, I guess, life happens. You see, my parents... they died a long time ago. My master, who was a friend of my father, adopted me.

C: 现在开始吧！
E: Let's go!

C: 石头老板派人破坏了物资通道，现在谁都没办法过去。除非…有人能把它修好。
E: Boss Stone sent people to trash the supply passage — no one can get past now. Unless... someone fixes it.

C: 要是再喝不到苏乐达，有些人估计都得精神崩溃…看你的了。
E: If they don't get to drink some SoulGlad in time, some of them are going to have a mental breakdown... It's up to you now.

C: 但在开始奋斗之前，还是先去玩会儿「美梦排排乐」吧，明天再努力也来得及！
E: But, I'm going to play some Dreamy Slots before I get to working hard. Tomorrow isn't too late to make a difference!

C: 来来来，让我敬您一杯经典苏乐达，祝您身体健康、事业长虹，梦外像美梦，梦里爽翻天！
E: Come, come, let me toast you with a glass of Classic SoulGlad! I wish you health and great success! May your life outside the dream be dreamy and your life inside, perfection!

C: 看看你这副娇生惯养的样子，是从「上面」来的吧，来这儿这么久，还没醒悟吗？
E: From that coddled demeanor of yours, you must be from the "topside." Have you not faced the truth, after staying here for so long?

C: 你知道我花了多少劲儿把汉堡肉捶松吗？你为什么不吃！宾客，你为什么不吃！宾客…宾客！…说话！滴答！
E: Do you know how much effort I spent smashing the burger patty? Why don't you want to eat it? Dear guest, why don't you want to eat it!? Dear guest...! Say something! Tick-tock!

C: 这就是垃圾短信的始末了。现在我的名字传遍了整个空间站，人人都知道有个叫伦纳德的呆瓜闯了大祸，职业生涯已经彻底完蛋了吧，哈哈……
E: That's the whole story about those spam messages. Now I'm infamous throughout the whole space station — everyone knows about the guy called Leonard who stuffed up big time. My engineering career is over. Ahaha... *sigh*

C: <size=36>太对了！我想听的就是这个！</size>
E: <size=36>That's perfect! That's exactly what I wanted to hear!</size>

C: 你将这幅完美的画作以天体运行作譬喻，充分传达了自己对大师澎湃的褒美之情——尽管你不确定大师是否知道「天体」究竟是什么。
E: You compare this perfect picture to celestial motion, filling every sentence with gushing praise for the great painter — despite your doubt that he even understands what "celestial motion" in fact means.

C: （看来他已经快要饿疯了…想想办法吧。）
E: (Looks like he's about to lose his mind with hunger... Let's figure out what to do.)

C: 下层区机兵的机体数据想来是不涉密的…那么，这件事就拜托你了。
E: Automaton data from the Underworld presumably is not classified... And so, I leave this task in your capable hands.

C: 我已经找到「宝藏」了。
E: I've found the "treasure".

C: 其他的展品就不用拍了吗？
E: Don't you need photos of any other exhibits?

C: 这还是我第一次来贝洛伯格的博物馆……
E: This has been my first time visiting the museum of Belobog...

C: 一台自动机兵，型号名为「蜘蛛」。
E: An automaton of the model Spider.

C: 「 第一位大守护者自此陨落。同时，贝洛伯格正式迈进风与雪与火种的时代。」
E: "Our first Supreme Guardian has since fallen. At the same time, Belobog officially took its first step into the age of wind, snow, and kindling."

C: 一组过去的剪报及其附录。
E: A set of newspaper clippings and their appendices.

C: 这么没头脑地找也缺乏效率，不如我们找个高点儿的地方？
E: We're not gonna be efficient running around like headless chickens. Why don't we get to the high ground?

C: 唉，我也有很长的时间没去过狐眠冢了，咱们就在那儿见面吧。届时，各位所有的疑惑都将会得到解答。
E: Well, it's been a long time since I visited Foxsomn Tomb. Let's meet there. By then, all your doubts will be answered.

C: 我就知道你在想什么。走，我们回绥园去吧。
E: I knew what you are up to. Come on. Let's go to Fyxestroll Garden.

C: 罗浮仙舟上少有祭奠的场所，但狐眠冢不同。它是狐人追思故人的地方。
E: There are few places on Xianzhou Luofu where one can honor the dead, but the Foxsomn Tomb is different. It's a place for foxians to commemorate the deceased.

C: 那今天就这样解散吧，回见！
E: That's all for today. See you all later!

C: 我没拍你。
E: I wasn't trying to photograph you.

C: 扑满被你的快门声吓到了，吸走了你的照片……
E: The Trotter is surprised by the sound of your shutter, and sucks your photo away...

C: 喂，你不要学我啊！
E: Hey! Don't copy me!

C: …这一碗苏打豆汁儿还是你喝了吧。
E: Okay — you drink it then.

C: 这时候还要保持神秘吗？
E: You don't need to keep a low profile anymore...

C: 码头的工人们说，即便提高了码货的效率也无济于事，想问能不能让咱物流这边……
E: We made our inventory more efficient, but the dock workers said we still need a way to distribute the goods. I was wondering if Heron Express would be interested...

C: 交给我吧，我能帮得上忙的。
E: Leave it to me. I'm sure I can be of some use.

C: …真是拿你没辙，我同意了。
E: *sigh* Fine... I'll do it.

C: 在我这里可以协助码头工人<color=#dbc291ff>「码放货物」</color>，以及协助鹤运物流完成<color=#dbc291ff>「物流规划」</color>。
E: You'll be able to help the dock workers <color=#dbc291ff>do the inventory</color> and help Heron Express with <color=#dbc291ff>logistics planning</color>.

C: 码头上出运输事故，你怎么会知道呢？
E: How did you know about the frequent accidents at the dock?

C: 嗯，我会全力以赴的，会长。
E: Yes, I'll do my best, President.
Hmph...

C: 但论固执，会长那个老东西比我有过之无不及。他比我活得更久，曾经见过金人巷的盛况，那时这里星槎往来穿行，金人摩肩接踵。
E: However, compared to the president, my stubbornness is nothing. Back in his day, Aurum Alley was teeming with shuttling starskiffs and commercial aurumatons.

C: 这是金人巷复兴计划最直接的成果，更重要的是，它是金人巷恢复商业活力的证明。这部分金额将用作「金人巷商区招标」的保证金。
E: This is the most direct achievement of our revival project. More importantly, it's evidence that the Alley has regained its footing. The money will serve as the bidding deposit for Aurum Alley.

C: 没错。
E: That is correct.

C: 没错。
E: Indeed.

C: 没问题。
E: Sure.

C: 去吧，我就在这金人巷里，等着你们从司辰宫捎回好消息。
E: Go, and may good tidings come with you when you return.

C: 两位对金人巷的帮助居功至伟，这是应当的。
E: You two have done a lot to help us. You deserve every bit of praise.

C: 你怎么这样啊？别人拜托你的事，你应该负责到底呀。
E: The nerve of some people... When people ask you to do something, you should assume a modicum of responsibility.

C: （接下来要把「货物」放在霍三哥定好的位置上，自会有人来取。）
E: (I should place the goods where Mr. Huo wants them. Someone will be here for collection.)

C: 我听说云骑军截获了一批放生帮偷偷装箱的豺狼，反正都会被处理的，要是能猎回一些，我试试做成菜品…它们应该就在迴星港里，拜托你了。
E: I heard the Cloud Knights intercepted a bunch of wolves that the Unshackled was smuggling around. Would be a pity if they just got disposed of. If you can get me some, I'll try coming up with some new menu items. You should be able to find the wolves at Stargazer Navalia. I'm counting on you!

C: ——不行，我已经得了不治之症了，小天老板你必须救救我，您是丹鼎司出来的对吧？
E: No, I've contracted an incurable disease. Little Tian, you have to save me. You're from the Alchemy Commission, right?

C: 那就拜托你了。
E: And so I leave it in your hands.

C: 感谢您的理解和支持，期待您的批准！
E: Thank you for your support and looking forward to your approval!

C: 但是商会拒绝与金人巷的各大商铺进行合作，曾经繁华一时的码头如今门可罗雀。
E: But the Merchant Guild refused to cooperate with the major shops in Aurum Alley, and the once prosperous dock is now desolate.

C: 时间能说明很多事情，年轻人。
E: There are many things that only time can tell, young one.

C: 金人巷的商铺们可不这么想！
E: The shops think otherwise!

C: 金人最重要的部分就在头部，人类也一样。
E: The most important part of an aurumaton is its head, same as humans.

C: 是这样的吗？{NICKNAME}大人真是帮了大忙了。
E: Is that so? {NICKNAME} has been such a great help.

C: 我听其他人说「有困难找{NICKNAME}」，就想着不抱期望地试试看…报酬什么的都好说，就是不知道你能不能搞得定。
E: Yep. I've heard others say "When in trouble, look for {NICKNAME}," so I thought I'd give it a try even though I didn't know what to expect... Of course, you'll be rewarded if you help me with this task, but I just don't know if you're up to it.

C: 这个…你自己看着点用！虽然科员之间都默认这个液剂没有危害，但是具体有什么效果，世玲可没法给你保证。
E: It's... you can try it out for yourself! The researchers all agree that this liquid is harmless. But, still, don't come blame me if anything goes wrong.

C: 除开这个机器人相关的素材，世玲还需要一些<color=#dbc291ff>陨铁</color>，交给你啦！
E: In addition to the materials related to this robot, I also need some <color=#dbc291ff>Meteoric Alloy</color>. I'll leave this to you!

C: 要是没有异常呢？
E: What if there's nothing abnormal?

C: 虽然科学需要献身精神…但你还是要以个人安全为第一考量，量力而行！
E: Science requires sacrifice, but you should still prioritize your personal safety and act according to your capabilities!

C: （用钥匙打开柜子）
E: (Open the wardrobe with the key)

C: 嗯嗯…好复杂。
E: Ah... it's so complicated.

C: 哎呀，想不到还有大人会帮我们小孩子说话！
E: Oh! I didn't think an adult will speak for us kids!

C: （就是这附近了。根据前几次的经验，「异常」不就摆在眼前？稍微调查一下就行。）
E: (This should be the place. Based on previous experiences, shouldn't the "anomaly" be out in the open? Just a bit of investigation should be enough.)

C: 啊！你这是什么阴谋论啊！异常现象不是那个什么…什么噗蛮吗？怎么会变成我呢？
E: Ah! What is this conspiracy theory!? Isn't the anomaly that... that Trodder thing? How did it turn into me?

C: 今日份的食材已经准备好了吗？
E: Is today's set of ingredients ready?

C: 关于美食庆典…
E: About the food fest...

C: 先不吃了。
E: I'll pass for now.

C: 今日的礼品已寄出去咯，客人你还想玩的话就等明天再来吧！
E: Today's gift has already been shipped out. If you want to join the fun again, come back tomorrow, my dear guest!

C: 是捡垃圾题材吗？
E: Is it about garbage picking?

C: 就这样，你们和哈努兄弟一同踏上了解救伙伴的旅程。而那是另一个故事了……
E: Just like that, the two of you and Hanu embark on a journey of rescuing the other companions. And that will be another story...

C: 我是来探究真相的！
E: I'm here to investigate the truth!

C: 哎…我们现在都没法正常工作，所以…我们想拜托你尽快找出幕后黑手。
E: Alas... we're unable to work as usual, so... please help us figure out who's behind the issue as soon as possible.

C: 屏幕上，一顶厨师帽吸引了你的注意力，它看来是如此地平凡又普通。但你知道，越是普通的东西越危险——
E: A chef's hat on the screen catches your eye. There seems to be nothing special about it, but you know that sometimes the more inconspicuous a thing is, the more dangerous it can be.

C: 为什么会选我呢？
E: Why me?

C: 教教我。
E: Show me how.

C: 等我把「自由调制」的秘诀传授给你，你就能制作出酒单上不存在的饮品了。这可是每位调饮师的必修课——总给客人喝卖相、成分全都一成不变的饮料，换谁都会腻的。
E: After I show you the ropes about "Free Mixing," you'll be able to craft drinks that aren't on the menu. This is something every drinksmith has to learn. Things could get boring if you keep dishing out the same recipes.

C: 做好进入特殊空间的准备了么？在那里你可以看到——我们，所谓的「美梦剧团」——究竟过着怎样的生活。
E: Ready to dive into the special space? There, you'll find out what kind of life we so-called Sweet Dreams Troupe members are actually living.

C: 哼，现在的你可管不着，我偏要说。
E: Hmm? Don't think you can order me around. I'm not listening.

C: 我是节能主义，我不好奇。
E: I'm all about conserving my body's finite life force, so I ain't curious.

C: 从银河遥远的过去向你发来最新的问候！无名客•{NICKNAME}，准备好进入「银河强手棋」了吗？
E: I send you the latest greetings from the distant cosmic past! Nameless {NICKNAME}, are you ready to enter Cosmodyssey?

C: 这是你的酬劳，大英雄，期待和你的下一次合作。
E: Here are your rewards, great hero. I look forward to working with you again.

C: 专门放得这么正式，生怕别人不知道东西藏在哪儿。
E: It's positioned so formally, almost as if they're afraid nobody will discover it's hidden there.

C: 你别说，还真有。
E: Believe it or not, there actually is.

C: 你长得好眼熟。
E: You look familiar.

C: 好嘞，深入了解才能创造佳作，您尽管问，我知无不言！
E: Sure! An in-depth understanding of the subject is essential in creating a masterpiece. Just ask away! I'll tell you everything I know.

C: 动画胶卷…哦，你说的一定是克劳克影业的《美梦大机密》。
E: Animation... Oh, you must be talking about Dreamjoy Secrecy by Clock Studios.

C: 没事，我刚刚叫来了米凯先生，他们完蛋了！
E: Don't worry, I just asked Mr. Micah to be here. They're finished!

C: 不会是因为…最近那部钟表小子的电影吧？
E: Was it about... the recent Clockie movie?

C: 米莫萨，他其实一直想要保护你，所以才从未对你提起那些不够光鲜的过去。
E: Mimosa, he had always wanted to protect you so he chose not to tell you about his less-than-glamorous past.

C: 你怎么又来了，现在《美梦往事》正在热映，克劳克影业蒸蒸日上，不需要家族来掺一脚！
E: Why are you here again? Dreamjoy Memoir is now showing, and the business of the Clock Studios is on the rise. There's no need for The Family to be involved!

C: 等我再琢磨一下…
E: Allow me to ponder it a bit more...

C: 我知道了，你要带着我们逃跑！那你一定需要一把趁手的武器——「帕特鲁鲁鲁电电枪，循此苦旅，击落星辰！」
E: I knew it. You're taking us to freedom! Then you need a trusty weapon — "Patrululu's Zappy Gun. Follow this bitter journey and strike down the stars!"

C: 「此处的守卫被哈努兄弟暂时击退。追兵将至，必须得快速离开此地。但……」
E: "The guards have been temporarily repelled by Brother Hanu. We have to leave before the pursuers catch up. But..."

C: 请把魔法给我的伙伴们吧。小狗有只能喷涌一次的气泡勇气，我愿在这里鼓起勇气，送朋友回家。
E: Please give the magic to my companions. This doggo only has enough for one spray of bubbly courage. I will muster my courage right here, to send my friends home.

C: 不过，这份邀请仍会有效。{NICKNAME}导演，期待我们的下一次合作。
E: But, the invite still stands. Director {NICKNAME}, I look forward to our next collaboration.

C: 这场是个战斗戏，<color=#dbc291ff>所有演员</color>都要入镜。
E: This is a fight scene. <color=#dbc291ff>All the actors</color> must be in the shot.

C: 没关系，你们先来吧，我觉得我已经在旅途中收获到一颗开朗的心了！
E: It's fine. You guys go ahead first. I feel like my heart's already brightened up along this journey!

C: 下次再聊。
E: Let's catch up another time.

C: 如果是这个主题，那应该就是木头老爷希望让小镇变得更加和平，但是遭到了钟表小子的误会……
E: If that's the theme, then Old Man Wood should be trying to bring peace to the town — but ends up getting misunderstood by Clockie...

C: 当然，我们也可以把抄袭换个名字——一种伟大的*致敬*。
E: Also, we prefer an alternative term: Something like a flattering homage.

C: 哈哈，我会如实反馈给制作组的。
E: Haha, I'll pass that feedback to the devs exactly as it is.

C: 「黄金球棒赐予你无与伦比的强大力量，宇宙间无人不知你银河球棒侠的美名。球棒侠成为星际间最炙手可热的形象，故乡的星球为你立起巨大的雕塑，也撬动了无数游客的钱袋。但由于你没有登记版权，只能眼睁睁看着金币溜入其他人的口袋…」
E: "The golden bat bestows unto you unparalleled powers, and everyone in the universe comes to know the name of the Galactic Baseballer, which becomes the most unrivaled figure across the universe. Your home planet erects a huge sculpture in your name as it pries money out of eager tourists' wallets. However, since you failed to register the copyright, you can only watch as the coins flow away into other people's pockets..."

C: 真希望他们能在验收前改完。要知道，其他几个赞助商可没我这么好说话。
E: I hope they can get things done before project delivery. Y'know, the other sponsors aren't nearly as nice as I am.

C: 哈哈，感谢你的赞美。这正是对{RUBY_B#「愚者」}我们{RUBY_E#}最好的褒奖。
E: Haha, thanks for the compliment. That's the best praise ever for {RUBY_B#Fools}us{RUBY_E#}.

C: 「{NICKNAME}，亲爱的主角，感谢你参演这部尚未完成的作品——」
E: "{NICKNAME}, my dear protagonist, thank you for your performance in this not-yet-finished art piece..."

C: <size=36>不像演的！</size>
E: <size=36>Beautiful!</size>

C: 拿到了美梦剧团的内心碎片…这种事也太梦幻了。
E: An inner self fragment belonging to the Sweet Dreams Troupe... This is just too surreal.

C: 匹诺康尼的风波平息之后，下次我再请你吧！
E: Next meal's on me when Penacony's chaos has been quelled!

C: 你来到此处，是为了那些「末日幻影」，对吧？
E: You're here for those Apocalyptic Shadows, right?

C: 我并不奢求这一课题能在「差分宇宙」中得到解答。毕竟，真理向来沉默寡言。
E: I don't dare to hope of finding the answer within the Divergent Universe. After all, truth has always been reticent.

C: 教学就教学，扯我干什么？
E: Just focus on your teaching. Why bring me into this?

C: 简直就是仙舟式家长！不行，你又不是我的家长，我现在就要你来夸夸我。
E: Jeez, you sound just like those parents on the Xianzhou! Can't I get some praise now?

C: 他订下规则用机甲与你手中三尺剑比斗，你就同意了。他说赢了怎样、输了怎样，你也同意了…这整个儿就是一场斯科特组织的运动会啊，赢了也没劲！
E: He set up these rules for a fight between his mechs and your sword, and you agreed. Then he laid out what to do if you win or lose, and you agreed again... It's basically just another one of Skott's organized sports events, and it's not even fun if you win!

C: 我？我什么也没做啊，可别怪到我身上。
E: Me? I didn't do anything, seriously.

C: 你是谁？这是我的私人领地，你是怎么进来的？
E: Who are you? This is my place. How did you get in here?

C: 三月小姐，我给你熬了一碗「松茸龙眼山白竹雀汤」，又滋养又大补，吃完以后保准你浑身都是劲儿。
E: I've made a bowl of Matsutake Longan White Bamboo Sparrow Soup for you, Miss March. It's nourishing and will give you a good energy boost.

C: 《霸道机甲爱上我》、《无机帝国罗曼史》…噫，你的审美象限真的好怪哦。
E: The Overbearing Mechs Falls in Love with Me... Romance of the Inorganic Empire... Wow, your taste in entertainment is really unique.

C: …有点道理。虽然我没有那么想凑热闹啦，我就帮你参考一下吧。
E: ...You're right. Even though I'm not a fan, I'll help you figure something out.

C: 就是这个气势，现在正是趁热打铁的时候！
E: That's the spirit! Strike while the iron is hot!

C: …你看，我没说错吧。
E: ...See, what'd I say.

C: 作为哑谜的谜底还算合适吧？
E: Appropriate as an answer to a guessing game, no?

C: 我查过了，血液中含有大量的病菌和病毒！
E: I checked, the blood is filled with germs and viruses!

C: …你听说过「械灵学派」吗？他们是无数已经消亡的博识学会学派之一，活跃在帝皇战争之前。
E: ...Have you heard of the Mechanical Soul School? They are one of the countless extinct schools of the Intelligentsia Guild, active before the Emperor's War.

C: 科学界会把我当作最新笑话的！
E: I'll become the latest joke in the scientific community!

C: 降灵术持续了半个小时，金人司阍并没有任何反应。
E: The seance lasts for half an hour, and there is still no reaction from the Aurumaton Gatekeeper.

C: 没有…吧。不过最近我感觉好像有一种「我与机械融为一体」的感受，感觉自己的想法、意识、愿望可以延伸，甚至能远程控制……
E: I guess... not. But recently, I have had the feeling that "mechanical spirits and I are one." It's as if my thoughts, consciousness, and desires can be extended and even controlled remotely...

C: 哦哦哦哦哦！稀有的双重属性，成功了？！那句仙舟俗语怎么说来着——「山重水复疑无路，稀有属性藏不住。」
E: Ohhhhhhhh! A rare double type! Does that mean it's a success!? What's that saying from Xianzhou — "In the mountain of doubt, no escape is found. Rare stats, they can't be bound."

C: 这是说，你要是想要练习这门剑术，你必须先要自己伤害自己的身体。否则，学会这门剑术也会伤害你的身体……
E: It means that if you want to learn this school of swordsmanship, you have to harm your own body. Otherwise, learning this type of sword skill will cause you harm...

C: 毕竟我是个卜者，从一开始就不相信「剑斗胜利等于解决问题」。
E: I am a diviner after all, I have never believed that "winning a battle means that a problem is solved."

C: 顺带一说，这些垃圾桶的素材是我从爱德华医生的梦泡里发现的，也不知他们从何而来，我就顺手拿来使用了。
E: I should mention that I found the materials for these trashcans in one of Dr. Edward's dream bubbles. I've got no idea where they came from. So, I just took them and used them for myself.

C: 看来除我们之外，世界上还有许多和我们有着同样兴趣的朋友啊。
E: It seems there are more people out there that share our enthusiasm, my friend!

C: 我在图书馆查资料时发现了关于「魔阴身」的记载，就这样产生了好奇心。
E: I found records on being mara-struck when I was searching for materials in the library and grew curious.

C: 曾经有部热门动画，主题就是关于「友谊魔法」拯救世界：和最好的朋友展开激动人心的冒险，还可以拥有华丽漂亮的魔法招式……
E: There was once a popular anime that was all about using the Magic of Friendship to save the world: The characters would set out on exciting adventures with their best friends, and could also wield wonderful magical techniques...

C: 但是别说打比赛了，我感觉自己现在正常生活都有困难！已经半只脚踏入生活不能自理的领域了……
E: But forget about competing, I feel like I'm struggling with just normal everyday life! I'm already halfway into the realm of needing help with daily activities...

C: 那叫「结阵行军」好不好！
E: That's called a united front, got it!?

C: 怎么突然插播广告？
E: What's with the sudden product placement?

C: 雅利洛-Ⅵ脱离银河太久了，我对大家觉得习以为常的事情反而一无所知。
E: Jarilo-VI has been isolated from the cosmos for so long that I'm clueless about things everyone else takes for granted.

C: 是我口不择言了。请原谅我的鲁莽，卡美丽小姐。
E: I spoke out of turn. Please forgive my rudeness, Miss Carmella.

C: 抱歉，只是说说心里话，火药味有些太重了。上场吧，贝洛伯格的卢卡。
E: I apologize, just speaking my mind. It appears I've ruffled some feathers. Time to get on the stage, Luka of Belobog.

C: 贝洛伯格代表队用自己的实力，捍卫了自己的尊严！多么激动人心啊！
E: Team Belobog has proven its superiority and defended its honor! What a roller-coaster of emotions!

C: 就是…「寻径指津」爱好者的圈子。
E: It's the..."Pathfinder" fan circle...

C: 你们不知道吗？演武仪典有「人气复活」的机制。被淘汰的选手或队伍，只要在网络投票里获得足够的人气，就能参加复活赛重返赛场～
E: You guys didn't know? The Wardance has a "popularity revival" rule. If eliminated contenders or teams garner enough popularity votes in online polls, they can participate in the repechage and re-enter the ring!

C: 反正就是在小桂子的努力下，我素裳又回来啦！
E: Anyway, it's all thanks to Lil Gui's hard work that I, Sushang, am back in the fight!

C: 么么～么！
E: Mehr mehr, mehr!

C: 贝洛伯格！我听人说起过…难怪你这个铁臂看起来如此威风，老师也是来参加演武仪典的吧？
E: Belobog! I've heard of it from others... No wonder your metal arm looks so awesome. Master, you must be here to compete in the Wardance, right?

C: 哈哈，真是个有趣的法子，好，就这么办！
E: Haha, what an interesting trick! Okay, I'll give it a go!

C: 那，我还有什么能做的吗？
E: Is... Is there anything else I can do?

C: 卢卡，你一直有个坏习惯，喜欢硬吃人一招然后找破绽。但杰帕德力量比你大太多了，记住喽，不要硬扛他的拳头。
E: Luka, you've always had this bad habit of taking a hit to exploit a weakness, but Gepard's much stronger than you, so remember, stay away from his punches.

C: 卢卡选手，接下来这场比赛的对手，波提欧…你可一定要小心。这是个极度狂躁的危险分子！
E: Luka, your next opponent is Boothill... You have to be careful. He's a dangerous maniac!

C: 哟呵！{F#小姑娘}{M#小子}你是我肚子里的蛔虫吗？
E: Whoa! Kid, are you a mind reader or something?

C: 下次开始我真的要收费了啊！
E: I'm really going to start charging money next time!

C: 太好了！卢卡选手！你终于振作起来了！
E: That's great! Luka, you've finally come around!

C: 你可能不熟悉我出生的地方。在我还是个孩子的时候，大家都生活的很苦很苦，每天都有人在死亡的边缘挣扎……
E: You may not be familiar with the place of my birth. When I was still a child, everyone led hard lives, teetering on the brink of death at all times...

C: 我讨厌这种感觉…我觉得自己无能为力，被人家拿捏在手心里，无论怎么反抗都像笑话似的。
E: I hate this feeling... It makes me feel powerless, like my life is within the palm of their hand, and all my efforts to fight back seem like a joke.

C: 星穹列车的社交圈也太广了吧！我参加个演武仪典都能碰到一堆和你称兄道弟的好朋友……
E: The Astral Express is so well-connected! I've run into so many friends of yours already while participating in the Wardance...

C: 我必须纠正你的观点，卢卡——伊德莉拉的教诲里不包含「胜者比败者更美」这种歪理。
E: I must correct you, Luka — Idrila never promotes the twisted notion of winners being more beautiful than losers.

C: 他的一切努力都失败了。
E: All his efforts were in vain.

C: 不，青雀小姐，他没有失败。伊戈尔•哈夫特后来回到了雅利洛-Ⅵ，战斗在抵抗反物质军团的前线。
E: No, Miss Qingque. He didn't fail. Igor Haft later returned to Jarilo-VI and fought against the Antimatter Legion on the frontline.

C: 所以我参赛了。这样无论我们中谁获胜，都会为贝洛伯格赢得声誉。
E: Thus, I entered the competition. This ensures that regardless of who emerges victorious, Belobog will earn recognition.

C: 站在这「竞锋守擂」擂台上的每一个人，都是了不起的战士。
E: Anyone who qualifies for the "Ringmaster's Challenge" is a respectable warrior.

C: 狐人僧侣的五官扭作一团。她紧紧咬住犬牙，徒劳地想扼住体内的愤怒。
E: The foxian monk's features contort in anger. She clenches her canine teeth tightly, trying in vain to calm the raging anger within her.

C: ……推论合理。
E: ...The deduction is logically sound.

C: 终于能撬开两位的嘴巴了？谢谢你，卢卡。
E: Finally got them to talk? Thanks, Luka.

C: 更何况，这可是帝皇战争时留下的玩意儿，所造杀业可不是一般的重。
E: Besides, this is a machine left behind during the Emperor's War — it has committed more sins of murder than we can imagine.

C: 我们赶着去仙舟呢，铁施主。如果你想了解丹轮寺，我们可以做个同路人，让驮那师父为你一路讲经说法。师父，这妥当吗？
E: We're in a rush to reach the Xianzhou, steel patron. If you wish to learn more about Claretwheel Temple, let us become travel companions and Master Dhyana can preach the mantra to you along the way. Would that be appropriate, Master Dhyana?

C: 停手吧。
E: Stop here.

C: 开始启动反有机方程演算。
E: Begin running the Anti-Organic Equation extrapolation.

C: 智械…你想做什么？
E: Intellitron... What do you intend to do?

C: 这帮记者还真的什么都往里写啊，看来下次得注意发言了。
E: These journalists really will sensationalize anything and everything. Gotta watch my words next time.

C: 合理的战术调整是需要看准时机的，这就是教练之间的博弈。
E: It's all about precise timing when it comes to tactical adjustments. This is the clash between coaches.

C: 扑满兄弟们！上吧！去吞噬卢卡吧！
E: Trotter brothers! Go forth! Swallow up Luka!

C: 应该打不过吧？你还是有点太强了。
E: Probably not? You're kind of overpowered.

C: 没问题！开始吧！
E: No problem! Let's begin!

C: …你完全不打算理会我是吧？
E: ...You're going to completely ignore me, eh?

C: 卢卡大意了，没有闪…
E: Luka got careless, and he didn't dodge...

C: 只要全力奔跑一定可以做到的。
E: As long as he sprints forth with all his being, he'll surely be able to make it.

C: 到场的各位记者朋友请在会场中找到合适位置，保持距离，并请按照流程准备好提问。
E: To the journalists who have arrived at the site, please situate yourselves appropriately, maintain your distance, and get your questions ready according to procedure.

C: 即便是见多识广的纯美骑士银枝，也应该承认卢卡选手通过「纯美」的考核绰绰有余。
E: Even the immensely knowledgeable Knight of Beauty, Argenti, would admit that Luka passes the evaluation of Beauty.

C: 你怎么只关心吃的，你到底是做什么的？
E: Why do you only care about food? What exactly is your job?

C: 我是教练，不是厨师，请注意你的问题。
E: I'm a coach, not a chef. Please watch what you ask.

C: （沉默）
E: (Remains silent)

C: 谢谢，这下你知道了吧？
E: Thank you. Now you know, don't you?

C: 与此同时，竞锋舰甲板上。
E: At the same time, on the Skysplitter's deck...

C: 想想你来这里的目的，不要被他们影响。
E: Think about why you're here. Don't let them affect you.

C: 你说话实在不像真的大毫。
E: You don't sound like the real Dahao at all.

C: …音乐派对？
E: ...music party?

C: 自我介绍就到这，压力来到你们了！
E: That's it for my self-introduction. It's your turn now!

C: 你为什么会对乱破感兴趣？
E: Why're you interested in Rappa?

C: 因为她实在太有魅力了！我在匹诺康尼长大，从小就在形形色色的派对中游荡，见过无数梦境名流与巨星，但从来没有任何人像乱破小姐这般特别——
E: Because she's super charming! I grew up on Penacony, and have been hopping from one party to another since young. I've met countless dreamscape celebrities and stars, but never one as special as Ms. Rappa...

C: 我也喜欢！看来我和乱破小姐有很多共同语言啊！
E: I like rap too! Looks like we share a common language!

C: 没什么事情了。
E: That's all.

C: 大概明白了。
E: I've just about got everything.

C: 实在是太厉害了！
E: That was awesome!

C: 其实……
E: Actually...

C: 你说，该不会是有什么太空生物偷偷混进来了吧？
E: You don't suppose some space creature managed to break in, do you?

C: 总感觉要是放任佩佩继续和他们呆在一起，迟早有天会学坏。
E: I can't help but feel that if I allow Peppy to hang out with them any longer, it'll eventually get led down some bad vices.

C: 对不起，最近有不少公务要处理，可能没法去匹诺康尼…但我和希露瓦会支持你的。
E: Sorry, I have a lot of official business to handle lately, so I might not make it to Penacony... But Serval and I will be supporting you.

C: 准备乐队演出。
E: Prepare for the band performance.

C: 谐乐学院指派给我的任务是：作为乐队核心完成在音乐派对的演出。乱破同学明显不会退让，我也尽到了吉他手的职责，那么就没有留在这的必要了。
E: The mission that Charmony Academy gave me was to complete a performance at the music party as a band leader. I know that Rappa won't back down, and I have fulfilled my duty as a guitarist, so there is no need for me to stick around here.

C: 再譬如…阁下精通键盘•忍具，可适当帮在下分担谱曲的职责，也算是能一展阁下的光彩。
E: What about... as you excel with the keyboard ningu, you can help me with some of the responsibility of song composition. You could use this as another way to show off your brilliance.

C: 这位外校学生，你有什么想要陈述的？
E: What is it you want to say, external student?

C: 主公，阁下的「忍•般若智慧」远胜常人，早已想到如何驳斥金属•大师了吧？
E: Master, your Ninja Prajna Wisdom far surpasses that of ordinary folk. You must have already figured out how to remonstrate Metal Master, right?
...Huh?

C: 而我不过是个被知识裹挟、被虚荣冲昏头脑、在象牙塔里闭门造车的学院派罢了。
E: Whereas, I am nothing more than an academic, blinded by my own knowledge, led astray by vanity, and left working away behind closed doors in my ivory tower.

C: 我这样…破坏了筑梦学院的规则，其余同学不会觉得不公平吗？
E: Do you think... that me breaking the rules of Dreamweaver Academy like this is unfair against the other students?

C: 拒绝：我与这位股东有协议在先，暂不发表看法。
E: Refusal: I have a prior agreement with this stakeholder, and will temporarily not be expounding any opinion.

C: 学生喜欢有什么用，要学校满意才行！我们有决定权吗？说话管用吗？只能等着被处分！
E: Who cares if students like it? The school's preference comes first! Do we have any decision-making powers? Do people even listen to us? We can only wait to get disciplined!

C: 听你这么说，好像也有点道理。难道她是被关起来了？
E: It makes some sense when you put it like that. Could she be locked up somewhere?

C: ——重复。音乐派对的闭幕演出即将开始，请表演乐队登台。
E: ...I repeat, the music party's closing show is about to start. Performing band, please get on stage.

C: 啊？这怎么行！走走，我陪你去跟他们论论理，本姑娘最瞧不起这种恃强凌弱的人了！
E: Hah? That won't do! Come on, I'll go with you to talk some sense into them. I'm not going to stand by and watch them bully the defenseless!

C: 喔！这就是和我们音律忍者作对的下场！
E: Ho! This is what you get for opposing the sound ninja!

C: 不知为何，白茫茫的雪原里有只扑满正在悠闲地踱步，对你的靠近没有表现出任何警惕。
E: For reasons unknown, there is a trotter sauntering about in the shimmering ivory snow. It does not seem alarmed as you get closer.

C: 好可爱的小家伙~嘿嘿，要不要跟我回学校呀~
E: What a cute lil fella! Heehee, how about coming back to school with me...

C: 大哥！就在那边，我找到那位桶友了！嗨——
E: Big Bro! Over there, I found that trashfriend! Hiiii!

C: 要打架吗，算我一个！
E: Is it a fight? Count me in!

C: 会觉得后悔吗？
E: Do you regret it?

C: 来试试吧，不用花任何钱，就能在游戏中得到完美的体验，绝对刺激，绝对好玩！
E: Give it a spin. Immerse yourself in a perfect game experience at no cost. It's guaranteed high-octane, <unbreak>100%</unbreak> assured fun!

C: 简单是简单…
E: I mean, it is, but...

C: 瞧你说的，打差评的我都给退货，怎么就成黑店了？买东西嘛，总有货不对板的时候。但在咱们这儿，商品不重要，重要的是交易的快乐。
E: Balderdash. I refund all who leave bad reviews. How am I doing something illegal? It's buying and selling, after all, and we can't always meet every customer's needs. But as for what we're doing here, our products aren't that important. It's the very fun of trading.

C: 家人慢走，明天还来啊！
E: Take care, friend. Come back tomorrow!

C: 杨大师，徒儿谨遵教诲。
E: Master Yang, this student will take your teachings to heart.

C: 不对劲，不对劲！杨叔！{F#她}{M#他}是不是作弊了！怎么变得这么强！
E: No, something's off! Mr. Yang! Is {F#she}{M#he} cheating!? How did {F#she}{M#he} suddenly get so strong?

C: 别担心，列车长～你忘了神通广大的小三月最擅长什么了？看我用六相冰拯救冰淇淋！
E: Fret not, conductor! Have you forgotten what the brilliant lil' March is best at? I'll save the ice cream with my Six-Phased Ice!

C: …令人忍俊不禁！「闭嘴」，你是我的神！
E: ...You sure are a tin can of laughs! Shush, you're my idol!

C: 不如我先敲晕你！
E: How about I knock you out first!

C: 哼哼，那就看看咱俩各自的主队，谁能笑到最后吧～
E: Heh-heh, let's see which of our teams will get the last laugh then!

C: 「谐乐学院的邀请实在盛情难却，可惜我排不开档期，只好委派副导演代为执导。」
E: "I could hardly refuse Charmony Academy's invitation, but I really couldn't get my schedule to work, so I had to ask the assistant director to manage it in my stead."

C: 你以为只要揪了就会有小鸟跳出来吗？思维定势可不好啾。
E: You think a bird's gonna jump out with just a yank? It's not good to be so fixed in your mental model, tweet.

C: 虽然这是拍不出来的。
E: Even though it can't be photographed.

C: 今天的拍摄全部完成啦，我上传照片，看看大家怎么评价吧。
E: That's it for today's photography. I'll upload the photos and see what everyone has to say.

C: 不止照片记下的那一瞬间，照片和照片之间，也发生了许多事情…照片一叠叠变厚，失去记忆的那段日子，好像在生命里也显得越来越短了呢……
E: It's not just the instant that the photos captured, but the many things that happened between photos... As the photos stack up, the portion of my life when I had no memories seems to get smaller and smaller...

C: 大家预备——
E: Ready, everyone?

C: 而「人间喜剧」最后的迭代，也需要你来提供更多的变量，为它画上完美的休止符。
E: And The Human Comedy's final iteration also requires your provision of even more variables, to end it with a perfect rest.

C: 此行，我被派来记录奥赫玛最近发生的事，没想到新的没写上，还把旧的给弄丢了。
E: On this journey, I have been dispatched to record the recent incidents at Okhema. Unfortunately, I didn't get to record in the new scroll, and even lost the old one.

C: 我们请求与天谴之矛对话，而非你，又或你那虚假的王。
E: We seek an audience with the Lance of Fury, not with you, nor your false king.

C: ——嗷！嗷呜呜！
E: Ah! Awoowoo!

C: （先安抚它们）
E: (Placate them first)

C: 等等，缇宝老师说*也*，难道……
E: Hang on, Tribbie said "also." Does that mean...

C: 闹鬼了！
E: A ghost!

C: 正所谓「美德即知识」，「德性」是智慧的起源，也是智慧的终点。
E: As the saying goes, "virtue is knowledge" — virtue is wisdom's origin and finale.

C: 嗷呜嗷呜，不过是只紫黑色的皮蛋而已，拽什么拽？
E: Awoo-awoo, who're you trying to impress? You're just purple and black pudding!

C: 我先休息一下。
E: I need a break first.

C: 「豹豹碰碰大作战」！
E: "Seal Slammers"!

C: 小灰，你来啦！*我们*想问问你，最近有没有做什么<color=#dbc291ff>特别的梦</color>呢？
E: Little Gray, you're here! We want to ask you — have you had any... special dreams lately?

C: 阿雅和*我们*都担心，小灰接受了{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}的祝福后，会不会得到具有启示作用的<color=#dbc291ff>预言梦</color>。
E: We and Agy are worried that after receiving the blessing of {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}, you might have had some prophetic dreams.

C: 三大预言灾厄会依次发生——「黑潮蚀清波」、「巨兽卧沉渊」…
E: The three prophesied disasters will happen in order: The black tide muddles clear waters, the giant beast rests in the abyss...

C: 泡泡，噢，我的泡泡。
E: Oh Bubbles, my Bubbles.

C: 啊，缇宝大人！这是在…「豹豹碰碰大作战」？
E: Oh, Lady Tribbie! You're doing the... Seal Slammers, yes?

C: 最后一个问题，离开{NICKNAME}，你有信心拿到「金海豹杯」吗？
E: One last question: After leaving {NICKNAME}, are you confident you can win the "Gold Seal Cup"?

C: 我的粉丝总是很热情。
E: My fans can be quite enthusiastic.

C: 当然，或许我们可以用一种更委婉的表述方式——伟大的*致敬*。
E: Also, we prefer a more implicit way: a flattering homage.

C: 在此之前，我的朋友，不妨先去体验一下正式版的魅力吧？
E: Before that, my friend, why not dive into the charm of the official version?

C: 对此我深表赞同。所以除了随游玩进度解锁的奖励外，玩家还可以通过获得某些成就，来换取限定款浣熊头像周边。
E: I couldn't agree more. So, in addition to rewards unlocked as you progress, players can also earn exclusive raccoon-themed avatar merchandise by unlocking certain achievements.

C: 「于是勇敢的球棒侠决定追寻魔王的足迹，向其发起挑战。」
E: "Thus, the brave Baseballer decides to follow the Demon King's trail and challenge them."

C: 没人能靠踩刹车赢下比赛，您要是准备好了就来叫我吧。
E: No one's winning this race by tapping the brakes. If you're ready, just call out to me.

C: 再说了，这是您登记注册的球笼赛车…哦，我想起来了，您说您没登记过。
E: Besides, this is the racer you registered for... Oh, wait, you said you didn't register.

C: 她的首场比赛，其他选手都因食物中毒缺席。
E: In her first race, all her competitors were absent because of food poisoning.

C: 什么车都没差，反正看技术。
E: Any car works, as long as the driver's got skills.

C: 别担心，只是普通的闹鬼罢了！
E: Don't worry, it's just an ordinary case of haunting!

C: 你就不怕被公司发现？
E: Aren't you afraid the IPC will find out?

C: 没关系，我不介意。
E: It's okay, I don't mind.

C: 幽灵小鸟根本就不在匹诺康尼的历史体系里，换句话说，它肯定是只外来的鸟。
E: Ghost Bird doesn't exist in any Penacony historical records, which means it's definitely from the outside.

C: 等等，什么情况？！你会说话？
E: Wait, what the heck!? You can talk!?

C: *鸟语花香*——
E: *Some truly fowl language*

C: 言归正传，配方里记着这么一种调饮，据说能让饮用者<color=#dbc291ff>对任何事表示赞同</color>。
E: But back to business. The recipes mention a drink that supposedly makes the drinker <color=#dbc291ff>agree with absolutely anything</color>.

C: 果断地开！
E: Rip it open!

C: 也是我的荣幸！
E: Likewise!

C: 星穹列车诚招人才。
E: The Astral Express is recruiting!

C: 你醒啦，小灰毛？俗话说日有所思，夜有所梦。原来你每天都想着这些事呀。
E: Rise and shine, Gray Hair. Like they say, think about something all day, and you'll dream about it at night. So this is what's been on your mind, huh?

C: （翻翻配方）
E: (You flip through the recipe...)

C: 最后一份配方字迹模糊，已经几近空白，真的有可能复原吗？
E: The last recipe is so faded it's almost blank. Can it really be restored?

C: 好哇，原来在这儿等着我呢。
E: Oh, so you were waiting for me here.

C: 令人忍俊不禁。
E: Heh, get it?

C: 测试进度还顺利么，如果累了的话可以先休息一下。
E: How's the testing going? Feel free to take a break if you're getting tired.

C: 当然，我这几天见到的宝贝比之前一整年都多！
E: Of course. In the past week alone I've seen more treasure than the entire past year!

C: 从初到仙舟，到血战幻胧…你尽可能将故事讲得跌宕起伏，可西衍先生的注意力却愈发涣散。
E: From your arrival on the Xianzhou to your bloody battle with Phantylia, you do your best to cover all the ups and downs and twists and turns of your story... But Mr. Xiyan's attention span seems to be waning.

C: 什么天材地宝，灵丹妙药的，吃下去少走五百年练武习艺的弯路，一下子打爆敌人，多爽快啊？
E: A glorious treasure: The elixir of life. Take it for a shortcut past centuries of martial art practice and cultivation. Then suddenly, pow! We're smashing enemies left and right. What's not to love about that?

C: 仓促起名，您见谅。再说了，能让您平添功力的灵丹不叫这个名字，还能叫啥？唉…咱们还是到那个炉鼎旁边继续编吧，在那里比较有灵感。
E: I am sorry for the ad-lib naming here. Anyway, what else am I going to call an elixir that magically imbues powers like this? Erm... Let's go over to that elixir cauldron over there and keep at it. I'm sure that'll give us some quality inspiration.

C: 怎么样，您准备好了吗？
E: How's it going? Ready to start?

C: 「{NICKNAME}举起神兵，夷然不惧，应道——」
E: "{NICKNAME} raised the divine weapon fearlessly, and dropped this line —"

C: 胡编乱造的作者…
E: Some screenwriting nonsense...

C: 那我去锻造了…
E: I'll go forge it then...

C: 将柄材雕刻好后安装上去。
E: Sculpt the hilt-wood and then install it.

C: （征得他的录音授权）
E: (Ask his permission to make recordings.)

C: 确实！
E: That's true, indeed!

C: 命令以太灵互相厮杀，让玩家从中取乐，真是太残忍了…如果你还没有感觉，就跟我来一场对决吧，在战斗中好好感受一下以太灵的痛苦！
E: Ordering Aether Spirits to massacre each other for the entertainment of players, it's just too cruel... If you have not felt it yet, come and battle with me. I will show you the true suffering of the Aether Spirits!

C: 原来如此。
E: I see.

C: 没关系，乔瓦尼先生肯定会指导我们的——对吧？
E: Not to worry! Mr. Giovanni will explain it all, right?

C: 看起来没起作用啊……
E: Looks like it didn't work...

C: 「次元扑满」…这可是特别稀有的以太灵。但它刚才在对决中的样子有些奇怪，是出了什么事吗？
E: A "Warp Trotter..." That's a pretty rare Aether Spirit... but they were acting kind of strange in the battle — is there something wrong with them?

C: 你…！这种事，本姑娘第一个不答应！
E: Are you kidding!? Nuh-uh, no way!

C: 果然，有游戏的地方就有你。
E: Where there's a game, there's Silver Wolf.

C: 记着，跟戴面具的人打交道一定要留个心眼。
E: Look, when you're dealing with someone wearing a mask, you gotta keep your wits about you. Common sense.

C: 你知道乔瓦尼的底细吗？
E: Do you have any intel on Giovanni?

C: 他可能掌握了某些情报。
E: Maybe he has some new intel.

C: 至于托帕总监和艾丝妲小姐方面，我会向她们说明情况。
E: As for Director Topaz and Miss Asta, I'll explain the situation to them.

C: {NICKNAME}，休息得怎么样？今天就是决胜乐园之旅的最后一站，可得把精神养好啦！
E: How'd you sleep, {NICKNAME}? Today marks the end of our Victory Zone journey! We'll need all the energy we can get!

C: 不愧是总监，游戏水平也高。
E: I'm sure you've got some serious gaming skills.

C: 废话少说，交出徽章！
E: Enough talk, hand over the Mastery Mark!

C: 好，等到下个赛季，我们再来一次对决吧！
E: Alright, let's battle again in the next season!

C: 就算你这么说，对决也停不下来啊！
E: We're not done with you yet!

C: 完成，两位的信息上传到锦标赛系统中了。两位只要向那边的同事告知准备完成，就可以入场比赛了。
E: All done. Your information has been uploaded to the system. Just inform my colleague over there when you're ready, and you can enter the arena.

C: 我的冠军之旅就到此为止了…你们两个，加油啊！如果拿下冠军的是你们，贝洛伯格的大家一定会热血沸腾的吧！
E: Well, my dream of becoming champion ends here... but I've got faith in you two. If you two clinch the title, the whole of Belobog will be singing your praises!

C: （两位小朋友似乎完全没有注意到我……）
