E: (Seems like the two kids haven't even noticed me.)

C: 请选手回到准备区——准备入场——！
E: Will contestants please make their way to the prep zone and prepare to enter the arena!

C: 我就知道又是你。
E: I knew you'd turn up again sooner or later.

C: 哈，那恐怕就有些困难了。娜塔莎女士一定不会同意的。
E: Hmm, that might be a little tricky. I'm afraid Miss Natasha would probably have objections.

C: 嘿！我的剑呢？你你你给我等着……
E: Hey! Where's my sword? Y—You just wait...

C: 瞧那边，有两个人穿着丹鼎司的制服，应该是来找龙女的吧……
E: Look! Those two are wearing Alchemy Commission uniforms. They're probably looking for the Dragon Lady...

C: 现在，怎么追？
E: How do we catch them now?

C: 走一步看一步吧。
E: Let's feel it out.

C: 将军同情它？
E: Do you sympathize with them?

C: 让你们见识见识岁阳的奇术！
E: Now you will experience the might of the heliobi!

C: 怎么会突然消失……
E: How could she suddenly disappear...

C: 难道是闹鬼了？
E: Maybe it was a ghost?

C: 白露大人…保持冷静，你被岁阳依附了，你的所思所想都不是你自己的念头。
E: Lady Bailu — please calm down. You're not yourself right now — you're being influenced by a heliobus.

C: 他们这是在看什么呢？
E: What are they looking at?

C: 青雀，多谢你力挽狂澜。
E: Qingque, thanks to you, the Divination Commission is safe again.

C: 摇动「同心火铃」
E: Shake Harmonic Chime

C: 我正在看回复呢，你也快来看一看。寒鸦大人说她马上就来。
E: I'm looking at the reply — see, here. Miss Hanya said she's on her way.

C: 不是我自卖自夸，咱们在「罗浮杂俎」上的文章，已经是罗浮最大的话题了。要是这么突然断更的话，真是对不起咱们的观众老爷们呀。
E: I don't wanna brag, but our articles on Ghostly Grove are the talk of the town! If we suddenly stopped uploading, it'd be pretty unfair to our audience.

C: 小心别伤到被附身的人。
E: Be careful not to hurt anyone else!

C: 大胆岁阳，你别在这里害人了！
E: Brazen heliobus: Don't you harm anyone here!

C: 不、不，请等等！
E: No, no, please wait!

C: …被岁阳缠身，会很快让我枯竭。我知道这一点，{M#小伙子}{F#小姑娘}…我在朱明仙舟读学宫时研究的就是这个。
E: ...I'll soon wither away from exposure to a heliobus, I already know that. {M#Dude}{F#Lady}, this is just what I used to research back in my days studying at the Xianzhou Zhuming's academy.

C: {M#小伙子}{F#小姑娘}，我知道你们要按十王司的规矩办事…但我想求你缓一缓，等我和她一起渡过最后一段时间，她一定会来找你们的。
E: {M#Dude}{F#Lady}, I know you have to act according to the rules of the Ten-Lords Commission... but I'm asking you to relax just a little. Once we've spent our final moments together, she will definitely come for you.

C: 人类，连自己族类的情感都无法理解和同情吗？还是你太过年轻，没能体会过挂念另一个人的滋味呢……
E: Humans: Are you really incapable of understanding and sympathizing with the feelings of your very own kind? Or are you so young to have never experienced the feeling of missing absent friends...

C: 走吧，我们回去把它带到镇妖塔里吧。
E: Let's go back and put it inside the Suppression Tower.

C: 勤奋或怠惰都是人的天性，我倒也没有什么偏见。但一个人突然性格大变，多半是有外因影响。
E: People are naturally diligent or lazy, I do not judge anyone for either. However, when someone's personality suddenly transforms, it is often because of an external influence.

C: …她正在书库那厢和同事们高谈阔论，畅想美好未来。
E: She's currently over by the repository, talking loudly to her colleagues and fantasizing about her bright future.

C: 当然！这些年来青总一直念叨着{NICKNAME}你的名字。
E: Of course! President Qing has been talking about {NICKNAME} for years.

C: 一个坏消息，星际和平娱乐复刻帝垣琼玉的规则推出了一款牌戏！
E: I have terrible news. The Interastral Peace Entertainment has created a knock-off of Celestial Jade!

C: 快快从青雀身上离开！
E: Leave Qingque's body, now!

C: 说不定你才是在弄虚作假。
E: For all we know, you're the one making up stories.

C: 将食物取出。
E: Remove the food from inside.

C: 先停手，我是可以讲道理的…终于有活人让老子吸口阳气了，你们让我喘喘……
E: Stop, I can be reasonable... Finally, a living person for me to breathe the sweet scent of life. Let me catch my breath first...

C: …什、什么？
E: ...Wh—What?

C: 我们找到雷诺一家的照片，这上面哪位是你？
E: We found a picture of Renault and his family. Which one of these is you?

C: 我认出来了，你就是那个主播！
E: I knew it was you. You're that streamer!

C: 藿藿？小心！
E: Huohuo? Watch out!

C: 对啊，咱们不是分头行动吗？
E: Oh yeah, shouldn't we have split up?

C: 你注意到阿月似乎紧张了起来，手指焦灼地扣着自己的衣角。
E: You notice that A-Yue seems anxious as her fingers fidget nervously at the hem of her blouse.

C: …保重了，阿月。
E: ...Take care, A-Yue.

C: 好。
E: Alright.

C: 别看我，我不会。
E: Don't look at me like that. I don't know how.

C: 累活都交给我是吧。
E: Giving all the tough work to me, huh?

C: 这边的水里偶尔会出现龙的影子，我第一次见时也吃了一惊呢。
E: Occasionally, dragons appear in the water here. I was surprised when I first saw them.

C: 其实，另一边也有。
E: There're also dragons on the other side.

C: 不过…这只岁阳说过自己想要离开仙舟。看在它没做过什么坏事的份上，多少考虑一下？
E: But... the heliobus said it wants to leave the Xianzhou. Seeing that it didn't cause any harm, perhaps we can consider its suggestion?

C: 唔，也是呢…毕竟你是带着这项任务来的嘛。
E: Uh, that's true... After all, you came here for this mission.

C: 咱会在这里待一会，你去忙自己的事吧。
E: I'll stay here for a bit. You go do what you need to do.

C: …有什么好在意的，我来看看。
E: ...Nothing's worth worrying so much about. Let me take a look.

C: 嗯嗯，{NICKNAME}这建议不错。
E: Mmm-hmm, good idea {NICKNAME}.

C: 尊敬的特邀测试员，诚邀您参与本次调研，我们期待您的反馈与建议。
E: Dear Special Test Candidate: We warmly invite you to participate in our survey and look forward to your suggestions and feedback.

C: 艾丝妲站长前不久为造物们购置了一批睡眠用品，她把这称为「猫窝」，当时有不少空闲猫窝被闲置了。
E: Lead Researcher Asta bought some sleeping supplies for the creations. She calls this a "Kitty Cot." There were lots of empty cat beds lying around unused at the time.

C: 这…不是，不过她会不会这么奖励你，我也不清楚。
E: That's... not it. I'm not sure if she would reward you for this.

C: 阮•梅想我们了吗？
E: Does Ruan Mei miss us?

C: 没啥意思…
E: Not at all...

C: 遇见您是我此生莫大的幸运。我该用什么来赞美太阳？绚丽的糖浆因您的出现而黯然失色，简陋的酒吧因您的到来而熠熠生辉，在我心中，您就像那——
E: It is my utmost fortune to have encountered your presence. How shall I extol the sun? Your radiance surpasses the splendor of syrup, and the humble lounge gleams with your arrival. In my heart, you are akin to the...

C: 「败逃的提督」。
E: The Defeated Governor.

C: …我当然知道！
E: ...Of course I know that!

C: 够了！停手吧！
E: Enough! Stop it!

C: 「还是那两扇门。」
E: "It's the same two doors as before."

C: 即使冒着发狂的风险，我也会在这个时候赌上全部。
E: Even if it drives me into a frenzy, I'm willing to risk everything at this point.

C: 「请听好我的问题。」
E: "Riddle me this."

C: 这是你想要的答案吗？
E: Is that the answer you were hoping for?

C: 我在不远处开了家酒吧，在那里，不会有任何人欺负你，还能遇到和你有着相同处境的「美梦剧团」。你愿意跟我回去吗？
E: I've set up a lounge nearby where no one will bully you. There, you can meet others from the Sweet Dreams Troupe who are in the same situation as you. Will you come with me?

C: 嘻嘻。莫非这就是那些宾客嘴里经常会骂的…雅痞？哇咔咔，这两个字是这么写的嘛？
E: Hee-hee, perhaps this is what those customers call... yuppies? Mwahaha! Y—u—p—p—i—e? Is that how it's spelled?

C: ——来杯微酸不苦，超级甜，尝起来清爽干净，有果香，还带点气泡的饮料！快点！
E: I want a drink that's slightly sour, not too bitter, super sweet, refreshing, fruity, and with a little fizz! Hurry up!

C: 果然是大！我的制作工艺还不错吧，保证挑不出毛病！哇咔咔咔咔！
E: Ah, it's big! My craftsmanship is pretty good, huh? I guarantee you can't find a single flaw! Hahaha!

C: 先转会搅拌棒。
E: Move the mixer first.

C: 我的孤独，虽败犹荣。
E: My aloofness remains unaltered, even in the face of defeat.

C: 到退场的时候了。像你这样生活丰富而充实的人，肯定不会记得我的。
E: It's time to leave the stage. Surely someone with a life as fulfilling as yours won't even remember me.

C: （…是不是直接把冰块敷在头上会更有效果？）
E: (...Would it be more effective if I just place ice cubes on her head?)

C: 但是我拒绝。
E: I refuse.

C: 令人赞叹的杰作！看啊，你的双手是何等地神奇，轻易便能抚平我内心的创伤！
E: A wondrous masterpiece! Your hands possess an enchanting touch, effortlessly mending the wounds within me!

C: 所谓的幸福是什么呢？
E: What is "happiness" anyway?

C: 还是先点单吧。请给我<color=#dbc291ff>一大杯越浓稠越好的饮料，味道稍微刺激点。最重要的——再来点爱，谢谢。</color>
E: Better make an order first. Please give me something in <color=#dbc291ff>a large glass, as thick as you can make it, and tastes a little intense. Most importantly — a little more love, please</color>.

C: 假设您就是这位当事人的话，还会继续联系对方嘛？
E: If you were in that lady's shoes, would you keep trying to contact Siobhan?

C: 好啦，喝完调制的饮料，也该把那件好玩的事告诉您了，就是呀——
E: Well, now that I've finished my drink, it's time to share that interesting story with you...

C: …细说？
E: ...Care to explain?

C: 假设您就是这位当事人的话，还会继续联系对方嘛？
E: If you were in that lady's shoes, would you keep trying to contact Siobhan?

C: 要是人家在面对那位的时候，也像您这样能说会道就好了。
E: If only I could chat with him as effortlessly as you do.

C: 是。
E: Yes.

C: （小星星的表现挺正常的，就是不太喜欢我的样子。）
E: (Starlet is behaving normally. It just doesn't seem to like me.)

C: <size=28>好的！我要<color=#dbc291ff>超大杯，甜甜的，有足够多颜色</color>的饮料。麻烦您了！</size>
E: <size=28>Okay! I want <color=#dbc291ff>an extra large glass that's sweet and has plenty of color</color>. Thanks for the trouble!</size>

C: …分层？
E: ...Layering?

C: 对，它喜欢说些容易引发误会的话，其实自己害羞得不行，每次都要靠冰块来给内部的电路降温。
E: Yeah, it loves saying things that could cause misunderstandings, but deep down, it's so shy that it has to use ice cubes to cool down its circuits.

C: 作为临时顶班的调饮师，你很敏锐。还猜到了什么，都说出来吧，让我听听。
E: You're sharp for a temporary drinksmith. What else have you figured out? Tell me.

C: 说是我的客人就行，家族的守卫不会拦你。不过是群服从命令的猎犬罢了，别太给他们面子。
E: Just tell them you're my guest, and The Family's guards won't stop you. They're merely obedient Bloodhounds following orders. Don't take them too seriously.

C: 梦境酒店不是被家族封锁了？
E: But isn't the hotel in the Dreamscape sealed off by The Family?

C: …这家酒吧的真实目的？
E: ...The true purpose of this lounge?

C: 当然，准备这些材料花费了我不少心思，好在确实收到了成效。
E: Of course. It took me a lot of effort to gather the ingredients. Luckily, my efforts paid off.

C: 汪！倒是你，作为调饮师，却对顾客提出过分的评价，这样很不对的哇！
E: What about yourself, woof? As the drinksmith, making harsh comments about your customers is rude and inappropriate!

C: （开始调制）
E: (Start preparing the drink)

C: （…已经快到忍耐的极限了。）
E: (...I've almost reached the limit of my endurance.)

C: 汪！味道真棒，舒翁不在的时候，你就是这里最伟大的调饮师了哇！
E: Woof! This tastes amazing! When Siobhan's not around, you are the greatest drinksmith here!

C: 好吧，咱们不扯这些闲篇了，先前你帮了不少忙，我想着也得投桃报李——

C: 准备开始苏乐达天团的正式表演了！
E: Prepare to begin SoulGlad Idol Group's proper performance!

C: 别问了，我都记得。
E: Don't even ask. I remember it all vividly.

C: 到全新的迷宫中寻找吧！我把财宝都藏在了那里——你仿佛能听到魔术师的耳语，他在期待赞美与掌声。
E: "Seek it out in a whole new maze! I've hidden all my treasures there!" It feels like you are hearing the magician's whisper, eager for praise and applause.

C: 猎犬还兴这个？
E: Are the Bloodhounds into this, too?

C: 我可从没说过自己是猎犬，咱就一打工的。
E: Hey, I never said I was a Bloodhound. I'm just an ordinary employee trying to make ends meet.

C: 现在这里的《仓鼠球骑士：速度与坚果》和另一侧的《哈努兄弟：狼之道》都开放了，欢迎您随时动工拍摄…呸，体验游玩！
E: Now Hamster Ball Knight: Fast & Furynuts and Brother Hanu: Way of the Wolf are available. Please feel free to work... I mean, have fun!

C: 哈？我是那么无聊的人吗！有这个时间我还不如去养只电子宠物玩玩。
E: Huh? Do you think I've got nothing better to do? If I had the time for that, I'd spend it playing with a virtual pet.

C: 您看，就是这样——那么您快来试试将您自己的小鸟也摆上去吧！
E: See? That's how you do it. Now, try placing your own bird up there!

C: 那么我就先不打扰啦，祝您接下来玩得开心~
E: Alright, I'll leave you to it now. I hope you enjoy the game!

C: 嗯，那就一起吧。不过先说好，我可不擅长打游戏哦。
E: Count me in, then! But don't say I didn't warn you: Gaming isn't my forte.

C: 流萤，你看这是什么——
E: Check that out, Firefly!

C: 在银河间巡演的时候，曾有位朋友送了我一本童谣。故事的主角是位没有名字的勇者。
E: Back when I was on a cosmic tour, a friend once gave me a children's book. The protagonist of the story was a hero without a name.

C: 关于「折纸小鸟」，匹诺康尼一直都流传着这样的说法：这些卡通角色其实是真实存在的，但只有被它们认可的人才能看见。
E: When it comes to Origami Birds, there has always been an urban legend spreading around Penacony: That these cartoon characters are actually real, but can only be seen by people whom they approve of.

C: 真难受…感觉大家都对我有误会，我想辩解，他们也不听……
E: It feels terrible... it seems like everyone misunderstands me. I try to explain, but they won't listen...

C: 妾身以为，这是你当下能实实在在应对流言的最好方法。
E: I believe this is the best way you can truly handle rumors right now.

C: 观众朋友们，没有黑幕。是我技不如人，肉身扛不住卢卡的铁拳…对不起，让你们失望了……
E: Dear spectators, this isn't rigged. I was simply outmatched and could not withstand Luka's iron fists... I'm sorry to have disappointed my supporters...

C: 那么有人就要问了，这仙舟古武术怎么就能和星际和平公司扯上关系呢？这话当从两千多年前说起。有史载为证，博识学会曾受邀相助仙舟参与丰饶民战争……
E: So, you might wonder, how do Xianzhou ancient martial arts connect with the IPC? Well, this story goes back to over two thousand years ago. Historical records show that the Intelligentsia Guild was once invited to help the Xianzhou during the Denizens of Abundance Wars...

C: 可叹年悠月久，这段盟友佳话竟然被后人遗忘。这也是我今天出现在这里的原因，我要还原历史，重现历史。星际和平公司的机甲，也是咱们仙舟古武术的瑰宝！
E: Regrettably, over the years, this tale of allies has been forgotten. This is why I'm here today, to restore and bring back history. The Interastral Peace Corporation's mechs are also treasures of Xianzhou ancient martial arts!

C: 卢卡，别接受他挑战…
E: Luka, don't accept his challenge...

C: 稍等一下，这怎么变成我义肢的发布会了……
E: Hold on. How did this turn into my prosthetic's launch event...

C: 对你我这样的人来说，道德、观点、立场都不过是给别人听的说辞。唯一重要的，只有数不清的信用点，不是吗？
E: For people like us, morality, perspectives, and allegiances are just pretenses for others. The only thing that matters is countless credits, isn't it?

C: 最坏的打算是，两个区域的重合，真就只是一场巧合。巧合，巧合也太多了……
E: The worst-case scenario is that the overlapping of these two domains was sheer coincidence. Coincidence... too many coincidences...

C: 最好预留一个小口，告诉她：「有空常来坐坐。」
E: Best to leave an inconspicuous backdoor to tell her: "Come back again when you have time."

C: …还是假的波尔卡？
E: ...Or was it an imposter?

C: 一个智械上班族总是喜怒不定，时间久了，同事发现了此中规律：如果他很暴躁，昨晚一定是充了火电；如果他很平静，昨晚一定是充了水电。
E: An Intellitron always goes to work with different moods. Over time, his coworker noticed a pattern: If he's grumpy, he must have charged with heat-based energy the night before. If he's calm, he must have charged with hydropower.

C: 明白了，那列车长就把你的家具全部没收帕！
E: Got it. Then Pom-Pom will confiscate all your furniture!

C: 入住快乐！！！
E: Congrats on the new home!

C: 随后，几乎房门关上的下个瞬间，又有人敲响了你的房门。
E: Just as the door is about to fully close, there's another knock at your door.

C: 在达米亚诺斯的带领下，你来到了奥赫玛外的附属城邦，在地下的一扇门前停住了脚步……
E: With Damionis' guidance, you have come to a vassal city outside of Okhema and stopped before an underground door...

C: 这时，一只比山还高的大地兽出现了。它一张口，便吃掉了其中七座，只剩如今刻法勒屁股下那座……
E: Then along came a dromas bigger than any mountain. One gulp later, seven mountains vanished, leaving only the one Kephale sits on now.

C: *激烈的拆蛋声*
E: *Intense sounds of the shell being ripped apart*

C: 你长不大了。
E: You'll never grow up now.

C: 让它领悟欧洛尼斯的祷言，问题自然迎刃而解。而让它学会祷言就是你接下来的课题了，{NICKNAME}——我言尽于此。
E: Once it masters the prayer of Oronyx, the issue will naturally resolve itself. Which brings us to your next assignment, {NICKNAME} — teach it the prayer. That's all I have to say.

E: You're the only one we can trust to teach, right?

E: Wait, please make sure to leave us a seat in the audience.

C: 世间所有孩子都怕疼痛，\n缇里西庇俄丝却自诩坚强。
E: Every child in the world is afraid of pain,\nyet Tribios tries to act tough.

C: 「它说，倾覆诸神吧。」
E: "Overthrow the gods, it declared."

C: 比太阳更加耀眼，\n比月亮更加华贵。
E: More blinding than the sun,\nRivaling the moon in its glory.

C: 不甘阖目之时，\n巨龙恍然——
E: In its final moments of defiance,\nThe Giant Dragon suddenly realizes —

C: 他们为巨龙架起盾墙，\n又驱军踏碎了那座城邦。
E: They raised a shield wall for the Giant Dragon,\nThen marched forth and crushed that city-state.

C: 「只是，要是成了大地兽，」\n「请务必要让我喂你红土！」
E: "But if you become a dromas,"\n"You absolutely must let me feed you redsoil!"

C: 「这也是一种『银河系漫游』。」 ——{NICKNAME} 「要是当初，列车长没踩刹车的话， 车厢恐怕会被我撞出个窟窿吧？」 ——三月七 「别加戏，是列车主动把你捞起来的。」 ——丹恒
E: "That's one way to go on a 'Cosmic Hitchhike.'" — {NICKNAME} "If the conductor hadn't hit the brakes back then, I probably would've punched a hole right through the car, huh?" — March 7th "Stop being dramatic. The Express was the one that actively scooped you up." — Dan Heng

C: 雕像的七窍喷出血液，\n人们欢呼中用金血洗手。
E: Then, blood gushed out from the statue's orifices,\nAnd the people, in cheers and elation, washed their hands in that golden blood.

C: <color=#9e5738>谁会赢？</color>\n「智识」星神的癫狂信众，\n还是君王举棋胜天的智谋？
E: <color=#9e5738>Who will win?</color>\nThe fanatical followers of the Aeon of Erudition,\nOr the audacious plots of the monarch playing against heaven?

C: 「嘻，你穿的什么奇装异服？」 少女捂嘴偷笑。 信使揪了揪少女的衣角， 「阿雅，不可以没礼貌！」
E: "Pfft. What kind of clothes are you even wearing?" The girl snickered behind her hand, While the messenger pulled on her sleeve. "Agy, don't be rude!"

C: 「我想告诉你，天空之所以伟大的秘密——」 「当痛苦的大地向它投来目光，」 「它总是会展露笑容！」
E: "I want to tell you the secret of the Sky's greatness — Whenever the anguished earth looks to it, it always offers a smile in return!"

C: 现在，当男人提剑而来，\n不必怀疑他将轻取胜利，
E: Now, when the man comes with sword in hand,\nThere is no need to doubt he will swiftly win victory.

C: 这有何难？\n她的双剪与双尺，胜过最巧的衣匠，\n勾勒出神塑般的曼妙形体。
E: Is that so hard?\nHer scissors and rulers are better than any garmentmaker,\nsculpting forms as perfect as the gods themselves.

C: 闭目惆怅之时， 侍女推来残破的织机。 「小姐，可否重拾针线，为我编织。」 小姐本想讪笑， 但睁眼却不禁失色—— 那侍者为护她周全， 疤痕遍布容颜。
E: As she closed her eyes in melancholy, The maidservant pushed a broken loom to her earnestly. "Miss, would you like to pick up the shuttle again and weave for me?" The young miss wanted to laugh, But could only respond with shock — For the maid's face was now covered in scars, As she fought to protect her mistress' safety.

C:
听闻此言，不知为何，
编织的渴望盖过了烦忧。

于是在断壁残垣中，
浪漫的织机重新转动。
E:
And yet, when she heard this,
The desire to weave overcame her fears.

Therefore, in the broken shadows of a house,
The loom of romance moved once more.

C: 实验第一阶段的产物。\n在第<unbreak>50121</unbreak>次循环中，因无机体Chaoz<unbreak>666</unbreak>的抉择，δ-me<unbreak>13</unbreak>受纳努克擢选飞升为绝灭大君。\n与十二因子关联的个体，演算回路中均出现了具有「毁灭」特征的金血，实验成功进入预定方向。
E: The product of the first experimental phase.\nDuring the <unbreak>50,121</unbreak>st cycle, due to the inorganic Chaoz<unbreak>666</unbreak>'s choice, δ-me<unbreak>13</unbreak> was selected to become a Lord Ravager by Nanook.\nAll entities linked to the twelve factors began to manifest Golden Blood with traits associated with Destruction within their extrapolation circuits. The experiment successfully entered its projected trajectory.

C:
「海列屈拉」曾对LykoS采取过多次攻击行为，但都收效甚微。

光历<unbreak>3960</unbreak>年，「海列屈拉」成为半神，移动权限卸载，并嵌入「坐标：斯缇科西亚」。

光历<unbreak>4534</unbreak>年后，「海列屈拉」持续提交内部指令：卸载ID：LykoS思维模块。该指令有违管理员安全协议，不予通过。

不久后，「海列屈拉」运算路径熔断，陷入休眠。
E:
"Helektra" had launched multiple attacks against LykoS, but with minimal success.

In Light Calendar <unbreak>3960</unbreak>, "Helektra" became a demigod. Its mobility permissions were removed, and it was fused into "Coordinate: Styxia."

After Light Calendar <unbreak>4534</unbreak>, "Helektra" continuously submitted internal commands to uninstall ID: LykoS's cognitive module. These commands violated the Administrator security protocols and were denied.

Not long after, "Helektra's" calculation pathway was overloaded, and it entered dormancy.

C: 具有<color=#f29e38ff>召唤能力</color>的敌人会根据你的行动进行倒计时。在计时结束时触发召唤，添加1个非精英敌人在空白区域。\n该敌人会直接出现，但<color=#f29e38ff>不会封锁周围的区域</color>。
E: Enemies with <color=#f29e38ff>Summoning Abilities</color> will start a countdown based on your actions. When the countdown ends, a non-Elite Enemy will be summoned in an empty area.\nThis enemy will immediately appear, but <color=#f29e38ff>will not lock down the surrounding area</color>.

C: 使用这些能力可以在今古传奇中获得分数及对应奖励，<color=#f29e38ff>《开拓豪侠传》</color>的文段也会逐步解锁。
E: Using these abilities can earn you points and rewards in Legends Past and Present, and will also gradually unlock <color=#f29e38ff>Legend of the Trailblazer</color> sections.

C: 自爆冲击头上有<color=#f29e38ff>特殊标记</color>的敌人时，可以将其<color=#f29e38ff>直接消灭</color>。\n若指定目标被消灭，<color=#f29e38ff>剩余小桶</color>会进入<color=#f29e38ff>究极金形态</color>，立即发动<color=#f29e38ff>【超级自爆冲击】</color>造成高额伤害。
E: When Self-Destructive Impact hits enemies with a <color=#f29e38ff>special mark</color>, the enemy can be <color=#f29e38ff>immediately defeated</color>.\nIf the designated target is defeated, the <color=#f29e38ff>remaining minicans</color> will enter <color=#f29e38ff>Ultra Gold form</color> and immediately deliver <color=#f29e38ff>Super Self-Destructive Impact</color> to deal a great amount of DMG.

C: 拥有对应属性或特性加成的配饰，可以强化武器的效果。

C: 击败<color=#f29e38ff>区域 - 精英</color>或<color=#f29e38ff>区域 - 首领</color>中的敌人后，可以消耗开拓力或使用沉浸器获取包含<color=#f29e38ff>位面饰品</color>在内的沉浸奖励。
E: After defeating enemies in <color=#f29e38ff>Domain - Elite</color> or <color=#f29e38ff>Domain - Boss</color>, you can consume Trailblaze Power or Immersifiers to obtain Immersion Rewards, including <color=#f29e38ff>Planar Ornaments</color>.

C: 位面内存在<color=#f29e38ff>大量可破坏物</color>，敲碎破坏物后可获取<color=#f29e38ff>大量奇物</color>。

C: 【烈毒】层数越高，受到的<color=#f29e38ff>暴击伤害</color>越高；攻击携带<color=#f29e38ff>4层</color>【烈毒】的敌方时，还会对其和相邻目标<color=#f29e38ff>激发持续伤害</color>。

C: 以钟表小子为原型制作的恶灵。无数倒霉的小孩被家长带进影院，只因将它错认为钟表小子系列的电影。其邪典的剧情，也成为了众多人难以忘却的童年阴影。
E: A vengeful spirit modeled after Clockie. Tons of unlucky kids were dragged to the theater by their parents, who mistook it for a Clockie movie. Its twisted plot became a childhood trauma for many.

C: 「纷争」的泰坦，在疯狂中延续疯狂的战争，乃是翁法罗斯众邦挥之不去的恐惧。\n它也曾身负荣耀的威名，令众邦众神心怀敬意。而那敬畏它的城邦被踏碎，那赞颂它的诗篇被焚毁，只有恶名回荡在无光的末世，玷污全世之座背负的光辉。
E: The Titan of Strife continues the mad war in their frenzy, becoming the unconquerable fear of the masses of Amphoreus.\nThey once were famed through glory, earning respect from gods and the people of the land. And yet, the city-states that revered them were sundered, and the poems that praised their name were destroyed. Only their evil reputation lingers in this lightless era and end times, tainting the Throne of Worlds's brilliance.

C: 听说杨叔曾经是秘密组织的首领，拯救过星球，当过老师，还画过动画的原画！哎，简直是外星人了……
E: I heard Mr. Yang was once the leader of a secret organization and saved a whole planet! Not to mention he's been a teacher, and even a storyboard artist! *sigh* He must be an alien or something...

C: 浩瀚如宇宙，它的过去，也由不得自己决定。
E: As vast as the universe is, it cannot change its past.

C: 在帕姆眼里，我一直就是个列车维修工吧。
E: To Pom-Pom, I'll always be the train's mechanic, haha.

C: 他很安全。我知道他有所顾虑…然而丹恒现在是列车组的一员，我和姬子不会让任何人伤害他。
E: He's safe. I know he has his doubts... but he's one of the crew now. Himeko and I won't let anyone harm him.

C: 姬子是那种…会发光的人。虽然我们是在重走列车过去的航路，但只要看到姬子，你就能看到她的梦想在闪光，她仿佛一开始就在列车上，一路驶向她的星穹。
E: Himeko's the kind of person that... gives off her own light. Even though we're traveling across the train's old route, you can see Himeko's dreams flashing before her eyes when you look at her. It's almost as if she's been on the train from the very beginning — always moving starward.

C: 有点意思。
E: Not bad.

C: 该说再见了…
E: Time to say bye. BOOM.

C: 这么快就上钩了。
E: You took the bait just like that?

C: 你不要过来……
E: No, don't...

C: 断开…连接……
E: Connection... lost...

C: 穿山断水！
E: Cleaving the world!

C: 该是休息时间了吧？随便一点。
E: It's about time for a break, no? Let's relax a bit.

C: 时不再至，请助我一臂之力！
E: The time is now. Lend me your strength!

C: 玲宝！准备好了吗？让我们摇滚起来！
E: Ready, Lynxy? Let's rock!

C: 医术又精进了些。
E: A doctor never stops learning.

C: 克拉拉：大家…还好么……
E: Clara: Is everyone... okay...

C: 星核猎手？不熟，没和他们谈过项目。据说那帮人很不好接触，但信用记录倒是意外地良好——比起那些捕风捉影的阴谋论，我更看重的是这一点。
E: Stellaron Hunters? We aren't acquainted. Never worked with them on any projects. Supposedly those guys are hard to get in touch with, but they have an unexpectedly good credit record — which I value far more than any groundless conspiracy theories.

C: 呵…加班加班，我来啦。
E: *yawn* ...Time for overtime.

C: 给我蹭蹭手气吧~
E: I could use some of your luck~

C: 来者是客，还请让小女子略尽地主之谊。
E: Ah, a visitor! Please let me show you some of our local hospitality.

C: 哦，是将军身旁那位机敏的小公子吧？没什么印象……
E: Oh, you mean the young boy? The one who's always by the general? I don't know anything about him...

C: 白花盛放！
E: Abyss Flower, bloom.

C: 若无剑鞘，剑不过是伤人的凶器罢了。十王司便是收敛长生的鞘，自缚于身的枷，评断我等功罪的刑典。
E: A sword without a sheath is nothing more than a lethal weapon. The Ten-Lords Commission is the sheath that reigns in our long lives, the yoke that binds itself to us, and the law by which our merits and sins are judged.

C: 比我快的武器不可胜数，但上千回的交锋后又如何？
E: There are countless weapons sharper than mine, but after a thousand clashes, what does it matter?

C: 我叫素裳，最近刚加入云骑军。你有事儿就和我说吧…虽然，我对「罗浮」也不熟，嘿嘿。
E: I'm Sushang, and I recently joined the Cloud Knights. Talk to me if you have any issues... but I don't know the Luofu very well either, hehe.

C: 人总要有梦想嘛，万一哪天真成了呢！
E: One should always have dreams, you never know, they might actually come true one day!

C: 今天练什么剑？要彦卿陪你么？
E: What kind of sword training will you do today? Do you wish for me to accompany you?

C: 距离达成梦想，还要挥多少次剑呢？
E: How many battles lie between me and my dreams?

C: 我听说云璃小姐剑术了得，本来想将她当作旗鼓相当的对手看待…可她总是对我的宝剑虎视眈眈，我可得小心一点。
E: I heard that Miss Yunli was a great swordmaster, so I thought she'd be a good sparring partner, but... she's always eyeing my sword, so I better be careful.

C: 藿藿笑起来多可爱呀，我的表演可不会让人害怕，就是让人快乐的表演，真想看她多笑笑~
E: Isn't Huohuo's laugh just the cutest? My performances aren't scary — they're uplifting! I can't wait to see her laugh some more~

C: 医不自医……
E: Where's a doctor when you need one...

C: 罪业的气息很重啊…
E: Ugh, the smell of sin is thick...

C: 三思而行，再思可矣。
E: Think thrice, act wise; though oft twice, shall suffice.

C: 我看你资质非凡，要不也试试徒手一回？
E: I see that you have remarkable potential. How about trying a round of hand-to-hand combat?

C: 我将，巡征追猎。
E: I venture forth to hunt.

C: 剑出，山倾！
E: Blade drawn, mountains fall!

C: 锤炼敲打，都被铸进剑身之中。
E: Tempered and forged, all are imbued into the sword

C: 正中死处。
E: Right in the heart of death.

C: 银河中有个自以为是的星神叫「纳努克」，祂竟然认为如果没有祂，银河就不会走向「毁灭」的结局！不好笑吗？好吧，我这里还有个「存护」的版本，要听吗？
E: So, we've got this arrogant Aeon named "Nanook" out there in the cosmos, and THEY genuinely believe that, without THEM, the entire universe wouldn't be headed straight for "Destruction!" Not funny? Okay, wanna hear my "Preservation" version?

C: 玩大了……
E: Done playing for today...

C: 哥哥一直在保护我，但我也没有想过挣脱他的保护…纵使我们走上不同的道路，我也…仍旧是他的妹妹。
E: My brother has always been my protector, and I've never contemplated stepping out of his shadow... Yet even though we may take different paths, I am... still his little sister.

C: 偶尔戴上假发，换个妆容，再戴一副眼镜——这样去哪都不用担心了~
E: Sometimes I just put on a wig, change my makeup, and slip on a pair of glasses – just like that, I can go anywhere without a worry~

C: 她总是埋怨我玩游戏没有策略性，说我一直是：「突突突，砰砰——砰！」就结束了。但我学不会她那招，叫…「逃课」？是我太笨了？
E: She always complains that I don't have any strategy when I play games — that I just go "clank-clank-clank, bang bang!" and it's over. But I can't learn that trick of hers, what's it called again... cheesing? Am I just too stupid?

C: 改悔吧。
E: Seek redemption.

C: 都给我站好了！
E: All of you stand still!

C: 我还以为自己碰上大麻烦了呢。
E: Phew, thought I was a goner there.

C: 居合！
E: Iai!

C: 一直以来，我认为我冲泡的咖啡与高强度科研很是般配。但若和姬子一较高下，未免小巫见大巫了——她在这件事上的想象力，我自叹不如。
E: I've always thought that the coffee I make is fitting for high-intensity scientific research, but Himeko really trumped me on that front — I admit defeat in terms of innovative coffee brewing.

C: 账号找回来了吗，小姑娘？
E: Did you get your accounts back, young lady?

C: 我还会回来……
E: I'll return...

C: 什么东西，还以为大的要来了。
E: Is that it? I was expecting something... bigger.

C: 谎言啊，纤毫毕现。
E: All lies shall be revealed with perfect clarity.

C: 时间不多了，阿雅，我们加快脚步吧！
E: We're running out of time, Agy. Let's hurry!

C: 缇宝：猜谜游戏的时候，*我*还没把谜面念完，缇安和缇宁就把答案说出来啦。\n缇安：刮起大风的时候，*我*还没把眼睛睁开，缇宝和缇宁就开始原地旋转啦！\n缇宁：吃酸苹果的时候，*我*还没开始吐舌头，缇宝和缇安就酸得哇哇乱叫啦。
E: Tribbie: Whenever we play guessing games, before I can even finish reading the question, Trianne and Trinnon have already blurted out the answers.\nTrianne: Whenever the wind blows strong, before I can even open my eyes, Tribbie and Trinnon have already started spinning on the spot!\nTrinnon: Whenever I eat a sour apple, before I can even stick out my tongue, Tribbie and Trianne are already yelling that it's too sour.

C: 强健的体魄、健康的精神，二者都依赖合理的营养摄入。懂得如何处理食材，恰当烹饪，是每一位勇士的必修课。
E: A strong body and a healthy mind both rely on proper nutrition. Knowing how to handle ingredients and cook properly is a lesson every warrior must learn.

C: 战场并非教室，谎言与真理在此各有分量。
E: The classroom is not the battlefield. Lies and truth both have their weight here.

C: 若心中仍有疑惑，请大胆发问。
E: If you still have questions, please speak up.

C: 万物流转，死生有序…终点，也是开始。
E: All things cycle through life and death... The end is also the beginning.

C: 很多人说，她的心空空荡荡，什么都没有。但恰恰是这颗看似空无一物的心，才装得下整个世界的心愿。
E: Many said that her heart is a void, filled with nothing. Yet, this seeming emptiness was needed to encompass the wishes of an entire world.

C: 那刻夏老师每次考试都不划重点，而且还要一对一口试！每逢大考，总有几位同学因脑力透支被送往我这里急救……
E: Professor Anaxa refuses to outline key topics for exams, and insists on one-on-one oral tests! Students inevitably end up in my care every exam season due to mental exhaustion...

C: 能把那位「天才」拉下马，果然不能小看擅长益智游戏的人…有机会好想和她过过招呀。
E: Being able to take down that "genius" just shows you can't underestimate people who are good at games of wit... If I ever get the chance, I'd love to test my wits against her.

C: 心境不同，风景…也与往日相异。
E: When the heart changes, so does the world it sees.

C: 事关生死，无名客不会袖手旁观。
E: When life and death are at stake, the Nameless won't stand idly by.

C: 群星啊，请为英雄闪耀。
E: Countless stars, please shine for the heroes.

E: Is that all?

E: Fracture!

C: 好梦成真！
E: Dreams do come true!

E: This time, we will walk forward together, hand in hand.

C:
・与瓦尔特对峙，黄泉点出了匹诺康尼与「开拓」命途的联系。
・此后，黄泉与瓦尔特一同来到朝露公馆调查「死亡」的真相。
・与列车组会合后，黄泉对瓦尔特的信任表示感谢，称在接下来的对峙中，她会站在星穹列车这边。
・黄泉与列车组一同迎战砂金，并在拔刀后将其斩落。
E:
・ In her confrontation with Welt, Acheron pointed out the connection between Penacony and the Path of Trailblaze.
・ Afterward, Acheron and Welt headed to the Dewlight Pavilion together to investigate the truth behind "Death."
・ After reuniting with the Express Crew, Acheron thanked Welt for his trust, stating that she would stand with the Astral Express in the upcoming confrontation.
・ Acheron and the Express Crew fought against Aventurine, defeating him after she drew her blade.

E: For today's match, I choose you! Go for the win, Chimera!

C: 敌方目标初始拥有<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color>层【韧甲++】，每层使敌方目标受到的伤害降低<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>；敌方目标每次韧性被削减为0时降低1层【韧甲++】。该效果的层数在敌方目标的每个阶段重置。
E: Enemy target initially has <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color> stacks of "Resilient Armor++," and each stack reduces DMG taken by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>. Enemy targets lose 1 stack of "Resilient Armor++" each time their Toughness is reduced to 0. Stacks of this effect will reset at each of the enemy target's phase.

C: 我方角色及其忆灵获得【<u>执念</u>】时，为该角色累计相同层数的充能，充能达到<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color>层后，进入【哀歌】状态。在【哀歌】状态下的我方角色发动攻击后，消耗<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak></color>层充能并对受到攻击的敌方目标造成<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak></color>次等同于角色<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak></color>生命上限的【<u>回味</u>】伤害，消耗到0层时退出该状态。【哀歌】状态下也可累计充能。
E: When an ally character and their memosprite gain "<u>Obsession</u>," they accumulate an equal number of Charge stacks. Upon reaching <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color> stacks, they enter the "Dirge" state. When a character in the "Dirge" state launches an attack, they consume <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak></color> Charge stacks to deal <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak></color> instances of "<u>Aftertaste</u>" DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak></color> of their Max HP to the attacked enemy target. The state ends when Charge stacks reach 0. Charge stacks can still be accumulated while in the "Dirge" state.

E: Obtain the Cosmic Fragment-related Curio "Green Miracle"

E: Obtain #2 Blessing(s) of 1-star rarity, with a small chance to improve skill.

C: 天才俱乐部#3纽尔·伊曼曾在实验室内复刻一颗黑洞，人们猜测她试图弄清「虚无」的本质。三个星期后，她将拟似黑洞改造成棉花糖机，自动向路过的孩子分发糖果，于是人们又猜测她研究的课题其实是「贪饕」。愚者们给出的猜测则简洁明了：或许她只是心血来潮，想要尝尝黑洞的味道。结果做得太多，光靠自己根本吃不完。
E: Genius Society #3 Nyul Iman once recreated a black hole in her laboratory, and people speculated she was seeking the essence of Nihility. Three weeks later, she modified the Synthetic Black Hole into a cotton candy machine that automatically dispensed sweets to passing children, which led onlookers to suspect her true study was Voracity. The Fools offered a simpler hypothesis: perhaps she was just curious about what a black hole might taste like. In the end, she made far too much for one person to ever eat alone.

C: 许多年前风靡翁法罗斯的护肤品。只要轻轻一喷，附着在脸上的金色粉末就能修复皱纹，同时还有美白和保湿的作用。有小道消息称，它的原材料其实来自英雄浴池的顶端，只有黄金裔英雄才能将其带出。而随着那位浴池的女主人神性见长，市面上再也看不到这种护肤品了。
E: Once all the rage in Amphoreus, this skincare product worked wonders with a simple spray: a veil of golden powder that smoothed wrinkles, brightened, and moisturized the skin. Rumors claimed its essence was drawn from the summit of the Hero's Bath, retrievable only by Chrysos Heir heroes. But as the bath's proprietress grew in divinity, such skincare products vanished completely from the market.

C: 身为虚构史学家，思迷非常重视鼓励教育，这或许和他并不愉快的童年有关。为了安抚失意的孩子，他设计了一个独特的「鼓励」容器。每当这个孩童受到夸奖时，「鼓励」之力都会化作实体，以大拇指状火焰的形式呈现在面前；鼓励越多，火焰就会烧得越旺。但当他试图将该创意推广向宇宙时，却受到了不少家长的反对。因为小孩不能玩火。
E: As a History Fictionologist, Thym places great emphasis on encouraging education, which might be related to his not-so-pleasant childhood. To comfort disheartened children, he designed a unique "encouragement" vessel. Whenever a child receives praise, the power of encouragement materializes in front of them as flame shaped as a thumbs-up. The more encouragement received, the brighter the flame burns. However, when he tried to promote this idea across the universe, he faced opposition from many parents. Because children shouldn't play with fire.

E: Sage's Leaf Robe

E: Winterfish Summerherb

E: Absolute Sound Quality

E: When losing a Blessing, gains <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> Cosmic Fragments.

C: 神赐珍宝（其三）
E: Divine Treasures (III)

C: 天赋
E: Talent

C: 造成的伤害提高<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>。
E: DMG dealt increases by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>.

C: 然而它总是，致命美丽
E: And Yet, Always, Deathly Beautiful

C: 「康士坦丝…她不是兄弟姐妹中最年长的，却像我们的长姊。在教导我们时，她的魔尾虽然让人害怕，却从没有伤到我们。」 ——「书吏」的记忆 「我们一同向父亲学习『毁灭』的技艺时，唯有康士坦丝掌握得最快，就像…是在回忆一些早已遗忘的本能。很可怕吧…但她的声音，又是那么温柔。」 ——「枷锁」的记忆 「她会用修长的手指帮我调弦，教我弹拨热烈的旋律。啊…我知道…她的指尖虽然跃动着火焰，但她的心是冷的。」 ——「调音师」的记忆 「康士坦丝…我最具野心的孩子，我最优秀的孩子，她不需要我赐下『毁灭』的火焰，她早已被来自内心深处的火焰点燃。 多么野心勃勃的孩子，但永火官邸喜欢这样的成员。我毫不怀疑，有一天她也会玩腻泯灭帮的把戏，到那时，恩主一定会朝她张开双臂，只因最暴烈的毁灭才能令祂欣喜……」 ——冥火大公的记忆 暮雨降临的那夜，卡翠娜、杜布拉、阿卡什——他们在火中不知所踪。 喜爱焚烧的魔女却并未将府邸的废墟付之一炬，而是将余烬中的记忆收殓—— 「父亲啊，为你的死亡祭奠——我会成为美梦下阴燃的火焰，将贪恋的一切拥入怀中。」 虚无的雨幕之下，谁也看不清她的表情，她是在微笑，啜泣，抑或……
E: "Constance... though not the eldest among the siblings, she was like our big sister. When teaching us, her tail was intimidating, but it never harmed us." — The Scribe's memory "When we learned the skills of 'Destruction' from Father together, Constance was the only one who mastered them the fastest, as if... she was recalling some long-forgotten instincts. Scary, isn't it... yet her voice remained so gentle." — The Shacklebound's memory "With her slender fingers, she would tune my strings and teach me to pluck passionate melodies. Ah... I know... though flames dance at her fingertips, her heart remains cold." — The Tuner's memory "Constance... my most ambitious and most excellent child. She needs not the flames of Destruction bestowed by me. She has long been ignited by the flames deep within her heart. Such prodigious ambitions. The Ever-Flame Mansion favors members like her. I have no doubt that one day she'll grow tired of the Annihilation Gang's games. When that time comes, our Master will welcome her with open arms, for only the most violent destruction brings THEM joy..." — Duke Inferno's memory On the night when twilight rain fell, Caterina, Dubra, Akash... they vanished in the flames. Yet she who is partial to conflagration did not set the mansion ruins ablaze, but gathered the memories from the embers... "Father, for your death I shall mourn. I will become the smoldering flame beneath sweet dreams, embracing all that yearns." Under the curtain of Nihility's rain, no one could make out her expression. Was she smiling, sobbing, or perhaps...

C: 她的长梦值得拥有更美好的结局，当遗憾业已存在，它也将弥补的机会永永远远地交到了你的手中。
E: Her long dream deserves a better ending. While the regret already exists, she has forever placed the chance to make things right in your hands.

C: 避免{NICKNAME}沾染虚无
E: Prevent {NICKNAME} from being tainted by Nihility

C: 追忆：「太一之梦」
E: Recollection: "Ena's Dream"

C: （可选）就此离开
E: (Optional) Leave from here

C: 反正，跟「剧本」说的一样，不管用什么办法潜入，你一定会被发现。
E: Anyway, just like the "script" says: no matter how you sneak in, you'll be found out.

C: 我就说…你怎么会觉得梦里很普通。现在呢？怎么样了？
E: I told you... Dreams are never as simple as they seem. How about now?

C: （除我以外，还有人在这里。）
E: (That there's someone else here besides me.)

C: 那时，你刚刚抵达匹诺康尼，正在酒店办理入住。
E: You had just arrived in Penacony at that time and were checking in at the hotel.

C: 行了，滚吧。让我来处理。
E: Well, just get out of my way and I'll take care of this.

C: 认识我的人太多，直接跟上去恐怕不合适。
E: Too many people know me. It wouldn't be wise to follow them so openly.

C: 抱歉，舒翁女士。如果有时间，我们本该好好聊聊的……
E: Sorry, Lady Siobhan. If there was more time, we could have had a proper chat...

C: 那我们岂不是……
E: Then aren't we...

C: 我们有过一次短暂的告别…但我没有阻止她，我做不到。离开格拉默帝国，本身就会让她迅速失去生命。
E: We had a brief farewell... but I didn't stop her, I couldn't... Leaving the Glamoth Empire itself would quickly drain her life away.

C: 「再度登神」——就算{RUBY_B#黄泉}她{RUBY_E#}是一位令使，也不应该……
E: "Ascends to godhood once more"... even if {RUBY_B#Acheron}she{RUBY_E#}'s an Emanator, she shouldn't...

C: 嗯，他说自己看清了第四种命运，不会再有其他意外。他也将我选为了「最后的幸存者」，就像{NICKNAME}那样。
E: Yes, he said he saw the fourth fate clearly, and there won't be any more surprises. He also chose me as the "Last Survivor," just like {NICKNAME}.

C: 「…轮不到她出场████我一人便足够…」
E: "She won't be necessary ████ I alone am enough."

C: 或许会迷失在忆域的乱流中，别担心，她大有来头，只会被暂时困住而已。
E: She might get lost in the Memory Zone's turbulence, but don't worry, she's quite something. She'll only be stuck there temporarily.

C: 原来如此。不是永火官邸的一员，也绝非星核猎手，你真正的盟友，是「梦主」本人？
E: I see. Not a member of the Ever-Flame Mansion, and definitely not a Stellaron Hunter... Your true ally is the Dreammaster?

C: 总比没人邀请更好，这位热心助人的女士。
E: Still better than having no invites at all, my dear helpful lady.

C: 家族发现了这一特性，巧加利用，让客人初次入梦时，能被送入不同的时刻。
E: The Family discovered this trait and cleverly utilized it, allowing guests to be sent to different Hours upon their first dream entry.

C: 我到处找你，就为了给你剧透这个。
E: I've been looking everywhere for you just to give you this spoiler.

C: 他想用来警醒自己吗？
E: Was he trying to warn himself?

C: 为时已晚，孩子。指针已然落于子夜，抬起头来，目视群星——知道它们因何而残忍吗？
E: Too late, child. The hands of time have struck midnight. Look up at the stars. Do you know why they are so cruel?

C: 我知我罪，敬请降罚。
E: I know my sins. Please bestow your punishment.

C: 我将拨开你眼前的阴翳，使你再度直视那予取予求的伟力，敬拜三重面相降下的仁慈——
E: I shall clear the shadows before your eyes, so that you may once again behold that almighty force that giveth and taketh, and worship the mercy bestowed by the Triple Face...

C: 我想…「秩序」的目的并不是让所有人陷入沉睡。正相反，他们利用星核，是为了催化阿斯德纳的忆质渗入物质世界，让「梦境」与「现实」交融。
E: I don't think... the goal of the Order was to put everyone into a deep sleep. Quite the contrary — they used the Stellaron to catalyze the leakage of Asdana's memoria into the material world, allowing the Dreamscape to blend with reality.

C: 一定有反击的手段。
E: There must be a way to counter him.

C: 哎呀，真了不起，你还真的自己醒过来啦？
E: Impressive! You really woke up on your own!

C: 实话说，我根本用不着来找你的，但谁叫花火大人心地善良呢？我杀过你一次，想给你个机会找回场子。
E: Honestly, I don't even need to find you, but I am just sooo kind. I've already killed you once to give you a chance to regain your home field advantage.

C: 该取舍的时候，现实可由不得你。难道你还想再来一遍「同谐」一视同仁的笑话？
E: When it's time to make a sacrifice, reality won't be giving you any choices. Or do you want to replay the old joke about the Harmony treating everyone the same?

C: 其实，原因是我觉得萤火虫很美。后来有人告诉我，那只是因为我的眼睛机能不够，否则就会发现，它们其实一点也不漂亮。
E: It was also because I thought fireflies were beautiful. Later, someone told me that my eyes don't actually work very well. Otherwise, I would have figured out that those insects aren't beautiful at all.

C: 我不愿面对死亡，也不想再继续战斗。但在命运面前……
E: I'm unwilling to face death, nor do I want to keep fighting. But when faced with destiny...

C: 大多命途会使人认为，这世界是美好的——只要你愿意「相信」，就能因相信本身得到力量。
E: Most Paths make people believe that this world is good. That as long as you are willing to "believe," you would gain power because of your belief.

C: 它与美好断然无关…相信也好，盲信也罢，人们从「信念」中获得力量，应当发自内心，而不是被迫低头。
E: It has nothing to do with good... Be it willing or blind, the way people obtain strength from "faith" should come from within, not from being forced to bow their heads.

C: 瓦尔特•杨
E: Welt Yang

C: 它并非艾利欧，而是「末王」的一缕神躯。
E: This cat is not Elio, but a strand of Terminus's divine corpus.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>你能看见这只黑猫，说明「末王」正在与你擦肩而过。其中一只的力量无法改变太多事，但你的过去，却是末王的未来。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>The fact that you can see this black cat means Terminus is in the process of passing by you. The power of only one black cat cannot change much, but your past is Terminus's future.</color>

C: …我能知道原因吗？
E: ...May I know why?

C: 还好这是梦境的世界，康士坦丝将所有的「无」承接到了自己身上，全部烧却了。
E: Thankfully, this is the world within the dreamscape. Constance took all the "naught" upon herself and burned it away completely.

C: 我们就去看烟花吧！
E: Let's go watch the fireworks!

C: 你已经看到了啊，笨蛋！
E: You've already seen it, you dummy!

C: 她就要走到失熵的尽头，思维已然先一步支离破碎。
E: She is nearing the end stage of the Entropy Loss, her mind already splintered first.

C: 你谦逊地拒绝了这份力量。浓云褪去，柔和的月光倾泻而下。当你睁开眼时，神赐珍宝已然消失，有些东西留在了你的脚边。
E: You humbly decline this power. The thick clouds disperse as gentle moonlight pours down. When you open your eyes, the divine treasure has vanished, but something is left at your feet.

C: 你是说…迈入色彩缤纷的幻想世界，和剧中人一起欢笑，一起哭泣？
E: So you mean... stepping into a colorful world of fantasy, laughing and crying together with the characters?

C: 多喝苏乐达。
E: Drink more SoulGlad.

C: 什么事也不在乎…
E: I don't care about anything...

C: 同为盛放星核的容器，你简直与它们油然而生了惺惺相惜之情。
E: Being a fellow vessel for Stellarons, you can't help but feel a kindred spirit with them.

C: 阴谋与论辩、创造与死亡，以及抵押生命也要完成的宏伟志愿…你仿佛才刚亲眼目睹，但已是前尘旧事。
E: Conspiracies and disputations, creation and death, and grand aspirations worth betting one's life on... Though it feels like you just witnessed it all, it's already become a tale of the past.

C: 预言中的奇美拉训练家是吧？
E: So you're the prophesied chimera trainer, huh?

C: 也是有样学样了。
E: Just following your lead.

C: 如果不知道接下来要做什么，可以在这里查看<color=#f29e38ff>攻略</color>。
E: If you're not sure what to do next, view the <color=#f29e38ff>guide</color> here.

C: 灰宝可以保存刚才使用的阵容啦。
E: Grayie, you can now save the lineup you just used.

C: 活动未开放
E: Event Unavailable

C: 本期不再提示
E: Do not show again within this period

C: 战技•一
E: Skill 1

C: 一旦得手，就略显无趣呀。
E: Winning takes out all the fun.
